- (Ohh, right, so he really was a Locust. But wait, why's he standing on that side...?) ｜ （对哦，原来他真的是蚱蜢派的人啊，但是他为什么现在站在那边…）

- Everyone has faith in Dr. Baizhu's medical skills. He's the right guy to go to when you can't figure out what's wrong with you. Oh... the rumors, you say? The only one that I know for a fact is true is how disgusting his medicine tastes. It's not just the kids who find it bitter, it's left me with some horrible memories, too! ｜ 白术先生的医术备受居民的信赖，如果有什么疑难杂症，去找他肯定不会有错。你说…那些奇怪的传闻？我只知道有一件事是真的，他开的药，确实特别苦，不止是小孩子觉得…给我都留下了很深刻的印象。

- Help Needed:\nI have tried every single delicacy in Inazuma, and I have yet to find a dish that moves me!\nPerhaps it is true that one simply cannot find true gourmet in some prosperous city, and that fine cuisine may only be found in the countryside...\nMy obsession with good food may seem difficult for the common man to understand, I know. Haha, it is alright. Let me put this simply: I would like <color=#3399CC>5 Teyvat Fried Eggs</color>.\nWho knows? I might just encounter a fabulous chef this way. And as for the remuneration... we'll speak of that again once I've eaten. ｜ 求助：\n稻妻城中的美食我都尝遍了，竟然找不到一份能打动我的料理。\n或许繁华的城市中反而找不到美食，真正的佳肴只存在于乡野中…\n我对料理的执着常人很难理解吧，呵呵，算了算了，简单点说就是：我要<color=#3399CC>五份提瓦特煎蛋</color>。\n说不定这样反而能邂逅厉害的厨师，至于报酬…吃完再说。

Once everything's settled down in Natlan, of course.\n<color=#37FFFF>Paimon</color>: Paimon can't wait to get a taste of the Pyro Archon's cooking! ｜ #<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>没想到火神居然是从「归火圣夜巡礼」中选出来的！\n<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>如果我打赢比赛的话，是不是也有机会成为新的火神呢？\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}：</color>哦？派蒙很有自信嘛。\n<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>哼哼，不要小看我哦，其实我已经领教过许多神明的「招式」了。\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}：</color>什么？\n<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>比如传说中的真·风神杂烩菜、文火慢炖腌笃鲜、哈瓦玛玛兹、「普茹斯蒂司」…\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}：</color>原来是烹饪招式啊！\n<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>没错，我提议等纳塔迎来和平后，在归火圣夜巡礼中也加入烹饪对决！\n<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>我已经迫不及待想领教火神的「火力」啦。

- <color=#D3BC8EFF>Peculiar Wonderland: Overview</color>\nDuring the event period, challenge the Peculiar Wonderland to win Peculiar Collab Coupons, which can be used to purchase items in the event shop.\nNo coupons will be awarded for abandoned challenges.\n\n<color=#D3BC8EFF>Peculiar Wonderland: Peculiar Conqueror</color>\nComplete tasks in Peculiar Conqueror to win additional rewards.\n\n<color=#D3BC8EFF>How to Unlock & Event Phases</color>\nComplete the quest "Peculiar Wonderland" to unlock the Peculiar Wonderland.\nAdditionally, after the Windblume Festival begins, more activities will appear in the Peculiar Wonderland as the event progresses, including Peculiar Challenges, Peculiar Trials, and Peculiar Conqueror tasks. ｜ <color=#D3BC8EFF>【奇趣秘园·简介】</color>\n活动期间，旅行者可以挑战「奇趣秘园」，获得用以兑换活动商店道具所需的「奇趣协力劵」。\n若中途放弃挑战，则无法获得「奇趣协力劵」。\n\n<color=#D3BC8EFF>【奇趣秘园·奇趣征服】</color>\n完成「奇趣征服」中的项目，可以获取额外的奖励。\n\n<color=#D3BC8EFF>【奇趣秘园·解锁与阶段】</color>\n完成任务「奇趣秘园」后，将解锁「奇趣秘园」。\n此外，风花节活动开始后，奇趣秘园中会随时间涌现出新的「奇趣挑战」、「奇趣试炼」，与「奇趣征服」项目。

- Rice, meat, and dried nuts, mixed with some yogurt and roasted together... what a wonderful mix of flavors. You can feel the aroma seeping out with the steam as you cut into the crispy outside. It doesn't even take very long to make, definitely my favorite dish. ｜ 大米与肉类、干果混合，加酸奶进行烤制，不同的香味会混合到一起。敲开焦脆的外壳，香味就会随着蒸腾的热气一同冒出来。制作起来也不会花太长时间，是我很喜欢的菜肴。

- As clan head of the Kamisato Clan, one of the great clans of the Tri-Commission, Kamisato Ayato is a household name in Inazuma.\nHowever, people do not have quite the same clear impression of him as they do of the Shirasagi Himegimi, the elegant and kind Ayaka.\nMost only know that he is an important figure in the Shogunate and the head of a famed noble house. But as for the details, there's little that they can say for sure.\nSome people say that "the Yashiro Commission's festivals and events are ever meticulous and have been full of consideration for the people. Surely the Commissioner's hand is in all such matters."\nBut others also say "ah, but there is much to politics that should never see the light of day. And how could he have kept such a lofty position without a few tricks up his sleeve, hmm?"\nAyato himself is unfazed by such comments.\n"Well, I consider myself merely a serious, dutiful public servant who owes his allegiance to the Almighty Shogun." ｜ 身为三奉行之一——社奉行神里家的家主，神里绫人的名号在稻妻可谓无人不知、无人不晓。\n但不同于优雅善良的「白鹭公主」绫华，人们对她的兄长绫人的认知并不清晰。\n人们只知道他是幕府的大人物，是贵族名门的家主，一旦问及细节，却都支支吾吾说不明白。\n有人说：「社奉行办起祭典和活动向来一丝不苟，又对邻里乡亲多有关照，其中一定少不了奉行大人的辛苦劳作。」\n但也有人肆意评论：「嘁，官场上见不得人的事情多的是。若不是懂些暗度陈仓的伎俩，怎么能当得上大官呢。」\n对上述种种说法，神里绫人本人似乎不甚在意。\n「我么…只是将军大人麾下一名认真工作、履行职责的公务人员罢了。」
- Wet environments and Hydro Attacks can cause beings to become <color=#FFE14BFF>affected by Hydro</color>. When Hydro meets other elements, it often triggers an <color=#FFE14BFF>Elemental Reaction</color>. ｜ 某些环境与水元素属性的攻击，可能会使生物<color=#FFE14BFF>附着水元素</color>。水元素与其他元素交汇时，也可能会引发<color=#FFE14BFF>「元素反应」</color>…

- After using an Elemental Burst, all party members on the field will unleash one shockwave that scales on 600% of the ATK of the character that unleashed that shockwave, and which deals DMG to nearby opponents. This effect can occur once every 2s and its CD is shared between all characters in the party. ｜ 施放元素爆发后，场上所有角色都将各自释放一次冲击波，基于释放冲击波的角色的攻击力的600%，对附近的敌人造成伤害。该效果每2秒至多触发一次，队伍中所有角色共享冷却。

- My name is Yanfei, top legal expert in Liyue — and for the avoidance of doubt, no one else comes close! From commercial litigation, to civil mediation, to criminal lawsuits, I'm fully versed in every area of the law, and I guarantee you a swift and satisfactory conclusion to your case! My contact details... Where should I write this down? ...Hmm, paper will just get lost, and it'll only rub off if I write it on the back of your hand, so... Aha! I know, I'll just write it here, on the clothes of this... whatever this thing is that follows you around. ｜ 我叫烟绯，是璃月港最顶尖的律法专家，没有之一！商业纠纷、民事调解、刑事诉讼，样样精通，一出手就搞得定！我的联系方式…要给你记在哪里好呢？唔…记在纸上容易丢，记在手上容易糊掉…哦！有了，就写在你旁边这个小家伙的衣服上吧。

- #Don't worry, Ann. {NICKNAME}'s really reliable — and really good with a wind glider, too! ｜ #安，不用担心！{NICKNAME}很可靠的，而且，很会用风之翼！
- A fossilized bone fragment sometimes found after defeating Geovishap Hatchlings. Geovishap Hatchlings all dream of growing into great dragons one day. They see these fossils as dragon bones and greatly cherish them, perhaps because they too hope to attain the dragons' longevity and power. ｜ 击败幼龙蜥后有时能找到的石化骨片。幼龙蜥都梦想着成长为真正的龙。会把古老的化石认作是龙之骨而加以珍惜，或许是因为希冀着龙的永恒与强大吧。
- Increases DMG against slimes by <color=#99FFFFFF>60%</color>. ｜ 对史莱姆类敌人造成的伤害增加<color=#99FFFFFF>60%</color>。
- Help Needed:\nI want to make Daddy a flower garland!\nDaddy says that he'll be back soon, and I want to make a garland for him.\nI've already made most of the garland... but I wanna use some Silk Flowers to decorate it.\nIf there's someone who doesn't mind helping, please find me <color=#3399CC>three Silk Flowers</color>. ｜ 求助：\n我想给爸爸编个花环！\n爸爸的信里说，他马上就要回来了，我想要编个花环送给他。\n花环的大部分我都编好了…但是我还想要用霓裳花做些点缀。\n如果有人愿意帮忙的话，就请帮我去搜集<color=#3399CC>三朵霓裳花</color>吧。

- Well, I can tell you that it's very expensive. He sold a lot of assets to purchase it back in the day. ｜ 我知道那破玩意儿很贵，当初为了买它，萨齐因变卖了好些产业。
- Disappeared, Pahsiv! ｜ 无影踪，珀西芙！
- Sorry, it was an accident... ｜ 一不小心就…
- You must be quite the chef! ｜ 瓦雷莎对烹饪有造诣？
- But all my efforts proved to be futile in the end. Really, the truth has been clear to me for a very long time... ｜ 可这一切终究无济于事，在许多许多年之前，我便认清楚了这个现实。
- After triggering Burning, Quicken, Aggravate, Spread, Bloom, Hyperbloom, or Burgeon, a Leaf of Consciousness will be created around the character for a maximum of 10s. When picked up, the Leaf will grant the character <color=#99FFFFFF>75</color> Elemental Mastery for 12s. Only 1 Leaf can be generated this way every 20s. This effect can still be triggered if the character is not on the field. The Leaf of Consciousness' effect cannot stack. ｜ 触发燃烧、原激化、超激化、蔓激化、绽放、超绽放或烈绽放后，将在角色周围产生至多存在10秒的「种识之叶」。拾取种识之叶的角色元素精通提升<color=#99FFFFFF>75</color>点，持续12秒。每20秒至多通过这种方式产生一枚种识之叶。角色处于队伍后台时也能触发。种识之叶的效果无法叠加。
- Maximize your resources and try to use all your Elemental Dice each Round ｜ 合理分配资源，尽量每回合用完元素骰

- Why do you ask? We definitely can't use them to forcefully get more evidence for your father's case. ｜ 但你问这个要干什么，想借去暴力取证的话，那可不行。
- Oh? If you don't mind, why don't you tell me about it first? ｜ 哦？不介意的话，可否先跟我聊一聊？
- #{NICKNAME}! So glad to see you. What luck! ｜ #{NICKNAME}！我真高兴能在这里见到你，真是太巧了！

- Hehe, Paimon's getting excited too! ｜ 好期待！
- This wondrous crystal contains a certain rhythm, like something beautiful woven from delicate silk. These items can be found throughout the mainland or from merchants who collect curios. The tune held within this crystal can be revivified in your Serenitea Pot using either "Euphonium Unbound: Winding" or "Euphonium Unbound: Soaring." The tune contained within this Radiant Spincrystal is "Sorrows of Strays." ｜ 蕴含着韵律的奇妙结晶，宛如细腻丝绸编织而成的美玉。零星散布在大陆各地，或是寻觅珍奇的商人手中。通过「尘歌壶」中的「千籁至音·飖扬」或「千籁至音·缪绕」，可以还原记录在其中的旋律。当前「旋曜玉帛」中蕴含的旋律为「潸怅的幽影」。

- Don't worry about that, Rana, you need to rest! ｜ 别想这些有的没的，拉娜你好好休息一会！
- Catching your enemy off-guard! ｜ 乘虚而入。
- Now, now, don't worry! That's the traditional interpretation, but people just assumed that because the Lone Butterfly sacrificed herself. ｜ 哎呀，放心放心，之所以大家会这么认为，是因为传说中的幽蝶仙子因此而牺牲。
- But be ready, for once I have peered into this dark dominion and beheld the treachery within, I shall rain down Thundering Retribution upon this place... ｜ 待我看透这幽暗时空中的诡谲动向，向此间降下圣裁之雷时…
- But though I wrote it down, I'm not very familiar with the way in which local interact, so I haven't dared to ask them. ｜ 虽然是记下来了，但我不太熟悉本地人的交流方式，就一直没有敢去问他们。
- Hello, my friend. You want to talk? ｜ 嗯？想随便聊聊吗，朋友。
- <color=#D3BC8EFF>Challenge {0}: Smash 'n' Bash</color>\n\n<color=#D3BC8EFF>Challenge Rules</color>\n1. Attack the <color=#FFCC33FF>Explosive Rocks</color> to smash them and score points. You score 1 point for smashing normal Explosive Rocks, and 3 points for smashing Explosive Rocks with special effects. Reach the target score to complete the challenge.\n2. Destroying Transverse Explosive Rocks will also blow up a whole row of rocks.\n3. Destroying Big Explosive Rocks will also destroy all the rocks on the field.\n4. Destroying Mighty Rocks will give all party members an increased ability to smash Explosive Rocks and restore their Stamina for a short duration.\n\n<color=#D3BC8EFF>Trial Character</color>\nNoelle \n\n\n ｜ <color=#D3BC8EFF>挑战{0} 轰轰岩块大消除</color>\n\n<color=#D3BC8EFF>【挑战规则】</color>\n1.多次攻击<color=#FFCC33FF>「轰轰岩块」</color>可以将其打碎并获取积分，击碎普通轰轰岩块获得1分，击碎有特殊效果的轰轰岩块获得3分，达到目标积分时玩法挑战成功。\n2.「横爆岩块」被击碎时，将炸碎一横排的全部岩块。\n3.「大裂岩块」被击碎时，将炸碎场地中的全部岩块。\n4.「增幅岩块」被击碎时，短时间内全队角色击碎「轰轰岩块」的能力会获得强化，并为全队回复体力。\n\n<color=#D3BC8EFF>【试用角色】</color>\n诺艾尔\n\n\n

- Recently, Watatsumi Island has been looking for ways to increase transportation efficiency. Basically, this means improving the operations of our cargo ships. So, we decided to send teams across Teyvat to learn about the most advanced techniques different nations have to offer. ｜ 最近海祇岛在改进货船的工艺，提升运输物资的效率。为此，我们派出了多个访问团，前往各国学习最先进的生产技术。

- Wow... this Xiao Lantern looks amazing, how did they paint it... ｜ 哇…这个霄灯真好看，这是怎么画的呀…
- If you ever have the chance to go, you'll see what I mean. But just stick to having a look. You don't want to stay too long. ｜ 如果你之后有机会去教令院，可以自己去体验一下，不过…体验归体验，别在那呆太久了。
- *sigh* That's true, but she definitely only offered us some so she could go find somewhere to cry for a little while. ｜ 哎，说是这么说，她肯定是去找地方哭了。
- Actually, I also have a more... personal request. ｜ 另外还有一个…比较个人的请求。
- How's your older brother? ｜ 关于你的兄长…
- Alright, then. Let us begin. ｜ 好了。那么，开始吧。

- We... accept our punishment. ｜ 可以…开始行刑了。

- An apex predator deep in the desert that can use the power of Anemo to a certain extent, which allows it to leave the ground when in combat and enter a floating state. While floating, it can fire Windbite Bullets. If these bullets are not destroyed in time, they will be converted into a high-density curtain of such bullets. <color=#FFE14BFF>Attacks from elements that may react with Anemo</color> can destroy Windbite Bullets, which will temporarily decrease the corresponding Elemental RES of the Setekh Wenut. After 2 Windbite Bullets are destroyed in succession, the Setekh Wenut will be brought down from its floating state. ｜ 沙漠深处的顶级掠食者，在一定程度上能操使风元素的力量，并能据此在面对强敌时离开地面，进入浮游状态。在浮游时，将排出多个「风蚀弹」。未能及时破坏的话，风蚀弹将转化为密集的风蚀弹幕。<color=#FFE14BFF>能与风元素反应的元素类型的攻击</color>可以破坏风蚀弹，并在一段时间内降低风蚀沙虫对应的元素抗性。连续破坏两枚风蚀弹后，将击落浮游中的风蚀沙虫。

- Good. Like I said — I like it when others have misconceptions of me. ｜ 我说了，这是一件好事。

- I'm Xi'er, from Chihu Rock in Liyue. My job is eating! Wait, no, there's a word for it... Gourmet! I'm a professional gourmet. ｜ 我是家住璃月吃虎岩的喜儿，工作是吃饭！啊不对，应该说叫什么来着…美、美食家！

- Do you think all of those Onikabuto together would be a match for my one? Here's a picture, let me know what you think. ｜ 那些鬼兜虫全部加起来，有我这一只厉害吗？请看看这张画片吧。

- Preliminary data fragment sorting complete. For the following 15 reasons, Oceanid Ann, I assess that your perspective is illogical. Firstly— ｜ 碎片数据的初步整理已经完成。纯水精灵·安，基于以下十五个理由，我认为您的观点存在不合理之处。首先——
- 1-Hit DMG|{param1:F1P} ｜ 一段伤害|{param1:F1P}
- Something to Share ｜ 有什么想要分享…
- Companion: Overtime Performance ｜ 伙伴·加时演出
- ... ｜ ……
- Go to the seaside to look for The Knave ｜ 去附近的海边寻找「仆人」
- Paimon ｜ 派蒙
- Serious ｜ 认真
- Though many in Liyue are fascinated by life in Yujing Terrace, its day-to-day operations and rules are a mystery to them.\nThey are aware that the Liyue Qixing are the cream of the crop who hold the fate of the city in their hands, but the calculations and data behind the Qixing's every decision are far harder to grasp.\nThe people understand that the new policies announced each year will change the dynamics of the market, yet none can comprehend how policy is plucked from complex meeting minutes and compiled into something easier on the human eye.\nAs the secretary of Yuehai Pavilion, Ganyu undertakes many tasks that ordinary folk do not see.\nFor those that have witnessed her standing by the dock at daybreak, enjoying her breakfast in silence, it is difficult to imagine her in such a post.\nEven still, by the time the sun has fully risen, she will have returned to Yuehai Pavilion overlooking Yujing Terrace, to continue to fulfill her contract.\nA contract that she signed three thousand years ago with Rex Lapis. ｜ 在璃月，百姓们大多对「玉京台」的生活心驰神往，对其中的运转规则却知之甚少。\n人们知道「璃月七星」是人中翘楚，掌握着城市的命脉。但他们很难了解，每个决议背后的数据支撑，是如何建立起来的。\n人们知道每一年新颁布的条例都会给市场带来全新的变数，却不知道它们是怎样从繁杂的会议纪要中被摘录出来，逐渐整编成为晓畅的文字的。\n甘雨，「月海亭」的秘书，承担了诸多世人看不见的工作。\n纵然世人得知甘雨的地位，恐怕他们也很难将「月海亭」的秘书与破晓时分站在码头上、安静享用早点的少女联系起来。\n但在旭日东升之前，她一定会重新回到高踞玉京台之上的月海亭，继续完成她的「契约」。\n——那是远在三千年前，她与「岩王帝君」签订的契约。
- The aftertaste is much purer than what I have delivered to me in Fontaine. It stands to reason that the long-distance transport has a tendency to imbue the water with extraneous emotion... ｜ 回味比之前运到枫丹的那些要更纯粹。由此可见，长途运输也会让水在一路上掺杂其他的思绪…
- I'll check out the shallow waters. ｜ 我去浅水区。
- Sasano ｜ 笹野
- From this angle, you can see more clearly just how high up that hot air balloon is... I wish I knew whose it was. ｜ 从这边看过去，那只热气球飞得可真高啊…到底是谁放的？
- The secret the Fortress of Meropide has been protecting is the entrance to the Primordial Sea. Though Neuvillette has sealed it once more, just how long will it last? ｜ 梅洛彼得堡一直守护的秘密竟是原始胎海的入口，尽管那维莱特再次将它封印，但又能坚持多久呢？
- Amber, if you are ever required to partner with Bennett in your future work and you encounter anything like this again, do not take any rash action. Wait for me and I will come to support you. ｜ 安柏，以后如果你遇到必须跟班尼特搭档的工作，碰上类似情况可别轻举妄动，等我支援。
- A relaxed pose. ｜ 放松的姿势。
- Nightwatcher's Candlelight ｜ 「更巡的烛火」
- Flip ｜ 翻转
- Alpha Pose ｜ 叉腰
- I guess Paimon really is quite small... ｜ 派蒙的确很小只…
- A detailed step-by-step blueprint for making a "Storage 101."\nAfter using this item, you can view it in the Creation Screen. ｜ 步骤详实的图纸，记载着「『存储的规则』」的制作方法。\n使用后可进入制作界面查看。
- *sigh* I do hope she likes my gift, though... ｜ 唉，要是我做的这些礼物能让她喜欢就好了。
- I've met her once a long time ago. We're not that familiar, but I've heard stories about her. ｜ 很久以前见过一次，不算熟悉，但对她的事迹有所耳闻。
- You're interested? Alright, I think they were... ｜ 你感兴趣吗？我记得应该在…
- Interesting Things ｜ 感兴趣的见闻…
- No worries, Aragaru got this! Aragaru can use Kusava to crack the rock open. ｜ 别急，让我来吧！用「苦舍桓」让大石头裂开吧！
- So this is what you're truly capable of? Then I shall have to get serious if I wish to catch up with you. ｜ 你的真正实力居然有如此地步吗？看来我不认真的话还无法跟上你了。
- See you. ｜ 再见。
- All right! Come again! ｜ 好，慢行，欢迎下次帮衬啊。
- CD|{param5:F1}s ｜ 冷却时间|{param5:F1}秒
- It's been... More than twenty years. I've suffered for over twenty years since the day you left... ｜ 已经…二十多年了吧，从你离开的那天开始，我已经煎熬了二十多年了。
- I... I'm just here to write a thesis. How in the world did I end up locked up again... ｜ 呜…我就是想写一篇论文，怎么又被关起来了…
- Every time I'm finished... answering nature's call, I collect all the "fertilizer" and spread it on my fields... ｜ 每次排泄完呢，把自己留下的「肥料」收集起来，堆在田里…
- Explain? I'm not gonna be their scapegoat. I have a lot of research on my hands, and my time cannot be wasted on them. ｜ 解释？我才不给他们做替罪羊呢。我还有很多研究要做，绝不能浪费时间。
- Oh, yeah, totally! It was, um... What was it again? ｜ 原来的目的…？——啊！完全忘了！
- *sigh* What am I going to do with you... ｜ 你啊你啊，唉怎么说你好…
- The long-fated rebellion has begun. Why not take your place at the banquet and join those who shall feast? ｜ 反抗的命运早已揭开帷幕。为何不来到席间，成为欢庆的一份子呢？
- Definitely a fork! To represent Paimon's lifelong mission to taste all the delicious food in the whole world! ｜ 肯定是叉子！代表吃遍全世界的好吃的！
- Mposo ｜ 恩波索
- You're welcome. See ya! ｜ 别客气啦，再见！
- But as the magic-makers and stars of the show, I think I should leave the final performance to you. ｜ 你们是舞台的聚焦点，也是魔术的创作者，最后的表演还是要交给你们才行嘛。
- Sayu makes herself gobble the two dishes up. ｜ 早柚又勉强自己吃下了两份料理。
- Hah, Mora is the least of my concerns. Besides, we're definitely due a meal after all the time we've spent together. Let me get this one — I might be an old hag, but I like to think I'm not completely useless. ｜ 哈，钱算什么。看在一起走了不少路的份上，让我来吧。给无聊的老婆婆一个请客的机会。
- A woodcarving torso with hands modeled after the claws of the Rishboland Tiger. It can be used to assemble an "Aranara Carving." It is painted blue and reminds people of a forest stream.\nRishboland Tigers often appear in the wilds of Sumeru. Their witty, brave, and curious behaviors are often portrayed in fairy tales. The woodcarving torso reminds people of Aranara who are as lively and energetic as Rishboland Tigers. ｜ 双手模仿长鬓虎爪的木刻躯干，可用于组装「兰那罗木刻」。以颜料涂制成蓝色，让人联想起林中的溪流。\n长鬓虎是须弥野外的常见野兽，因为种种习性，它们在童话里总是机智、勇敢、富有好奇心。而这种木刻躯干，塑造的就是那些行为与长鬓虎类似，比较好动活泼的兰那罗。
- Are you a miner, then? ｜ 你是矿工吗？
- Let's go. There are a few people I want to introduce you to. ｜ 走吧，我带你去见几个人。
- A member of a loosely-organized mercenary corps from the golden desert sands. Will work for anyone as long as the pay is good.\nA professional mercenary who cares about nothing outside of work and the mission at hand. To such people, their only game plan is to complete the mission, and their high asking prices on the market match that committment.\nAn ominous, fragmented spirit is sealed within the weapon they use, awakening in moments of peril. Once it does, it can only be silenced by the cries of the vanquished — whether that be its wielder, or its wielder's foe. ｜ 来自黄金一般的沙漠，是松散佣兵团体中的一员。为了报酬，愿意为任何人效力。\n对职责与任务之外的一切事宜漠不关心的职业佣兵。将完成委托作为唯一的行动纲领，在佣兵市场上的要价也是最高的。\n使用的武器中封印着残破的厄灵，会在危急时苏醒。只有战败者的哀嚎才能平息其忿怒——不论败者是武器的主人，抑或是敌人。
- When will that person come... ｜ 那个人，什么时候才会来呢…
- Elphane ｜ 欧菲妮
- Aeval ｜ 爱贝尔

- If this goes on much longer, even the little saurians will realize something's off. ｜ 不行，再这样拖下去，连小龙都能看出有问题了。
- Wait a minute. If we consider this from a different angle, isn't it a good thing that the bait you made was convincing enough to fool even Cyno? ｜ 等等后辈。换个角度想想，你做的假蝴蝶连赛诺都能骗过，这不是一件好事吗？

- Very well, then find yourself some enemies with whom you wish to cross blades. A taste of my power will more than convince you. ｜ 好啊，你尽管去找你觉得值得一战的对手吧，我会让你心服口服的。

- The seeds of nefarious nightmares appear to have taken firm root... Though my magic arrow of midnight purges them in an instant, they return with a vengeance... Hmph, it would make a mockery of the majesty of the Prinzessin der Verurteilung! ｜ 没想到噩梦之种如此难缠…就算用至夜的魔箭于须臾间肃清，可它卷土重来的态势也过于险恶…哼，这样下去，实在有损断罪皇女的威仪！
- After obtaining the buffs, when a character deals DMG to an enemy using a <color=#F39000>Nightsoul-aligned Elemental Skill</color>, a <color=#F39000>shockwave will be unleashed</color> that deals True DMG and <color=#F39000>traps</color> enemies. ｜ 获取增益后，角色对敌人造成具有<color=#F39000>夜魂性质的元素战技</color>伤害时，会<color=#F39000>释放冲击波</color>，造成真实伤害并<color=#F39000>禁锢</color>敌人。

- Whoa! Amazing! Nara who used Arana's tune to get into Vanarana are definitely good Nara whom Arana trusts. ｜ 哦哦！那可真了不起。通过兰拉娜的曲子来到桓那兰那的那菈，那一定是兰拉娜信任的好那菈。

- He'd go so green with envy, it might kill him! Gonna wait till I get back from my post to break it to him, though. ｜ 他恐怕能嫉妒得要死。不过那也得等我站岗回去以后再说了。

- Bane of Flame and Water: Raven Bow ｜ 踏火止水·鸦羽弓
- Beautiful weather, fresh air, a stellar view... And to top it all off, some fantastic company! I couldn't ask for a better day! ｜ 天气很棒，空气很清爽，周围都是漂亮的景色…最重要的是，你来找我玩啦，我现在超开心！
- #Paimon sees your point {NICKNAME}... If you rule out everything that's completely impossible, gliding is the only idea left. ｜ #说得没错…除了「飞行」以外的答案，{NICKNAME}也认为都已经排除了呢。

- A Mondstadt-style countryside domicile that maintains a very old-school design, which includes a very large fireplace.\nNowadays, Mondstadt experiences very gentle weather, thus eliminating the need for fireplaces, which is why birds often nest on the chimney tops. ｜ 蒙德乡间的住宅，保持着古早的设计，设有大尺寸的壁炉。\n如今蒙德气候温暖，壁炉不常使用，因此鸟类总是在烟囱顶部筑巢。
- I see. So you're of a mind that suitable challenges can display the full strength of the Fungi. ｜ 原来如此，你们觉得适当的挑战，可以展现出蕈兽伙伴的全部实力。
- That will depend on our assessment of our own abilities. ｜ 这三种方案的主要差别，在于实施者对自己能力的判断。
- Dehya and Candace heard about someone plotting to kidnap Sachin. You should report this to the matra. ｜ 从迪希雅和坎蒂丝那里听说了有人密谋绑架萨齐因的事，及时向风纪官汇报吧。
- ...The remnants appear to be in the form of the Moon. ｜ …从灰尘上看，应该是「月亮」。

- Zhiyi remembers the lessons that Uncle Tian taught him once while they were fishing together, and the hesitation he felt when poisoning the latter, and is wracked with internal turmoil... which Yelan interrupts. Since he has broken the law, he must be punished, but there is a way that he can avoid the worst-case scenario. He just needs to accept her offer... ｜ 知易回想起，过去与天叔一同垂钓时他对自己的教诲，回想起自己给天叔下毒时的犹疑，内心不断挣扎。夜兰上前打断了他的思绪。既然违反了律法，那就必须得到相应的惩罚。不过知易仍有机会避免最糟糕的结局，只要他答应夜兰提出的交易…
- But I believe that whether it be Dahrian machines or the monsters of Dev, they shall be no match for the great Envoy or yourself. ｜ 不管是荼诃的机关还是迪弗的魔物，对于尊使大人和你们来说，应该都是小菜一碟吧。

- Rock-Steady Treasure Hunter ｜ 磐岩的寻宝者
- Huh, that was quick. You kept talking about "rite" and stuff, so Paimon thought it'd take a whole bunch of complicated incantations to conduct. ｜ 欸，这么简单就完成了吗？一直在说什么仪式仪式的，我还以为要念一堆听不懂的咒语才算完成呢。
- Unlocks at Friendship Lv. 5 ｜ 好感等级达到5后开启
- Wow, so Zhongli is even super knowledgeable about tea. ｜ 哇，钟离在喝茶方面也是行家呀。
- Mualani used to never plan ahead when traveling. Whenever she arrived someplace, she'd wander around, chatting with locals and asking about fun things to do nearby, good places to eat, or any unique local customs, and then decide on the spot what to do that day.\nIf she really hit it off with someone, she'd happily invite them along. This usually developed into a lively party, or a fun excursion nearby.\nAs long as Mualani isn't running too short on time, she'll soon know "the sights and places only the locals know" like the back of her hand.\nSometimes, other tourists and sightseers will ask her for directions, and as soon as she starts expounding on her knowledge of the area, it's hard to blame them for assuming she's a guide and offering her money to show them around.\nMualani would repeatedly wave her hands: "A guide must ensure the safety of travelers, and that's way out of my league! Besides, I only just got here myself!"\nFriends visiting the People of the Springs from afar was when Mualani really got to show her skills.\nSome of her friends said she was a born guide, and others urged her:\n"Once you're a guide, take us to dragon ruins nobody else has even been to for a look! Maybe we'll find some valuable swag!"\nMualani thought it all sounded very doable, so the next day, she went and found the famous guide, Nuu, and asked to be his student.\nShe asked him, just what skills does a guide that wants to take people exploring need to master?\nNuu thought for a second: "First is wilderness survival, such as the behaviors of wild animals, the uses of and how to cook common plants, and how to pick a good campsite. Next is knowing the land itself, such as how to judge the direction of the tides and the length of time between eruptions. You must also have actually traveled across the landscape, traversing the canyons, caves, and volcanoes. Yes, spend about three years doing that, and you'll be ready to start learning."\nMualani was about to just turn and leave, but suddenly thought better of it. She did want to see many places she ordinarily wouldn't, and so she paid a huge sum as her tuition fee.\nThough Nuu emphasized that reaching your destination safely was the most important thing, Mualani could never resist seeing where the other fork in the road led. After all, what if there was some amazing treasure waiting to be found? And so, all kinds of accidents inevitably happened, like accidentally charging into Koholasaurus nests or falling into pits concealed by grasses.\nBut Mualani didn't fuss about such situations. To her, taking the wrong road helped her remember the right path, not to mention that sometimes, her misadventures led to windfalls — for example, finding an ore unknown to anyone in their time buried at the bottom of the pit.\nLater, when she officially became a guide, she remembered her teacher's words, and planned the safest, most reliable routes for travelers. Still, a journey without happy accidents was kind of like an Apple Roly Poly without Apple, and that was completely unacceptable to Mualani.\nOnce, she was taking some tourists to a plateau that commanded an expansive view. She suggested a group photo, and just as they had all gotten into their poses and chosen their expressions, just as Mualani was lifting up the Kamera, a volcano in the distance suddenly erupted.\nMualani pressed the shutter in that very instant, and clapped and laughed at the resulting photo. "A perfect shot! Go me! Guess I planned out the best spot for the picture, huh?"\nJust then, a massive rumbling caused the tourists to look at each other apprehensively. Mualani reassured them:\n"Relax, it's totally safe at this distance! Next up, there'll be a few smaller eruptions. You'll never see anything else like it, so have a seat and enjoy the show!"\nThat's the kind of reliable guide Mualani is, helping you reach your destination safely even amidst heart-stopping excitement.\nShame, though, that even to this day, she's never found a Saurian relic that can fetch a decent price. ｜ 曾经，玛拉妮旅游的时候从不提前规划。到了一个地方，她就四处闲逛，跟当地人谈天说地，打听当地有什么好吃好玩的，又有什么独特习俗，再临时决定当天要去什么地方。\n若是聊得热络，玛拉妮还会兴高采烈地邀请他们同行，最后往往会发展成一场热闹的聚会或者郊游。\n只要玛拉妮待的时间稍微长一些，她就会对「本地人才知道的景点」了如指掌。\n偶尔有同样来观光的游客找玛拉妮问路，一见玛拉妮如数家珍的样子，都容易以为她是位向导，就提出花钱请她带路。\n玛拉妮连连摆手：「向导是要保证游客安全的，我干不了这事。何况我也刚来这里没多久啦！」\n每当有远方的朋友来到流泉之众，那更是玛拉妮大展身手的场合。\n朋友里有人说她简直是天生的向导。又有人撺掇：\n「等你当上向导了，带我们到没人去过的龙遗迹里转转吧。说不定能找到值钱的好宝贝呢。」\n玛拉妮觉得这事可行，第二天就找到知名向导努乌先生，请求当他的学生。\n玛拉妮问他，想要带人探险，应该掌握什么技能呢？\n努乌先生思索片刻：「首先是野外求生知识，比如野生动物习性，常见植物用途和烹饪方式，选取露营地的方法。然后是山川自然知识，比如判断潮汐走向和岩浆的喷发周期。还要实际走访地形，把峡谷，洞穴，火山走一圈，嗯，花上三年时间就能入门了。」\n玛拉妮几乎转身要走，但转念一想，还是想看看平时去不了的地方，就付了一大笔钱作为学费。\n虽然努乌先生一直强调，安全抵达目的地是最重要的，但玛拉妮总是忍不住看看另一条岔路有什么。万一有什么了不得的宝藏呢？于是难免出现种种意外，比如误闯了鳍游龙的巢穴，或是掉进了被杂草掩盖的坑洞里。\n对于这些状况，玛拉妮不以为意，在她看来，踩过了错误的道路也就等于记住了正确的道路，况且有时候还能收获一些意外惊喜，比如坑洞底下埋了一块年代未知的矿石。\n后来她当上了向导，她记着老师说过的话，尽量给游客们规划稳妥安全的路线。但是，少了惊喜的旅途就像是苹果卷卷不放苹果，玛拉妮可不能接受。\n有一回，玛拉妮带着游客来到一处视野开阔的高地，她提出要给大家拍合影。游客们摆好姿势，做好表情，就在玛拉妮举起相机的同时，远方的火山突然喷发。\n玛拉妮在那瞬间按下快门，又在看到画片后拍手大笑：「取景完美！不愧是我测算出来的最佳观测地点。」\n方才巨大的震动令游客们大为吃惊，面面相觑。玛拉妮解释道：\n「放心，这里是绝对安全的距离啦。接下来还会有几波小爆发，大家可以坐下来好好观赏了。这可是会让人终生难忘的胜景哦！」\n玛拉妮就是这么一位能让你在惊心动魄中安全到达目的地的，非常可靠的向导。\n可惜，能卖出好价钱的龙遗物，至今还是没有找到。
- What? You... You kept that one quiet... ｜ 这…这我还是第一次知道。
- The young man who had returned Zixin's string of pearls left without revealing his name. Grandma Zhang comes up with a plan that will allow Zixin to find him... ｜ 梓心尚未得知归还珠串的青年的姓名，他便已经走远，为了找到他，张婆给梓心出了个主意…
- There's no one like Amber! She lives life to the fullest while always adhering to her strong sense of justice. She's ready to answer the call for action at any moment, but is also very understanding of others. She's like the spark that lights the fire in everyone's heart around her. ｜ 安柏她真的很厉害！热爱生活，有正义感，不仅充满行动力，也非常善解人意，总是能像一团火一样照亮别人。
- Even if you and the snake both asked me to, I will never again take human form. ｜ 就算你和蛇一起要求，我也不会再化成人形了。
- #Whoa... what should we do, {NICKNAME}? If we leave this matter alone, not only will that researcher be in danger, but the Wenut problem won't be resolved... ｜ #呜哇…怎么办，{NICKNAME}？要是放着不管的话，不仅那位学者有危险，沙虫的问题也不好解决…
- Ah, that would be because, when Ioroi tried to pluck a Naku Weed from the imperial garden, Ei nearly split him in two... Yashiori Island style... ｜ 哦，当初他去偷御苑鸣草的时候，差点被影劈成八酝岛的样子…
- And, thank you for having me. ｜ 还有，谢谢你邀请我到这儿做客。
- "This will be our last visit. Thank you for having us, Mr. Okazaki. I hope we did not give you too much trouble." ｜ 「今番是最后一日光顾，感谢冈崎老爷为我们提供方便，一直以来麻烦了。」

- Haha... yes. It was all I could manage. ｜ 哈哈，没办法，我拥有的只有这些。

- This street is the busiest place in Inazuma. Not only can you get the daily necessities here, but you can also purchase rare, high-end, and exotic goods. It's my favorite spot. ｜ 这条街是稻妻城最热闹的地方，不仅日常需要的东西都能买到，有时还能淘到些罕见的海外高级货，我很喜欢。
- Seems like they really don't want anyone setting foot in Inazuma, huh... ｜ 这就是存心不想让人靠近稻妻啊。
- That there was a third person all along. ｜ ——还隐藏着第三个人。
- A precious medicinal ingredient that has lost all medicinal value after years in storage. ｜ 是珍贵的药材，但存放了这么久已经失去了药用价值。

- While enhanced, the Anomalous Model will not be paralyzed when its weak points are struck. Moreover, the Anomalous Model's attacks can alert nearby opponents. These opponents will be attracted by the Pursina's Spikes as they approach and will begin to attack them. ｜ 强化状态下，特异体被命中弱点将不会瘫倒。此外，特异体的攻击可能会惊扰附近的敌人。而敌人靠近时将受到「普尔希娜光钉」的吸引并向其发起攻击。

- Jawad ｜ 哲瓦德

- Protect feeble Mihir and repel our foes. Though this is but a small challenge, you should still take care, my Yasnapati. ｜ 守护衰弱的米希尔，同时击退敌人，虽然只是小小的挑战…吾之「谒颂主」可要小心啊。
- Well then, here's the payment, as promised! ｜ 来，这些是说好的报酬，还请两位收下！

- Hey, hey, chill, boys, chill. Relax! ｜ 你们两个，慌什么！

- Because fear is induced by uncertainty, the more chaotic the situation, the better. Having the event staff also mysteriously vanish only added to the uncertainty... I must say, I think this Test of Courage truly lived up to its name. ｜ 既然恐惧来源于未知，局面当然是越乱越好。最好是连工作人员也神秘消失，这样才能称为「试胆大会」嘛。

- Someone did something to bring the mirages into being. As they were just passive side products, it was natural that they couldn't provide us with any useful information. ｜ 有人做了某些事，使这些幻境诞生。它是被动产物，自然就无法提示我们什么了。

- Autumn, think back carefully. What part of your life did I not prepare for you? Every time you went astray and met with misfortune, it was due to your own willful decisions. ｜ 小秋，你仔细想一想。你生活中的哪一步我没有为你安排，你走歪的路都是你自己选的。
- Ah! Who goes there!? ｜ 喂，谁在那边？！
- Ahh, the rain is really coming down... let's just hope the conditions out here won't get too muddy. Otherwise, I'll need to help everyone clean their boots, and there won't be enough time to prepare a meal... ｜ 好大的雨…希望地面不要变得泥泞，不然就要帮大家擦靴子了…做饭的时间要不够了。
- Oh, my, this region really does remind me of returning to port at sunset... ｜ 欸呀，这片海域总让我想起黄昏归船之时…
- (If the end of the time scale is reached, and the universe is like a blank sheet of paper, the former Holy Blade will project its shadow to reveal the way forward.) ｜ （假使抵达了时间尺度的尽头，宇宙如同白纸一般，曾经的「圣剑」也会投下影子，指明前进的方向。）

- Congratulations... on being wrong. If you really did go out and do that, then you'd have a part in the collapse of my fortunes. ｜ 恭喜你…答错了。要是你真的去收集核心，那毁灭我下半生的功劳就将有你的一份了。
- Hahahahaha! You're... You're an embarrassment! ｜ 哈哈哈哈哈！你这个丢人东西！

- Mora is very shiny, but every coin looks the same — I don't wanna exchange my stones for those. ｜ 摩拉虽然亮晶晶的，但是都长得一样，芙佳才不要用石头换呢。

- If Confrerie of Cabriere wants to poach clients from Northland Bank, that's fine, but I'm afraid you still owe the bank a hefty sum of Mora. So why don't we work things out between us first before you get back to your little conversation here? ｜ 你们卡布里埃商会跟我们北国银行抢业务也就算了，居然还敢在北国银行留有坏账…插个队，让我先清算一下怎么样？
- You must have a lot of adventuring experience, right? Would you mind doing the evaluation for me? ｜ 你应该很有冒险经验吧？如、如果你愿意的话，能帮我去「评估」一下吗？
- Hehe, is someone looking for us? ｜ 嘿嘿，谁要找我们呀？
- Haven't you been keeping a journal— ｜ 我记得安柏有本笔记…
- The lower levels of the Geode Mine Shaft contain many unusual ores... ｜ 下层的晶簇矿坑道有着非比寻常的矿藏资源…
- That's just my style. If I decided in advance exactly how I was going to cook something, there'd be no element of surprise to the dish. ｜ 这是我的风格嘛，如果在做一道菜之前就想好了要做什么，那注定就是一份没有惊喜的料理。
- The principles work differently for elemental users. That's a completely separate matter to how the miners of Liyue make ad-hoc fuses. ｜ 元素使用者的原理算是特例啦…和我所说的，璃月矿工常用的临时引信制作方法，是完全不同的。
- It's better if we kept this secret. ｜ 还是暂时保密为好。
- Thank you kindly. Let's just hope Inu Shoushou remembers the scent of this Kunai... Then again, I'm certain he will. ｜ 多谢。希望犬少将还能记得苦无上的气味…不，它一定记得吧。
- We would never be disappointed in you. ｜ 我们不会感到失望。
- Nothing, nothing... It's just, before we came here, the things we experienced together now seems like a fog, like clouds. Can't see them clearly... Need to remember. ｜ 没什么，没什么…只不过，来之前，我们一起经历过的事情…像雾一样，像云一样，看不清…需要回忆。
- Old Treasure Hoarder Notes ｜ 破破烂烂的盗宝团笔记
- Tonight seems to have gone off without a hitch. I'm so glad it's all going smoothly. ｜ 看来晚会进行的很顺利，没出什么问题真的太好了。
- Yeah, you bet! Don't worry, I'm exceedingly good at adapting to new environments. ｜ 嗯，当然！放心吧，我的适应力是很强的。
- According to Bona, you need to collect burning Firestones and offer them up to the Altar of Primal Flame if you wish to find the Jade of Return... ｜ 按照玻娜的说法，为了找到「回还之玉」，就要收集燃烧的火石，并将之供奉到源火的祭坛之处…
- I will leave the requester to fill you in on all the relevant details. His name is Yuehui, and he should be at The Chasm right now. ｜ 那么具体情况就让委托人再详细与你们沟通吧，他叫玥辉，现在应该就在层岩巨渊的附近。
- Thankfully, we've already cleared this place out. Otherwise, the Khvarena may have gotten lost in the purple mists! ｜ 幸好我们之前把这里好好打扫了一遍，不然说不定灵光也会在紫雾里迷路呢！
- You can go to the place they call the Serpent's Heart. The clues to this second set of trials is hidden there. ｜ 你们可以去那个所谓的「蛇心之地」的某处，寻找第二试炼的线索。
- Clockwork meka have been spotted in the wilderness, threatening the safety of the peripheral areas. Defeat them to put an end to this threat. ｜ 发条机关出现在野外，威胁着周边区域的安全，前往将其打倒。
- Not bad. A lot better than I had anticipated, at least. ｜ 不错嘛，比我预想中要好太多了。
- I was just going to ask you the same thing. ｜ 被你抢先了。我也想问你这个问题呢。
- How disappointing! Ah, they're so beautiful, too... ｜ 真让人失望，明明都这么漂亮…
- About Weight Gain ｜ 关于发胖…
- This place is unstable. It is too risky to continue pursuing her. \n ｜ 此处并不稳固，继续追下去风险太大。\n
- Let me see what you need, dear customer... ｜ 让我看看客人的要求…
- Diadem of Knowledge? You mean that thing he donated to the Akademiya? ｜ 才识之冠？你是说他捐给教令院的那个？
- Is... that even possible? ｜ 这…这种事也做得到吗？
- Quite unexpected, yes — I suspect foul play! ｜ 不符预期，肯定是有人在抹黑咱们。
- Thanks, Cyno. Feels good to hit the jackpot. ｜ 谢啦赛诺。赚大了。
- What would you do if a sum of Mora like that suddenly landed in your lap? ｜ 如果突然有这么一大笔钱，你会做什么？
- Here's your payment. Do accept it, if you would be so kind... ｜ 这是报酬，请您收好…
- Provides the "Conductive" effect to all Lil' Fungi on the team and increases their ATK for a period of time. When Lil' Fungi take DMG, the "Conductive" effect will be removed. ｜ 为队伍中所有「小小灵蕈」提供「超限」效果，在一段时间内使其攻击力提升。「小小灵蕈」受到伤害时，将移除「超限」效果。
- Itto suggested that as you proceed with the Test of Courage as usual, he will hide in the shadows and scare people from time to time. You should ask the member of staff for details. ｜ 一斗建议我们正常进行试胆大会，他会躲在暗处吓人。向工作人员询问具体事宜吧。
- I don't know what we would have done without your help, so this is a little token of our appreciation. I hope you won't refuse! ｜ 我们家那些事呀，没有您根本解决不了，一点微不足道的心意，您可不要嫌弃。
- Cooking Ingredient ｜ 食材
- Ah... Everything you have said is correct. I have indeed done a lot for my hometown, and I would be willing to be with you all... But what is the purpose of having me stand here like this? What is there to discuss? ｜ 咳！虽然这些话没错，我确实为家乡白淞镇做了不少事，也很愿意跟大家在一起。可这是需要站在这里讨论的事吗？
- Lanoire ｜ 莉诺尔
- Don't worry, I'm fine. Thanks for asking. ｜ 没事的，谢谢大家的关心。
- Start making a cocktail ｜ 开始调制酒品
- Has something to do with these Elemental Monuments? ｜ 会和这些元素方碑有关吗？
- Forest of Blessings ｜ 赐福森林
- #<color=#37FFFF>Paimon: </color>It's a well-established tradition that during Inazuman celebrations everyone's wearing festive masks.\n<color=#37FFFF>Paimon: </color>Paimon tried to look around the stalls, but hasn't found any mask that fits...\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}: </color>So you really want a mask of your own?\n<color=#37FFFF>Paimon: </color>Of course! Not wearing a mask during an Inazuman festival is the same as not receiving a bouquet at the Windblume Festival...\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}: </color>Let me make one for you.\n<color=#37FFFF>Paimon: </color>Whoa! {NICKNAME}, you're the best!\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}: </color>Hmmm, I wonder what kind of mask will fit you best? How about... a slime mask?\n<color=#37FFFF>Paimon: </color>Yay, Paimon Slime! ｜ #<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>说起来，在稻妻的祭典上，大家都有佩戴面具的传统呢。\n<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>可是找遍所有的摊位，都没有适合我戴的尺寸…\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}：</color>派蒙很想要自己的面具吗？\n<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>当然啦！总觉得在祭典的氛围里，如果没戴面具，就好像在风花节上没收到花束一样…\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}：</color>那我来给你做一个吧。\n<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>哇——{NICKNAME}，你是最好的人！\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}：</color>嗯，面具的样式就定为…派蒙最喜欢的史莱姆吧。\n<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>好耶，史莱姆派蒙！
- A bag of Naku Weed seeds. ｜ 一袋「鸣草」的种子。
- Protective Proliferating Organism ｜ 守护的增殖生命体
- Sure. ｜ 可以。

- In that case, you may have the map. Also, take this with you. ｜ 既然如此，我就把这张地图交给你了。此外，也把这个带上吧。
- They were the ones who rescued me from a perilous place when I was just a baby, and together they raised me. ｜ 当初也是他们从险境里救下婴儿时候的我，并且一起把我抚养成人的。
- He did seem a bit relieved when I appeared. Now it makes sense. ｜ 确实，和一开始他的反应是吻合的。
- The meteorites carry his will, and can pass it on to others. In other words, centuries on from Leonard's life, and the strength of his will has not diminished one bit. ｜ 陨石传递着他的意志，也就是说，千百年来他的愿望一直没有减弱。
- Ahem... Right now, I am nothing but an ordinary editor-in-chief. I'm here to enjoy my vacation and gather some inspiration along the way, and if I can at all help it, I'd rather not concern myself with such weighty topics as the future fate of nascent technologies... ｜ 嗯…现在的我只是一个普普通通的主编，此番前来，为的是度假和取材，有点不想思考「技术前景」这种沉重的字眼呢…
- Hah... Intuition? Well, I have to hand it to you, Lynette... ｜ 哈…直觉吗，真不愧是琳妮特…
- Should you be willing, you could try your hand at some of the questions I've already recorded. ｜ 如果您愿意的话，可以试试体验一下我已经记录在册的问题。
- Maybe there really was no other way. ｜ 也可能是真的没别的办法。
- A cup carved out of ice that is as chilly and biting as winter. Its former master would drink an unfreezable liquor from it. ｜ 用寒冰雕制成的杯盏，如冬天一般坚利。曾经的主人从中啜饮过不冻之酒。

- #Morning, {NICKNAME}! ｜ #早啊，{NICKNAME}。
- At this time, you seem to recall the powerful sentiment expressed by an employee at a clockwork workshop when dealing with a particularly problematic product: ｜ 此时，你似乎想起了某间发条工坊的员工面对棘手的产品时发出的感慨——
- Hey! Paimon's not your dog or something! ｜ 什么啦！这是把我当狗狗了吗！
- Most Waves Defeated ｜ 最多击退波次
- All these years without any sign of Kirya, and he pops up out of nowhere the minute my brother and I get out of prison... It couldn't be any clearer who the kid's after! ｜ 这么多年都没动静，偏偏等到我跟卢西恩出狱才有动作…这小子一定是冲我们来的！

- Okay, this should do it! ｜ 好欸，这样应该就可以了吧！

- Let me get warmed up first... ｜ 我再去准备一下…
- ??? ｜ ？？？
- A performance art that imitates the actions and behavior of a Suanni. Symbolizes good fortune and jubilation. ｜ 模仿「猊兽」的动作与神态进行的表演。是喜庆与吉祥的象征。

- All these twists and turns remind Paimon of the adepti domains we've been to before. Could there be an adeptus here? ｜ 这种转来转去的结构，跟我们以前走过的一些仙人秘境有点像呢。难道…这里也有仙人吗？
- Guess we leave it up to you then. Where's the inn? ｜ 那就全靠骑士团了。旅馆在哪里？
- Well... You're right, if I really think about it, I'm not too familiar with many big name merchants... ｜ 这个嘛…仔细想想，跟我比较熟的商人也不多…
- "I'm looking for a visitor from Fontaine who was asking about hot springs on the Visitors' Message Board — the one who mentioned something about 'melting,' or 'dissolving.'" ｜ 「寻找一名枫丹来的游客，曾在游客留言板上询问有关温泉的问题，并有提到过类似有关溶解或融化之类的词语。」
- I don't think you're hearing me... ｜ 我觉得…你完全没明白我的意思。
- Only five months have passed since the last Turnfire Night, and he's already showing signs of instability. ｜ 距离上一次回火夜才过去五个月，它又有了暴动的迹象。
- If Sakujirou still hasn't made up his mind, those two running into each other won't solve anything — and even worse, there'll be no coming back from it for Sakujirou. ｜ 如果朔次郎还是没有下定决心，两个人见面不仅不能解决问题，还会让事情变得不可挽回。
- He knows that, but he still feels guilty. Ororon has a strong ability to perceive souls. More than any of us, he understands just how dire the situation with Ley Lines has become. ｜ 是啊，这个道理他明白得很，可还是觉得遗憾。而且他对灵魂的感知很强，比别人更清楚地脉的情况有多糟。
- That guy from the Saurian Relics Association and the chubby chap from the Children of Echoes kept talking up how dangerous it was, but it looks like there really was nothing to it! ｜ 龙遗物研究协会的家伙和回声之子的大胖子，说得那么危险，但看来似乎也没什么嘛！
- Is there time for a quick snack? I'll whip one up in no time! ｜ 要吃点点心休息一下吗？我准备了一箩！
- The bustling streets of the Court of Fontaine seem more lively than usual. Why not take a walk around? ｜ 枫丹廷的街道似乎比平时更热闹，四处转转吧。
- See how Lyney is doing afterward ｜ 询问林尼后续情况

- Defeat all opponents ｜ 击败所有敌人
- Mr. Jazari is probably still on Devantaka Mountain researching. Since we have a lead now, let's go look for him. ｜ 加扎里先生的话，应该还在降诸魔山做研究吧，既然现在已经有了线索，我们快去找找他吧。

- Oh. Any thoughts or leads, Caterpillar? ｜ 是喔。卡特皮拉有什么想法和线索吗？
- Same old Paimon. ｜ 真拿你没办法。

- When party members perform <color=#f39001>healing</color>, create a <color=#0075de>Healing Hydroball</color> that follows the active character and lasts for <color=#f39001>{0}</color>s. It will record the amount of HP healed and will explode when its duration ends, dealing <color=#f39001>AoE Hydro DMG</color> to nearby opponents based on the amount of healing recorded and the number of <color=#f39001>Windblessing: Hydro</color> stacks. Up to 1 Healing Hydroball can be created every <color=#f39001>{1}</color>s ｜ 对队伍中的角色进行<color=#f39001>治疗</color>时，将生成一个跟随场上角色的<color=#0075de>疗愈水球</color>，持续<color=#f39001>{0}</color>秒，疗愈水球将记录治疗的生命值回复量，持续时间结束后疗愈水球爆炸，基于记录的治疗量和<color=#f39001>风之祝祷·水</color>的层数对周围的敌人造成<color=#f39001>水元素范围伤害</color>，每<color=#f39001>{1}</color>秒至多生成一个疗愈水球
- Well, when you put it that way... ｜ 你都这么说了，我完全反驳不了呢…
- Hey, are you... ｜ 你是在…
- "A Thousand Ephemeral Visions of Dew" ｜ 「露水的千般愿景」
- A hat once worn by the witch who dreamt of burning away all of the demons in the world. The large brim blocked her sight. ｜ 曾经梦想烧尽世间魔物的炎之魔女曾经戴过的帽子。宽大的帽檐能遮挡她的视线。
- Since it's been such a great show, I'll just let the false accusations against me slide. Either way, I've still got some business to attend to, so if you'll excuse me... ｜ 能欣赏到这样的好戏，我就不怪罪你们抓错人的事了。我这边还有事，就先离席了…
- It's normal for there to be bridges outside blizzard-swept mountain villages, and normal for them to get broken, but for a person to cross one by floating through the air... Why resort to such a lame plot device? ｜ 暴雪山庄外面有桥，很正常，桥被弄断了，也很正常，可是有人能漂浮在半空飞过整座桥…写这个情节干嘛呀？
- But then again, the crew isn't usually this riled up. It's not that they're arrogant, they're just bubbling with ambition, that's all. ｜ 话说回来，大伙平时也不是这样，虽不算恃才傲物，但也有几分心气。
- Feelings About Ascension: Climax ｜ 突破的感受·转

- Of course I have. Matter of fact, we were all here drinking together just a few days ago. ｜ 见过啊，前几天我们还在这里一起喝过酒。
- You and your partner reached the Mare Jivari! A famously terrifying place with not a wisp of wind! ｜ 传说中的烬寂海，一丝风都没有，可怕至极！
- Now that we have the Iron Chunks, I'm going back to work. You, back off! ｜ 铁块已经有了吧，那我马上就开工了，你离远点！
- Give the cocktail ingredients to Charles ｜ 将调酒材料交给查尔斯
- Try hiding your tactics next time. A spider never builds a web in plain sight. It works in the shadows, until it's ready to strike. ｜ 下次对局时，记得要藏好自己所有的心思和计划。就像编织一张蛛网，在整张网完成之前，要保证它一直处在无人发觉的暗处。
- In Round 1/3/5/7 of each Wargame, you will gain 1 chance to draw a Stratagem.\nStratagems can provide various buffs in the Wargame, and choosing them wisely can have a significant impact upon the outcome. ｜ 在每场推演的第1/3/5/7回合，旅行者将获得1次机会，抽选战斗策略。\n战斗策略能为推演提供多种助益，合理选择战斗策略，可对推演产生可观的影响。
- ??? ｜ ？？？
- An ancient teacup that seems to have been lost in the wilderness. It seems to exude a faint adeptal aura. ｜ 不知何人遗落在野外的古老茶杯，似乎能够感受到微弱的仙力气息…
- When the character's {SPRITE_PRESET#1110}Energy is maxed out, you can consume that {SPRITE_PRESET#1110}Energy to use a powerful Elemental Burst. ｜ 角色的{SPRITE_PRESET#1110}充能达到上限时，可以消耗所有的{SPRITE_PRESET#1110}充能，来使用威力强大的「元素爆发」。
- You didn't go home? ｜ 不回家吗？
- Step back. ｜ 退后。
- Big Pudgy Problem! ｜ 圆滚滚的大团骚乱！
- Played by Clorinde ｜ 克洛琳德饰

- That is our "calling," and the future of Rainsong Pond rests upon it. As such, there is no room for error — do you understand me? ｜ 这是我们的「使命」，也决定着雨歌塘的未来，容不得半点错误，你明白吗？
- The Maushiro... It's the key to writing "The Chronicles of the Sea of Fog (Working Title)"... ｜ 木簧笛…这可是极为珍贵的…《雾海纪行（暂定）》的关键…
- I never understood that in the first place. ｜ 我本来就不明白…
- Y—Yes, Coach! Muscles! ｜ 明、明白了，教练！肌肉！
- I can't believe that the Master of Stars wasn't powerful enough to defeat those hilichurls... ｜ 这些丘丘人，以「星辰天君」的法力居然也制服不了吗…
- The recent issues with The Withering have occupied a lot of manpower, though I don't know much about the details... ｜ 由于最近「死域」的一些问题，具体我也不清楚，但是他们似乎花了很多人力负责调查那个…
- A Letter in Beautiful Handwriting (VIII) ｜ 字迹华丽的信·其八
- Catch %1% fishes ｜ 捕%1%条鱼
- Woah, what a luxurious chest! But we still don't know who this "dummy" is... ｜ 嘿嘿，好豪华的宝箱！虽然还是不知道「呆瓜」是谁…
- Okay! Before we get to work, please give us the funds. ｜ 好！那我们就开工了，请提供采购资金吧。
- Duplicate Obtained ｜ 重复获得
- And there aren't too many things to... uhh... remember. ｜ 需要记住的事情，不多。
- Mmhmm, bye now! Please do let me know if I can help you with anything. ｜ 嗯嗯，再见啦！如果有需要帮忙的地方，请一定要告诉我喔！

- Cassiodor ｜ 卡西奥多
- Honestly, I don't harbor any resentment toward the Shogun. Yes, she almost took my Vision away, but ultimately that's just because of her unique perspective. Everyone has their own perspective, there's nothing strange about that.\nThe only thing I don't understand is her goal in doing so. What does she imagine eternity really looks like for Inazuma? And why is sacrificing her people's aspirations so necessary to achieve it? I can neither understand nor agree with her approach. ｜ 说实话，我对将军本人没什么怨恨。虽说她差点夺走我的神之眼，但那是因为她的立场特殊吧。立场不同是很正常的事情。\n我想不明白的，是她的目的。她所设想的永恒国度到底是什么样？为什么非得牺牲民众的愿望换取。我无法理解，也无法认同。
- So, you want to use the grand prize to buy a place, right? ｜ 就是说，你看上了争霸赛的奖金，想用它买一套房子，对吧？

- And as you can see, my Prince of Mischief has a pretty good chance of winning this thing, so... argh, if it was any other day, you know... ｜ 你也看到了，我这只「混世魔王」是很有希望的…真不巧啊…
- Wow, you're making a meal out of this, aren't you? You really, really... have way too much time on your hands. Okay, I give up, you win. ｜ 在那说什么漂亮话呢？你真的，真的是一个，好有闲心的人…我服了，我认输。

- I... might have an idea. ｜ 我…想到一个办法。
- Hehe, making games is nowhere near as fun as playing them. Besides, working through the night certainly isn't my idea of a good time. ｜ 呵呵，做游艺哪有玩游艺有意思，我可不想熬夜工作…
- You are one who crosses the celestial atlas, and who passes through countless worlds. If our history is engraved in your memory, it will one day accompany you into another world. ｜ 你是远渡重天、跨越星海之人。把历史刻在你的记忆里，就可以在未来某日，随你一同前往别的世界。
- Hehe, it's sure nice to hear you say that~ ｜ 你说话真好听，嘿嘿。
- A wood-carved hat adorned with a plum blossom that can be used to assemble an "Aranara Carving."\nIt was modeled after the hat of an eccentric, quirky girl in Liyue Harbor. A storyteller once created many stories involving the subject of death, but they all ended up being detested by parents. "Death is too heavy a topic for children," they say. "My fairy tales are created for the children who have to face death in reality." Unfaltered, the author maintained their stance. Thus, these somewhat special Farewellers came to exist in Aranara fairy tales. ｜ 饰有梅花的帽子，可用于组装「兰那罗木刻」。\n以璃月港内古灵精怪的神秘少女的装束为参考制作。有一位童话作者创作了许多涉及死亡的童话，遭到了家长们的厌恶。大人们认为这一主题对于孩子来说太过沉重。但这位作者固执地宣称：「我的童话，是为了那些在现实里面对死亡的小朋友们创作的。」就这样，兰那罗童话中，也有了送别者这一特殊角色。
- A flower with the color of fire. Its petals possess a strange shape, and it is relatively rare.\nBased on scholars' experiment results, these flowers contain a special catalytic substance that can make transparent extracts from luminescent plants shine as if the plants had already matured. ｜ 色泽如火的花卉，花瓣的形貌奇特，虽不算极为珍奇，但也并非随处可见。\n根据学者们的试验结果，这种花卉中含有特殊的催化成分，能让原本透明的荧光植物提取液提前散发出成熟期的光芒。
- Since this arose from natural causes, it's time to wrap things up. ｜ 既然是自然现象，那也该去收尾了。
- Time is limited, so I can't go into full detail, but let me give you a brief bit of background on the current situation. ｜ 我知道你心有疑惑，眼下时间紧张，我便简要说明如今的状况。
- But usually, the people in our tribe are either impossible to find or holed up indoors. ｜ 至于平时，本部族的这些人要么找不到人影，要么憋在家里不出门。
- ...Honestly, you've already done your part by bringing me here. I can't keep troubling you... ｜ …其实，你们带我来这里之后，我已经没有继续劳烦你们的理由了。
- Welcome to Chioriya Boutique. Is there anything you need? ｜ 欢迎光临「千织屋」，请问您有什么需要吗？
- A shard that broke off a larger Electro Crystal. Gives 50 Electro Energy when absorbed. ｜ 从电元素结晶上剥落下来的晶片，吸收后可获得50点电元素能量
- I am Razor. ｜ 我是雷泽。

- ...I could climb it! ｜ 我觉得可以…

- Yun Jin's outfit. It was made by skilled tailors from the Feiyun Commerce Guild. Yun Jin fell in love with it at first sight, and it is now her favorite set of casual wear. ｜ 云堇的装扮款式。由飞云商会的巧手裁缝设计制作的裙装，被云堇一眼相中，成为了她最心爱的常服。
- Let the people's inner voices reach the divine throne in the heavens.\n<color=#FFD780FF>Mavuika's Elemental Burst is not reliant on Energy, but instead, on "Fighting Spirit."</color>\n\n<color=#FFD780FF>Fighting Spirit</color>\nWhen Mavuika has at least 50% Fighting Spirit, she can consume it all to unleash her Elemental Burst.\nMavuika can obtain Fighting Spirit via the following methods:\n· When in combat, Nightsoul points consumed by nearby party members are converted to Fighting Spirit.\n· When nearby party members' Normal Attacks hit opponents, Mavuika gains 1.5 Fighting Spirit. This can trigger once every 0.1s.\n\nAfter using this, Mavuika gains 10 Nightsoul points and enters the Nightsoul's Blessing state. Riding her Flamestrider high in the air, she uses a powerful Sunfell Slice against opponents on the ground, dealing Nightsoul-aligned <color=#FF9999FF>AoE Pyro DMG</color> and entering the "Crucible of Death and Life" state.\n\n<color=#FFD780FF>Crucible of Death and Life</color>\nDuring this time, Mavuika's various actions will no longer consume Nightsoul points, and her interruption resistance is increased. Also, the DMG dealt by Sunfell Slice and "Ancient Name Unbound"'s Normal and Charged Attacks is increased based on the amount of Fighting Spirit she has when using the Elemental Burst.\nCrucible of Death and Life will be canceled when Mavuika leaves the field.\n\n<i>"—But this time, I want to break the cycle and free us from this fate for good."</i> ｜ 让众人的心声，直抵高天的神座。\n<color=#FFD780FF>玛薇卡的元素爆发不依靠元素能量，而是依靠「战意」。</color>\n\n<color=#FFD780FF>战意</color>\n当玛薇卡拥有至少50%战意时，玛薇卡可以消耗所有战意，施放元素爆发。\n玛薇卡可以通过以下方式获取战意：\n·处于战斗状态下时，队伍中的附近的角色消耗的夜魂值将会转化为玛薇卡的战意；\n·队伍中附近的角色的普通攻击命中敌人时，玛薇卡将获得1.5点战意，该效果每0.1秒至多触发一次。\n\n施放后，玛薇卡获得10点夜魂值，进入夜魂加持状态，驾驶驰轮车腾跃至空中，并向地面上的敌人进行一次强力的坠日斩，造成具有夜魂性质的<color=#FF9999FF>火元素范围伤害</color>，并进入「死生之炉」状态。\n\n<color=#FFD780FF>死生之炉</color>\n持续期间，玛薇卡的各种行为将不再消耗夜魂值，并提高玛薇卡的抗打断能力。同时，依据施放时的战意，提升坠日斩、「古名解放」时的普通攻击与重击造成的伤害。\n死生之炉状态将在玛薇卡退场时解除。\n\n<i>「——但这次，我想亲手打碎这样的宿命。」</i>

- It's all right with me, though. I'm pretty confident about our growth and activities. ｜ 没关系，我对目前的发展很有自信。

- Oh, speaking of which! Because I've been helping residents with some reconstruction efforts, Mr. Pixica gave me priority access to hot-air balloon rides! ｜ 哦，说到这个！因为我帮当地的居民做了一些重建工作，皮希加先生给了我可以优先乘坐热气球的机会！
- Perhaps, Durin's power drives people to madness... But that's merely crude conjecture. ｜ 或许，杜林的力量会使人疯狂…但这也只是我粗略的猜测。
- When Cyno is in the Pactsworn Pathclearer state triggered by <color=#FFD780FF>Sacred Rite: Wolf's Swiftness</color>, after he triggers Electro-Charged, Superconduct, Overloaded, Quicken, Aggravate, Hyperbloom, or an Electro Swirl reaction, he will restore 3 Elemental Energy for all nearby party members (except himself.)\nThis effect can occur 5 times within one use of <color=#FFD780FF>Sacred Rite: Wolf's Swiftness</color>. ｜ 赛诺处于<color=#FFD780FF>圣仪·煟煌随狼行</color>的启途誓使状态下时，触发感电、超导、超载、原激化、超激化、超绽放、雷元素扩散反应后，将为队伍中附近的所有角色（除了赛诺自己）恢复3点元素能量。\n该效果在一次<color=#FFD780FF>圣仪·煟煌随狼行</color>中，至多触发5次。
- 111165;0 ｜ 111165;0

- Ha, we can take anything it has to throw at us! ｜ 能应付的都不是麻烦！
- That way, when bullets strike the armor, they would first disintegrate upon striking the outermost layer, causing the projectile to lose its structural integrity and greatly reducing its penetrative power... ｜ 如此一来，铳枪的弹丸打在铠甲上，首先会磕碎在最外层的铁甲上，整体外形严重受损，穿透力大大降低…
- Alright! Shinobu, we've decided... ｜ 行！那忍姐，我们选…
- Really? Why, what happened? ｜ 什么梦能把人累成这样？

- Oh. Right. Sorry... ｜ 也对，抱歉…

- Yes, of course. The best view should be from the Jade Chamber. ｜ 这是当然。观赏烟花的最佳地点，非群玉阁莫属。
- Charlotte's outfit. "If your reporting isn't real enough, it's because you're not close enough." Charlotte often has this to say about journalism. Sometimes, however, she adds: "But of course, maybe it's that the lens you're using just isn't that great." ｜ 夏洛蒂的装扮款式。「如果报道不够真实，那就是你靠得不够近。」当夏洛蒂谈及报道事务时，她常这么说。但有时候，她也会补充道：「当然啦。也可能是你用的镜头不太好。」
- Who shall become redoubtable foes of Mr. Cyclops in the marketplaces of Liyue... ｜ 在璃月这片市场上，都将成为「独眼小宝」的有力竞争对手…
- That won't solve the underlying problem. ｜ 解决不了根源问题。
- But since you're the Hydro Dragon, wouldn't "dragon out of water" suit you better? ｜ 我突然想到，以你的身份，自称「局外龙」比较合适吧？
- Hello! ｜ 你们好呀！
- Then become a traveler, just like us! What could be more fun than adventuring around the world? ｜ 那长大了就像我们一样，当旅行者吧！到处冒险挺有意思的！

- A withered flower worn on the shirt. Its former owner insisted on wearing it even in exile, so it must mean something. ｜ 带在身上的黯淡的花。是流放之身也要带着，一定有重要的意义吧。

- I've dealt with all kinds of people in my time, but never have I been made to stand while I'm waiting for an appointment. ｜ 我也曾和各种各样的人打交道，还是第一次站着等别人。

- What!? How did you get that so fast? ｜ 呃，为什么你一下子就想到了答案！
- When the crystal attacked the giant snake... ｜ 晶石攻击巨蛇…

- An Incredible Bitter Tone of Voice Hiding a Grudge ｜ 超级幽怨的声线
- *chuckle* ｜ 噗哧…

- That feels a bit... over-idealized to me? ｜ 稍微有点理想化吧。
- They exhausted their strength, to the point where they could no longer maintain their form, and were rejected by the Vourukasha Oasis for being tainted. ｜ 耗尽了力量而无法维持形体，又因为沾染了污秽而被花海所拒绝。
- That's exactly it. They are two different things altogether. ｜ 没错，就是这样，根本是两回事。
- You gotta be extra careful when lifting heavy objects. It's just common sense! ｜ 搬运重物的时候要小心自己的安全，这可是常识哦！
- Ah, this should be it, right? I'll turn it off — that should restore the Ley Lines in the area to normal. ｜ 是这个吧？我把它关掉了，这附近的地脉应该恢复正常了。
- I will have a taste too. ｜ 我也尝一点吧。

- How are you going to earn any Mora like this? ｜ 那你怎么赚钱呢？
- Phew... I feel much better. Zakariya's indeed a great doctor. ｜ 呼…我感觉好一些了，扎卡里亚医生的医术果然高超啊…
- You have a deal. ｜ 一言为定。
- An active character will be knocked away when affected by an Overloaded reaction. The next character on standby will be forced to become the active character. ｜ 出战角色受到超载反应时会被击飞，将强行将下一位后台角色切换为新的出战角色。

- I'm just saying it like I see it, haha... Which is incidentally the only skill I have worth talking about. ｜ 实话实说而已，哈哈哈…再说，我也只会这些。
- *sigh* I guess I'm still just too immature... ｜ 唉，我果然还是不太成熟啊…
- Beep... Bee-eep. ｜ 哔…哔哔。
- ...Hey. Don't you even think of getting me to talk. I won't shirk my duties! ｜ …喂，你可别想从我这儿套话，我是绝对不会擅离职守的！
- Was it really just the power of the sacred flame? ｜ 就只是圣火的力量吗？
- "We have no idea where we are, but it looks like we've left Inazuma far behind. Ha, I wish I could see the looks on the faces of those Shogunate lackeys!" ｜ 「虽然不知道在哪，但看来已经远离稻妻了，幕府的那群家伙，应该也知道我们的厉害了！」
- Heh, not bad. You just made your first attack. ｜ 哼，不错嘛，这样就完成一次攻击了。
- Paimon's beat... but after so many shifts, it seems we're really getting the hang of it now. ｜ 可累死了，不过打工了这么多次，好像也渐渐掌握到诀窍了。
- I'm being hunted down by Yae Publishing House's editors. ｜ 八重堂的编辑们在追杀我。
- #{NICKNAME}, can you round up Xingqiu, Chongyun, and the Mondstadt contingent? I have a favor to ask of you. ｜ #{NICKNAME}，能帮我召集行秋、重云，还有蒙德的几位朋友吗？有事想拜托你们。
- Then take this maple leaf as a keepsake. Our promise is thus made. ｜ 那便以这枫叶为信物，与你就此约定了。
- Tell me about Sweet Flowers. ｜ 关于甜甜花。
- I'm not the type that's easily swayed, Rahman. You of all people should know that. ｜ 你应该知道我不是那种容易被打动的人，拉赫曼。
- <i>These audience members are positively barbaric!</i> ｜ <i>这些观众太野蛮了！</i>

- So let's go back to the place where we <color=#00E1FFFF>witnessed the shady-looking guy</color>. ｜ 所以我们再去<color=#00E1FFFF>目击的地点</color>看看吧。
- Thank you! You're the only ones I can rely on in this vast sea of sand! ｜ 拜托你们了，这茫茫沙海里，我只有你们可以依靠了！
- Yes, the Song of Life is a very nice name. Let's call it that. Paimon is very good at naming things. ｜ 嗯。生命之歌很好，就叫这个名字吧。派蒙很会起名字。
- I have no more questions. ｜ 不，没什么事了。
- #Okay, well, thanks. Come on, {NICKNAME} let's go talk to some others. ｜ #好吧，谢谢你。{NICKNAME}，我们再去问问别人吧。

- I've got some other things to do at the moment... ｜ 还有别的事…

- Oh! So, it would be like... like experiencing a different life, but still as yourself? That's not a bad idea. ｜ 哦！体验自己的另一场人生吗？是个不错的选择。
- Missing? You mean, he hasn't returned after leaving that day? ｜ 失踪？意思是，那天他离开后再没回来过吗？

- Go back to the Tonatiuh and meet up with your companion. ｜ 回去天蛇船与伙伴会合吧。
- Oh yeah, and we'll also need some Ocean Zephyrs to cure Milray. Who'll go gather them while we're organizing the Trials? ｜ 对了，我记得想要治好米莱，还需要海风草。我们忙着举办荣花演武，谁去收集呢？
- Foggy Forest Branch... very throw! Very many places! Very Erinnyes! ｜ 幽林枝…十分很丢！十分很多地方！十分伊黎耶！

- After your adventure in the Night Kingdom, I trust you've come to fully understand the meaning of that Name. ｜ 相信在夜神之国的冒险之后，你已经完全领悟了古名所蕴含的意义。
- It looks like we've got the last piece. We should at least be able to negotiate a bit with our opposition now. ｜ 看来我们拿下了最后一分。这样至少就可以和对面斡旋一下了。
- Oh! Looks like our main character is already in position! ｜ 哦！看来我们的主角已经就位了！
- Explore the tower ｜ 在塔楼中探索
- Ah, it's a Jumpy Dumpty! ｜ 啊，果然是「蹦蹦炸弹」！
- One last thing, Miko... I just want to know, have you been well all these years? ｜ 神子啊…老身有个问题想问你，这些年你过得好吗？
- CRIT Hits have a <color=#99FFFFFF>100%</color> chance to generate a small amount of Elemental Particles, which will regenerate 6 Energy for the character. Can only occur once every <color=#99FFFFFF>6</color>s. ｜ 攻击造成暴击时，有<color=#99FFFFFF>100%</color>的几率产生少量元素微粒，能为角色恢复6点元素能量。该效果每<color=#99FFFFFF>6</color>秒只能触发一次。
- Haha, I'm just kidding, of course. This place is for resting, I wouldn't start a fight here — I do have some manners. ｜ 哈哈，当然是玩笑话。这里是用来休息的地方，基本的礼貌我还是懂的哦。
- You're in charge of things now. Don't do anything foolish. ｜ 你就是这一代当家做主的人，不要干蠢事。
- Here they are! ｜ 准备好了。
- But you are no fools, certainly, considering that you knew to follow mine instruction. ｜ 汝等倒也不笨，知道沿着奴家的指引找过来。
- *drooling* Sounds good! Oh, I've never tried any dishes from other nations before. I certainly look forward to it! It's been so long since I've had a decent meal, too. To be honest, the last time had to be when Tighnari came to visit. ｜ 哇，是没吃过的外国菜，真是太期待了！老实说自从提纳里上次来过之后，我已经好久没吃到像样的饭菜了。
- But Keratry wouldn't stop pestering me to take her out. I just couldn't stop her, and ended up taking her outside to play. ｜ 但柯蕾特莉一个劲地嚷着要出去玩。我拗不过柯蕾特莉，只能陪着她出去闲逛。
- Cooking, helping with the family business, exorcising evil spirits, or conquering demons... ｜ 做饭、做生意、驱邪、降魔也好——
- (We've used up all the evidence we collected. There's no way for us to make a rebuttal here.) ｜ （证据已经用完了，没办法形成有效的反驳。）
- Well, we don't necessarily have to track down that specific person. If you have a way of obtaining the information I seek, Miss Dori, I would be happy to compensate you for those services as well. ｜ 当然，也可以省去找人的环节，如果万能的多莉大商人能够直接打听到来源的话，我也愿意支付这笔情报费。
- (So, basically, take these with us, right?) ｜ （是让我们带上这些武器的意思吧？）
- Hanachirusato ｜ 华散之缘
- Paimon thinks we need to find out what happened. C'mon, let's find Ayaka at the Yashiro Commission! ｜ 我觉得有必要去问问这件事。走，我们赶快到社奉行去找绫华吧！
- Alright, so, let's just say that the Crafting Bench we're responsible for has malfunctioned. That, at most, amounts to... what, negligent management? ｜ 好吧，退一万步说，我们蚱蜢派负责维护的合成台出了故障导致有人受伤。那顶多也就算个…管理不善？
- *cough*... Anyway, the abnormality you sensed may have been pollution caused by the energy leakage from this core. ｜ 咳…总之就是说，你们感觉到异样的地方可能正是这个炉心泄露造成的污染。
- Are you looking to go inside and explore, by any chance? Not that I'd stop you, no, but... ｜ 你不会是想要进去探探吧？我倒是也不会阻止你啦，就是…

- Right? Hmph! I knew Pakaa was just being his usual ignorant self. But no more! Once I'm done writing this new song, he'll have no choice but to admit how impressed he is! ｜ 对吧？哼，我就知道是帕卡不识货。等我创作好这首新歌，他一定会被我折服！
- Enemies that strike quickly can seize the initiative in choosing where battle will be joined, and this is an area where Flying units shine. You should select appropriate units to deploy a defensive line in time to prevent their approach while they are still a considerable distance away... ｜ 快速来袭的敌军有着选择交战点的主动权，空中单位尤其如此，我方则应派遣合适的单位，及时建立防线，将其拒止在远处…
- Start the Streaming Projector ｜ 启动「聚流映灯」

- Indeed, it feels a bit lacking. ｜ 确实，欠点意思。

- True, I don't get sick as much, but speaking of being looked after... When I was in Sumeru, I did find myself and my stomach missing your cooking so terribly... ｜ 嗯，我确实很少再生病了，但说到照顾…爱德琳，我在须弥的时候真的很想念你做的菜…
- Unlocks at Friendship Lv. 4 ｜ 好感等级达到4后开启
- What the heck is "caulk"? Is it the glue that holds all the parts of the ship together? ｜ 你说的「黏料」是什么呀，是把船的部件全都粘起来的材料吗？
- Photo ｜ 留影
- He lost his sense of restraint. He started buying more and more things, and even resorted to borrowing money just so he could pay for them. ｜ 后来他就逐渐失去了节制，收藏品越买越多，还开始借债。
- What is it? ｜ 这是…
- Ms. Yun likes a drink with her barbecue, so I ended up getting her to try them out for me. ｜ 只是云老板吃烧烤，就好搭这一口，所以先请她尝尝。

- Huh, so this is where the portal led. Paimon was worried there for a second... ｜ 什么呀，原来传送门传送的是这呀…还害我担心了一小会儿。

- Yes, Dendro promotes plant growth and works especially well on poor crops. ｜ 是的，草元素对生物的生长有很大促进作用，对长势不佳的作物尤其有效。
- According to Vahu{RUBY#[S]Aetiology}mana researchers, this power system most likely had been in widespread use long before the first ruin machine was ever built in ancient Khaenri'ah. ｜ 根据一些因论派学者的推测这类动力系统早在古国坎瑞亚建造第一台遗迹机关之前就已经被广泛使用了。

- "The prelude to battle looms over the world! Come, Traveler, show me how the threads of fate shall be rearranged in your hands!"\nHint: Fischl's deck has "Energy Recharge" and "Elemental Bursts" as its main themes, and includes a large number of cards that can restore Energy. ｜ 「战场的幽幕已然向此世展开，旅人啊，向我展示你拨动命弦的手腕吧！」\n【提示】菲谢尔的牌组以「充能」和「元素爆发」为主题，包含大量能够补充「充能」的卡牌。
- While walking through Hanamizaka, it is hard not to notice a young man of the oni race named Arataki Itto.\nNever mind his horns or piercing voice sticking out like sore thumbs — the sight of him enthusiastically joining in to play childrens' games is enough to set him apart from the crowd.\nIn any case, his obvious lack of things to do stands in stark contrast to Hanamizaka itself, where craftspeople gather in droves and busy themselves all day long.\nItto claims to be the "first and greatest head of the Arataki Gang," the responsibilities and duties of which he tried to explain to some Tenryou Commission officials when they came to him to investigate a rather harmless street brawl. Unfortunately, they interrupted him not two minutes into the explanation before marking him down as "unemployed."\nThat designation is not exactly accurate, of course: other than the Gang's activities, which the Shogunate does not acknowledge, Itto does also do some odd jobs to stay solvent, usually working one day before taking three days off.\nAs such, a more accurate designation should have been "three-quarters unemployed." ｜ 行走在花见坂的街道上，很难不注意到一位名为「荒泷一斗」的鬼族青年。\n姑且不论头顶醒目的鬼角与充满穿透力的大嗓门，仅凭那副在孩子群中兴致盎然参与游戏的模样，就足以让荒泷一斗从芸芸众生中脱颖而出。\n而且，对于工匠云集、终日忙碌的花见坂来说，他也实在是清闲过头了。\n一斗自称「荒泷派初代目头领」，在某次无伤大雅的街头斗殴后，他曾向前来调查的天领奉行官员解释过这份职业，但两分钟后就被对方打断，并记录下「无职」二字。\n「无职」一说并不准确。因为除了不被幕府认可的帮派事务之外，一斗也会做些零工维持生计，工作频率为做一休三，十分稳定。\n就算要写，也应该写「四分之三无职」才对。

- Decreases Swimming Stamina consumption by 15%. In addition, for 10s after using an Elemental Skill, Max HP is increased by <color=#99FFFFFF>20%</color>. For every Hydro Elemental Type character in the party, Max HP is increased by another <color=#99FFFFFF>12%</color>, and the maximum increase that can be achieved in this way is <color=#99FFFFFF>24%</color>. Can be triggered once every 15s. ｜ 游泳消耗的体力降低15%。此外，施放元素战技后的10秒内，生命值上限提升<color=#99FFFFFF>20%</color>，队伍中每存在一位水元素类型的角色，生命值上限将进一步提升<color=#99FFFFFF>12%</color>，至多通过这种方式提升<color=#99FFFFFF>24%</color>，该效果每15秒至多触发一次。

- I've always wanted to see a tanuki shapeshifting. They say it can change into all kinds of things, and that it likes to play pranks on passersby. It's a creature with a sense of humor, that's for sure. ｜ 我一直想见识狸猫的变化手段。传闻中，狸猫能够变化成各种各样的形态，跟路人开玩笑，是一种很有幽默感的生灵哦。

- While I was still in Inazuma, there was a cat with green eyes that always liked to follow me whenever I went out into the wild in search of inspiration. The kitty seemed to be very interested in the colors and patterns of the fabric I was carrying. She would even come up and rub her head against my legs when she was in a good mood.\nLater, I recognized those green eyes again, but on a girl with two tails. The way she gazed at new and intriguing things still had not changed after so many years. ｜ 从前在稻妻，我到野外找设计灵感的时候，总有只绿眼睛的猫喜欢跟在我身边。那家伙好像对我手上布料的颜色和花纹很感兴趣，心情好了还会蹭蹭我的小腿。\n后来，我一眼就认出了这个绿眼睛、背后还长着两条尾巴的女孩。她看那些新奇东西的眼神，这么多年就没有变过。
- Hmm? Oh, did you make the trip all the way back here just to see me? ｜ #咦？{NICKNAME}，你是专程回来见我的吗？
- <color=#FFD780FF>Normal Attack</color>\nPerforms up to 3 rapid strikes.\nAfter using his Elemental Skill "Canopy Hunter: Riding High"'s mid-air swing, he can perform a Normal Attack in mid-air before landing.\n\n<color=#FFD780FF>Charged Attack</color>\nConsumes a certain amount of Stamina to spin and throw his Claymore forward to attack opponents.\n\n<color=#FFD780FF>Plunging Attack</color>\nPlunges from mid-air to strike the ground below, damaging opponents along the path and dealing AoE DMG upon impact. ｜ <color=#FFD780FF>普通攻击</color>\n进行至多三段的连续攻击。\n通过元素战技「悬猎·游骋高狩」进行空中摆荡后，在落地之前能在空中进行一次普通攻击。\n\n<color=#FFD780FF>重击</color>\n消耗一定体力，向前方旋转地投出大剑攻击敌人。\n\n<color=#FFD780FF>下落攻击</color>\n从空中下坠冲击地面，攻击下落路径上的敌人，并在落地时造成范围伤害。

- Wrestling tatankasaurs is a longstanding tradition in my tribe, and winning is seen as a great honor. I decided to give it a shot after I'd been training for a while, but failed several times over, and the experience left me doubting my entire approach to training. Then, a short while later, the chief of the tatankasaurs suddenly flipped and went on a rampage through our settlement. Amid the chaos, I found myself standing between the saurian and a little girl who hadn't managed to escape in time. I had to save her... so I confronted the tatankasaur chief head-on. Somehow, knowing that she was right behind me and needed my protection helped me find a strength within me that I never knew existed. I wrestled with all my might, and I threw that tatankasaur onto its back. That was the day I learned to trust in my training approach again. I realized that training does steadily build your strength over time, but to summon your full strength, you have to call on it from somewhere deep in your soul. ｜ 沃陆之邦有个习俗，就是找突角龙角力，并将这种比赛的胜利视为荣耀。我健身一段时间后，尝试过几次，但都没有成功，一度以为自己的健身策略是错误的。后来突角龙族群的首领突然失控，闯进部族驻地横冲直撞，为了救下一个来不及逃走的女孩，我正面拦下了它。角力过程中，意识到身后有需要保护的人，我竟然爆发出了之前从未察觉到的力量，成功掀翻了它。从那时起我才明白，我的选择是正确的。健身是一个积蓄力量的过程，但把这份力量完全发挥出来所需要的呐喊声，必须来自心灵深处。
- Oh wonderful! I was worried that you'd be busy trying to earn Credit Coupons all the time, but it seems like you haven't neglected your investigation work after all. ｜ 太好了，我原本担心你们会一直闷头赚特许券，看样子你们在调查上也没有懈怠。
- Derives the ability to spur his teammates on from the recited prayers of the knightly order, regenerating HP for all nearby party members. This healing is based on Mika's Max HP and will grant them the Eagleplume state.\n\n<color=#FFD780FF>Eagleplume</color>\nWhen the Normal Attacks of active characters affected by Eagleplume hit an opponent, Mika will help them regenerate HP based on his Max HP.\nCharacters affected by this state can only regenerate HP in this way once per short interval of time.\n\n<i>"Carry hope when in dire straits, and keep vigil when all is well... For that pure white plume shall at last guide the lost wayfarers."</i> ｜ 从骑士团的诵祷中导引鼓舞伙伴奋勇前行的力量，为队伍中附近的所有角色恢复生命值，回复量受益于米卡的生命值上限，并为其施加鹰翎状态。\n\n<color=#FFD780FF>鹰翎</color>\n处于鹰翎状态下的当前场上角色在普通攻击命中敌人时，米卡将为其恢复生命值，回复量受益于米卡的生命值上限。\n处于这种状态下的角色，短时间内至多通过这种方式恢复一次生命值。\n\n<i>「逆境中心怀希望、顺遂时不忘警戒…因为那洁白的翎羽，终将引领迷途的旅者。」</i>

- After receiving your help, the Millelith is finally able to assign a small group to reinforce their defenses around the city.\n\nUnsatisfied with the lack of effort from them, you've come back to the area hoping to find more clues.\n\nTo your surprise, you met Xiao, a Liyue adeptus who has the same intention as you.\n\nYou both discovered that there are some markings at the corners of the construction site.\n\n"If a shackle within the realm of deities and demons got loose, I shall take full responsibility." "But this time, the threat comes from the mortal world — your world, and thus, you shall take full responsibility, mortal traveler."\n\nSo said the adeptus to you.\n\nIn attempting to decipher the markings and to learn its origin, you're reminded of that person that you've met in Mondstadt, a knight who prioritizes results above all else and who acts without care for the line between light and dark... ｜ 为忙碌至极的千岩军稍微搭了把手以后，终于有一个小队表示，可以抽出人力来加强戒备了。\n\n而怀疑此事只是杯水车薪的你，回到了现场，想要再发现一些有用的线索或踪迹。\n\n出乎意料地，在堆放易燃材料的现场，你遇到了同样在查看可疑痕迹的璃月仙人——魈。\n\n建设现场角落的暗处，被人画下了一个符号。\n\n「如果在仙与魔的世界，有什么东西失去桎梏，那就是我的责任。」「但这次的威胁来自人类的世界——你们的世界，所以这是你的责任，人类旅者。」\n\n仙人是这样对你说的。\n\n为了问明这个符号的来历，你想到了之前在蒙德结识的那位，黑白通吃、游走于灰色地带的骑士…
- Hmm, the books about plants and flowers must have belonged to Kazuha's great-grandfather. ｜ 植物花艺类的书，肯定是万叶曾祖父的吧。
- Huh? What's that sound... ｜ 咦？那是什么声音…
- Now, I was in the ore business for a while myself, but not any longer. If you need some, I'd say... this place is a good shout. ｜ 我以前确实做过一阵矿石生意，但现在已经不干啦。您需要矿石吗？就在这个地方，可以过去看看。
- In the end, all I could think about was the unfinished business at my workshop, so I said a quick goodbye to Mualani and returned to my tribe. ｜ 到最后，我满脑子都是工坊里的事务，就匆匆向玛拉妮告别，回了部族里。
- Consecrated Beast ｜ 圣骸兽
- When people are forced into a corner, that is when their greatest strength will appear. I thought it may be an opportunity for him to awaken the Vision. ｜ 人被逼入绝境之时，会爆发出相当强大的力量，我原以为，这会成为神之眼亮起的契机。
- Abandon Warning ｜ 退出警告
- A strange tree whose branches flow with clear, cold moonlight. Perhaps its roots, which reach deep into the heart of the earth, are connected to something that awaits an opportunity to once again emerge and bask in the moon's light. ｜ 枝头流淌着清冷的月光的奇树。深入地心的根系末端，是否又连结着某种等待着再次沐浴月光的悠古之物呢…
- Huh! It's like he's trying to re-enact the fairytale! Sacrificing himself for the crimson oni... ｜ 难道，他想要重现童话里的做法…？！为了赤鬼而自我牺牲…
- Dressing Room unlocked. Collect unique wind gliders and outfits to alter the appearance of your characters. ｜ 角色装扮已解锁。收集珍稀的风之翼与衣装，打扮角色吧
- Twilight Theater Head ｜ 暮夜剧团团长
- So please, take it. I'll take care of a few things, and then I'll figure out how to... y'know, sell this on the sly... ｜ 请您一定收下！我收拾收拾，等会就去看看，怎么才能把这首饰悄悄卖出去…
- Wait, what's on the... Is that... the insignia of the Knights of Favonius? ｜ …慢着，这上面…刻着的是…西风骑士团的徽章！？

- Defeat "Gosoythoth" ｜ 击败「古斯托特」
- ??? ｜ ？？？
- Halt. Those not involved in the proceedings are not permitted to go any further! ｜ 止步！七星请仙，无关人等暂请回避，不可向前！
- Save your strength. You know your station. ｜ 省省力气，你该知道自己情况的。
- Give the Almond Tofu to Chenxiang ｜ 将杏仁豆腐带给沉香
- In the end, the Lantern Rite planning was left to Keqing and myself. I am the head organizer, while Keqing is responsible for the highly anticipated fireworks show. ｜ 海灯节的工作，便落到了我和刻晴肩上。我担任总负责人，至于万众瞩目的「烟花会」，就交给刻晴了。
- As you may have noticed, I haven't given up on investigating the Order of Skeptics' documents. ｜ 如各位所见，我没有放弃整理矫论团的文献。
- Lakelight ｜ 湖光
- Oh. So what? You did offer to treat me to a meal, didn't you? Anyway, I am something of a VIP, you know. Wouldn't you find it embarrassing to treat me anything short of lavishly? ｜ 哦，那又怎样呢？之前说要请客的，不是你们自己吗？再说了，你们忍心亏待我这个贵客吗？
- We had a... full exchange of opinions, and are trying to work out a new design. ｜ 在我们…充分地交流后，正准备尝试一种新的设计方案。
- Increases the Level of <color=#FFD780FF>Opening Flourish</color> by 3.\nMaximum upgrade level is 15. ｜ <color=#FFD780FF>旋云开相</color>的技能等级提高3级。\n至多提升至15级。
- And guess what I got from him? A dealer's ledger! With it, I can avoid dangerous areas in the desert and go to more places! ｜ 你猜我从他们手上买到了什么？一份行商记录！有了它，我就能避开沙漠中的危险区域，去更多地方了！

- ... ｜ ……
- A reed coronet that emanates the spring breeze. ｜ 散发着春风气息的柳冠。
- Luck... ｜ 时运不济…
- I've heard Mondstadt merchants say that the Good Hunter has something they call Cream Stew. I wonder how that might taste... ｜ 我听从蒙德来的商人说，蒙德的「猎鹿人」餐馆有一道菜叫白汁时蔬烩肉，不知道味道怎么样…

- Hibiki will be back any time, after all. Also, she and Domeki said that something good would happen once the stone was complete. ｜ 阿响随时都会回来的。而且她和百目鬼说过，石头奴家做好的时候，就会发生好事。
- Then it'll be time for me and my stowaway brothers to shine. ｜ 我知道，接下来就是我和那些「偷渡」兄弟们的工作了，没错吧？
- Ei ｜ 影
- All trees will cast shade over someone they can protect sooner or later. ｜ 树总有一天会成为它庇护的人的阴凉。

- Alright, let's play a match. ｜ 那就来一局。
- When a nearby party member triggers a Nightsoul Burst, Mavuika's ATK increases by 30% for 10s. ｜ 队伍中的附近的角色触发「夜魂迸发」时，玛薇卡的攻击力提升30%，持续10秒。
- Well... how about some Slime Gel Gloves? They exist, right? I saw an adventurer using them once. ｜ 那么…「史莱姆凝胶手套」总是存在的吧？我看到别的冒险家用过一次。

- We promise to {RUBY#[D]Call for backup}become better men. ｜ 我们一定{RUBY#[D]这就回去招呼兄弟}改过自新。
- *sigh* I really hope they teach these tabloids a lesson they won't forget. It'd sure make my life a lot easier... ｜ 唉，希望这回能好好治治这些小报，也让我消停消停…
- Obtained by cooking ｜ 烹饪获得
- The Jibashiri threatened them, saying that if they didn't give its location up, they would be abandoned in the hanging prison. They would be the last three people left in Enkanomiya. ｜ 地走官们威胁他们说，如果不老实交代，就把他们永远遗弃在悬空牢里。到时候整个渊下宫可就他们三个活人了。
- Sprint Start: II ｜ 冲刺开始·其二
- Exclusives mean a big payout. You're not in our line of work, are you? ｜ 那当然，一篇独家新闻就意味着一大笔酬劳，一看你就不是做我们这行的。
- Okay, let's see about your results, shall we? ｜ 好，让我们看看结果如何！

- "But I couldn't share with anyone the thing that is troubling me so deeply. I couldn't tell them your name." ｜ 「可是，我无法向他人诉说我的烦恼，无法将你的名姓道出。」

- But, we'd have to leave in the— You know what, Kama? You really are "a very big rock." ｜ 但是，要离开离岛——啊啊，好生气。阿釜果然是「很大的石头」。
- Other than those, the fog and the moonlight, the stars and the darkness... Hmm, I can't explain these... ｜ 除此之外…雾与月亮，群星与黑暗…唔，解释不通呢…
- Somber Yet Weary Voice ｜ 厚重却疲惫的声音
