- HP Cost|{param12:P} Max HP ｜ 生命值消耗|{param12:P}生命值上限
- Maximize your resources and try to use all your Elemental Dice each Round ｜ 合理分配资源，尽量每回合用完元素骰
- Consider it your reward for dealing with all those fallen rocks *cough* ... Besides, it may well be of more use to you than to me... ｜ 这里的东西，就当是你们出手解决掉岩石的酬劳，咳咳…而且，说不定交到你们手上，比在我手上有用多了呢…
- It... It was Paimon... ｜ 都、都是派蒙…
- I gotta say, it does intrigue me, the way we all ended up here together. ｜ 我们这些人能像这样巧聚在此，不可不说是一件趣事。
- Time for you to leave. It's... getting dark. ｜ 快回去吧，天…快要黑了。
- I blame your curiosity, Paimon... ｜ 都怪派蒙的好奇心…
- "I am an official member of the Adventurers' Guild! Ad astra abyssosque, towards the stars and the abyss! Isn't it a wonderful motto!" ｜ 「我是冒险家协会的正式会员喔！Ad astra abyssosque，向着星辰与深渊！很棒的座右铭吧！」
- Seirai Island, was it? I'll go there for sure if I get the chance! ｜ 在清籁岛上对吧？等有机会，我一定要自己去看看…
- #Arasaha is right. Seeing Nara {NICKNAME} fighting the Bulky Iron Chunk had us in awe. ｜ #兰沙诃说得对，看到那菈{NICKNAME}和「大方方铁块」对战，如同幼鸟见识到峰巅之高，砾石触及大地之广。
- If we cannot find the Tonatiuh and retrieve the Jade of Return, then everything they did would have been in vain. ｜ 如果无法找到天蛇船，无法拿到「回还之玉」的话，那他们所做的一切就都没有意义了！
- Mine DMG|{param4:F1P} ｜ 诡雷伤害|{param4:F1P}
- An ancient suzerain of the Fontemer Aberrant that dwells in a cavern. Has a body possessed of phantasmal beauty and a temper fiercer than a raging thunderstorm. ｜ 蛰居在岩窟之中的古老原海异种王者。拥有幻兽般优美的身姿与雷霆般酷烈的脾性。
- Oh, we're not interrupting anything, are we? ｜ 嘿嘿，没有打扰你们说话吧？
- Here, your allowance. ｜ 来，这是你们的零花钱。
- #Wait a sec, it's not done yet! We have to wait for {NICKNAME} to finish cooking it first! ｜ #哇！还没有烤呢，得等{NICKNAME}做好才能吃啦！
- Wait for Paimon!!! ｜ 等等我，我们一起逃！
- The Tanit are the tribe from which Jeht hails. Their campsite is in the depths of Deshret Desert, amidst the ruins of what was once the city of Gurabad. If you don't mind, I'll mark it out on your map. ｜ 「塔尼特」是婕德小姐所属的部族，他们的露营地在赤王沙漠深处的居尔城遗迹处…请让我帮你在地图上标出来吧。
- Sounds like everything's going smoothly. ｜ 听起来准备得挺顺利。
- #{NICKNAME}? Did you... wake me up? Thank you. Why are you here... ｜ #{NICKNAME}？是你叫醒了我么，谢谢你，你怎么会在这里…
- Main Cannon, Make Ready... Fire! ｜ 「战船？主炮！开火啦！」
- That means you and the other two must be... ｜ 所以红头发的和他的同伙应该是…
- I'm, uh, Mingbo... I work in the Ministry of Civil Affairs. ｜ 我是明博…隶属于总务司。
- Quest Item ｜ 任务道具
- Paimon can't read this very well... Either way, let's make of note of this mural first, shall we? ｜ 真难懂…总之先把这幅壁画记录下来吧。
- Yes. I tried to write this letter in a... tactful manner. I hope Ms. Hiiragi won't be offended by it. ｜ 是的，我挑了一封我觉得用词最…得体的，希望柊小姐读的时候不会觉得不快。
- Well, now that we've made plans to meet again tomorrow evening, all we can do is pray for Setaria's mission to go off without a hitch. ｜ 既然时间已经定在明晚，那我们现在能做的也就只有祈祷塞塔蕾顺利了。
- Thanks so much for your help! Let's go to Mt. Tianheng, then. That's where the first track starts. ｜ 谢谢你愿意帮忙，那我们快去天衡山吧，我布置的第一条赛道是从那里开始的。
- Well? Did you bring the goods? ｜ 怎么样，用来交换的「货」带来了吗？
- Um, let's keep moving forward and keep our eyes peeled, huh? ｜ 唔，我们还是往前走走看吧。
- Aimed Shot|{param7:F1P} ｜ 瞄准射击|{param7:F1P}
- What about Nantuck? Did you guys find him? ｜ 那楠塔克呢？你们找到了吗？
- Give the gathered journals to Stevens ｜ 将收集到的日志交给史蒂文斯
- What a stubborn enemy! But I'm not giving up either! The future of Fontaine's art rests on my shoulders! ｜ 真是顽固的敌人，不过我也不会轻易放弃，毕竟枫丹艺术的未来就靠我了！
- Hmph, you little liar! ｜ 哼，骗子！
- Handling these balloons every day, seeing how the customers react, the looks on their faces... That's enough for me. ｜ 每天折腾折腾我的热气球，看看乘客们的反应和表情…就已经很充实了。
- Hydro Slime ｜ 水史莱姆
- Receiving a Gift: III ｜ 收到赠礼·其三
- You can count on us. ｜ 包在我们身上。
- Maybe he's been quietly struggling with something... ｜ 或许他也有自己的苦衷吧…
- Gameplay Tutorial ｜ 玩法教学
- And as for you, you will be able to save your companion. ｜ 你也可以，救你的伙伴。
- Hehe, you're not wrong there! I may not understand the mechanical mysteries at work here... But that Cloud Retainer sure is an incredible adeptus for having come up with such ingenuity! ｜ 嘿嘿，那还用说！我是不了解这里面的机构奥妙…但当初布置它们的那位留云借风真君，真是了不得的仙人！
- Such a fascinating and bold deity. How wonderful! Our future may yet be bright after all... ｜ 又有趣又有魄力的神明，真是太好了，未来应该可以放心一些了…
- ... ｜ ……
- But it seems I overlooked one nonetheless. You. ｜ 原来我少算了一个「变量」，那就是你啊。
- Inside the city!? ｜ 城里？！
- That's right. With so much Canned Knowledge flooding the market, it was becoming impossible to fetch decent prices anymore. ｜ 是呀。因为最近罐装知识逐渐泛滥，已经卖不到好价格了。
- With no reason to refuse, the girl accompanied the Dagger Bandit back to the land where the light did not shine. They brought light to that place, and the darkness was dispersed. ｜ 女孩并没有拒绝的理由，跟着大盗回到了无光的国度，他们为那里带来了光明，黑暗就此被驱散。
- And like... it's okay if I'm not destined for greatness. I might not have the qucusaurs' approval, but with my hot air balloons, I can still reach the skies... ｜ 但我也没必要成为那么伟大的人吧，就算没有绒翼龙的认可，我也能靠热气球飞起来…
- Hey, Xilonen. Is something wrong? ｜ 希诺宁，你在这里啊，出什么事了吗？
- Your words paint an optimistic picture indeed. Allow me to remind you, however, few among us are willing to sip from a glass filled with tainted water. ｜ 我有必要提醒你，无论你如何美化它们，都没有人想要品尝「浑浊的水」。
- In Co-Op Mode, this effect only applies to your own character(s). ｜ 多人游戏时，仅对自己的角色生效。
- Huh? Why can't Lisa use it? ｜ 咦？为什么丽莎用不了？
- They're good for your health when consumed in moderation. ｜ 不是过量食用的话，的确对健康有好处。
- Learned from Realm Depot Furnishing Blueprint ｜ 洞天百宝·摆设图纸购买习得
- I'd like to see that... ｜ 想看…
- Haha, now that's the passion we like to see, although... unfortunately, your response was technically one word too long. ｜ 哈哈，这位朋友的热情我们都感受到了，只可惜…少了一个字哟。
- #In that case, we'll leave the experiment in your hands, {NICKNAME}, Paimon. All the best — the success of the project is riding on you! ｜ #那，实验就拜托两位了，{NICKNAME}和派蒙！研究项目的存亡，在此一举。
- A descendant of King Deshret with an amber left eye. The defender of Aaru Village. ｜ 有着琥珀色左眼的赤王后裔，阿如村的守护者。
- My shadow. Everyone says I won't be able to catch it, including my big brother. ｜ 我自己的影子，大家都告诉我是抓不到的，我哥哥也这么说。
- Before I knew it, I had become as tough as her. ｜ 不知不觉，我也成为了一个如她一般坚强的人。
- Character and Weapon Enhancement Material ｜ 角色与武器培养素材
- Kinich ｜ 基尼奇
- Crisis of Shields ｜ 持盾的危机
- After Mr. Raimondo assigned me here to organize the files, I was suddenly informed of my new title. ｜ 自从被雷蒙多先生指派来这里整理之后，就突然被告知，多了这么一个头衔。
- There's absolutely no way they would talk to us then. ｜ 要是这样，肯定不能顺利地对话了。
- Raw pieces of fish with a fruity fragrance. The sheer fragrance bowls you over in the first wave, with sourness and spiciness bringing up the rear, granting this fish layers akin to the tides, with you the surfer on a sea of flavor. Even when the tumult has subsided, your yearning remains. ｜ 带果香的生鱼块。首先扑面而来的是鲜美的冲击，下一波则是酸与辣带来的刺激，小小一块鱼肉有着宛如浪潮般此起彼伏的层次感，仿佛在海上冲浪，浪潮平息后，仍是意犹未尽。
- Arouet ｜ 阿鲁埃
- ...I once had the opportunity to join The Crux, but by the time I signed up, they were full. ｜ …我曾经有机会可以加入南十字船队的，不过到我报名时正好满员了。
- Iansan ｜ 伊安珊
- Unlocks at Friendship Lv. 6 ｜ 好感等级达到6后开启
- A model shield with defined edges, with Xudi having combined descriptions from ancient legends with things he has heard for its construction. It can be mounted on a "Good Shelf" for exhibition.\nAccording to Xudi, this is the "sturdiest shield," which can block any manner of attack without breaking. With its protection, even the most cowardly paper frog can find their courage. As such, it has gained the rather exaggerated name, "Avatar of Valor." ｜ 棱角分明的盾牌模型，由许迪结合古老传说中的描述与自己的见闻构建而成，可被摆放在「好架子」上进行展示。\n据许迪说，这面盾牌是「最坚固的盾」，无论什么样的攻击都无法将其打破。而在这样的保护下，即使是最懦弱的纸蛙都能鼓起勇气来，因此它也有了「勇气的化身」这一夸张的名字。
- Oh? Come and have a chat, kid. Who knows — if the influence of those meteorites gets any stronger, there'll be no one to talk to but in your dreams. *chuckles* ｜ 哦？年轻人，快来聊一聊吧。说不定哪天陨石的影响更严重了，到时候所有的人就只能在梦里聊天咯，嘿嘿嘿…
- It's much better in here than out there. Nothing to worry about, life is stable, and no need to ponder complicated questions. ｜ 这里的生活比外面好多啦，风雨无忧，生活规律，也不需要思考复杂的问题。
- Paimon doesn't quite follow... ｜ 有点听不明白…
- Avidya Forest ｜ 道成林
- But these Blubberbeasts just won't leave, and I daren't approach them... *sigh* ｜ 但这群膨膨兽又待在这里不愿走，我又根本就不敢靠近它们，唉…
- Anyway, when the Domain was rearranging itself, the rooms were moving up and down. The monsters were scattered all over the place! *sigh* I had so much fun fighting them these last few days. ｜ 秘境重组期间，房间会上下移动，魔物也被带着四处乱窜。嗯！这几天，我打得很尽兴。
- Paimon ｜ 派蒙
- What do you want? ｜ …干嘛？
- Increases all party members' DEF by <color=#3399CCFF>165–235</color> for 300s. ｜ 队伍中所有角色防御力提高<color=#3399CCFF>165-235</color>点，持续300秒。
- The suspect... or suspects, have a clear objective. ｜ 犯下这桩案子的犯人…或者犯人们，作案时有明确的目的性。

- We're looking for this thing, aren't we? ｜ 我们要找的就是这个吧？
- $[K1]: When your active character is <color=#FFFFFFFF>$[A1404]</color>, equip this card.\nAfter $[A1404] equips this card, immediately use <color=#FFD780FF>$[S14042]</color> once.\nWhen your $[A1404], who has this card equipped, uses <color=#FFFFFFFF>$[S14042]</color> while having at least 2 levels of <color=#FFFFFFFF>$[C114041]</color>'s Indwelling effect, DMG dealt by <color=#FFFFFFFF>$[S14042]</color> +1. (Max twice per Round)\n(You must have $[A1404] in your deck to add this card to your deck.) ｜ $[K1]：我方出战角色为<color=#FFFFFFFF>$[A1404]</color>时，装备此牌。\n$[A1404]装备此牌后，立刻使用一次<color=#FFD780FF>$[S14042]</color>。\n装备有此牌的$[A1404]在<color=#FFFFFFFF>$[C114041]</color>的「凭依」级数至少为2时，使用<color=#FFFFFFFF>$[S14042]</color>造成的伤害+1。（每回合至多2次）\n（牌组中包含$[A1404]，才能加入牌组）
- Try the Illumiscreen... ｜ 欢迎试玩「玲珑霄灯图」…
- Especially that Alvard... ｜ 特别是那个埃尔瓦德…

- Complete "Signs of Evil" and unlock all endings. ｜ 完成「寻妖觅邪记」，解锁全部结局。
- Yeah. I'm acting as everyone's representative, so I'll need to act brave, even if I won't feel like it. ｜ 嗯，想到代表的是大家，就算害怕我也要打起精神来。
- The White Glove and the Fisherman ｜ 白手套和渔夫
- W—Well, it was certainly exciting! ｜ 还…还挺刺激…
- But now... now, I can taste Mondstadt's Dandelion Wine, and I can order custom-made silks from Liyue... ｜ 现在嘛，终于又能喝到蒙德的蒲公英酒，定做璃月丝绸制作的着物了…
- Wait, aren't we missing someone? Ah! Lord Xbalanque! ｜ 是不是忘了什么人了…啊！希巴拉克大人！
- Think she's also here to play some cards? ｜ 罗莎莉亚也来酒馆打牌？
- #({NICKNAME}, may the fun be with you in the world of Genius Invokation TCG!) ｜ #「{NICKNAME}，希望你能感受到『七圣召唤』的乐趣！」
- Fayz Trials - Event Ending ｜ 「溢神的论证」活动结束提醒
- "This author is currently writing a story in which two heroes who use elemental powers clash with one another."\n"This author is also really particular about the 'backdrop,' even insisting to me several times that it has to look as cool as possible."\n"You know Mt. Yougou here in Inazuma? I reckon that it would make a cool backdrop."\n"Mm, yes, I think that wielding one's elemental powers underneath Mt. Yougou would make for a most awesome scene indeed!" ｜ 「这位作家，似乎正在写一本操纵元素之力的英雄们互相战斗的故事。」\n「而且他似乎很在意『背景』的样子，和我强调了很多次，想要一个有气势的画面背景。」\n「你知道我们稻妻的『影向山』吗？那可是一座看上去很有气势的山喔。」\n「唔，如果能在影向山的衬托下帅气操纵元素之力的话，一定也会很有气势！」
- Sufficient photos have been taken ｜ 已完成足够数量的留影
- Uh, hello? Is someone speaking? Are you hiding in the mud? Hmm, apparently not... ｜ 喂，你好？有人在说话吗？你藏在泥巴里吗？唔，好像不是…
- "For the Fairest One" ｜ 「为最美的那位」
- Hmm... Well, for example, kites in the shape of a butterfly typically symbolize freedom, happiness, or the desire to break free. ｜ 嗯…比如蝴蝶纹样的风筝，多半与冲破束缚、追寻自由与幸福有关。

---
### Part 174

- A luminescent grass that grows all over Mt. Yougou. When the world leaves the twilight behind, the dewdrop glows are extinguished, as if a formless shadow has passed through the grass.\nWhen the night is in full swing, and your mind is filled with thoughts of one you miss but may not meet... Surely you, too, would feel some sadness. ｜ 蕴聚着荧光的琼草，丛生于影向山一带。暮光尽散后，瑰丽的「露草色」斑驳明灭，如有无形的身影穿行草间。\n在夜色四合之时，若是脑海中浮现出心心念念之人的模样，却不见与她重逢的机会…或多或少会感到几分悲戚吧。
- Me neither. ｜ 我也没听懂。
- Masque of the Red Death Increase|{param12:F2P} ｜ 红死之宴提升|{param12:F2P}
- Actually, come to think of it — how have you dressed for formal occasions in the past? ｜ 这么说来，你们以前出席正式场合的时候会怎么打扮呢？
- Opponents' HP increased by 100%. ｜ 怪物血量提升100%。
- The Sakoku Decree! ｜ 锁，锁国令！
- You're fierce on the battlefield. But, when it comes to alcohol, my crew would drink you under the table. ｜ 要是在战场上，你肯定是威风凛凛，虎入羊群。但要是来我们船上喝一顿，怕就是羊入虎口咯。
- Paimon ｜ 派蒙
- And now that we're here, my good outlander guests, wanna try out some surfing training sometime soon? ｜ 说到这个，两位远道而来的异邦客人，之后有没有兴趣也来试试看我们的冲浪训练呀？

- The two of you, please come with me. Before the selection officially begins, there are a few things I still need to tell you. ｜ 那么，二位客人请先跟我来吧。在正式开始选拔前，我还有一些注意事项要告知您。
- Hmm... What should I write on this gift envelope... ｜ 唔…祝柬写点什么好呢…
- You're the owner of this place, and I don't want to take excessive advantage of your hospitality. ｜ 原本就是来做客的，占了主人太多地方就不好意思了…
- Uhm, your expressions... Wasn't it tasty? I thought I did a good job... ｜ 看你的表情，不好吃吗？我觉得还不错呀…
- Chin up! For Rukkhadivine Mushrooms... ｜ 振作起来！为了树王神圣菇…
- Yokina ｜ 尤季娜
- Do you want to play, Nara Friend? Let's start right away if you're ready! ｜ 那菈朋友，要不要来玩？准备好了的话，马上就开始！
- Huh? But how do you have a nursery without seeds... Ah! Could Aranakula have some Ararakalari that can grow Viparyas out of thin air? ｜ 欸？可是没有种子要怎么在苗圃种植…啊！难道是兰那库拉有什么可以凭空种出毗波耶的兰迦拉梨？
- A crane from Port Ormos. Its frame is made from processed Adhigama Wood, and a special mechanism powers its winch, giving it an impressive lifting capacity. All cargo ships entering Port Ormos are unloaded using this crane.\nIn the last hundred years or so, Kshahrewar researchers have been attempting to popularize the use of construction machinery, and this crane was one result of their project. While increasing its lifting efficiency, the crane also takes up very little space and shares many foundational components with other structures in the area. Therefore, it doesn't require a specialized technician to repair, which greatly lowers its construction and maintenance costs. Moreover, these cranes allow Port Ormos to accommodate a higher volume of cargo influx through an increased deployment rate while keeping the budget unchanged. ｜ 可见于奥摩斯港的起重机，以特殊处理后的「证悟木」为骨架，利用特殊的机关驱动绞盘，吊运能力极强，所有进入奥摩斯港的货船都会使用这型起重机卸载大型货物。\n近百年来，妙论派的部分学者正努力推行工程机械的通用化，目前在役的三型通用起重机正是这一项目的成果：该型起重机在提升吊运性能的同时，减小了占地面积，并与其他区域的大量工程共用基础构件，可以由其他建筑的工匠来修缮，从而压缩了建造与维护的成本，有助于在相同预算下提升部署量和出勤率，大大增加了奥摩斯港的吞吐量。
- Knock, knock, knock... ｜ 咚咚咚…
- Hehe, how could I not? You're looking at one of Wanmin Restaurant's regulars, you know! ｜ 嘿嘿！那是当然了，我可是万民堂的常客！
- I thought this would be the only fitting way to repay someone of your stature! ｜ 我认为只有这样的回报，才配得上您的身份！
- Paimon ｜ 派蒙
- Forever in Arms ｜ 「与它们永远相伴」

- Nighttime Whispers in the Echoing Woods ｜ 回声之林夜话
- It is surprisingly a relief. ｜ 居然让我松了一口气。
- I don't understand this at all, but I just want to spend some more time with my family. I don't want them to be sad. ｜ 我不太明白，但我只是想再陪他们一会儿，我不想看见他们难过。
- Pretty good. ｜ 感觉还不错。
- Alright, so we have luck on our side. ｜ 太好了，果然运势站在我们这边。
- Paimon's been meaning to ask that too. Is "Dopey Dazzler" your real name? ｜ 我之前就想问了，你真的就叫…「炫彩呆子」吗？你的本名呢？
- This doll has a light scent to it, too. I'm sure the kid you're sending this to will love it. ｜ 这种带着香气的娃娃，小朋友肯定会喜欢的。
- A pity? ｜ 可惜？
- Unlocks at Friendship Lv. 6 ｜ 好感等级达到6后开启
- Kujou Sara leaves... ｜ 九条裟罗离开了…
- Snowswept Memory ｜ 历经风雪的思念
- As such, before I attend to my other responsibilities, I must first and foremost continue to serve Fontaine as its highest judge. The duty of the Hydro Sovereign and the duty of the Iudex shall coexist within my person. ｜ 所以在履行其他责任之前，我首先要作为最高审判官继续为枫丹效力。二者将在我的生活中并存。
- Kids these days... ｜ 年轻人…
- ...Right away! ｜ ——是！
- She rallied many people around her who were destitute or had lost their sense of purpose in life, and convinced them to join her troupe. She wrote her own scripts, acted on stage, and mentored each and every one of us. ｜ 她劝说很多无家可归或郁郁不得志的人加入剧团，亲自表演，亲手写剧本，还指导我们每一个人。
- Looks like this is the barrier. Hehe, it's not gonna stop us now! ｜ 看来结界就在这里了。哼哼，这回已经难不倒我们了。
- Now, the curtain has finally fallen on her "performance"... The character she portrayed was an imaginary one, yet in playing that role she fulfilled her duties... Though she is meek and full of doubt by nature, she was able to use madness to stiffen her resolve and see her duty through to its conclusion. The work that she has done over the centuries is truly immense. If she were to ever make a return to the stage, I should personally attend the performance and give her my heartfelt applause... Yes, I must do so when the opportunity arises. ｜ 时至今日，她的「演出」终于落幕。「表演」是想象的产物，但芙宁娜却凭此完成了自己的职责…怯懦之人用疯癫让自己勇敢，一直以来辛苦她了。\n有机会的话，应当为她的舞台献上掌声…嗯，一旦有机会的话。
- Finished! Let's go find Hora. I bet he's digging away underneath that tree again. ｜ 好了！我们这就去找霍莱吧，它肯定又在那棵树下面挖土了。
- Whoa, things are really heating up! ｜ 哇，气氛一下子就起来了呢！
- Anyway, we can talk more about that later. Iotham must be somewhere deeper in the cave. We'd better keep moving. ｜ ——这个回头再说。优丹应该在洞窟更深处，我们赶紧走吧。
- Rock Shieldwall Mitachurl ｜ 岩盾丘丘暴徒
- Thank you *cough* ... for helping to clear away those rocks. ｜ 谢谢你们，咳咳…清理掉了这里的岩石啊。
- There's been no noise, no bright lights, no nothing! I couldn't have asked for anything more! ｜ 没有噪音，没有强光，完全可以给满分！
- So I closed the shop, and now I just receive customers next to my flower field. ｜ 所以我就关了店面，只在我的花田旁边接待顾客。
- Among the Seelie that came to follow me, I found one kind that is particularly keen on treasure-seeking. ｜ 在那些过来跟着我不走的仙灵里，我发现了一种特别热衷于寻宝的仙灵。
- A secret between women... I wonder what sort of secret dish that is? ｜ 女孩之间的秘密…到底是什么菜，弄这么神秘。
- So, all in all, this adventure has been pretty meaningful! ｜ 这次的冒险也很有意义呢。
- Maybe this is just... fate's dark design. ｜ 或许是…命中注定…

- "We part in body alone, for our hearts drift with the clouds." ｜ 「别离只此身，心随白云流。」
- This isn't a bad time for it to happen, either. The war has only just ended, and with their long-standing goal suddenly gone, people are feeling a little lost. ｜ 现在这个时段，能有这种事也不错。战争才刚结束，猛地失去了长久以来的目标，人们多少有些迷茫。
- The entirety of Ritou falls under the jurisdiction of the Kanjou Commission. ｜ 整个离岛都在我们勘定奉行的管辖之下。
- But what if you run into people asking for an autograph? ｜ 要是又遇见了人要签名…
- A Fish Called Rhodeia ｜ 一条名叫洛蒂娅的鱼
- Shall we take them to <color=#00E1FFFF>Sister Jilliana</color>? Or you wanna gather some more? ｜ 要直接拿去给<color=#00E1FFFF>吉丽安娜修女</color>吗？还是去再找一些？
- A burning Pyro Slime explodes upon death. ｜ 仍在燃烧的火史莱姆被消灭时，会发生爆炸。
- I was so scared I ran all the way here, until I just couldn't run anymore... Thank goodness I found you and this... uh... maid. ｜ 我被吓得不轻，一路逃到这里，实在是跑不动了…还好遇到了你和这位…唔…女仆小姐。
- Huh? When did you arrive? I didn't even notice... ｜ 欸？你是什么时候来的，我都没注意到…
- They might be with that woman! Get them! ｜ 说不定是那个女人的同伙！给我干掉他们！
- The tales of the vanquished are eventually forgotten, and an Ancient Name cannot survive when the stories of its bearers are lost to time. ｜ 因为失败者的故事，终究会在时间中被遗忘，它的存在本身也很难维系。
- Just as merit must be recognized, mistakes must be penalized. You may have been proven innocent of the more serious allegations leveled at you, but this does not exempt you from bearing the consequences of your mistakes. ｜ 有功当赏，有错该罚。清白已还，但你还是要为自己的所作所为付出代价。
- Iktomisaurs ｜ 暝视龙
- I always wondered what purification was capable of... I knew you were capable of doing it, but seeing it with my own eyes is a unique experience. ｜ 虽然知道你有这种力量，但…原来这就是净化，真是百闻不如一见。
- Earn {param2} points ｜ 达到{param2}积分
- "Master Chicomexochitl, I am a merchant from Fontaine. I would like to ask you: Where should I go to find personal happiness?" ｜ 「奇科梅科奇特莉大师，我是来自枫丹的商人，我想要求教您，我该去往何方，才能寻找到属于我的幸福呢？」

- Exquisite Chest ｜ 精致的宝箱
- Uh-huh, uh-huh! Yoimiya plays with us and tells us stories all the time. She wouldn't tell a lie! ｜ 就是就是，宵宫姐姐经常陪我们玩，给我们讲故事，她绝对不会骗人！
- "...The Inspector flew into a rage and slashed Katsuragi. The great blade cut deep into the flesh...cast his own nagamaki into the furnace's flame..." ｜ 「…目付大人震怒，斩桂木。入胴之深，此物是为大业物…并将亲造之长卷弃于踏鞴炉中…」
- With the Phantom Weasel arrested, Lyney's show can finally take place. Fingers crossed that everything goes smoothly... ｜ 怪盗貂被抓捕归案，林尼的魔术秀可以顺利举办了。希望一切顺利…

- Hmm? Oh, hey, I wasn't expecting to run into you here. ｜ 嗯？真巧，你也在酒馆啊。

- Good to see this in the hands of a reliable Guild member. Well then, good luck. The Guild will take care of the details of this commission. ｜ 不错，真是可靠的协会会员。那么，一路顺风，委托的细节就由协会来处理吧。

- Let wisdom become another weapon in your arsenal. ｜ 让智慧也成为你的武器。
- It's getting difficult for those poor folks to get water now. They have to go all the way to Chihu Rock, or even further afield. ｜ 现在大家取水很不方便，不少人都只能去吃虎岩或者远一点的地方取水。

- The inscriptions on a monument in the ruins say that the winds of the distant past will guide the way to the Tonatiuh once Pyrophosphorite is placed on the Altar of Primal Flame within the ancient city. ｜ 老爹他们在遗迹中找到的铭文上说，只要将火磷石奉献到古城里的源火祭坛上，来自久远过去的风便会指明通往天蛇船的道路。
- Alright, see that rock over there? First, you need to travel in that direction! ｜ 好了，看到那边那块石头了没，首先，你们得先往那个方向去！
- It's made using the Great Thunderbird's power, so if you have keen elemental senses like Ruu does, finding them would be a cinch. ｜ 因为是雷鸟大人的力量凝聚成的，所以如果像阿瑠那样，对元素有敏锐的感觉，就能轻易找到了。
- Restrain this fellow! Tightly now, we mustn't let him get away. ｜ 各位，加把劲，把这个人捆得再严实些。

- Can you stop conflating the show on stage with your real-life relationships in the troupe? ｜ 不要把舞台演出和剧团里的关系混为一谈行吗？

- Itzayah ｜ 伊扎娅
- These tall things look like hilichurl towers to Paimon. ｜ 这些高高的东西，看起来像是丘丘人的哨塔。

- Huh? Are you offering to treat me to a meal? ｜ 哇，是要请我吃饭吗？
- Servant of the Stone Drake ｜ 使役岩之魔蜥的战士
- The wallet contained a picture taken by the owner of the wallet, and in the background of that photo was a criminal on the run. ｜ 钱包里有失主拍摄的画片，画片的背景里偏巧拍到了一位在逃通缉犯。
- Sangonomiya and the Shogunate have signed their ceasefire agreement. Guess we shouldn't expect a resumption of the conflict any time soon. ｜ 珊瑚宫和幕府的休战协议已签，应该不会再开战了吧。

- Weapon Ascension Material.\nAccording to ancient tribal tradition, all that a person takes comes from this world — so naturally, all that they gain shall also be given back to it. ｜ 赋予武器突破之力的材料。\n在部族古老的传统之中，有这样的观点：你所取的都是来自于这个世界，于是你所得的也将献于这个世界。
- Weapon Ascension Bundle (Very High) ｜ 武器突破自选-超级
- A vibrant plant that has also been named "lycoris" by the poets. It was once thought extinct in the Inazuman archipelago, only to re-emerge now upon the battlefields. It is said that it blooms most enchantingly where much blood was spilled.\nThough it is very rare and expensive, this plant is regarded as ominous, and thus is little purchased. Rumor has it that these plants are watered using blood. The bloodier and more brutal the battlefield, the more lovely the dendrobium blooms shall be. Inazumans believe that the souls of the fallen shall follow the winding paths of the bloodied dendrobiums into the next life, thus rejoining the eternal elemental cycle. But as for those who doubt or are perplexed by "eternity," they shall be shackled to the earth, becoming another enchantingly red flower amid the vermillion fields. ｜ 在诗文中也被称为「赤蕊」的鲜艳植物，一度在稻妻列岛绝迹，如今在战场上再度重现。传说在血腥的战场上，它们开得格外妖艳。\n虽然格外稀少昂贵，但由于在稻妻人心中颇为不祥，销路也不大。传言说这种植物以鲜血浇灌而成，愈是血腥惨烈的战场，血斛便开得愈发盛大艳丽。稻妻人认为，战殁的灵魂将踏着血斛之花铺成的曲折道路前往彼世，归于永恒的元素循环；但对「永恒」抱持怀疑而迷惘的魂灵，将会被大地束缚，成为朱色苗圃中的另一朵妖红之花。
- ...How are you holding up? Would you like some support, Miss Callirhoe? ｜ …还行吗？要不要我扶着卡莉露小姐？

- Fischl: "Behold, the sight of the Prinzessin der Verurteilung as she descends from the darkling heavens amid the profuse flowering of ideals — how like it is unto the descent of a savior of the mortal realms!"\nOz: "If I may impose, mein Fräulein, please refrain from grabbing my wings to perform tight turns. I fear that my feathers might fall off..." ｜ 菲谢尔：「自天穹的深色中坠落，拾掇飘摇的信念之花…吾之身姿，宛如降临世间的救主！」\n奥兹：「小姐，下次请别拽着我的翅膀强行转弯，会把羽毛揪下来…」

- A succulent shaped like the paw of a great animal.\nIt is said that there was a time when the plants that grew here could shapeshift at will, almost as if they were some kind of enigmatic dragons. Some would appear poisonous or dangerous in other ways to avoid being eaten by herbivores. If this is indeed true, it is not hard to understand why the Saurian Claw Succulent — true to its name — came to take on the form it still has today. ｜ 形如巨大动物爪掌的多肉植物。\n据说从前，生长在此处的植物与神秘莫测的龙一般，可自如转变自己的形体，有些就会拟态成危险或含有毒素的样子，以免被食草的兽类啃食。如果这个说法当真的话，确实不难理解为何肉龙掌形如其名，拥有现在这样的形态。

- Eide ｜ 埃德
- Fontaine's laws are very strict, but its people are quite free-spirited. Fontainian society contains all manner of social organizations, clubs, or factions, all of which have their own origins, development, goals, and style.\nFor example, the short-lived Hat Jellyfish Association ostensibly promoted the protection of the waters and those living within, but was in truth founded by a band of explosives enthusiasts.\nBy comparison, the Spina di Rosula are a law-abiding, reliable lot, their overly rambunctious young President notwithstanding.\nIn official statements, the Spina proclaims itself to be a citizen-oriented society that involves many walks of life and focuses its efforts on solving difficult issues amongst the common folk, and that it will cooperate with the Fontainian authorities where needed.\nIf you ask Navia, she'd tell you that the Spina serves as a business partner with all sorts of people in it, that will help with any problem, using the velvet glove or the iron fist as appropriate.\nNeither of these descriptions are mistaken, at least in broad strokes, so you may choose the one you prefer — though it is worth noting that those who choose the latter wording will find it easier to make friends with Navia. ｜ 枫丹的律法十分严谨，民风却相对自由。社会内有着大大小小的民间组织，或称帮派，它们起源不一、发展不一、目的不一、风格不一。\n比如曾经短暂出现的「帽子水母帮」，这个对外主张保护水域生态环境的组织，其实是由一群爆破爱好者成立的。\n和这种组织相比，尽管刺玫会的年轻会长有些过分活泼，但基本上还是一个守法、可靠的好组织。\n按照官方的对外说法，刺玫会是一个以民生为本，涉及各行各业，致力于为民众解决疑难问题，在必要时也会与枫丹当局沟通合作的帮会。\n如果问娜维娅的话，她会说刺玫会是一个什么人都有，什么忙都帮，在合适的时候说合适的话、开合适的枪的生意伙伴。\n两种说法大约都没有错，人们可以选择自己喜欢的那个。只是选择后者的人，可能更容易成为娜维娅的朋友。
- You apply with Grainville to do some of the simpler processing tasks, and get some Credit Coupons without breaking a sweat. ｜ 向格兰维尔申请了一些简单的加工工作，轻松拿到了特许券。

- Time to show 'em the might of the Arataki Gang! For a time, Itto lets out his inner Raging Oni King, wielding his Oni King's Kanabou in battle.\nThis state has the following special properties:\n· Converts Itto's Normal, Charged, and Plunging Attacks to <color=#FFE699FF>Geo DMG</color>. This cannot be overridden.\n· Increases Itto's Normal Attack SPD. Also increases his ATK based on his DEF.\n· On hit, the 1st and 3rd strikes of his attack combo will each grant Arataki Itto 1 stack of Superlative Superstrength.\n· Decreases Itto's Elemental and Physical RES by 20%.\n\nThe Raging Oni King state will be cleared when Itto leaves the field.\n\n<i>This is the pinnacle technique of the ultimate fighting style (according to Itto). It would be pointless for Arataki Itto to reference any other fighting styles to improve his own, for he, and no other, is the strongest, most terrible oni in the land.</i>\n<i>Shouta thinks it looks really cool.</i> ｜ 是时候展现荒泷派的一斗之威名了！在接下来的一段时间内化身「怒目鬼王」，使用鬼王金碎棒战斗。\n具有如下特性：\n·普通攻击、重击与下落攻击造成的伤害转为无法被附魔覆盖的<color=#FFE699FF>岩元素伤害</color>；\n·提高荒泷一斗普通攻击的攻击速度，并基于其防御力，提高攻击力；\n·第一与第三段攻击在命中敌人时，将为荒泷一斗自己提供1层「乱神之怪力」效果；\n·荒泷一斗的所有元素抗性与物理抗性降低20%。\n\n「怒目鬼王」状态将在荒泷一斗退场时解除。\n\n<i>一斗奥义中的奥义（自称）。为了变强去模仿其他东西没有意义，因为世界上最强最恶的鬼王即「荒泷一斗」是也。那一斗只要去模仿一斗就可以了！</i>\n<i>翔太觉得很帅。</i>

- I'm just gonna stop you there and say no. If anything, I'm saving you time. ｜ 「我这样果断地拒绝你，其实是在帮你节省时间。」

- I am Master Crepus's adopted son, and Master Diluc's brother. However, as a serving Captain with the Knights of Favonius, I am rarely at the winery. ｜ 我是克利普斯老爷的养子，迪卢克老爷的兄弟，一直在西风骑士团工作，不常出现在酒庄。
- Seems the fever's gone. ｜ 也没有发烧了。
- This is no ordinary Iridescence Tour. Me and Jack-Attack are teaming up to turn this into the "Iridescent Arataki Rockin' for Life Tour de Force of Awesomeness"! ｜ 这不是普通的「虹色巡回」，是我与沙克兄强强联合的「荒泷生命摇滚虹色大巡回」！

- Heehee... Today's your birthday, I'm so excited! The tradition in our tribe is to get all your friends together and host a bonfire feast in your honor. The birthday person gets to cheers everyone and drink as much as they want! Although... with you being so famous, I guess you'd end up having to down at least a thousand drinks... Which would be great fun, I'm sure, but probably not the best thing for your liver. And it could get exhausting, too... Hmm, how about something more low-key instead? Like... a private party at my secret campsite? ｜ 欸嘿嘿…今天是你的生日，我也好开心好开心！按照「沃陆之邦」的传统，我们会邀请亲朋好友，为寿星办一场篝火宴会，寿星会跟每个人碰杯畅饮！但我感觉，以你的名气，办篝火宴会的话，至少要喝几千杯酒，开心是开心，就是太伤身了，而且也会很累…要不然，我们就去我的秘密野营地，来一次悠闲的庆祝会？
- I knew it, I just knew it! Be they human or Saurian, ambitious warriors are always drawn to one another! ｜ 果然，人也好，龙也好，拥有进取心的勇士会互相吸引！！
- As expected, there are a load of rifthounds here, too. ｜ 果然这里也有很多兽境猎犬。
- And yet the storm hasn't abated at all... ｜ 但是雷暴还没有平息啊…
- Look, I know everyone's using the same promotional tactics, but... does that really make it okay? ｜ 梅里埃导演…我知道新戏要请人宣传是常事…但这真的，还是「正常」的手段吗？
- Huang the Third! We're back! ｜ 黄三爷，我们回来啦！
- Farrokhzadan Note (I) ｜ 「法罗赫之子」的笔记·其一
- Repel the Treasure Hoarders and rescue the merchant being threatened by them. ｜ 击退所有盗宝团，救下被盗宝团胁迫的商人。
- Okay. Get ready... Oh, and no peeking. ｜ 那么，准备好——啊，不许偷看。
- This shrine really seems to lack the whole divine affection thing, huh... ｜ 神社真是个不讲情面的地方…
- When my first introductions with people take place in the water, they've generally gone... a bit less swimmingly. ｜ 一般来讲，我如果是在水里和一个人认识，那他的状况可就不好说了。
- Over there! Those must be the hilichurls we're looking for. ｜ 看那里，应该就是那些丘丘人了。
- Crab Bait ｜ 螃蟹诱饵
- Moreover, I heard that the head of the Kamisato Clan was injured by the fleeing swordsmiths, which, combined with his advanced age, caused him to pass away shortly thereafter. ｜ 不仅如此，我听说神里家家主也被叛逃者所伤，再加上年事已高，不久后就过世了。
- ??? ｜ ？？？
- And even worse, they're sending troops to attack our main base... ｜ 而且，他们正在派兵往我们的大本营进攻…
- We didn't know it would turn out like this... ｜ 我们也没有料到…会变成这个样子…
- There'll be a victory feast tonight, right? ｜ 今晚是不是有宴会？
- Sure. See you. ｜ 嗯，再见。
- Seagrass found by the seaside generally isn't that fresh. There's always a little something missing in the flavor of dishes you make that way. ｜ 那种在海边就能采到的海草都不太新鲜，用来做菜总感觉少点味道。
- Sea-Dyed Blossom ｜ 海染之花
- You... you... ｜ 你们…你们…
- Not only will I be promoted to Herbad, I could even be addressed as Pir Jazari. ｜ 这次不仅升为诃般荼不在话下，说不定还会被称为加扎里师呢。
- Yes, that would be perfect. I've been meaning to ask for your guidance on many things. ｜ 正合我意。我憋了许多问题，早就想向你请教了。
- Fontaine Remarkable Chest Reward ｜ 枫丹地区奇馈宝箱奖励
- (Emilie is doing her best to treat her Master... We shouldn't interrupt her.) ｜ （艾梅莉埃正在想办法救治…还是不要进去打扰了。）
- Time Taken ｜ 所用时间
- "The letter you commissioned us to deliver was delivered as requested some time ago. Please accept the reality of the situation." ｜ 「您委托投递的信件早已送达。还望您能够接受现实。」
- Matching players... ｜ 正在匹配其他玩家
- I wish to exercise my right to defend our lady. Mr. Joinville, you only know of Navia's goodness, but nothing of her utterly independent mind. ｜ 我要行使辩护权。瑞安维尔先生，你只知道娜维娅善良的一面，却不知道她在善良的同时还拥有完全独立的思想。
- Oh no, is it because of me? Is the innkeeper fed up with you because you've been feeding me all this time? ｜ 呀，难不成真是我在你这吃喝太多，惹你被掌柜的嫌弃了？
- Desert of Hadramaveth ｜ 千壑沙地
- Speaking for myself, I'd rather see him recognize and atone for his mistakes than see him punished for them. ｜ 对我来说，比起惩戒罪人，更希望他能迷途知返。
- #Color: {FIREWORK_REFORM#1}\nSize: ×{FIREWORK_REFORM#3}\nHeight: {FIREWORK_REFORM#2}\nRotation: {FIREWORK_REFORM#5}°\n\nA firework that explodes in the shape of heart. Some say that if you view this from just the right angle, your love life for the year shall be blessed. ｜ #色彩 {FIREWORK_REFORM#1}\n大小 ×{FIREWORK_REFORM#3}\n高度 {FIREWORK_REFORM#2}\n旋转 {FIREWORK_REFORM#5}°\n\n心型的创意烟花。传说从最端正的角度欣赏到这种烟花后，很快就会迎来最美妙的爱情运势。
- Sorush ｜ 斯露莎
- Interesting Things ｜ 感兴趣的见闻…
- *sigh* What a headache. ｜ 啊，真是头疼…
- Hah, now that the Offering Box has been repaired, the shrine shall soon return to its former thriving glory... ｜ 哼哼，既然「塞钱箱」已经修好了，那神社一定会很快重新热闹起来的…
- Replenish using other means ｜ 其他方式补充
- Nahida is a god. Changing into a Fungus should be a piece of cake for her. ｜ 纳西妲可是神明，变成一只蕈兽应该轻轻松松吧？
- Or, if you ever think about me during your journey, take it out, won't you? Who knows, maybe I'll just end up appearing right in front of you. ｜ 当然，想我的时候也可以拿出来哦？说不定我会忽然蹦出来见你呢？
- But wasn't this device also within said ruins? And wasn't it also a work of Edwin Eastinghouse that used... Arkhium as its energy source...? ｜ 但是这个「实验性场力发生装置」也在废墟之中。而且它还是艾德温·伊斯丁豪斯的研究成果，利用那个…「始基矿」作为能源…
- {2}:{3}, {0}/{1}/{4} ｜ {4}年{0}月{1}日 {2}:{3}
- Cloud Retainer...? ｜ 留云借风真君…？
- Used to be? ｜ 曾经？
- Maybe you can help me! Even though I've been getting more sleep recently, I haven't gained any height at all. Any ideas? ｜ 你帮我出出主意吧，最近虽然越睡越多，但是好像已经没有再长高了。
- Paimon ｜ 派蒙
- A flower carved from grey stone covered with gold foil. Legends say that during a war, it was used to differentiate friend from foe. ｜ 由灰石雕刻并巧贴金箔的花，传说在一场战争中，曾作为敌我双方区别的凭证。
- Vasoma Fruit and Bija... ｜ 恒素果和惟耶之实…
- D—Do they...? ｜ 是…是吗？
- Hehe, y'think so too? Let's give it a shot, then! ｜ 嗯，你也觉得可行吗？那就试试看吧！
- So there's no deeper purpose? My, it's quite hard to understand stories written these days. ｜ 所以就只是为了修辞吗？这年头的故事，还真是难以理解。
- If you could, my lords, please help me find these stone slates, that I might investigate them— ｜ 接下来，烦请二位大人搜寻石板，让我来研究一番…
- Bloomflower Trials ｜ 荣花演武
- After all, I was so busy dealing with all sorts of outsourcing requests from the Fontaine Research Institute, that I simply didn't have the time to do any formal academic writing. ｜ 因为，我之前忙着处理枫丹科学院的各种外包订单，来不及做书面工作。
- I'd really love to take this teapot apart and learn more about it. Although, I'm not too confident that I'd be able to put it back together correctly afterwards... On second thought, forget I said anything. ｜ 我很想把那个壶拆开看看，可惜暂时没有把握组装回去，还是算了吧。
- "Don't you dare die on the battlefield, Kujou Tengu! You still owe me a duel!" ｜ 「天狗你也别轻易死在战场上！回来决斗呀！！」
- Hora! Be a good boy now, and stay still! I'm just going to give you a quick wipe-down... ｜ 霍莱！听话，别动！就是稍微擦洗一下！
- Trapped Yumkasaur ｜ 受困的匿叶龙
- Armuta. ｜ 阿利弥多学院。
- For what it's worth, I can pass on what others have told me. But I advise you to take it with a pinch of salt. ｜ 我就随便说说啊，你就听听看就行了，别太当真，我也是听人家说的…
- I lost all my chances of a normal life just because I was born into their lot! Not only that, but because they wanted me to become an undercover agent, they stripped me of my name, too! ｜ 因为不是一个肚子里出来的，所以就得给他们当手套！因为要去当卧底，所以就连自己的名字都不配有！
- About my reputation with the Flower-Feather Clan... ｜ 我在「花羽会」的声望…
- Go to the wharf at Liyue Harbor ｜ 前往璃月港的码头
- Pops Xing ｜ 兴叔
- Go to the docks ｜ 前往码头
- Like my new stratagem? ｜ 一道新战术。
- Marcotte ｜ 茉洁草
- Kirya ｜ 基里亚
- Furnishing Blueprints ｜ 摆设图纸
- Use Fantasia Flowers ｜ 消耗「幻剧之花」
- Boundary Marker Inscription ｜ 界碑上的刻文
- Try look for buried objects ｜ 尝试挖掘埋藏的物件
- Leave the tent ｜ 离开帐篷
- I'll do it. ｜ 我知道了…

- Like ｜ 好评
- Max Storm DMG|{param4:P} ｜ 最大爆风伤害|{param4:P}
- It's okay. I find it quite interesting. I didn't realize that this was how ordinary people viewed the Shogun. ｜ 没事，还挺有意思的，没想到在普通民众的眼中，将军是这样的形象。
- You and your friends fell from the top of that waterfall, and you passed out along the way. Guess someone couldn't keep it together... ｜ 你们一群人突然就从瀑布上掉了下来，其中有一个还不争气地晕了过去。
- Is that so...? Thank you. We will talk about everything else later. ｜ 是吗…多谢你了。别的事情，我们晚些再聊吧。
- If my suspicions regarding the portal network are correct, then the fact that there is a portal leading here tells us that the Abyss Order has their eyes on this location. ｜ 假如我对「传送网络」的猜测是正确的，刚刚我又恰巧被传送至此，那就证明在深渊教团眼里，此处存在着设立传送节点的价值。
- 2-Hit DMG|{param2:F1P} ｜ 二段伤害|{param2:F1P}
- Ley Line Disorder ｜ 地脉异常
- What do you mean by that? ｜ 你说这话是什么意思？
- Ah, the messenger's here. ｜ 啊，你们看，讯使来了。
- Magical Crystal Chunk ｜ 魔晶块
- Pyrotechnic Strike DMG|{param15:F1P} ｜ 礼花术弹伤害|{param15:F1P}
- Great. Don't be too long. I'll be here waiting! ｜ 那么，请你快去快回吧，我就在这等着你。
- My little saurians... I promise I won't be so strict with you anymore... ｜ 我的小龙…爷爷再也不凶你们了…
- As for my roundabout approach... Well, that was something which I had no choice but to do. ｜ 而我采取这种迂回的办法，确实也有不得已之处。
- Before Edgar can finish speaking, he completely passes out. ｜ 艾德加话没说完，就彻底昏了过去。
- As such, some of my memories may yet be helpful to you. ｜ 或许有些回忆能够帮助到你们呢。
- Complete "Prelude of Blancheur and Noirceur." ｜ 完成「白露与黑潮的序诗」。
- Hmph. It's because of her family, I'm sure of it. They never liked me, didn't want her to have anything to do with me. So they waited for an opportunity to quietly move out of Qingce Village for good. ｜ 哼，准是她家里人不喜欢我，不想她和我在一起，就找了个机会，不声不响地带着她，整家从轻策庄里搬走了。
- According to Viktor, he lost his box near the Thousand Winds Temple, and it still bears some Electro elemental traces. You might be able to follow these clues to find the box that you seek... ｜ 据维克多说，那个盒子的丢失地点应该在千风神殿附近，而且盒子上还附着有元素的痕迹。如果循着这些线索，也许可以找到那个盒子…
- Furnishing Blueprint ｜ 摆设图纸
- Shot 1 ｜ 第1镜
- O—Oh! Th—Thank you so much for calling me a knight! ｜ 噢、噢噢！您…您竟然愿意称我为骑士，万分感谢！
- It seems we have to use Hydro to collect Romaritime Flowers. ｜ 要采集这种海露花的话，好像要先对它使用水元素力呢…
- And you are... ｜ 你是…
- It's already damaged, but Paimon feels sad thinking about it getting disassembled. ｜ 虽然它已经损坏了，可一想到它要被拆掉，我还是觉得有点难过。
- Talk to Ann ｜ 与安对话
- Gameplay Overview ｜ 玩法介绍
- I bet he's gotten himself all dirty playing outside. Bring him back and give him a bath. ｜ 它肯定在外边玩得脏兮兮的，把它带回来给它洗个澡。
- I am very sorry... I was just too embarrassed before, and so never explained clearly. ｜ 实在是对不起…之前觉得太丢人了，一直没能解释清楚。
- Don't worry about it. I'll handle all the arrangements. ｜ 你们就别操心了，这件事我来安排吧。
- Rawr? ｜ 呀？
- So I came to Dragonspine by myself. If he's not going to come find me, then I'll go looking for him... Or so I thought... ｜ 我就一个人来到雪山了。既然他没法来找我，我就来找他好了…
- Eh-he? ｜ 欸嘿？
- Her Excellency, the Almighty Narukami Ogosho, who promised the people of Inazuma an unchanging Eternity. ｜ 其身为御建鸣神主尊大御所大人，许稻妻人民以亘古不变之「永恒」。
- It will take a moment for me to finish my work. Don't keep the lad waiting, now! ｜ 我整理情报还要些时间，可别让那孩子等急了。
- Opportunities to bask in the sunlight like this are few and far between. ｜ 能悠闲晒太阳的时间可不多。

- Abyss Mage ｜ 深渊法师
- As stated in the Fontaine Foreign Species Management Act and the Quartier Lyonnais Code of Business Conduct, you may proceed with your event. ｜ 根据《枫丹外来物种管理法》与《利奥奈区商业行为规范》，你可以继续举办活动了。
- Unlocks at Friendship Lv. 4 ｜ 好感等级达到4后开启
- You mean... This was all a trick so that you'd be left alone with me? Colter, are you with Romeuf too? ｜ 难道说是调虎离山？科尔特，你也是罗默夫的人？
- I've discovered something far more important... and far more terrifying. ｜ 我发现了…更可怕、更重要的事呀。
- Th—This logic... ｜ 这、这…
- I could be standing on the right side of the law, eh? ｜ 就是站在正义这边的好人哦。
- Congratulations. ｜ 恭喜你。
- Cleansing Bell ｜ 涤尘铃
- The time has come to harvest the sweet, ripe grapes and wait for the wines to mature. ｜ 正是葡萄成熟的时候，把甘甜的葡萄摘下，等待酒酿成的时节吧。
- There's something blocking the Mist Bubble! That's no good! ｜ 附近好像还有阻挡水泡的障碍！这可不行！
- Charged Attack Final DMG|{param7:P} ｜ 重击终结伤害|{param7:P}
- A book that was popular 100 years ago? It doesn't sound like something that'd be popular now, to be frank. ｜ 一百年前的流行书…听上去不是能热卖的类型呢。
- Charged Attack|{param4:P}/{param5:P}/{param6:P}/{param7:P}/{param8:P} ｜ 重击伤害|{param4:P}/{param5:P}/{param6:P}/{param7:P}/{param8:P}
- What kind of place will we find ourselves in? Paimon's getting excited! ｜ 会去到一个什么样的地方呢？还有点小小的兴奋呢！
- "O stars high above the wasteland..." ｜ 「群星升起在荒原之上…」
- Sure, I'll give it a go. ｜ 我来试试。
- Never-changing eternity is the promise I made to my people. ｜ 千世万代不变不移的永恒，这是我给予臣民的许诺。
- This seems to have once been an ancient ritual site, but it has since been taken over by ruin machines from the outside.\nThose who defeat these mechanized invaders may obtain precious artifacts. ｜ 原本似乎是古代的祭场，如今已经被外来的遗迹机关占据了。\n能够战胜踞身其中的机关入侵者的话，或许就能获得珍贵的圣遗物吧。
- "I am too old to take to the battlefield, and I thank all the young people for their contributions... it's just that my three sons have yet to come home." ｜ 「老夫是没法上战场了，也很感谢小伙子们的奉献…只是老夫的三个儿子至今还没回来。」
- Mm. ｜ 呶。
- Huh? Eula? ｜ 欸？优菈？
- Holy Sovereign's Notes (III) ｜ 圣王的手记·其三
- I had gotten pretty familiar with the hike, so I brought Haydar with me. I'm just glad we didn't meet any monsters along the way. ｜ 路线我也踩得比较熟了，我就带海达来了这里，幸好没遇到什么魔物。

- This seems like solid evidence. Let's take it back to Victoria. ｜ 这应该可以证明了，我们回去找维多利亚小姐吧。
- What about the real murderer who was later caught by Sango? ｜ 那后来被珊瑚抓住的「真凶」呢？
- Foundations of Stone: Grand Design ｜ 铸石地基-「鸿图华构」
- Level up character to Lv. {0} and reach Adventure Rank {1} to ascend ｜ 角色提升到{0}级且冒险等阶到达{1}级可以突破
- Open the stone on the yellow cloth. ｜ 黄色布上的那块…
- Emura Chuuya's Hideout ｜ 江村中弥的藏身地
- Perhaps the villagers know where he is. You'd better ask around. ｜ 你要是想找他的话，就去找其他人问问吧。
- Huh? But don't we already have a partner from the last round...? ｜ 欸？我们上一轮不是…
- I don't understand... Why won't anyone believe us? ｜ 我不理解，为什么没人愿意相信我们呢？
- I made some little changes. Akasha Terminals are already capable of sending messages. I just tweaked it so that it can connect to any node. ｜ 我稍微加了一点改造，虚空终端本来就有传递讯息的功能，我只是让它变得可以指向任意节点。
- Well, Enjou, don't you think you're a bit too quick on your feet? ｜ 这个嘛…渊上你行动力是不是太强了。
- Defeat %1% opponent(s) within %2% second(s) ｜ 在%2%秒内击败%1%只怪物
- Mm. ｜ 呶。
- Pyro-1 has become more than just a pawn to you. ｜ 你已经心软了。
- Haha... You two are a fascinating pair I must say. ｜ 哈哈，你们两位是很有趣的人啊。
- Hilichurl ｜ 丘丘人
- Let's play again. ｜ #{PLAYERAVATAR#SEXPRO[INFO_MALE_PRONOUN_BIGBROTHER|INFO_FEMALE_PRONOUN_BIGSISTER]}，我们接着玩吧。
- Whew, today's work sure is off to a great start. No sooner do I get the package than I run into its recipient. Praised be the Pyro Archon! ｜ 嗯，真是火神保佑，刚拿到的快件就找到了收货人，今天的工作有了个好的开头啊。
- Starsilver ｜ 星银矿石
- Fulminating Sandstorm ｜ 风沙轰鸣
- About Varka ｜ 关于法尔伽…
- (A personal matter... involving me? Surely I haven't done anything improper recently, have I?) ｜ （私人问题？不应该啊，我最近没有出现任何办事不妥的情况才对…）
- But, I can't guarantee we'll be able to complete it, either. ｜ 我也不保证能完成哦。
- Activate Target ｜ 激活目标
- Nuu's student over there. ｜ 比如那个努乌的学生。
- Karkata ｜ 卡卡塔
- "Better get to our work now. We can't afford to live with the few supplies delivered to Aaru Village every month." ｜ 「我看还是老老实实打工要紧，光靠每个月往阿如村运的那点物资，可不够我们这些人活的。」
- Stardust Exchange ｜ 星尘兑换
- #I really wanna go myself, but... {NICKNAME}, Paimon, I'm counting on you to help Benben recover! ｜ #虽然很想自己去，但是…{NICKNAME}，派蒙，奔奔能不能恢复，就拜托你们了！
- Hmm... Okay. I'll give it a shot. ｜ 我决定试一试。
- Mein Fräulein, I cannot simply attack the Traveler! ｜ 小姐，我总不能直接攻击旅行者吧！
- When I was a child, though, my grandfather would tell me stories about how the Marechaussee Hunters drove back the monsters. So, on the off-chance that something might come of it, I decided to reach out to you. ｜ 我因为小时候听爷爷讲过逐影猎人同魔物战斗的故事，才孤注一掷，想到可以向你们求救…
- Such crimes will surely land me the harshest punishments... Never mind the bankruptcy or the sullying of my name — if I am indeed judged, I might really die! ｜ 这些罪名会给我带来最严重的惩罚…财产亏空，身败名裂还是小事，被审判的话，真的有可能会死掉！
- A water pouch used by the Viridescent Venerer. Its capacity is much greater than one would expect. ｜ 绿野猎人曾用过的水囊，里面的空间远比想象的更大。
- Increases DMG against opponents affected by Hydro or Electro by <color=#99FFFFFF>12%</color>. ｜ 对处于水元素或雷元素影响下的敌人，造成的伤害提高<color=#99FFFFFF>12%</color>。
- Fujing ｜ 符景

- A stall where carpets, tapestries, and finished fabrics are displayed for sale. Such stalls are often seen in many stores in the Grand Bazaar. Diverse textiles of rich patterns and beautiful colors fascinate tourists and trigger a bulk-purchase impulse. Thanks to the popularization of weaving machinery techniques, quality carpets can be seen in almost every Sumeru household. Carpets have also become an important part of interior design in Sumeru, and the academic discussions surrounding them are legion — such as pattern design in aesthetics studies and dyeing material enhancement in chemistry studies, and overviews on the development of the textile industry and weaving machinery. Once, a self-claimed "senior" researcher in machinery even had an intense academic argument with an architecture researcher over a related discussion in front of a textile stall. Their argument ended up with both sides "agreeing to disagree," which was later deemed as a classic example of "rational discussion" between researchers. ｜ 出售地毯、挂帘和成品布料的摊位，可见于大巴扎的多个店面，待售的织物品类丰富，花纹精美，花色明艳，首次来访的外国客人常常看得眼花缭乱，因其独树一帜的风格和实惠的价格毫不犹豫地掏出摩拉，大量采购。而得益于机器纺织的普及，几乎在每个须弥人的家中都能看见做工相当不错的地毯，地毯已成为须弥室内装潢的重要组成部分，由其延伸出的学术讨论也多种多样，除了美学范畴内的图案设计，化学领域内的染剂改良，还有关于纺织业和机器加工的展望，甚至某位宣称自己是「老前辈」的机关领域学者，和专攻建筑的学者也曾在织物的摊位前开展激烈的争论。好在两人的争论以和而不同的方式收场，这也成为了学者们「理性讨论」的典例之一。
- Appearance control logic ｜ (test)表现控制逻辑$HIDDEN

- I already told the server to put it on my tab. Don't bother getting her to split the bill, it'll only complicate things. ｜ 我都跟招待说过了，账记在我名下，不需要找招待来算钱了，麻烦。

- "Stay cool and face your guilt!" ｜ 「无需畏惧，直面罪责。」
- With a heavy heart, you piece back together the story that was broken and scattered across time... ｜ 带着沉重的心情，一个支离破碎许多年、如今终于被拼凑起来的故事被娓娓道出——
- We actually have a lot more of this ore. ｜ 这样的矿石我们还有不少。
- Didn't you have any guard with you? ｜ 你没有护卫吗？
- Most people's lives are like that, anyway. Those who can control their own path will always be few and far between... ｜ 毕竟大多数人的人生都是这样，能自由掌控方向的终归是少数…
- Oh, five stars will be plenty, really... But your enthusiasm means a lot! ｜ 欸，五星就够了，五星就够了。您的热情我心领了。
- Nahida ｜ 纳西妲
- Great work... You're looking more like a head chef every day! Hehe, whatever crazy characters come walking through that door, I know you'll be able to handle them... ｜ 嗯…你越来越适应在店里掌勺了嘛，这下不管来再怎么麻烦的客人，都不成问题…
- You must be Mr. Yip! Thank you for coming all this way. ｜ 您就是叶德先生对吧？一路过来辛苦了。
- Seems everyone in the Lawrence Clan is this way. They'll do anything to save face... ｜ 劳伦斯家的人都这样吗…面子大过天呢…
- This is a Sumeru Rose that I picked. ｜ 这是我采到的须弥蔷薇。
- Loch Urania ｜ 优兰尼娅湖
- Well, I imagine bards must be quite carefree, then. ｜ 那吟游诗人肯定最没烦心事。
- Look for another three Strange Teeth ｜ 再寻找三枚奇异的「牙齿」
- Oh, blessed one of mine! Did I not say that the cord that binds us is as the dawn and its light, intertwined? ｜ 哦，我的祝圣之人啊，我早已说过，你我之间的纽带一如晨曦光晕般交织相连。
- According to our customs, Dandelions can carry wishes. ｜ 在我们的习俗里，蒲公英能够承载愿望呢。
- Anyway, we'll leave once you're ready. ｜ 那么，等你准备好，我们就出发吧。

- How did you end up here? ｜ 你怎么到这里来的？

- Juice ｜ 果汁类
- Get outta my face, you non-drunkard! ｜ 没醉就赶快滚，没事了。

- "Alright! I might not know all the rules, but as long as I follow my instincts, I think I'll be able to have a good time!"\nHint: Amber's deck contains many cards that can support Elemental Skills and 3 characters of different Elemental Types. - Fret not. Your Prinzessin is not so foolish as to entertain preconceived notions on how thy mirage should or should not present itself. ｜ 本皇女可没有在期待那种愚昧无比的事。
- And mark my words, I'll remember that... ｜ 这个仇我记下了！

- Yes, and ours are very good. ｜ 我们这里的点心可是很好吃的喔。

- That's right. Dreams themselves may be imaginary, but they're also experiences that can never be relived or replicated. ｜ 是啊，虽然梦是虚幻的，但同样是不可复制，不可重温的一次「经历」。

- How's my reputation in Liyue? ｜ 我在璃月港的声望…

- DMG dealt by Charged Attacks increased by <color=#99FFFFFF>20%</color>. For every party member with the same Elemental Type as the wielder (including the wielder themselves), gain 1 Gimmick stack. For every party member with a different Elemental Type from the wielder, gain 1 Theatrics stack. When the wielder has 1/2/3 or more Gimmick stacks, ATK will be increased by <color=#99FFFFFF>20%/40%/60%</color>. When the wielder has 1/2/3 or more Theatrics stacks, Movement SPD will be increased by <color=#99FFFFFF>6%/9%/12%</color>. ｜ 重击造成的伤害提升<color=#99FFFFFF>20%</color>；队伍中每存在一位与装备者元素类型相同的角色（包括装备者自身），将获得1层「手法」效果；每存在一位元素类型不同的角色，将获得1层「演技」效果。处于1/2/3层及以上「手法」效果下时，攻击力提升<color=#99FFFFFF>20%/40%/60%</color>；处于1/2/3层及以上「演技」效果下时，移动速度提升<color=#99FFFFFF>6%/9%/12%</color>。

- I just know a ton of people, so over time, people have habitually come to me when they need something or someone found. ｜ 因为我认识的人多，所以久而久之，大家在需要找人或者找东西的时候都习惯先来找我。

- Of course! Speaking of Candace, remember when she was a little girl? ｜ 可不是吗。说起来，坎蒂丝可是我们从小看着长大的。
- Diversity of fish species... ｜ 海祇岛的鱼类…

- The Red Empress? I have no idea who that is, though the name kind of rings a bell. ｜ 红女皇…那是谁，我并不知道，但是这种隐约熟悉的感觉。
- I later found out the garrulous gent's name is Zhihua, and the fortune-telling lady's is Qiming. Seems there's some history there... Why don't you go ask them about their stories? If it's anything interesting, come back and fill me in. ｜ 后来我打听到，这两个人一个叫志华，一个叫绮命，你去帮我再打听打听，如果有什么好故事，就快点拿回来给我吧。

- Her Excellency is currently away from the camp. We don't know where she went, but she instructed us to take care of everything in her absence. ｜ 珊瑚宫大人目前并不在反抗军营地，我们也不知道她去了哪里。不过珊瑚宫大人临行前留下过嘱托，让我们一切照常即可。
- Legend has it that there are countless bizarre and amazing creatures in forests like this, and the most famous among them are the Aranara, which, supposedly, means the "forest people." ｜ 在这样的森林里，传说中有数之不尽的奇异生灵，而当中最有名的就是兰那罗。这个名字据说，就是「森之民」的意思。
- Wow, that's tough... ｜ 好难…
- Ooooh, gotcha! Hehe, let's bring this fish back, shall we? ｜ 哦，抓到了！嘿嘿，把那条鱼带回来吧！
- A prosperous commercial port across the sea from Fontaine. Business is booming as people and goods come and go. ｜ 与枫丹隔海相望的繁荣商港。人稠物穰，生意盎然。
- I am simply here to stand guard over the excavation site. Perhaps a better way to put that might be... the only reason I'm here standing guard is so I don't have to answer questions like that. ｜ 我只是一个挖掘场的看守，或者这么说吧，我就是为了不回答这类问题才选择在这里当看守。
- A single blast can only create a very small opening. To send you back to the outside world, I may need to continuously channel power in order to keep the tunnel open. ｜ 爆发式攻击只能撕开很小一道口子，若要将你们送回外界，恐怕需要持续注入力量以维持通道不毁。

- Let's have fun then. See you later. ｜ 开心就好。回头见。

- In other words, she doesn't really adhere to the strict rules and conventions of her family. ｜ 换句话说，就是她没怎么把家里的条条框框放在心上。
- Its power seems to only resonate with the people of Al-Ahmar, also know as the descendants of King Deshret. ｜ 它的力量奇特，似乎只有阿赫玛尔的子民，也就是俗说的「赤王后裔」才能与之共鸣。
- Apart from that, I don't have anything of value that you youngsters might want. ｜ 除了这个老物件，我也没什么值得你们年轻人来求的了。
- Insufficient Primogems ｜ 原石不足
- Humans, such ado about nothing... Is it so strange that I speak? ｜ 人类真是喜欢大惊小怪啊…奴家会说话是件很奇怪的事吗？
- Eh, I think I'm alright at this. ｜ 还好吧。也不算很拿手。
- Do you know the People of the Springs well? ｜ 你很熟悉「流泉之众」吗？
- Goodbye. ｜ 再见。
- Paimon can understand why you might want her gone... But isn't there any other way? ｜ 我可以理解你想让她消失的理由…但是非这样不可吗？

- That was quite the detailed explanation. I didn't know The Cat's Tail's famous mixologist had such an eclectic skillset. ｜ 确实是很详细的介绍，没想到盛名在外的「猫尾酒馆」调酒师还有这样的才能。
- So, hmph! How dare you call our name weird!? ｜ 所以——哼，你们竟然敢说我们的名字奇怪？！
- Right. That's how things are now... The living are so exhausted that they've no strength to spare any words for the dead. ｜ 是啊。都已经那样了，活着的人筋疲力尽，就算想来对逝去的人说几句话也力不从心。
- But since that's how things are, let's hand this drum over to Katheryne and let her reassign someone to complete... whatever commission this was. ｜ 既然这样我们就把这个鼓带回去交给凯瑟琳小姐吧，然后让她重新找人来完成委托就好啦！
- Leave the boss to Ushi and me. We're ready. ｜ 老大交给我和阿丑，我们准备好了。
- For those that swiftly traverse the phlogiston-woven Spiritway, speed becomes a crucial variable, causing all they behold to appear differently. Not only must they follow the racing lines that flow like water; they must also learn to discern the true appearance of things and at the same time, seek inspiration through the tension between extreme curves and straightaways... ｜ 沿着燃素交织而成的「游隙灵道」迅疾穿行时，速度将为视觉带来关键的变量，眼底的一切都将呈现出有别寻常的面貌。捕捉流水般奔驰的线条，延展描摹事物本貌的技巧，在夸张的弧形与直线中，探寻聚焦张力的灵感…
- Elemental Skill: I ｜ 元素战技·其一
- Quest Item ｜ 任务道具
- Perhaps we can negotiate further. ｜ 我们或许可以谈谈附加条件。
- It's a long journey from Inazuma to Fontaine, but that didn't stop them. Eventually, they managed to confirm that Escher was an alias, and that I was not from Fontaine at all. ｜ 稻妻至枫丹路途遥远，您的人花了不少时间确定埃舍尔是个假名，我并不来自枫丹…
- Lumenstone Adjuvant ｜ 流明石触媒
- Defeat all opponents ｜ 消灭所有魔物
- I did — in the first round, in fact. Word of mouth proved very effective. I spoke to a handful of people, they told their friends, and so on. Now, a record number of people have signed up to attend the next lecture. ｜ 第一轮就达到了。宣传效果还不错，一传十、十传百，来报名参加科普讲座的人已经是历次最多了。
- Oh, you're the famous duo I've been hearing so much about. ｜ 哦？我听过，这可是最近很有名的组合。
- (I'm so happy I've finally found a place to stay.) ｜ （太好了，接下来的日子有着落了。）
- Receiving a Gift: III ｜ 收到赠礼·其三
- Attain {param0} Festive Fever ｜ 节庆热度达到{param0}
- Still, I shouldn't tear myself up over it. The Rite of Parting went smoothly — and so may Rex Lapis' journey be. ｜ 算了，不纠结了，如今「送仙典仪」也办妥了，岩王爷一路走好。
- Alright. I understand. ｜ 好吧，我明白了。
- Ah, I see. ｜ 噢，原来如此。
- It's fine. If it turns out the Knights of Favonius are ready to throw our good will back in our faces, they will find out soon enough just where the limit of their strength is! ｜ 没事，如果骑士团真的不识好歹要和我们翻脸，也得先想想自己的实力够不够！
- When HP is above 90%, increases CRIT Rate by <color=#99FFFFFF>28%</color>. ｜ 生命值高于90%时，暴击率提升<color=#99FFFFFF>28%</color>。

- Is the Zohrah Mushroom not here? ｜ 「须罗蕈」不在这里吗？
- Echoing Conch ｜ 回声海螺
- I must away — happy Lantern Rite! ｜ 我先走啦，节日快乐！
- Winner Takes All ｜ 取胜者，大小通吃
- Once I've finished eating I can get on with my adventure... ｜ 吃饱了就可以去冒险了…
- Favorite Food ｜ 喜欢的食物…
- It's not the biggest organization around, but each of our members is a certified ace angler! ｜ 虽然现在规模不大，但所有成员都是百里挑一的优秀渔师。
- Ms. Yun is also here for the contest. Turned out she needed to borrow a boat, so we came together. ｜ 云先生也是来参加比赛的，碰巧要借用我的船，所以就一起来了。
- Paimon's also curious... What's Kaeya doing with all that food from Good Hunter and Wanmin Restaurant? ｜ 这么说来，也好在意凯亚的事情。猎鹿人和万民堂…送到歌德大酒店的订单…
- Low/High Plunge DMG|{param10:P}/{param11:P} ｜ 低空/高空坠地冲击伤害|{param10:P}/{param11:P}
- Maximize your resources and try to use all your Elemental Dice each Round ｜ 合理分配资源，尽量每回合用完元素骰
- Lan has been looking for a certain sword. Her search has not been fruitful, so she's decided to widen her search range. ｜ 岚姐正在寻找一把剑，但却始终没有收获，她决定扩大搜索范围…
- If we wanna save the souls of the townspeople, we're gonna have to head to that doomus aria of whatever that super rude, duper arrogant guy talked about, right? ｜ 要解救镇上居民的灵魂，就只能前往那个没礼貌还很自大的坏蛋说的什么黄金宫殿了吧？
- Having been thwarted in his trial, Rex Lapis' soul has recouped the celestial heights. He beseeches the people of Liyue to grieve not, and to let not their hearts be saddened. ｜ 帝君遭逢天劫，魂归高天。故此昭告璃月，尚祈众民节哀，免致心伤。
- Food ｜ 食物
- Outside the Canvas, Inside the Lens: Greenery Chapter ｜ 画外旅照·青植之篇
- A fake cadaver can be created in order to rescue Lyudochka, but you'll have to prepare the necessary materials. You need 8 Raw Meat, 4 White Iron Chunks, and 3 Sea Ganoderma, as well as a distinguishing set of clothes. ｜ 虽然可以通过伪造尸体的办法救助柳达希卡，但必须把相应的材料准备好才行。除了八块兽肉、四块白铁块和三颗海灵芝，还需要一件能够辨认身份的衣服。
- Whether it's bettering myself or helping others to get stronger, all these things make me happy! ｜ 无论是我自己得到提升，还是帮助别人变强，我都觉得很开心！
- Bow exercises... ｜ 素引练习…
- Now this one, I have no idea about. It's likely a pen name of some sort. ｜ 那我可不知道，应该是这位老师的笔名吧。
- Ugh... Although they're all bad guys, seeing them all famished certainly makes Paimon feel sorry for 'em... ｜ 唔…虽然他们都是坏东西，但看着也蛮可怜的。都饿成这样了…
- Purchased from Realm Depot: Furnishings ｜ 洞天百宝·摆设购买获取
- Keep going and reach Ashvattha's Concourse ｜ 继续前进，前往觉树之堂
- Right this way, please. Everything's already been prepared, so please have a seat. ｜ 二位这边请，这边请，我们这什么都备齐了，这边坐就好。
- Wait! Hold on a second! ...How exactly do you propose to cover every single ruin in Liyue!? It'll take you forever! ｜ 等一下！你别这么激动，璃月这么大，你想要找到什么时候去啊？！
- A "Golden Dish"? Is that... food that's made of gold? ｜ 「吞金料理」？是…是金子做的料理吗？
- Are you sure that meeting here and chatting the day away like this isn't just a product of your own wishful thinking? ｜ 像这样聚在桌旁谈天说地，是否只是一厢情愿呢？
- Oh yeah? Well, where is it then? ｜ 什么？东西去哪了？
- Is Lamizana some kind of pest? ｜ 拉密萨纳是什么害虫吗？
- Birthday ｜ 生日…
- It's totally unnatural! Wait... Could someone be behind them getting infected with the Abyss!? ｜ 真是反常！该不会这些蜜虫被污染，是什么人为的阴谋吧？！
- #Don't drink too much of it, {NICKNAME}! Just spit it out if something feels off, okay? ｜ #{NICKNAME}，不要喝太多呀！感觉不对就赶快吐出来！
- Ah, hello little ones. I take it you have received my commission, hmm? ｜ 你们好啊，小家伙们，看样子是已经接到我的委托咯？

- Zero Hour Invokation: Revived Serval ｜ 零时召唤：复活的薮猫
- Cochanina ｜ 柯夏尼娜
- Why did she stop? ｜ 她为什么不再打造「古名」了？
- #Paimon's talking about fish-fishing! It's been a while since we last ate fish you caught and cooked yourself... Plus, it's about time you gave {REALNAME[ID(2)|SHOWHOST(true)]} a taste of your culinary wizardry! ｜ #还是钓点鱼吧，我们好像有段时间没吃{NICKNAME}做的鱼了，就让{REALNAME[ID(2)|SHOWHOST(true)]}也尝尝你的手艺嘛！
- Xilonen ｜ 希诺宁
- I'm here to meet with some researchers, but when I saw you two looking so troubled, I decided to follow. ｜ 我本来是要和学者见面，正好看到你们走进来然后一脸犯愁的样子，我就跟上来了。
- A lot of the flowers in my shop were blown away by that huge wind from before. ｜ 呜…因为之前那阵很大的风，我店里的花被吹走了好多。
- Well, it would be just wonderful if you could let us know! ｜ 能跟我们说一声就再好不过啦！
- "What shall cut the rain?" ｜ 「何物可裁雨？」
- Oh no, why's she crying? Should we go check on her? Y'know, just in case she's... thinking of doing something stupid... ｜ 哇，那个女孩怎么突然哭起来了？我、我们要不要去安慰一下？万一她做出什么傻事…
- A wooden sign placed here by "Claw Convoy" staff, demarcating the area of activity for adopted animals. Use the Inscribed Mirror to find adopted animals that live nearby. ｜ 「伴爪同行」工作人员竖立在此处的木牌，标明了被认养动物的活动范围。使用「铭随流镜」，找到在附近生活的被认养动物吧。
- A little surprise for you. ｜ 一点小惊喜。
- ??? ｜ ？？？
- Do plants even have thoughts? ｜ 植物可能并没有思想吧。
- I leave Director Aurelie in your hands. ｜ 奥蕾丽团长的名字，就交给你了。
- Oh? That's wonderful! Please discuss the matter with your fellow soldiers, and we'll do another take in a while. ｜ 哦？那太好了，请您去和其余的士兵先生们讲讲，稍后我们再来一次。
- Forget bandits. Even a ferocious hawk wouldn't be able to get through then. ｜ 到时候，别说匪徒了，哪怕是一只凶戾的猛禽，也不会放它进来。
- You go with Ella Musk to communicate with the hilichurls. Perhaps this might be the start of a new friendship...? ｜ 与艾拉·马斯克一同前去与丘丘人交流，或许是一段新友谊的开始…？

- True, and one that has been sundered from the present for who knows how long, at that. It should have long since been buried in time... ｜ 是啊…而且还是一座距离现在不知道多久，应该早已被埋没在时光里的城市…

- I'm feeling inspired... ｜ 有些灵感…
- Yep. Had Thelxie lived in Penguin Town, he'd probably have become great friends with Pers. ｜ 嗯，如果「特尔克西」在企鹅小镇，应该会和「佩伊」成为好朋友。
- "Watch and learn, comrade! A real warrior isn't picky about their weapons!" ｜ 「伙伴，看好了！真正的战士不会挑剔兵器！」
- Guest Message ｜ 访客留言
- Guest Challenge: Mualani ｜ 来客挑战：玛拉妮
- The Grand Master is currently off leading an expedition, so the Master, Jean, has stepped in to oversee the Knights while he's gone. ｜ 大团长现在正处于长期离开的状态，所以由副团长琴代行团长职责…
- Brightwood Room Doors ｜ 寓所辉木房门
- Seems business is booming at the Xinyue Kiosk. No one should notice if we blend in there. ｜ 新月轩人气兴隆，我们混进去应该不会被注意到的。

- Meow meow. ｜ 喵呜。
- A mysterious ship has dropped anchor outside Liyue Harbor. The ship appears to be quite luxurious, all the more reason to hop right on board... ｜ 在璃月港的海边停着一艘神秘的船，看起来十分华贵。而你却冒冒失失地直接闯了进去…

- Your efforts have been acknowledged ｜ 你的努力得到了神像的认可。
- What does a "messenger" do? ｜ 「传话人」是什么？
- Mother ｜ 母亲
- You look a little disappointed... ｜ 你看起来有点失望的样子…
- You find Ningguang looking worn out in the Jade Chamber. It turns out she's caught a cold. However, no mere illness will stop the Tianquan of Liyue Harbor from performing her duties. After all, she has much to take care of. ｜ 在「群玉阁」上，你发现凝光的神色有些疲惫。原来是不小心染上了风寒。但是，即便身体有恙，璃月港的「天权星」依旧坚持着工作。毕竟，她重任在肩。
- So, I was thinking... Someone... Or something might've stolen the offerings before the deity could accept them. ｜ 所以我…我觉得这一次，也许那些供品在被神明大人取走之前，就被其他人…或者动物拿走了。
- #Call me Paimon! And this here is {REALNAME[ID(2)|SHOWHOST(true)]}! ｜ #叫我派蒙就好！还有它，它叫{REALNAME[ID(2)|SHOWHOST(true)]}！
- You're so polite and careful with your words! I hope you have a pleasant visit! ｜ 两位真有礼貌，用词也很谨慎！那就祝你们参观愉快了！
- Yes. Badly wounded, but he will live. ｜ 嗯，受了很重的伤，不过总算保住了一条命。
- Does it, though? To me, it's nothing more than just a superstition spread by the elderly. Although there may be some truth to it, it still lacks logical credibility. ｜ 是吗？在我看来，不过是老人们骇人听闻的说法罢了。虽然其中有一定的道理，但依然缺乏可信的逻辑联系。
- Sure! What do you feel like having? ｜ 没问题，看看今天想吃点儿啥？
- Pharmacist's Notes (III) ｜ 药师的笔记·三
- Unlocks at Friendship Lv. 4 ｜ 好感等级达到4后开启
- Tiancheng ｜ 天成
- Any pickpockets loitering around will simply disappear into the crowd, where even the Millelith will be powerless to track them down... ｜ 如果有小偷作案的话，很容易就混进人群里找不到了…千岩军也不好抓捕…
- Clear the water veins on the island ｜ 疏通岛屿水脉
- Don't forget, I am Yanshang Teahouse's hostess. Playing cards is second nature to me... ｜ 可别忘了，我可是「岩上茶室」的招待，会玩牌本就是应有之义…
- ... ｜ ……
- Achieve victory ｜ 赢得胜利
- I did. ｜ 拿到了。
- Whenever someone picks on me thinking I'd be an easy target to take packages from, I send them running! ｜ 那些看我好欺负就来抢东西的家伙，全都被我给打跑了。
- Much consultation did one have with the most recent and popular recipes before deciding on this dish. It is said to be soft and tasty — a fine dessert indeed. ｜ 这种叫做「布丁」的菜色，是我从最近流行的食谱里看来的。据说香软可口，是款不错的甜品。
- Varesa and I will show you our tribe's customs and fun activities. Don't miss out! ｜ 到时候我和瓦雷莎会带你感受一下沃陆之邦的风土人情，敬请期待吧！
- Adjust time to 08:00 – 14:00 the next day ｜ 调整时间到第二天8-14
- 2-Hit DMG|{param2:F1P} ｜ 二段伤害|{param2:F1P}
- Peddler ｜ 商贩
- Thank you for coming to Mondstadt General Goods. Be sure to visit again! ｜ 谢谢惠顾蒙德百货，诚挚等候您下次光临~
- Could there be some treasure buried in the desert around here somewhere? It would be a shame if we missed out on it! ｜ 该不会是有什么埋藏在沙漠中的宝藏吧，那要是错过了可就亏大了！
- Did you guys just get here? Or do you have another way out? Still, we've searched all over this place, and there doesn't seem to be any way back to the surface. ｜ 你们是新掉下来的吗？还是说有别的出路？不过我已经在这儿找过一圈了，附近好像没有能返回地面的路。
- Could I trouble you to go to the side, and take a picture of this "fish lantern" for me? I'd like to have a reference picture for later. ｜ #{NICKNAME}，能请你去给旁边这只大大的「鱼灯笼」留个影吗，我想要留下一些画片做参考。
- Fortunately, I've built up quite the network while helping people repair their equipment free of charge. They furnish me with information concerning ores from time to time. ｜ 幸亏我平日里免费帮别人修理东西积累了些人脉，他们时不时会给我带来些矿石的情报…
- The wise say it's better to look toward the future than look back into the past. So let's talk about our future collaboration, and let bygones be bygones, shall we? ｜ 聪明人都说，与其回顾过去，不如放眼未来。不如我们聊聊今后的合作吧！
- Ugh, no! That's no good... I've got to stay positive, I know I can finish it all. ｜ 不行，不能先说丧气话，我一定能吃完。
- Um... Does it have to be me? ｜ 欸…一定要我去吗？
- Worry not, just leave it to me. ｜ 放心，就交给婆婆吧。
- Hehe, the Windblume... Isn't that the Cecilia? ｜ 「风之花」…难道不是塞西莉亚花吗？
- The Shogun's Army is without a leader for now. ｜ 幕府军也会暂时群龙无首了。
- No. I mean that the body and soul will continue to be eroded until they are virtually nonexistent, even if "death" is not the form that this erosion takes. ｜ 不。而是在「磨损」的作用下，灵魂与肉体依旧会被消磨殆尽，哪怕不是以「死亡」这一形式。
- Guess it's not that bad after all? ｜ 说明体验还不错？
- Raise the Frostbearing Tree to Lv. 12. ｜ 将忍冬之树供奉至12级。
- P—Pose!? I—It's about the scenery behind me! ｜ 这，这我摆什么姿势好？哎呀，主要是拍后面的景致…
- I am the assistant responsible for looking after our tribe's supplies. A pleasure to make your acquaintance. ｜ 我是负责打理部族物资的帮手，请多关照啦。
- "Master Chef's Summertime Banquet" ｜ 「特别大厨的夏日盛宴」
- You run into Amber on the walls of Mondstadt after she has just finished returning a mischievous cat to its owner. Hopefully, it won't go running off again... ｜ 在蒙德城的城墙上，你遇见了安柏，她刚把一只调皮的小猫送回了它主人的家中。希望那只小猫别再跑出来了…
- Even though I'm a Name Engraver, forging Ancient Names isn't my primary work. Helping people in the tribe forge tools and weapons makes up the majority of my work.\nAfter all, Ancient Names are pretty rare, but there are countless commissions for other kinds of items... ｜ 虽然我是「铸名师」，但铸造「古名」并不是我的主业。相对来说，帮部族内外的人锻造器具和武器，才是我主要的工作。\n毕竟「古名」稀少，但大家的锻造委托可是无穷无尽啊…
- Hmm, I wonder who this unexpected person might be? ｜ 意想不到的人，会是谁呢？
- Support Card ｜ 支援牌
- Lanoire, let's discuss adventuring later. We really should find your family first... ｜ 莉诺尔，探险可以留到以后再说。首先应该找到你的亲人…
- Talk to Grundeland ｜ 与戈伦德兰对话
- About Bran... ｜ 关于布兰…
- The evidence for that can be found in... How only Fontainians could dissolve in Primordial Seawater, and how all the girls Vacher dissolved were also turned into Oceanids... ｜ 要证明这一点的话…只有枫丹人会溶解在原始胎海里，失踪的少女们溶解后也变成了纯水精灵的样子…
- ...and said to me, "With this sword, you should—" ｜ 还对我说，拿着这把刀，就应该…
- Fifty-three. Be patient. I'll call your number when it's your turn. ｜ 五十三号，到号会叫你们的。
- Finches Are Still the Cutest! ｜ 团雀依然最可爱
- Anzai ｜ 安西
- That's right! We got this the day we used the fake Bamboo Slip to tail you. ｜ 嗯，这是我们用假竹签跟踪你那天，得到的签文。

- Is it really that effective? ｜ 真的这么有用吗？
- This environment? What do you mean by that? ｜ 这种环境？这种环境是什么环境？
- Indeed. Unfortunately, I wasn't able to protect them. ｜ 的确如此。然而很遗憾，那时候我并没能保护好他们。

- Some fabric of fine make. It will surely be of use in making furnishings. ｜ 优质的布匹。制作摆设时应该能派上用场。

- Hehe... Ye— W—Wait, no! Not at all! ｜ 嘿嘿…嗯…呃，不是、不是！

- All my best friendships are built on a warm, fuzzy feeling in my stomach. ｜ 胃里暖暖的…

- Oh, Ayaka! Guess who fulfilled all your wishes~! ｜ 「绫华，你的最后一个愿望也已经实现了。」
- Today's an important day. I had to send the gang away, otherwise they'd be accusing me of favoritism. Here, take a look at this. I got you the greatest birthday gift combo ever! One top-grade Onikabuto — I'll have you know it took me three whole days and nights to catch this bad boy — one out-of-print collectible trading card that took me 300 rounds to get my hands on, and finally, a birthday song performance performed personally by yours truly! Happy Birthday to you, Happy Birthday to you, Happy Biiiirthday dear Traveler, Happy Birthday to youuuu! ｜ 今天是个重要的日子，我特意把弟兄们支开了，不然他们肯定要说我偏心。来，看看，我给你准备的生日礼物可是最高规格的！抓了三天三夜才抓到的特级鬼兜虫一只、大战了三百回合赢来的绝版卡牌一张，哦还有本大爷亲自演唱的生日歌一首——咳咳…祝你生日快乐…祝你生日快乐…
- Come to think of it, Miss Flora herself gives people the same impression. ｜ 这么说来芙萝拉小姐也给人这样的印象呢。

- As opposed to a celebration of romance, they believe that the Windblume Festival is more about commemorating the liberation of Old Mondstadt from tyranny. ｜ 比起庆祝爱情，他们认为风花节更应该纪念旧蒙德从暴君的统治中解放。

- In case you've forgotten, the Komore Teahouse is the safest place for me to hide in this area. ｜ 你不记得了吗，对于我来说，躲在木漏茶室是这附近最安全的地方了。
- Someone stupid like you shouldn't be out making a mess of our city. Your time would be better spent listening to an opera or sitting in a restaurant. ｜ 你这样的愣头青就不要满城乱撞了，有闲工夫不如去听个戏，下下馆子。

### Part 175

- Defeat all opponents ｜ 打倒所有敌人
- Really? Wonderful! That's wonderful! ｜ 真的？！太好了…太好了！
- 3-Hit DMG|{param3:F1P} ｜ 三段伤害|{param3:F1P}
- ...Walking Shroom-Kin! ｜ …会走的蕈类！
- Our second commission comes from Liyue's Wanmin Restaurant. It's another advert looking to cook up new customers.\nTo be honest, this one caused me a bit of a headache at first — I just don't know anything about Liyue cuisine — but as luck would have it, I ran into a kindhearted Liyue poet who helped me pen a very catchy script.\nNow, my friend, might I trouble you to edit this one to match the logic of that script?\nThough I must say, our good poet didn't seem too set in her ways, so I'm sure she wouldn't begrudge you a little editorial freedom. Anyway, the decision is yours, and I look forward to seeing the final cut. ｜ 第二个委托，是来自璃月万民堂的营销广告。\n说实话，一开始我确实很头疼，毕竟我对璃月的美食文化可以算是一窍不通。好在我碰到了某位热心的璃月诗人，全靠她的帮助，我才有如今这么朗朗上口的台本。\n所以我的朋友，这次可能需要麻烦你按照这位璃月诗人台本逻辑进行剪辑。\n不过，我看这位诗人也并非那么刻板的人物，所以你也不必非要循规蹈矩地剪辑。总而言之决定权在你，期待你的成片。
- But my situation is... more complex than that. In the beginning, what drove me to harbor those thoughts was less "idealism," and more a sense of guilt. ｜ 但我的情况…比较复杂。起初，促使我这么做的不是「理想」，仅仅只是「愧疚」而已。

- Log in to <color=#FFFF84FF>Genshin Impact · Cloud</color> this version to get a <color=#FFFF84FF>Cloud Pass</color> ｜ 当期版本登录<color=#FFFF84FF>【云·原神】</color>即得<color=#FFFF84FF>畅玩卡</color>
- A nightstand found at the Bimarstan. Made of light Brightwood, it is compact and easy to move around. At the same time, it is still able to effectively store important items. If a doctor is no longer adding medicine into this nightstand, then it means a patient is close to a full recovery. ｜ 可见于「健康之家」的床头柜，采用了轻质的「辉木」板材，尺寸紧凑，便于搬运，同时，储存重要物品的效能并未弱化，能兼顾布置的便捷性和对药品的保存。若是病人发现医师不再向这种柜子里添加药品，往往说明他距离痊愈不远了，值得庆贺。
- #{NICKNAME}! Why are you just standing there? ｜ #{NICKNAME}，为什么要站在原地一动不动啊！

- You hurry to find proof of your claims to Kujou Sara that the Kujou Clan has betrayed the Shogunate within three days. ｜ 三天时限内，为了向九条裟罗证明九条家已经背叛幕府的事实，你需要赶快找到证据。
- Red Supervisor ｜ 红色的监督人

- A lovely-looking dessert. It is believed that this dessert was created by a cook working for a rich Fontainian family. To cheer their young master up, the cook made a Beryl Conch-shaped cake. The authenticity of this story can no longer be verified, but the cake's delicious taste is beyond doubt. ｜ 形状可爱的小甜点。据说是一位枫丹大户人家的厨师，为了哄小少爷，才模仿苍晶螺的形状制作的糕点。这故事的真实性已不可考，但其美味却是真真切切的。
- Has Miss Sango found out who that rascal is? Why, I'm going to whoop... ｜ 怎么样，珊瑚小姐查到那个混账到底是谁了吗？我非要好好教训一下那家伙不可…
- "Snappy Silhouette" Mark Duration|{param5:F1}s ｜ 「瞬时剪影」印记持续时间|{param5:F1}秒

- Ah. Sorry, guess I was so delighted to see you, I forgot to introduce myself. ｜ 啊，不好意思，看到你们很高兴，把这件事给忘了。
- Oh, I nearly forgot... these are for you. Consider them a token of my appreciation. It was nice to have someone accompany me during the festival. Thanks again! ｜ 对了，这些东西请你先收下吧，就当做是报酬啦，大过节的你还陪我跑来跑去，谢谢你啦。

- How fresh is it? ｜ 有多新鲜？

- Merely a consequence of my identity and personality. Do not worry about me. Just enjoy the show. ｜ 这是身份与性格所致，不用在意我，把注意力都放在表演上吧。
- Festivals, eh? Well, it's nice and all. The lights are pretty, and things are livelier than usual. ｜ 过节吗…过节好啊，张灯结彩，比平时热闹多了。
- Looks like we've got one job as medical assistants left. We'll come with you. ｜ 看来医疗助手的工作还没结束呢，我们陪你一起去吧。

- Elemental Burst: III ｜ 元素爆发·其三
- Huh? Why is there a mushroom over there? ｜ 欸，怎么那边有…蘑菇？
- Don't feel bad — my daddy found the hiding place for me, so normal people would never be able to find it. ｜ 没关系，毕竟是我爸爸帮我挑的位置，一般人肯定找不到。
- Mhm, we ran into her on the road not too long ago. She seemed to be falling asleep standing up, and kept mumbling about something... ｜ 嗯，不久前在路上遇到她，她好像没睡醒，看起来困得快死了，嘴里一直嘀咕着什么…
- Chase away the Violetgold Angler Gull ｜ 驱赶紫金渔鸥
- About Tighnari ｜ 关于提纳里…
- Nope, no idea... Should we get someone else to make one for us? ｜ 我不知道啊，唔…能不能拜托人帮我们去做呢…
- Hypostatic Symphony ｜ 无相交响诗

- Morning, Aloy. ｜ 早啊，埃洛伊。

- Does that really mean what he thinks it does...? ｜ 真的是这个意思吗…
- You enter the assessment venue with Yelan... ｜ 跟着夜兰进到了考察现场…
- At Omikami's instruction, we learned the culture of Narukami, and we established foreign relations with many different nations. ｜ 我们在大御神的授意下，学习了鸣神文化，并且曾与诸方土地建立了外交。
- Meow? ｜ 喵？
- Make up for the difference... ｜ 弥补差距…
- It's been a while since we last saw that illuminated bird! She's always the one popping up out of nowhere and scaring us half to death, so let's surprise her this time! ｜ 好久没见到那只仙鸟啦，以前她总是突然出现，吓我们一跳。嘿嘿，这次我们也给她来一个突然袭击！
- "Immaculate Judgment" ｜ 「宏亮无垢的裁决」
- Phew... This has gotta be the end. What a close call... Good thing you were here with us! ｜ 呼啊…这应该就到尽头了吧。刚才确实有一点点惊险。还好有你在。
- Legend has it that in ancient times, the Order of Skeptics would hold a ritual of purification for them, so as to bring them all back to the Vourukasha Oasis. ｜ 传说在古时矫论团会为她们举行净罪的仪式，使她们得以重回「甘露花海」。
- Wow, he can do all that flying without ever falling to the ground? ｜ 哇，一直飞在天上不落地吗？
- Uh, we don't need to get too serious though, right? It's eerie enough down here without adding more tension into the mix! Ugh, let Paimon say it. ｜ 我说，太严肃也不好吧？这里本来就有点阴森了，再这么一来，像在内斗一样！还是我来说吧。

- A hut that may be found in Aaru Village. It is especially small, and craftsmen have specially set up a folding mechanism at the frame joints such that this entire setup can be folded up quickly and carried away by a Sumpter Beast — all the better to be able to set up a hut at fixed points in one's trek and rest for a while...\nHowever, due to the greater waterproofing on this particular type of hut, it will often cause the Sumpter Beast that carries it to feel unbearable heat, and some merchants would rather suffer under the sun for a while longer than burden these poor creatures any further. But during such times, Sumpter Beasts do also use their bodies to block the sunlight for these merchants, thus providing a measure of shade. ｜ 可见于阿如村的棚屋，尺寸尤其小巧，工匠们特意在框架的连接处设置了折叠机构，使其能被快速收拢，由驮兽运走。每跋涉一段时间，就能原地展开棚屋，好好休息一阵…\n不过，由于这种棚屋采用了防水效果较好的织物，会让背负它的驮兽燥热难忍，有些商人宁愿自己多晒一会儿太阳，也不愿意再给驮兽增加负担了。这种时候，驮兽也会用自己的身体为商人遮挡阳光，提供荫蔽。

- For example, I can foresee the outside world posing a threat to Inazuma's businesses. These are the issues that I must work to solve. ｜ 比如可预见的，外界对稻妻商业造成冲击等问题。这些都是接下来我会着手处理的事。
- Ah, what to do, what to do? The thing that troubles me is... the fact that you can even think of troubling things when you have such a great magician like myself standing right in front of you. ｜ 怎么办呢？我最大的烦恼就是——你在我这样的大魔术师面前，还能想到烦心的事情。

- ...Huh!? ｜ ……咦？！

- H—Heh, it didn't quite go as well as I'd hoped... ｜ 有，有点失误…
- I was tasked with locating a research base belonging to a scientist known as Mosso Lombroso. ｜ 这次我接到任务，要寻找一座研究基地，属于一个叫做莫索·郎勃罗梭的科学家。
- Let's go work in the production zone. ｜ 去生产区打工。
- Butterfly ｜ 蝴蝶
- With the Abyss crisis resolved, the people of Natlan can finally embrace a long-awaited peace. Before long, changes begin to take root in their lives...\nBut the time has not yet come. Forsake not the strength to defend, nor forget the taste of struggle.\nAs long as the sun still hangs high in the sky, battle shall never cease.\nIn the face of this hardship, the warriors will endure; for in the name of what once was, they fight for what will be. ｜ 深渊危机解除，纳塔迎来期盼已久的和平。然而，人们的生活也在随之改变…\n还不到时候。勿放下守护的力量，勿忘却拼搏的滋味。\n只要太阳高悬天上一日，战斗就无从停止。\n战士将跨越苦难，为昔日之事与未来之路而战。
- Huh? We didn't get to say anything! Miko, why'd you have to steal our thunder? ｜ 欸？我们还没开口呢！神子你怎么抢先一步啊？

- We were supposed to meet at the café yesterday, but it took her a long time to show up. She didn't even bring any pen or paper for her report! ｜ 昨天我们俩约在咖啡馆见面，可她花了好长时间才出现，甚至连写报告用的材料跟纸笔都没带！
- A detailed step-by-step blueprint for making a Wrought Iron Carved Street Light.\nAfter using this item, you can view it in the Creation Screen. ｜ 步骤详实的图纸，记载着「铁艺雕花路灯」的制作方法。\n使用后可进入制作界面查看。
- It's not that I don't know anyone there, it's just... *sigh* Okay, fine. ｜ 倒也不是有没有交情的问题…唉，罢了。
- But in the end, he was just an ordinary person. What could he do? ｜ 但他也就是个普通人，能有什么办法。
- This matter is perilous. Tell me once you are ready, O Traveler, and we shall begin. ｜ 此事凶险，旅者啊，若汝准备好了，再与吾说吧。
- For the sake of world peace, let us shout out those words of wisdom for all of Teyvat to hear— ｜ 为了提瓦特的和平，让我们向更多人喊出那句话吧——
- Generally speaking, such chores are not the concerns of the performer himself... ｜ 一般来说，这种杂务是不需要歌手本人亲自动手的…

- Let's wait till the snow gets heavier and have a snowball fight! ｜ 等雪积起来…我们来打雪仗吧！

- Oh, it's you. Just in time, too. Anna's been getting better ever since eating the medicine prescribed by that doctor. ｜ 是你啊，来得正好…自从吃了那位神医的药，安娜的病逐渐好了。
- ...Of course. ｜ …好。
- How did it go? Well, I trust? Tell us all about it! ｜ 怎么样，一切顺利吗？跟我们仔细讲讲！
- Defeat all opponents to complete the stage ｜ 击败所有敌人后可结算本关
- (These are all daily necessities...) ｜ （里面是一些生活物资…）
- I hope to finish the paper while I'm in Inazuma. If I can't get it done, I'll have to go back to the Akademiya to face the music. ｜ 希望我真的能在稻妻把论文写出来。要是写不出来的话，我…我就真得回教令院挨骂了…
- 1-Hit DMG|{param1:F1P} ｜ 一段伤害|{param1:F1P}
- After collecting all manner of food, some finches will find a piece of flat land nearby upon which to have a feast with friends. At this time, a finch with particularly vibrant feathers shall become the host for the mealtime activities... ｜ 收集了多种食物后，有些团雀会在大大的石头附近找一块平整的土地，与好朋友们一同聚餐。此时，羽毛色彩鲜艳华丽的那只团雀，就会成为聚餐活动的主持者…
- She clearly knows about everything we've been doing, and Paimon doesn't think it'd be a stretch to say she was threatening us just now. ｜ 她刚刚的语气，很明显是知道我们做的事了吧？而且她摆明了是在要挟我们。
- Since we ran that story, the Maison Gardiennage has made a slew of arrests including, uh... one "Phantom Blubberbeast," a "Titanic Redcrown Finch," and a "Specterman"... ｜ 自从刊登了那篇小说，执律庭已经成功抓获了一大群…「膨膨兽怪盗」、「巨大红冠雀」和「飘浮灵侠」。
- Invite friends over to assist you and shorten creation time. ｜ 邀请好友前来助力，可缩短制作时间。

- I... uh... I'm very happy to see you Kaia, I... ｜ 我…呃…迦雅，很高兴见到你，我…

- This Serenitea Pot cannot be used. Returning to your home world ｜ 对方「尘歌壶」不可用，正在返回自己的世界
- Ley Line fluctuations caused by the Abyss are getting stronger. Mavuika is rushing back to the Stadium. ｜ 地脉中来自深渊的波动愈发强烈，玛薇卡正在紧急赶回竞技场。
