- Accompany Bennett to go shopping ｜ 陪班尼特购物
- 20% ｜ 20%
- But according to the Emergency Adjustment Plan... ｜ 但是计划书上写着…
- First of all, please allow me to first express my sincerest gratitude to everyone in the crew. ｜ 请允许我，先向各位致以我最诚挚的谢意。
- If the stars align, we'll see each other in Inazuma again. ｜ 有机会的话…我们稻妻再见。
- Ask the representatives their reasons for participation ｜ 询问学院代表们的参赛原因
- Oh? Color me impressed. You figured it out so quickly! ｜ 哦？该说不愧是你吗？这么快就看出了规律？
- Hmm? What is it, youngster? ｜ 咦？年轻人，有什么事吗？
- Yes! That has to be true. Apart from saving the Princess... apart from that one wish, I have nothing at all. I'll do anything to fulfill it! ｜ 嗯！这一点，一定不会有错。因为，拯救莉利丝公主，我除了这一个愿望，什么都没有。为了实现愿望，要我做什么都可以…！
- Now that sounds more like it! Though, using the Akademiya's research funds to chase your dreams, isn't that a bit like abusing your position to get what you want? ｜ 这个听上去终于正经了起来，不过，也像是在用教令院的经费满足自己的梦想呢，这就有点「公报私仇」了…
- Energy Cost|{param5:I} ｜ 元素能量|{param5:I}
- Marvelous, isn't it? And that is why I firmly agree with my great-great-grandmother's belief that cute finches can bring about world peace! ｜ 很神奇吧！所以我才坚信太外祖母的说法，可爱的团雀能让世界和平！
- Tubby ｜ 阿圆
- I'll never cooperate with you. I've told you that! ｜ 我说了，我绝对不会和你合作！
- Isn't there supposed to be a festival soon? ｜ 关于即将举办的祭典。
- Avatars of Lava have been sighted roaming the wilderness, threatening the safety of the surrounding areas. Defeat them and remove this threat. ｜ 熔岩游像正在野外游荡，威胁着周边区域的安全，前去将其打倒，清除这股威胁。
- But since when do you build Mingxiao Lanterns out of rag dolls? ｜ 布娃娃也能用来建设「明霄灯」吗？
- Ugh, how did we lose 'em? They were just here a second ago... ｜ …可恶，怎么就跟丢了呢，刚才明明还在这里…
- But in the process of searching, many guests were deeply affected by what they saw here in the Mirage, becoming carefree as their anxieties eased. ｜ 在这个过程中，这些客人被蜃境中的所见所闻影响，不再患得患失，逐渐变得悠然自在。
- Low/High Plunge DMG|{param6:P}/{param7:P} ｜ 低空/高空坠地冲击伤害|{param6:P}/{param7:P}
- No, my digestion was fine this time. What you saw just now was the aftermath of the digestion process. ｜ 不，这次的消化还好，刚刚让你们看到的，算是消化的结果。
- #<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}:</color> So here in Mondstadt, alchemy is practiced out on the streets?\n<color=#37FFFF>Paimon:</color> Is that so strange?\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}:</color> In many of the worlds I've been to in the past, alchemy has always been a secretive art.\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}:</color> Watching alchemy being practiced as a part of daily life is like being in a world where people all have three stomachs...\n<color=#37FFFF>Paimon:</color> Paimon thinks only having one stomach is weird!\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}:</color> Uh...\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}:</color> Are you serious?\n<color=#37FFFF>Paimon:</color> What do you think? ｜ #<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}：</color>原来蒙德的炼金工作台是在街头开放的。\n<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>是呀，很奇怪吗？\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}：</color>我曾经去过的许多世界里，炼金术都是作为秘术存在的。\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}：</color>看到炼金术成为日常的一部分，就像看到「三胃人」的世界一样奇怪…\n<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>喂！人只有一个胃才会奇怪吧！\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}：</color>嗯…\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}：</color>你是认真的吗？\n<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>嘿嘿，你猜！
- "I once undertook a commission to 'persuade a dangerous warrior.' When I found him, he happened to be playing this card game. I picked up a few tricks from watching him — enough to defeat him and walk away with my payment in full..."\nHint: Kinich's deck centers on using Techniques and is geared towards triggering Burning reactions. He can obtain many buffs by triggering Burning reactions and using Techniques. ｜ 「我接受过一项委托，『说服某位危险的战士』，结果找到他时，他正好在玩这种卡牌游戏，于是我现场学了几招，打败了他，拿到了全额佣金…」\n【提示】基尼奇的牌组以「特技」为核心，并且擅长触发「燃烧反应」，在触发「燃烧反应」和「特技」后会获得诸多强化。

- Custom Domain Limit Reached ｜ 拟想秘境数量达到上限

- I'm sorry, I threw everything together on a whim. ｜ 对不起，我随便放的。

- A vibrant market street based on the Stadium of the Sacred Flame's Chuwen Fair. Shops and stalls of all colors stand shoulder to shoulder, decked out in graffiti and decorations that lend the scene a style and a vital glow unique to Natlan.\nOrnaments and paints in rainbow hues are the calling cards of Natlan's markets and the common currency for those who wish to express their affinity with the latest trends. It would be no overstatement to say that countless new fashions are birthed in the stands and stalls of markets like this all over Natlan.\nThis Furnishing Set is favored by the following companions: Mualani ｜ 以圣火竞技场的楚汶市集为蓝本，还原布置的街道，其中各色店铺棚屋林立，诸多涂鸦配饰相交辉映，颇具活力，展示着独属于纳塔的集市风貌。\n各色颜料与配饰即是纳塔市集上最常见的商品，也是人们在表达对潮流理解时的常客。因此毫不夸张地说，无数风靡纳塔的潮流正是在这样的市集上诞生的。\n偏好这套摆设的同伴：玛拉妮

- An elegant-looking Liyue dish. The snow-like coating is soft and airy, like snowflakes gently falling onto your tongue. Then, the rich, fresh crab meat quickly envelops your taste buds, like radiant, resplendent plum blossoms blooming amidst the lonesome, serene snowfall, captivating and enchanting. ｜ 造型清雅的璃月菜品。雪衣糊柔软且蓬松，像是雪花轻盈地落于舌尖。紧接着鲜醇的蟹肉迅速占据味蕾，宛若孤寂清冷的白雪之间，坠入一剪靡丽绝俗的梅花，惹人沉醉。

- This elegant-looking Liyue streetlamp utilizes strong and durable Cuihua Wood for its primary structure, with linked lanterns as the light source.\nRumor holds that some residents of Yilong Wharf believe that even numbers are auspicious, and therefore strongly advise against taking down just a single lantern at a time. In reality, artisans chose this design for more practical reasons — dual sources of illumination provide redundancy, preventing damage to a single lantern from rendering the light source ineffective, while also making it easier for the Millelith to use them as an emergency source for lanterns in certain extenuating circumstances. As for its meaning regarding good fortune, that can be regarded more as a happy coincidence... ｜ 外观典雅的璃月路灯，主体结构运用了结实耐用的「萃华木」，以串联的双重灯笼作为光源。\n有传言称，遗珑埠的部分居民认为双数更具吉祥之意，并因此强烈建议人们不要随意取下其中一盏灯笼。但实际上，工匠选择这种串联双重灯笼的考量更偏重实用——双重灯笼不仅可以提供冗余，预防单灯损坏导致的照明不足问题，同时也方便千岩军在特殊情况下临时取用。至于其祈福的寓意，更多是一种美好的巧合…
- For real? Why does it sound like some kind of scam... ｜ 真的吗，很像在骗人欸…

- Hmm? What are you smiling about, Kokomi? ｜ 咦？你在偷笑什么？

- A sepia pottery piece with a pedestrian appearance. Its shape and production process all follow Sumeru's most ancient firing methods. Such utensils are also known as "treasure vases," implying that whatever is stored inside must be some kind of treasure.\nIn the very beginning, residents in Sumeru would use a certain type of soil dug from the rainforests as raw materials to create all kinds of pottery. However, due to the insufficient content of certain minerals in such materials and the limitations of their craftsmanship, the lifespan of the pottery pieces produced then was fairly limited. After a few years, they tended to become incredibly brittle and fragile. Some potteries still produce this kind of earthenware and often sell them in bulk as the cheapest containers. The earliest batch of such pieces, however, have become rare collectors' items. ｜ 外观朴实无华的陶器，呈现出纯粹的「陶棕色」，沿用着须弥最古早的烧制方法与罐形。这类器皿亦有「宝瓶」的别称，有「瓶中之物皆为珍宝」之意。\n起初，须弥人会以雨林中的某类土壤为原料，制作各式陶器。但由于原材料的某些矿物成分含量不足，以及工艺的限制，这类陶器的使用寿命相当有限。达到一定年岁后，器皿就会变得易裂易碎。如今还有手工作坊生产这种陶器，作为价格最为低廉的容器大量销售，遗留下来的早期批次都成为了值得收藏的珍品。
- Caribert makes the scene of what transpired at that time appear before you... ｜ 卡利贝尔令当时的情景浮现在了你的面前…

- Haven't we seen that somewhere before? ｜ 好像在哪里见过？

- Eh... this is all hard to understand! Dori, what does this all mean? ｜ 嗯…看不懂！多莉，你知道是什么意思吗？

- A mitachurl that has mutated due to an accumulation of a large amount of elements in its body. They are bigger, stronger, and absolutely ferocious.\nHilichurls worship no gods and follow no order or discipline. The strongest and the most ferocious one among them is seen as fit to lead the tribe. ｜ 体内积聚了大量的元素，发生了变异的丘丘暴徒。更大、更壮、更凶悍。\n丘丘人的文明中没有神，也没有秩序。只要够强壮，打架够狠，就能成为它们的王者。
- It's nice to see you so happy, Pahsiv, but uh, what are we gonna use these for, again? ｜ 珀西芙看起来很高兴呢，不知道这个有什么用…
- It's gonna pop! ｜ 活力！

- Hmm, it's looking a lot like Callirhoe was the one who wrote this. ｜ 唔，这么一看，还真像卡莉露写的。
- To Xingqiu, "a moment of solitude" can mean all sorts of things.\nExamples include visiting Wanwen Bookhouse to peruse the latest novels and going to Heyu Tea House to sample Yun Jin's latest drink.\nSometimes, it means that he is off to fight for justice in the name of chivalry.\nDefeating bandits on the road, driving away monsters, helping distressed children by fetching their kites from the tree tops... there are all manner of responsibilities that fall into the category of chivalry.\nInspired by tropes from his beloved martial arts novels — such as the king who wears a disguise and mingles with the common folk — Xingqiu does not hesitate to leverage the power of the Feiyun Commerce Guild to resolve more complex issues when violence isn't the answer. ｜ 对行秋来说，「偷得浮生半日闲」可以指代很多意思。\n有时指的是去「万文集舍」看新进的小说；有时指的是去「和裕茶馆」缠着云堇老板开发新饮料。\n而在某些特别的时候，指的是「独自行侠仗义」。\n击败拦路的恶匪、赶走捣乱的怪物、帮哭泣的孩子摘下挂在树梢上的风筝…这一切都在行秋「行侠仗义」的范围之内。\n就像武侠逸闻中广为流传的「微服私访」故事那样——在某些冒险的尽头，行秋并不在乎动用飞云商会的力量来解决一些武力之外的问题。
- Why hasn't anyone come to fix this place... ｜ 真是的，怎么一直没人修呢…
- Even if it's just for the sake of his health, I ask that you get to the bottom of this matter as soon as possible. ｜ 就算是为了舒瓦瑟尔先生的健康考虑，还请您尽快查清这件事的始末。
- Go pick mushrooms ｜ 前往采摘蘑菇
- ... ｜ ……

- It's rare to see you guys struggling like this. What is it this time? ｜ 很少见到你们乱成这样，是出什么大事了吗？
- Noelle ｜ 诺艾尔
- ...Hold up, how much did you say again? One-and-a-half million!? Did Paimon hear that right? ｜ 欸，等等，你说多少？一百五十万？我没听错吧！

- By speaking of your own mistakes and hearing sincere advice in return, improvement will come, over time. That's the way we do things. ｜ 说出自身的错，听取真诚的建议，事情便会慢慢好转。这是我们做事的方式。
- Who... Who said that people from Fontaine must know how to swim? Not every person from Liyue can cook, and not every Mondstadter's a poet! ｜ 谁…谁说枫丹人一定要会游泳了？也不是每一个璃月人都会做菜，每一个蒙德人都会作诗吧？

- Listen to and solve the troubles of the citizenry ｜ 倾听并解决蒙德居民的烦恼
- Rockfond Rifthound Whelp ｜ 嗜岩·兽境幼兽
- Adjust your camera angle such that your character blocks the Particles from view to collect them and consume Fayz Force to use your Supersense Skill, and also obtain a random Fayz Furtherance. The maximum amount of Fayz Force that can be accumulated is sufficient to use the Supersense Skill <color=#FFCC33>3</color> times. If you do not use a Supersense Skill for 50s, the DMG you deal will decrease precipitously. ｜ 调整取景框的角度，使角色遮挡「超感光粒」，则可以获取光粒，消耗「溢神能量」施放「超感技能」，并获得随机「溢神助力」，「溢神能量」累积的最大值可供施放<color=#FFCC33>3</color>次「超感技能」。如果50秒未施放超感技能，角色伤害将显著降低。
- Talk to Ogura Mio ｜ 与小仓澪对话
- Well, you heard the good lady, bartender! ｜ 酒保，安排起来！
- This proper and elegant square wooden table is made from affordable and durable Fragrant Cedar Wood, and is often found in the teahouses around Yilong Wharf. It is so named because it can seat guests on all four sides.\nRumors say that having been washed with tea water for so long has caused them to absorb the essence of the tea leaves, preventing cracking and making the table shinier and giving it a light tea fragrance over time. Such rumors even attracted the attention of buyers from numerous other nations.\nBut in reality, the luster of tables and chairs depends entirely on constant care and maintenance by the staff, and there's no silver bullet to magically solve everything... Also, it would truly be a waste if guests spilled too much tea on the table... ｜ 端正大气的木制方桌，由经济耐用的「垂香木」打造而成，多见于遗珑埠的茶馆，因四面皆能围坐客人而得名。\n有传言称，这种桌子在经过长期的茶汤温养之后，会吸收茶叶的精华，使得桌子不仅不会因年久失修而开裂，反而会变得更具光泽，并散发出淡淡的茶香。这一传言甚至引得其他国家客商上门求购。\n但其实，桌椅的光泽全靠工作人员们持之以恒的保养与维护，并无神奇的捷径可循…而且，要是客人将太多茶汤洒落在桌上，未免也太浪费了…
- Why'd you think of me...? ｜ 为什么要找我…
- Could you tell me more about yourself? ｜ 关于你自己…
- I am so sorry. I have had no audience to play for for so long that now my strings are a little... I'll sing for you next time. ｜ 不好意思，我这里已经很久没有听众来过了，弦的状态有点…还是下次吧。
- What she likes, huh? Hmm... If there has to be one... She is very fond of a snack called Candied Ajilenakh Nuts. ｜ 她的爱好啊…嗯…非要说的话，她特别喜欢「枣椰蜜糖」这种小点心。

- After hearing about your experiences in the desert, Tubby designed this rock decoration based on her own imagination and Paimon's description. It resembles the actual landscape of the desert and can be used to form the basic terrain of adepti abodes.\nThe craggy, bizarrely-shaped rock seems to be the work of the swirling storms that carry coarse sand grains with them.\nThe irregular shape of such rocks is a sign of danger. Mercenaries walking in the desert all know that it indicates that the winds change direction frequently in the area. As a result, the sand carried here by said winds will make for treacherous footing — one step wrong, and you might sink into this quicksand. ｜ 派蒙与阿圆聊到沙漠中的见闻后，阿圆根据派蒙的描述和自己的遐想所构筑的山石，与沙漠中的景观极为相似，可以构成壶中洞天基本地貌。\n表层嶙峋，形态独特，似是被回旋的强风和沙粒雕琢，才表现出如此独特的形状。\n这种岩体的形状正是一种警告，行走于沙漠中的佣兵们都明白，不规整的岩石形态代表周围的风向长期与别处不同，那么被风捎来的细沙可能正以不稳固的状态堆叠，行走其上时，有时会陷入流沙之中。

- Should you require anything else, I'll be here. ｜ 如果客人还有什么需要，我一直都在。
- Well, you're right. No matter how the ceremonies change, the feelings of the people who drink tea are always the same. ｜ 嗯，你说的对，似乎无论茶道形态如何改变，饮茶之后人的心境总是相似的。
- There's an old poem that goes, "O kite borne of paper flying true and sound, a lone traveler wanders just waiting to be found, send them love, send them word, send them homeward bound." ｜ 我曾经在一本古诗集中读到过：「寄语纸鸢送愁客，天涯犹有未归人。」
- Let's ask about the creative process behind the game and confirm their identities that way... Paimon saw Thoma's team show up just now. So, we can investigate them next! ｜ 问出设计游艺的心路历程，侧面印证身份…刚才聊天的时候，我看托马他们也到了，不如现在就去试试吧！
- "That's insane!" ｜ 「别开玩笑了！」
- "Dear friend\nI am leading you by the hand\nInto the night where lanterns shine bright" ｜ 「亲爱的朋友\n我牵着你的手\n带你走进夜晚华灯」
- Mavuika ｜ 玛薇卡
- Paimon ｜ 派蒙
- If that's the case... ｜ 如果是那样的话…
- A card face that can be obtained from Genius Invokation TCG. For reasons unknown, the printing method used here allows you to see slightly different images on the card face when you view it from different angles... ｜ 「七圣召唤」中，可以获得的牌面，不知道利用了什么样的印刷方法，在不同的角度观看牌面的牌画时，似乎能够看到牌画中的内容也有些微的不同…
- Oh, and, do tell the person who sent you... ｜ 再帮我给那位差遣你们的人带句话，就说…
- Disclaimer ｜ 声明
- Enter the temple ｜ 进入庙宇
- #Err, are you going to give it the same name as you, {NICKNAME}? ｜ #咦，这样吗，{NICKNAME}，你要用和自己一样的名字？
- We've made quite the name for ourselves. ｜ 打响名号了呢。
- Deflection! ｜ 反弹！
- A gamepiece based on Geovishap Hatchlings.\nA young vishap with a hard Geo exoskeleton. Vishaps are exceptionally agile creatures that one would be wise not to underestimate in battle.\nThanks to their special way of moving, Geovishap Hatchlings have the ability to execute surprise attacks, covering distance quickly. The protection their armor offers against ordinary weapons is also an important part of their overall combat efficacy. Understanding the combat capabilities of such monsters is an effective way to increase the ability of each nation's military forces to deal with fast-moving, heavily armored units. ｜ 以「幼岩龙蜥」为原型的兵棋。\n有着坚硬岩质甲壳的小型龙蜥，行动非常灵活，是不容小觑的对手。\n得益于特殊的行动方式，幼岩龙蜥的奔袭能力较为优秀，其甲壳对于普通兵器的防御能力也构成了战力组成中的重要部分。研究这类魔物的战斗特性，能有效提升各方将士对于快速重装单位的抵抗能力。

- Kairagi might show up. ｜ 说不定会有海乱鬼出现。
- We've got business to tend to, but thanks for the invite. ｜ 我们待会还有事，就不去啦。
- Charged Attack Stamina Cost|{param8:F1} ｜ 重击体力消耗|{param8:F1}点
- Oh, Paimon knows why! You're afraid of Miko because you always miss your submission deadlines! ｜ 我明白了！你肯定经常拖稿，所以很怕神子！
- Thank you both. I hope you will find somewhere nice to go and relax for a while. ｜ 辛苦你们了，请找一个令人放松的地方尽情休息一会儿。
- No matter what, do remember — "Refreshing Fonta, a Font of Refreshment!" ｜ 无论如何…记住，清爽枫达，畅饮世界！

- My lady, please stay back! We'll handle it... ｜ 小姐请退后，让我们来…
- But if I were to go alone, who knows how long it would take to defeat them. ｜ 但我一个人去清理，不知道要清理到什么时候。

- We should go to the front line. ｜ 我们也去前线吧。
- If it was possible, I wish I could see them again, just like before. ｜ 有可能的话，我还想像以前一样，每天都有它们作陪。

- Get them! ｜ 都给我上！

- #Got it! There's no way I'd have been able to get it back by myself... Thank you, {NICKNAME}. ｜ #拿到了！要是只有我自己，说不定取不回来…谢谢你，{NICKNAME}。
- Could it really be a coincidence!? ｜ 真的会有这么巧的事吗！
- (Ah! I was so nervous that I didn't notice that big wheel at all!) ｜ （唔！太紧张了…我这才注意到那个大轮子…）

- In "A Tour of Wonders," you must complete challenges and claim stamps at Scenic Checkpoints. <color=#FFE14BFF>Once you have completed said challenges and obtained the stamps</color>, you can obtain the corresponding rewards. ｜ 在「诸景巡礼」玩法中，玩家需要完成挑战，并前往「巡景台」处获得印章，在<color=#FFE14BFF>完成挑战且获得印章</color>后，即可领取奖励。
- Sure. ｜ 好呀。
- Divine Ingenuity ｜ 神工天巧
- We will enjoy the sights we see and the stories we write together. What do you think, Seymour? ｜ 我们将一起分享旅途中的风景和故事，你觉得如何，西摩尔？

- Lovi, let's find another place to play. I mean, you don't have to study today for once, right? ｜ 洛薇，我们快去下个地方玩吧，今天你好不容易不用学习了。
- Hi! ｜ 嗨！
- Morning Dew's Moment ｜ 朝露之时
- No more holding back! ｜ 那我也不必留手了！
- Arapandu has a very important task to do for Festival Utsava, for Apam Woods, and for Nara Varuna. ｜ 兰般度有重要的任务，为了无忧节，为了水天丛林，为了那菈法留纳。
- Shinobu is moving on to better things. We should be happy for her! ｜ 阿忍找到了更适合自己的路…我们都要为她高兴才对！
- So Credit Coupons are a currency that can only be used here? ｜ 所以特许券，就是只能在这里用的货币？
- Ahem, ahem! ｜ 咳，咳！

- Haha. *cough* Well, I suppose I worried over-much. You are very strong indeed — I shall have no fear in leaving the Energy Amplifier to you. ｜ 哈哈…咳，是我多虑了，你的实力很强，我可以放心地把「导能原盘」交你保管了。
- And what does your abandoning your homeland have to do with me? Wait. Are you stowaways? Well, if you're looking for my help, you're barking up the wrong tree! ｜ 你们抛弃故土，跟我有什么关系？哎呀，难道说你们是偷渡客？要找我帮忙，你们可是选错人了。
- Violet Lightning Concerto I ｜ 协奏曲·紫电之光 I
- ...None of their future articles would have any credibility. ｜ …以后的评论将无法取信于人。
- Hahaha, believe me, even if she were to end up at rock bottom, she'd find a way to somehow laugh it off as one of her silly mistakes and climb her way out. ｜ 哈哈哈，相信我，就算掉进了谷底，她也会一边开自己的玩笑一边爬上来的。
- Goulash ｜ 稠汁蔬菜炖肉
- Be careful though, it would be rude of us to wake the others. ｜ 小心点，过去的时候别吵醒其他丘丘人。
- Oh ho! Looks like Roald's here as well! ｜ 欸？原来罗尔德先生也在这里呀！
- Character Ascension Material ｜ 角色突破素材
- Here, have a taste! Oh, you can't drink alcohol? What a shame. ｜ 尝一口你就…哦，是吗，还不能喝酒啊，真可惜。
- Defeat a Pyro Hypostasis that has reignited twice. ｜ 击败一个复燃过两次的无相之火。
- That said, I don't think I'd be any good at excavation by hand — might be better to just buy the ore pre-processed. But if you have need of them, you can check the place out. ｜ 不过我没那个本事徒手开采矿石，还是找人买现成的吧。你需要的话可以去这个地方看看。
- Hmm... I also heard you mention "Alhaitham" just a moment ago. Isn't he also from Haravatat? Are you two hiding something from me? ｜ 怎么感觉有点奇怪…刚刚我还听到「艾尔海森」，他不是我们知论派的人吗？你们是不是藏着什么秘密没告诉我？
- That should be the "northern camp" that Taruka mentioned over there, right? But it isn't time yet, so why not <color=#00E1FFFF>sit down and wait</color> first? ｜ 那边应该就是塔卢加听说的「北部营地」了吧？不过现在还没到时间，不如<color=#00E1FFFF>先坐下等等</color>好了。
- 1-Hit DMG|{param1:F1P} ｜ 一段伤害|{param1:F1P}
- Whoa, offering a discount just like that? Tlazolli sure has connections... ｜ 呜哇！开口就是打折，特拉佐莉女士的人缘好厉害…
- Believe me, friend, we should all be doing something about this! ｜ 相信我，朋友，我们都应该做些什么！
- Don't get your hopes up. ｜ 别太乐观。
- How about I tell you some stories from my time in the resistance? I can think of a few you're not likely to hear from anybody else... ｜ 就和你讲讲反抗军里的趣事吧？你在别的地方不一定会遇到哦。
- We Pari exist to avert the catastrophe and cleanse the defilement. ｜ 花灵是为了抵御灾厄、祓除污秽而存在的族群。
- You wish! Isn't that right? ｜ 哼，我们才没兴趣呢！对吧？
- A long, long time... How long is that, exactly? ｜ 很久很久…有多久？
- I see. The Temple of Silence resorted to rather unique means of self-preservation. It explains how they managed to remain hidden for so many years. ｜ 原来如此，缄默之殿用于自保的手段确实特殊，难怪能隐藏这么多年。
- Natlan Dwelling: "Lofty Tower" ｜ 纳塔端居-「昂扬高塔」
- 1-Hit DMG|{param1:F1P} ｜ 一段伤害|{param1:F1P}
- Oh, we totally get that. Sounds just like some of the Adventurers' Guild's commissions. ｜ 哦，这个我们可熟了，就跟冒险家协会的那些委托一样嘛。
- If I ever get the chance... Hee-hee, I wanna go again. ｜ 要是有机会…嘿嘿，我还想再去一次。
- Also, I do not wish for anyone else to know of my involvement in this. ｜ 而且我也不想让别人知道这件事是我做的。
- I believe Sensei hoped that one day you would provide for someone in the same way. ｜ 老师也希望你，有一天能像这样庇护其他人。
- All journeys are fleeting, and will eventually come to an end. What will give us the most fulfillment and happiness in the end are those who will greet us at our journey's destination. ｜ 所有过程都只是过程，最终让我们幸福的是在旅途终点见到的人。
- As for whether I'll help, it'll depend on the situation. ｜ 我会视情况判断是否帮你这个忙。
- What's with her ominous tone? ｜ 这股好像很危险的气息是怎么回事…
- Learned from Realm Depot Furnishing Blueprint ｜ 洞天百宝·摆设图纸购买习得
- A special feather-shaped species that grows by the seaside. It looks kind of like a seagrass but is in truth a soft-bodied aquatic coral with a unique shape.\nFeather-shaped color outlines are frequently employed in graffiti art. Apparently, many beginners hone their drawing skills by tracing these when they first start practicing... ｜ 生长在海边如羽状的特殊物种，看似是水草般的植物，实际上是形态特殊的水栖软体珊瑚。\n涂鸦中时常用到羽状的色彩轮廓，据说许多新手在练习时，都将这种采集物当成过描摹的对象…
- Though flowers bloom yet always fade, but people go yet return another day. I just knew that you'd be back to see me before long, hehe. ｜ 花开花谢，人去人归，我就知道你会回来看我的，呵呵。
- ...I do hope that "change" will come a bit more slowly. ｜ …还是让「改变」来得再慢些吧。
- Unlocks the associated character ｜ 角色解锁
- We're shrine maidens. ｜ 我们是巫女。
- The actual perpetrator of the serial disappearances, Cowell, selected his next victim from the audience reservation list. ｜ 少女失踪案的实际作案者考威尔，在观众名册上挑选了作案目标。
- "Buyer" ｜ 物资的「买家」
- We shall rewrite history! ｜ 我们必须改写历史！
- Ah, I really hope they grow up soon... ｜ 嗯…真希望它快点长大…
- Even trying to leave Inazuma's borders is fraught with difficulty, never mind attempting to travel the world. A normal person would never even make it past the many assessments that the Kanjou Commission conduct. ｜ 别说是环游世界了，就算是想要出海也是困难重重，一般人连「勘定奉行」的多重审批都通不过。

- ??? ｜ ？？？

- Hmm... You're right, Lanoire! We're gonna win this thing! ｜ 唔…莉诺尔说得对！我们肯定能赢！
- Infiltration AI14 ｜ (test)潜入AI14
- Go to Leschots's workshop ｜ 前往莱舒的发条工坊
- Variation on Debris and Metal ｜ 残垣与铁壁的变奏
- But how... No, that can't be true! The Princess should be in the tower. I mean, that was the adventure team's only hope in this dark world... ｜ 不对！不应该是这样的！莉利丝公主，应该就在高塔里才对呀？我们水仙十字冒险团，我们存在在这个黑暗的世间唯一的愿望…
- Melusines ｜ 美露莘
- She flees even now, but how can she escape him? Eighteen pairs of blood-red eyes! Thousands of sharp, venomous fangs! Countless mouths and numberless tongues, ever thirsting after blood! ｜ 她在逃跑，但她怎么逃得过「他」！十八双血色的眼睛！千千万万锋利的毒牙！永远渴求鲜血的、数不清的口与舌！！
- We've gotta make sure that we've still got that Maushiro, of course! ｜ 要先看看，木簧笛还在不在身上才行！
- Eh? This looks a lot like the thing that protected Iotham earlier... ｜ 欸？这个…和之前保护优丹的东西很像…
- Whoa, it's that painting we just saw! It's turning this way, along with the whole wall! ｜ 是刚刚我们看过的画，和墙壁一起转到这边来了！
- Culminate! Chatter of Joyous Dreams ｜ 幕收！欢谈如梦
- But this Doctor guy seems like a pretty tough opponent... He knew exactly where to set up an ambush. Did he predict that we would try to find Tighnari? ｜ 不过「博士」真的有些可怕，是算准了我们会去找提纳里吗，所以才雇人在这里设下埋伏…
- ...! ｜ ——！
- It rained heavily after that on that day, and I couldn't find my way home, so I hid under a big rock. ｜ 然后，那天下了很大的雨，我找不到回家的路，只能到一块大石头下躲雨。
- Why don't you hand me the ingredients — it's a bit of a chore to prepare, so I'll take it from here. ｜ 把材料给我吧，制药的事情比较麻烦，我来就好。
- Well, seems everyone's here. Would you announce the results now, Estienne? ｜ 人都到齐了，艾蒂安，现在可以公开了吧。
- Dropped by the Black Serpents ｜ 黑蛇众掉落
- ??? ｜ ？？？
- I suppose you could think of it that way. We Fontainians are big tea drinkers too. ｜ 可以这么理解。我们枫丹人也是很爱喝茶的嘛。
- #Hey there, {M#amigo}{F#amiga}! Are you here to listen to Six-Fingered José's latest composition? ｜ 嘿，朋友，是来听六指乔瑟的最新作的吗？
- Good golly gosh, the fell dragon Narcissus! ｜ 我的天，魔龙纳西索斯！
- Echoes of the Plentiful Land ｜ 丰沃之陆的回声
- When It Snows ｜ 下雪的时候…
- Fishnado ｜ 翻鱼搅浪
- Arataki Kesagiri Combo Slash DMG|{param6:F1P} ｜ 荒泷逆袈裟连斩伤害|{param6:F1P}
- Gold is a wonderful color, the same as sunshine. That's what I'd like to call you on this important occasion! ｜ 金色是很美好的颜色，它和阳光的颜色是一样的。在这么重要的场合，我想这样称呼你！
- When the game begins: Select 1 out of 3 random characters ｜ 游戏开始时：从3名随机角色中挑选1名
- *cough* *hack*! ｜ 呃咳，呃咳！
- A style of bed that has been much loved in Mondstadt of late. The Knights of Favonius also adopted it as their standard issue dormitory bed.\nIt was once rumored that these beds were made using unique fabrics that had the blessing of the gentle winds, which allowed people to sleep more easily.\nHowever, the Knights were forced to switch out the stuffings of the mattresses and pillows on account of the number of knights who showed up late. ｜ 近年来深受喜爱的蒙德床榻，骑士团也将其采用，作为宿舍的标准床铺。\n曾有这样的传言：这种床榻采用了独特的织物，有着柔风的加护，让人更容易快速入睡。\n但考虑到迟到的骑士正在逐渐增多，骑士团不得不更换了床垫和枕头的填充物。
- Complete stage without using up Vitality ｜ 未耗尽活力值的情况下完成挑战
- I lost my composure. Please forgive me. In that case, please keep this "Memento Lens" safe. It is a very precious instrument indeed. ｜ 真是失态，请二位原谅。那么，请好好保管好这个…「留念镜」。那可是十分宝贵的器物。
- Umm... We don't know too much about him, apart from his obsession with Card Backs. But apparently, he's stolen other players' cards before! ｜ 唔…除了知道他对牌背非常热衷之外，其他不太了解，但听说他还是做过偷别人牌这种事的！
- Okay, I'm free now anyway. ｜ 好吧，反正也没什么事。
- Tadhla ｜ 塔德菈
- How Did That Happen ｜ 怎会如此
- A rusted key. Who knows how long it has been here... ｜ 被锈蚀了的钥匙。不知道在这里放了多久…
- In Co-Op Mode, this effect only applies to your own character(s). ｜ 多人游戏时，仅对自己的角色生效。
- Realm of Diversion ｜ 绕尘纪行
- Deals $[D__KEY__DAMAGE] $[D__KEY__ELEMENT]. ｜ 造成$[D__KEY__DAMAGE]点$[D__KEY__ELEMENT]。
- Not at all. We just came early to set everything up, since we happened to be free today. ｜ 没有没有，是我们正巧空闲着，就提前来布置了一番。
- Restores 28% of Max HP to the selected character and regenerates 620 HP every 5s for 30s. ｜ 立即为选中的角色恢复生命值上限的28%，并在之后的30秒内，每5秒恢复620点生命值。
- I also asked the locals about her. They call her: "She who has dominion over the stars and the course of fate itself"... Not even a pretense of humility. Clearly, she let the role of creator-goddess get to her head... ｜ 后来我就去找人打听了一下。「司掌星辰与轨迹」，她还真是演都不演，彻底陶醉在她的创作里了…
- Rana! Can you hear Paimon? ｜ 拉娜！你听得见吗？

- A hero of the Flower-Feather Clan, one of the warriors who sacrificed themselves in the name of justice and virtue, forever cherished in the hearts of the people... ｜ 「花羽会」的英杰，为公义和美德献身的勇士之一，被人们恒久铭记…
- Extreme... Skewers? ｜ 极、极意之串？
- Sorry, I just can't control myself whenever I remember that time. ｜ 抱歉，每次想起来，我都没法控制住自己。
- That's right, but don't feel disappointed on his behalf — he himself was not upset about that turn of events. ｜ 是的，不过别为他感到遗憾，他对此并没什么不满。
- Maybe a story will explain it better. So, he used to spend a lot of time playing rock paper scissors and hide-and-seek with the kids on the streets. ｜ 听我讲一个他的故事你们就明白了，他以前经常和町街的小孩子玩猜拳和捉迷藏。
- And if I may add, we the Fatui had nothing to do with this disaster. ｜ 另外声明一下啊，这次龙灾的发生和我们愚人众可没关系。
- To fight against the Akademiya, we will need to figure out the nature and the purpose of their work. Is there a way for us to get access to the confidential documents you mentioned? ｜ 为了对抗教令院，我们有必要了解清楚他们具体在做些什么，你所说的「机密文件」有办法弄到手么？
- Hehe. We're in your capable hands, then! We'll be watching your movements carefully and timing you from down below. ｜ #那就拜托你啦，{M#大哥哥}{F#大姐姐}。我们会在地上仔细看着你的动作，算好时间的。
- But, unfortunately, that's just wishful thinking. ｜ 很遗憾，这种浪漫的想法也仅仅只是美好的幻想。

- I am indeed indebted to you. I shall see you at the <color=#00E1FFFF>tavern</color>, as per the plan. ｜ 是我欠你们一个人情。那么就按照计划，<color=#00E1FFFF>酒馆</color>见了。

- During the challenge, Hydro Tulpa: Flashflood will enter a charging state as it prepares to unleash Devastating Torrent. When it unleashes Devastating Torrent, all characters currently on the field will be downed. While charging, Hydro Tulpa: Flashflood will activate a Shield that regenerates Elemental Energy and Fighting Spirit for characters in your party and resets the CDs of Elemental Skills and Bursts. If the Shield is broken, the charging of Devastating Torrent will be interrupted. ｜ 在挑战中，「水形幻人·洪流」会进入蓄能态势，并准备释放「坏灭激流」。「坏灭激流」将使当前场上的所有角色变为无法战斗状态。在蓄能过程中，「水形幻人·洪流」将张开护盾，为队伍中的角色恢复元素能量和战意，并重置元素战技与元素爆发的冷却时间。当该护盾被破除时，「坏灭激流」的蓄能将被打断。
- If you're tired, go have some of Mondstadt's famous wine at a tavern called "Angel's Share." ｜ 当您感觉疲劳的时候，不妨去「天使的馈赠」酒馆尝尝蒙德闻名的好酒。
- You'll be pleased to know that the next time you wish to visit the Pearl Galley, you won't need to take the aerial route. ｜ 如果您以后再想来这「珠钿舫」上玩一玩，就不用费力飞过来了。

- <color=#FFD780FF>Normal Attack</color>\nPerforms up to 4 attacks that deal <color=#99FF88FF>Dendro DMG</color> to opponents in front of her.\n\n<color=#FFD780FF>Charged Attack</color>\nConsumes a certain amount of Stamina to deal <color=#99FF88FF>AoE Dendro DMG</color> to opponents in front of her after a short casting time.\n\n<color=#FFD780FF>Plunging Attack</color>\nCalling upon the might of Dendro, Nahida plunges towards the ground from mid-air, damaging all opponents in her path. Deals <color=#99FF88FF>AoE Dendro DMG</color> upon impact with the ground. ｜ <color=#FFD780FF>普通攻击</color>\n对前方进行至多四段的攻击，造成<color=#99FF88FF>草元素伤害</color>。\n\n<color=#FFD780FF>重击</color>\n消耗一定体力，短暂咏唱后，对前方区域造成<color=#99FF88FF>草元素范围伤害</color>。\n\n<color=#FFD780FF>下落攻击</color>\n凝聚草元素的力量，从空中下坠冲击地面，攻击下落路径上的敌人，并在落地时造成<color=#99FF88FF>草元素范围伤害</color>。

- Huh, there seems to be something next to that device. Let's go have a look later, shall we? ｜ 咦，那里的机关旁似乎有什么东西，等下过去看看吧？

- The art of blade forging taught by the Shogun varies based on astrology, application, materials used, the furnace conditions, individual personalities, and elemental changes. These differences between smiths is what gave rise to the Raiden Gokaden. Swordsmiths capable of forging renowned blades are seen as spiritual personnel with sacred abilities, and as such they should be managed by the Yashiro Commission, which oversees all cultural, artistic, and ceremonial affairs. So naturally, the swordsmith's betrayal is the fault of ineffectual management by the Kamisato Clan. ｜ 将军所传的锻刀之术，也因星象、用途、矿质、炉火环境、人之性格、元素变化的不同，而有所区分。即是刀工之间所说的「雷电五传」。能锻造名刀的刀工，也被算作是本领通神的神事相关人员，归属统筹文化、艺术、祭祀的社奉行一派管理。因此，出现了刀工背叛的事情，自然就是神里家的督办不力了。
- You don't have to push yourself that hard... ｜ 倒也不用这么拼命…

While restrained, the Metastable Jadeplume Terrorshroom's <color=#d47202>Dendro Ward will be removed</color>, and its Physical and All Elemental RES will be <color=#d47202>decreased slightly</color>.\nOnly the host can use Active Strategies in Co-Op Mode. ｜ 在挑战中，可呼唤兰吉特发射拘束弹支援战斗。拘束弹将<color=#d47202>打断</color>「亚稳态翠翎恐蕈」的攻击，并在一段时间内，将其<color=#d47202>拘束在地面</color>。受到拘束期间，「亚稳态翠翎恐蕈」的<color=#d47202>草元素护罩将被移除</color>，同时其物理抗性和所有元素抗性将<color=#d47202>小幅降低</color>。\n多人游戏中，只有主机可以使用主动策略。

- Focusing the might of the formless wind around her blade, Jean releases a miniature storm, launching opponents in the direction she aims at, dealing massive <color=#80FFD7FF>Anemo DMG</color>.\n\n<color=#FFD780FF>Hold</color>\nAt the cost of continued stamina consumption, Jean can command the whirlwind to pull surrounding opponents and objects towards her front.\nDirection can be adjusted.\nCharacter is immobile during skill duration.\n\n<i>That which follows Jean, the wholehearted defender, is a guardian wind that can banish danger from her comrades' presence.</i> ｜ 将无形的风之力汇聚在剑上，释放微型的风暴，将敌人向瞄准的方向击飞，造成大量<color=#80FFD7FF>风元素伤害</color>。\n\n<color=#FFD780FF>长按</color>\n以持续消耗体力为代价，令旋风将周围的敌人与物体牵引至面前。\n可以调整方向。\n期间无法移动。\n\n<i>与一心守护的琴同行的，是能将危险驱离伙伴身边的守护之风。</i>
- He said our family's fortune was inauspicious, and we needed something to suppress the bad luck. That's what he planted the tree for... how can I just chop it down? ｜ 说咱家运势不好，家里得有个镇着命脉的家伙，那树就是请回来镇宅的，如何砍得了呀？
- Right on! It's powerful yet flexible, with a stubbornness that never surrenders to the challenges ahead. That's the existence I strive for. ｜ 对！既刚强又柔韧，我想成为那样的存在，永远顽强，永远不被眼前的逆境打垮。

- While under the effects of <color=#FFD780FF>Sparks 'n' Splash</color>, Klee will regenerate 3 Energy for all members of the party (excluding Klee) every 3s.\nWhen <color=#FFD780FF>Sparks 'n' Splash</color> is used, all party members will gain a 10% <color=#FF9999FF>Pyro DMG Bonus</color> for 25s. ｜ 在<color=#FFD780FF>轰轰火花</color>的状态下，可莉每3秒会为队伍中所有角色（不包括可莉自己）恢复3点元素能量；\n施放<color=#FFD780FF>轰轰火花</color>后的25秒内，队伍中所有角色获得10%<color=#FF9999FF>火元素伤害加成</color>。

- There are many kinds of smiles, but only a truly joyous one can bring blessings to others. Let's consider this smile a down payment for our future victory. ｜ 笑有很多种形式，能保佑人的却只有因喜悦和幸福展露出的笑。现在的笑，就当是预支未来的胜利了。

- Opponents' ATK increased by 50%. ｜ 怪物的攻击力提升50%。
- <color=#D3BC8EFF>Legend of the Vagabond Sword: Event Guidelines</color>\nHead to a newly appeared Domain to challenge new and powerful bosses. \nBefore you begin the challenge in earnest, you can choose the difficulty level and select certain Flairs to accumulate more points.\nStarting on the first day of the event, a new challenge will unlock each day until the seventh day, by which all the challenges will have been unlocked.\nThe event will last for 16 days in total. Once the event ends, your accumulated points will be cleared, and you will be unable to claim any further rewards.\n\n<color=#D3BC8EFF>Flairs</color>\nFlairs are factors that can shift the overall difficulty of the challenge up or down. They also affect the number of points that will be earned at the end of the challenge.\nFlairs consist of various buffs and negative effects that affect the challenge. Different Flairs will affect the challenge difficulty and the final score differently.\nWhen the challenge begins, you can select Flairs that suit your own pace.\n\n<color=#D3BC8EFF>Points and Rewards</color>\nUpon completion of the challenge, you will obtain points based on the difficulty of the challenge and the Flairs you chose.\nYou can also collect a first-time completion reward the first time you clear a certain challenge.\nUpon accumulating specific amounts of points, you will be able to claim the corresponding rewards. ｜ <color=#D3BC8EFF>【风来人剑斗绮谭：活动简介】</color>\n前往新出现的秘境入口，可以挑战前所未见的强大首领。\n正式开始挑战前，可以选择挑战的难度，以及附加的「艺能」，以取得更高的积分。\n从活动开始的第一天起，每天会开启一个新的挑战，直到第七天开启所有挑战的关卡。\n活动整体持续16天。活动结束后，将清除累积的积分，并且无法领取奖励。\n\n<color=#D3BC8EFF>【规则：艺能】</color>\n「艺能」是能左右整体挑战强度的因素，也影响挑战完成时积分获取的多寡。\n其中包括各种针对挑战者的增益与负面效果。依据不同的艺能，挑战的难度与最终获取的积分也会有所不同。\n挑战时，可以依据自己的步调，选择适合自己的艺能。\n\n<color=#D3BC8EFF>【规则：积分与奖励】</color>\n依据所选定的艺能与挑战的难度，完成挑战时能获得积分。\n首次攻克某一挑战时，也能领取首通奖励。\n依据所取得的积分，可以在达到指定积分时领取对应的奖励。
- Hahaha, you're no slowcoach either. Your presence here means that Sango is telling me, "I have a new helper." ｜ 哈哈哈，你的反应倒也不慢。现在你在这里，几乎就相当于珊瑚在和我说：「我有了个新帮手」。

- This picture shows Liyue Harbor from an elevated perspective. Keep following Batlo's advice and carefully examine the picture, find the missing scenery, and then grasp the "artistic hallucination." But the way this "artistic hallucination" changes with each work of art, should it be said to be "artistic," or is it more properly a "hallucination"... ｜ 这张画片似乎是在一个高处记录了璃月港的景致。继续按照巴特洛的说法，仔细观察画片，寻找到缺失的景物，再抓住那种「艺术幻觉」吧。但这种「艺术幻觉」居然会随着画作不同而改变，该说不愧为「艺术」，还是不愧为「幻觉」呢…

- "Most of the engineering platforms and the related machinery have been dismantled. All involved personnel, please return to the surface to await further instructions." ｜ 「大部分工程操作台及其相关器械皆已拆卸，请相关人员返回地面待命。」
- Event Card ｜ 事件牌
- —They hear a strange sound but it's actually the sound of the traditional Maushiro recording in folktales so please I want to properly describe its sound and that's why I need a real Maushiro! ｜ ——进入鹤观时听了奇怪的声响，但那其实是民话记载中鹤观的传统乐器木簧笛的声音，所以如果我想要准确描述它的音色就需要真正的木簧笛！
- What big job are you doing? ｜ 你在做什么重要的工作？
- I understand my enemy well is all. As the saying goes, heroes and villains are two sides of the same coin. ｜ 我只是很了解他们而已，正如我说「英雄」也是另一视角上的「恶人」。
- Restores <color=#3399CCFF>26–30%</color> of Max HP to the selected character. ｜ 为选中的角色恢复生命值上限的<color=#3399CCFF>26%-30%</color>。
- There are only a few Fatui stationed around the perimeter. We should take care of them first, so they can't alert anyone. ｜ 山体侧面的人员部署不多，我们尽快解决，别给他们通风报信的机会。
- Picturesque Records ｜ 笔触如画的记录
- Anyway, you've certainly handled the training well so far. The next exercise is live-combat training. Let's go, shall we? ｜ 刚刚的训练，你的表现也很不错，我们走吧，接下来是实战训练了。
- Lagenaria ｜ 悬壶座
- You describe Mona's distinguishing features to Wyratt... ｜ （旅行者向威拉格描述了莫娜的外貌特点…）
- I'd like your assistance with this investigation, since you two are the only ones who have seen the alleged ghost. ｜ 所有人中唯独你们见过那位「幽灵」，我想和你们一起调查真相。
- The energy readings around here have stabilized a great deal, thanks to you. When I go back and write my thesis, I will mention you for sure. ｜ 能量读数稳定了许多…谢谢你的努力，等我回去会在论文中提起你的。
- Whoa! Th—That was close... ｜ 呜哇！好，好险…
- We've heard that Spiritways were created by the ancient dragons, but still... ｜ 虽说好像之前就听说过，游隙灵道是古代龙族创造的…
- A special model of Aeonblight Drake that can engage in <color=#FFE14BFF>ground</color> and <color=#FFE14BFF>aerial</color> combat.\nThe Aeonblight Drake (Heavy Assault Pack) will periodically unleash dangerous <color=#FFE14BFF>Energy Surges</color> that will increase its Elemental RES based on the primary Elemental DMG type it has taken at this time. Each time it unleashes an Energy Surge, it will remove any other active Elemental RES effects.\nWhen it is in its aerial state, it will gain the protection of a <color=#FFE14BFF>Ward</color>, but the various <color=#FFE14BFF>cores</color> all over its body will be exposed. <color=#FFE14BFF>Hit those cores</color> to destroy the shield. After the shield is destroyed, the Aeonblight Drake (Heavy Assault Pack) will fall to the earth and be immobilized. ｜ 特殊型号的兆载永劫龙兽，可以在<color=#FFE14BFF>地面</color>与<color=#FFE14BFF>升空状态</color>下进行攻击。\n重武装兆载永劫龙兽在战斗中会周期性释放危险的<color=#FFE14BFF>能量洪流</color>，并根据此前受到伤害的主要元素类型，提高对应的元素抗性。每次施放能量洪流，都将清除已有的其他元素抗性提升效果。\n进入升空状态后，将受到<color=#FFE14BFF>护罩</color>庇护，但身体诸多部位的<color=#FFE14BFF>核心</color>会暴露出来。通过<color=#FFE14BFF>命中核心</color>的方式，可以破坏其护盾。护盾被破坏后，重武装兆载永劫龙兽将坠落至地面并瘫痪。
- I feel like I'm in class... ｜ 有种在上课的感觉…
- Okay... So we've only got five battles to get in shape enough for Guoba-san. Then we gotta master what he teaches us, THEN take down that cocky pe{RUBY#[S]"Crystal Tornado"}t rock... ｜ 只用五场斗虫修炼，就将实力提升到锅巴兄认可的地步，再向锅巴兄好好学习，打败那个嚣张的{RUBY#[D]「水晶岛梆梆旋风」}家伙…
- When you're out on the job, focus on delivering things! If you're going down a slope, just keep going as you normally would. Why would you suddenly drop into a slide like you're on vacation!? ｜ 送东西就好好送东西，遇见山坡就正常越过去，有什么必要半路突然开始玩滑行？
- So, something bad is happening to Erinnyes, and you want to protect it? ｜ 伊黎耶岛正在变得不好，然后，你要保护它？
- Of course we won't! We're friends! ｜ 不会的！我们是好朋友！
- Haha, whether you understood me or not, don't you worry. I'll take care of the kids, and make sure they stay safe. ｜ 哈哈，不管有没有听懂，总之放心吧，我会注意孩子们的安全，好好保护他们的。
- Default ｜ 默认
- Well... How about meeting at the café for a drink next time? We could discuss how to write the report. ｜ 那个——下次一块去咖啡馆喝一杯怎么样？我们可以商量一下，这次的报告要怎么写。
- A detailed step-by-step blueprint for making a Bird and Blossom Design Fountain.\nAfter using this item, you can view it in the Creation Screen. ｜ 步骤详实的图纸，记载着「花鸟喷泉」的制作方法。\n使用后可进入制作界面查看。
- The Aranara disperse following the duet. ｜ 合唱结束后，兰那罗们陆陆续续散开了…
- Yes. Everyone else has told me that I have to move on and embrace the fun of Genius Invokation, saying that I'm one of its creators... ｜ 是啊…认识的人都叫我看开点，去享受「七圣召唤」的乐趣，说我是什么「发明人」之一…
- This is the first time we've met in real life. Before, we've only met in dreams, consciousness, or when I was in someone else's body. ｜ 这还是我们第一次在现实中见面呢。曾经都是在梦里，在意识里，或者我在别人的身体里。
- Ei, Paimon, and you drink the Dango Milk slowly. ｜ 影，派蒙和你都将「团子牛奶」缓缓饮下。
- Still, thanks for telling me to get onboard, evil spirit. It's... It's just that I've lived here for so long, and yet there's so much I still haven't seen or done... I can't just leave this place! ｜ 谢谢你催我上船，岛外的恶灵大人。只不过呀…我活了这么些年，还有好些东西没见识过呢，可舍不得离开…
- Hah! Are you sure you're Remurian? Do you not know that Phobos was fashioned by the omnipotent Sebastos and the infallible oracle? ｜ 你是雷穆利亚人吗？难道你不知道创造「福波斯」的是全能的至尊与无谬的先知？
- Well, I've put this letter into the drifting bottle. Send it down the river. ｜ 这封信我已经装在漂流瓶里了，你快去放进河里吧。
- A common bird feather. Experts use it to practice strength control, while rookies use it to make fans. ｜ 随处可见的鸟类落毛，高手用来练习力道，新手则用来制成扇子。
- "Thank you for your letter. Though I have extended a response, I cannot answer your query due to your questionable motives." ｜ 「感谢你的来信，我对你的问题做出了回答，但由于你动机不纯，我不能直接附在信中。」
- I used to run a blacksmith's there — Hanfeng's Ironmongers. My apprentices would all have been around your age. ｜ 以前我在那边开了一家叫「寒锋铁器」的铁匠铺，跟着我学打铁的小徒们…嗯，都和你差不多大吧。
- Aeval ｜ 爱贝尔
- Hehe, anyway, it's easy to poke fun at business people and their strange rituals when I don't know the first thing about business. But a client's a client, so I'll always respect their wishes down to the last detail. ｜ 好啦，玩笑话这里讲完这里散，我不是做生意的料啦，但就算我不理解还是会做好我的本职工作的！
- 5-Hit DMG|{param5:P} ｜ 五段伤害|{param5:P}
- I guess they just forgot to draw those splotches. ｜ 可能只是忘记画上斑点了。
- Don't worry. I'm not trying to grill you — I'm just making a guess. ｜ 没关系，我也不是在提问，只是猜想而已。
- This was good tea, by the way. Thank you for your hospitality. Well, that'll be all for today. ｜ 茶不错，感谢招待。好了，今天的茶会就到这里吧。
- Talk to Xudong ｜ 与旭东对话
- Exploration Progress ｜ 探索度
- Are you a merchant? ｜ 你是商人吗？
- Exploration Knowledge ｜ 探索知识
- Reward Preview ｜ 奖励一览
- Cyclone! ｜ 风暴！
- A card face that can be obtained from Genius Invokation TCG. For reasons unknown, the printing method used here allows you to see slightly different images on the card face when you view it from different angles... ｜ 「七圣召唤」中，可以获得的牌面，不知道利用了什么样的印刷方法，在不同的角度观看牌面的牌画时，似乎能够看到牌画中的内容也有些微的不同…
- So there was nothing inside... That's good, that's good... ｜ 什么都没有，什么都没有…好啊，好啊…
- A... happy pose? You mean, something like... we were laughing together at a funny joke? ｜ 快乐的姿势？就像…听到了笑话的感觉吗？
- Photo DMG (Hold)|{param2:F1P} ｜ 长按拍照伤害|{param2:F1P}
- Ah. As ever, this is such a wondrous sight! Although only a few shields and spears remain, I'm sure the grand scenes of the past are already flashing before your eyes! ｜ #令人神往，令人神往呀！虽说现在也只剩下这两三面盾、七八条枪了，但想必{M#少侠}{F#女侠}眼前也已经浮现出当初的盛景了吧！
- Use Elemental Tuning to use more Elemental Skills ｜ 进行元素调和，多使用元素战技
- Zhu Ming ｜ 祝明
- There's a hole in the tree. It seems completely empty, and there's nothing in it... ｜ 这里好像有个树洞，不过里面是空的，什么都没有…
- Charged Attack Spinning DMG|{param5:F1P} ｜ 重击循环伤害|{param5:F1P}
- By the way, sounds like you and Hu Tao were up to something on the night of Lantern Rite... She didn't go into detail, but it must have been big. ｜ 对了，海灯节那晚，你和胡桃其实是办了大事吧？她没详细讲，但我感觉就不是普通的祭仪。
- Thunderbolt Rush ｜ 电掣雷驰
- It's not too complicated. ｜ 不算太复杂。
- ??? ｜ ？？？
- There are plenty of cliffside murals near the Flower-Feather Clan, but not many flat, open areas large enough for a giant work of land art. ｜ 「花羽会」边上有不少绘制在山崖上的壁画，却少有能铺得下巨幅地画的平地。
- As we agreed, then. I shall instruct you in the sealing of those rocks. ｜ 按照约定，奴家这就把封印石头的事情告诉汝等。
- According to what Fujin said before, all this adeptal energy should be used on the Votive Rainjade. That way, Qiaoying Village can reap the results next year! ｜ 按照浮锦之前的说法，这些仙力都用在「祀珑」上了。这样一来，翘英庄明年应该也会大丰收啦！
- Never thought I'd see the day when Yanxiao leaves his kitchen... ｜ 难得见言笑让出厨房…
- Head to the site of Ganyu's trial and speak to her ｜ 前往甘雨的修炼地点，与甘雨对话
- And the Wolfhooks that grow in safer areas have all been picked. ｜ 而且那些长在安全区域的钩钩果，也早就被人采集完了。
- Played by Clorinde ｜ 克洛琳德饰
- How strange. My courage fails me as I grow older... ｜ 真奇怪啊，年纪大了，勇气却越来越少。
- Player {0} has not unlocked this stage and cannot participate in the challenge. ｜ 玩家{0}未开启本关卡，无法参与挑战
- A simple flower brooch that is a keepsake from someone's first adventure. ｜ 别在胸前的朴实小花，是一次冒险后得到的纪念品。
- It's not that fixed, is it? ｜ 上下高度差挺大的吧…
- Help me! Help me, please! ｜ 救我呀！救命啊！英雄救命啊！！
- Oh wow... No way, bro! ｜ 哦天哪，不会吧哥们！
- Guanchui's Funds ｜ 关垂的「采购资金」
- I'll live up to your legacy. Aramuhukunda's name has filled us with courage since many, many moons ago, and that will not change for many, many moons to come. ｜ 我不会愧对你的故事的。兰穆护昆达的名字，从好多好多个月亮以前，就让大家充满勇气，好多好多个月亮之后也不会变。
- Ever So Close ｜ 近在咫尺的目标
- Tell me. Where is the old records room? ｜ 快说，地方在哪儿。
- About Lamizana... ｜ 关于拉密萨纳…
- "Big Sis" and I had to split right there. I've got no clue where she is now. ｜ 然后我和「大姐」分道扬镳，不知道她跑到哪去了。
- Still, it'll all be worth it as long as we find the answer in the end. At least... that's what I think. ｜ 不过，只要最终能得到答案，一切都是值得的。嗯…至少我是这么认为的。
- Achieve victory ｜ 赢得胜利
- Those who are afraid of disapproval and who lose confidence in themselves will never become their best selves, and they'll never find someone who truly sees them! ｜ 要是害怕被人否认，对自己失去信心，那就永远不可能成为自己心里最棒的模样，更没法找到认可自己的知音！
- "Concierge" ｜ 「礼宾员」
- A detailed step-by-step blueprint for making a Six-Sided Lantern: Harmony in Friendship.\nAfter using this item, you can view it in the Creation Screen. ｜ 步骤详实的图纸，记载着「六角灯笼-『和气致祥』」的制作方法。\n使用后可进入制作界面查看。
- Defeat all opponents ｜ 打倒所有敌人
- There is one other thing. Master Callas' opponent in the duel... was Ms. Clorinde. ｜ 还有一件事，卡雷斯先生当时的决斗对象…正是那位克洛琳德小姐。
- Hey there. If you're here to view the goods, I'm afraid I'm still waiting on the latest delivery... ｜ 嘿，是来看货的吗？新的货还没到，可能得再等等…
- As an old friend of his, I would like to help, but... ｜ 作为那家伙的老朋友，我当然愿意帮忙，不过…
- Once I get my Geo Vision, I'm gonna be the most legendary hero this world's ever seen! ｜ 等以后再得到岩元素的神之眼，本大侠就是天下第一侠客了！
- It's been so long now, I can only imagine what wonderful stories you have to share. ｜ 这么久不见，你们好像又经历了不少有趣的事。
- During this Round, this character's next <color=#FFFFFFFF>Normal Attack</color> costs 1 less $[K309]. ｜ 本回合中，该角色下一次<color=#FFFFFFFF>「普通攻击」</color>少花费1个$[K309]。
- You see, Master has taught me that "when in an abode, do as the adepti do"... Um, wait, I think it's "the guest should go along with their host"... ｜ 师父教过我要「入乡随俗」，欸…等等…这时候是不是应该用「客随主便」更好？
- Ah... My academic career... ｜ 唉…我的学术生涯…
- Not to worry, though, I'm sure you'll be able to handle whatever comes your way in the real world. ｜ 别担心，在现实中，你一定能渡过难关的。
- With your fame and accomplishments, it is only natural that news of your arrival would reach us as soon as you stepped foot in Fontaine. ｜ 像二位这样杰出的人物，一旦踏上了我们枫丹的土地，自然会有小小鸟跟我们说喽。
- Opponents' Anemo RES increased by 50%. ｜ 怪物的风元素抗性提高50%。
- Shhh, careful! We'll get in trouble if the guards catch us. ｜ 嘘，小心点，被看守抓住了可就麻烦了呀。
- Sometimes, when I see the ball flying at me, I freeze up thinking of all the ways I can hit it back! ｜ 有时看着飞来的撞球，思考太多条件，反而会左右为难！
- Cauich ｜ 卡乌胡
- Hear me out and don't keep staring at the sea. ｜ 听我说，最好别一直盯着大海看哦。
- Ah, Ryouko. How's business? ｜ 哟，凉子，生意还好？
- Charm Magic ｜ 符法之力
- Injuries that cause interruption will be hard to avoid here. Use <color=#FFCC33>shields</color> to protect yourself and help combat go more smoothly. ｜ 这里的干扰攻击密集且难以规避。使用<color=#FFCC33>护盾</color>保护自身，也许会让战斗更加流畅。
- Rainbow Macarons ｜ 缤纷马卡龙
- Charged Attack Stamina Cost|{param8:F1} ｜ 重击体力消耗|{param8:F1}点
- #I'm sorry, Knight {NICKNAME}... As for the rest, each time I try to recall it, I grow very frightened... and very sad. This is the best I can do for now. ｜ #对不起，{NICKNAME}骑士…其他的事情，我只要去想，就会觉得，很害怕、很难过。现在能想到的，就是这些了。
- Sparks 'n' Splash DMG|{param1:F1P} ｜ 轰轰火花伤害|{param1:F1P}
- Look for clues in the hilichurl camp ｜ 调查丘丘人营地中的线索
- Attain a score of {param2} in Elemental Ensemble ｜ 在「元素多重奏」挑战中达到{param2}积分
- <color=#D3BC8EFF>Event Summary</color>\nGygax of Mondstadt has been improving Windtrace, adding all sorts of new design elements and renaming it "Windtrace: Seekers and Strategy." Now, he is also calling for volunteer test players. Take part to obtain Windtrace Coins and unlock different levels of rewards.\n\n<color=#D3BC8EFF>Eligibility</color>\nReach Adventure Rank 20 to take part in "Windtrace: Seekers and Strategy."\n\n<color=#D3BC8EFF>Event Rules</color>\n1. On each of the six days of the event after it has begun, the maximum number of Windtrace Coins you can collect is increased by 1,000.\n2. You can earn Windtrace Coins in Solo Mode and matchmade games alongside up to 2 friends. If you use the latter method, all the members of your party will be Rebels. You will be unable to obtain Windtrace Coins while playing together with 3 friends. ｜ <color=#D3BC8EFF>【活动简介】</color>\n蒙德城内的吉盖克斯改进了自己设计的「风行迷踪」，在其中加入了全新的设计，并将其命名为「风行迷踪·谋策之局」，并且，他也正在招募愿意试玩的玩家。参与试玩可赢取「迷踪币」，用于解锁不同等阶的奖励。\n\n<color=#D3BC8EFF>【参与条件】</color>\n冒险等阶达到20级后，才能参与「风行迷踪·谋策之局」活动。\n\n<color=#D3BC8EFF>【活动规则】</color>\n1.活动开启后的六天内，每天将解锁1000枚「迷踪币」的获取上限。\n2.可以单人游玩，也可与最多两名好友共同游玩「匹配游戏」，并获取「迷踪币」，以此种方法游玩时，队伍内的全部玩家会强制扮演游侠阵营；与三名好友一起自行组队进行游戏时，无法获取「迷踪币」。
- Paimon ｜ 派蒙
- Skill DMG|{param1:F1P} Max HP ｜ 技能伤害|{param1:F1P}生命值上限
- Anna the Adventurer! ｜ 冒险家，安娜！
- Return to the venue and keep playing "Marechaussee Hunter: Judgment Day" ｜ 返回游戏场地，继续游玩《逐影猎人：审判之时》
- Anyway, once Liyue Katheryne has this letter, she will be your point of contact there for all your adventuring needs. ｜ 有了这封信，她也会像我一样，为您的各种冒险活动提供最专业的服务。

- Human dreams are more precious than gold, or so they say. ｜ 人的梦想比金子更宝贵，人类这样说。
- Everything has its own proper sequence. You must first understand the principles behind... ｜ 凡事都讲先后顺序，你得先搞清楚原理…
- You even highlighted the Society's activities during your compilation of the logs, so they'd be immediately visible to anyone examining the records. ｜ 为了让人能一眼就注意到「爱心社」，你在整理记录的时候，刻意把相关的条目放在了显眼的位置。
- Whoa, there's all kinds of delicious scents in the air today! The sea breeze in Port Ormos isn't even enough to cover them up! ｜ 哇，今天的奥摩斯港闻上去香喷喷的，连海风的味道都要被压下去了呢！

- You live up to your reputation as a warrior. Your abilities are far beyond those of ordinary folks like me. ｜ 不愧是名扬四方的勇士，各方面的本领都不是我这种普通人能企及的。

- Ask about the legendary island ｜ 打听传说中的岛屿
- #{REALNAME[ID(2)|SHOWHOST(true)]} ｜ #{REALNAME[ID(2)|SHOWHOST(true)]}
- Farrokhdokht ｜ 法罗赫之女
- Perhaps... Zurvan is right. For Sorush to become a so-called Bloomguard, she might need a bit more training... ｜ 唔…也许祖尔宛说得对，斯露莎要成为称职的花灵勇者还需要一些磨练…
- Wish ｜ 祈愿
- Whoa! Did the barrier just disappear? Looks like it's a shortcut... ｜ 哇！这道屏障消失了？看起来是一条近路欸…
- Charged Attack DMG|{param6:F1P}+{param7:F1P} ｜ 重击伤害|{param6:F1P}+{param7:F1P}
- Well, you were all making such a racket, so of course we'd come over. ｜ 岛上闹出那么大的动静，我们自然就过来了。

- A massive amount of Pyro energy is coursing through this scorching ancient sacrificial altar.\nYou will get scorched by merely being here.\nYou shall earn Talent level-up materials, if — and only if — you can pass the trial. ｜ 这座炽热的古代祭祀场中，聚积了大量的火元素之力。\n置身其中会受到持续的高热灼烧。\n若能通过其中的试炼，或许能获得令人天赋成长的物质。

- Then what are we waiting for!? We can't let it escape! ｜ 那我们也跟上去吧！不要让它跑远了！
- She looks awfully idle the majority of the time, and yet when it counts, she always rises to the occasion and provides indispensable assistance. Of course, you'd know far more about that than me, wouldn't you? ｜ 她平时看起来是懒散了点，但在适当的时机，却总能给予重要帮助。你应该再清楚不过了吧？
- ...I guess that makes sense? But I'm not staying here either way — I'd feel more comfortable in the company of experienced adventurers. ｜ …好像也有点道理？可是要让我留在这儿我可不愿意，和经验丰富的冒险家一起才比较安心。
- I'll be taking this. ｜ 先拿下了。
- Oh, if it isn't my little girl's new pal? You here to hang out with her again? ｜ 哦呀，这不是丫头的新朋友吗？今天又来玩啦。
- The sages wanted to realize their god creation plan without being discovered. The safest and most convenient way would be to build within the Akademiya itself. ｜ 贤者们想要实现造神计划，又不想被发觉，最安全也最方便的办法的确是直接在教令院内部开工。
- to activate the mechanism ｜ 启动机关
- Seems like we're going to need the Outrider's input on this one. ｜ 这方面的问题，可能要多多请教那位侦察骑士了。
- Talk to Bennett ｜ 与班尼特对话
- #<color=#37FFFF>Paimon: </color>It's hard to talk about the recent events in Inazuma and not mention the Vision Hunt Decree.\n<color=#37FFFF>Paimon: </color>But you don't have a Vision, so you don't have to worry about losing one.\n<color=#37FFFF>Paimon: </color>On the flip side, if you are caught by the Tenryou Commission, {NICKNAME}, you also can't surrender your Vision in exchange for your life...\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}: </color>I can tell them that you are my Vision.\n<color=#37FFFF>Paimon: </color>Another reason to have Paimon around... Wait, WHAT!?\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}: </color>Don't worry, I wouldn't let them take you, Paimon.\n<color=#37FFFF>Paimon: </color>That's more like it.\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}: </color>We'd just go to jail and suffer punishment together...\n<color=#37FFFF>Paimon: </color>Uh... W—Well, if that's how it would go down, then maybe you should hand me over to them...\n<color=#37FFFF>Paimon: </color>...Wait a minute! How about we just don't get caught in the first place? ｜ #<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>说到稻妻最近发生的大事，果然还是眼狩令吧。\n<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>不过你没有神之眼，所以不用担心会被收走。\n<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>但反过来，如果被天领奉行抓住，{NICKNAME}，你也没办法交出神之眼来保命…\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}：</color>我可以跟他们说，派蒙就是我的神之眼哦。\n<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>派蒙还真是方便的道具…才不对吧！\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}：</color>放心吧，不会交出派蒙的。\n<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>这样还差不多。\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}：</color>然后我和派蒙大概会一起坐牢，一起被下令处死…\n<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>唔…如、如果真的这样的话，还是把我交出去吧…\n<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>…等等，从一开始不要被抓住不就好了吗！

- #Looking for a missing young {F#male}{M#female}. Has {F#blond}{M#blonde} hair, wears exotic clothes. Any information/assistance greatly welcomed. ｜ #寻找失踪{MATEAVATAR#SEXPRO[INFO_MALE_PRONOUN_BOY|INFO_FEMALE_PRONOUN_GIRL]}，热望有心人积极提供信息与帮助。失踪者蓄金发，身穿异域服装，十分显眼。

- Um... Hi! I'm Varesa from the Collective of Plenty! I'm a warrior, and I also manage an orchard... If you're into food, or if you wanna buy fresh fruit by the cartload, or... or if you like hero stories, then we should definitely hang out! I'll show you all the good food around here, give you the best-quality fruit in our whole tribe, and tell you all the coolest stories about the biggest heroes in history! ｜ 你…你好！我叫瓦雷莎，是「沃陆之邦」的战士，经营着一间果园…如果你喜欢美食，想一车一车买水果，或者…对「英雄们的故事」感兴趣，都可以来找我！我会把所有好吃的、「沃陆之邦」品质最好的水果，还有最最重要的，厉害的英雄传说，全部分享给你！
- Hmm? Did you want something? ｜ 嗯？怎么了？
- The current scribe of the Sumeru Akademiya, a man endowed with extraordinary intelligence and talent. He lives free — free from the searching eyes of ordinary people, anyway. ｜ 须弥教令院现任书记官，有过人的智慧与才能。生活得自由自在，一般人基本找不到他。
- Apart from that strange air current, this mountain is also home to some very strange ice. ｜ 而且除了那股奇怪的气流之外，雪山中还有一些奇怪的冰。

- The Nation of Saurians beckons — an all-new odyssey is about to begin.\nNew adventures, new encounters, and a vast world that keeps unfurling like a neverending scroll.\nStanding silently in the midst of that strange land, the Stadium of the Sacred Flame awaits the arrival of heroes... ｜ 向着龙的国度，冒险即将起航。\n新的旅程、新的邂逅，广袤的世界如同不断延展的画卷。\n在那陌生的土地上，圣火竞技场无声矗立，等待着英雄的到来…

- Heh. I mean, it's not completely unreasonable. Doing dirty business doesn't mean you don't accumulate experience, right? ｜ 哼哼，也不算完全没道理吧，做不干净的生意不代表不能积攒经验啊。

- When you're ready, I'll take you to Vimara Village. It's smooth sailing from there to either Sumeru City or Port Ormos. ｜ 等你什么时候方便，就由我护送你到维摩庄吧。从那边出发，沿着水路去须弥城或是奥摩斯港都很方便的。

- Hilichurl Shooters are ill-prepared for melee combat. Rushing them will prevent them from having a chance to shoot. ｜ 丘丘人射手往往疏于近战。猛烈的攻击能让他们无暇射击。
- *cough* Thank you. So, as for that dark mud... *cough* Sorry... ｜ 咳咳…谢谢你，前辈。那么那些污黑的物质…咳咳…抱歉…
- Are we getting close? Which way should we go now? ｜ 就在这附近吧？接下来该往哪儿走？

- This character will not be Frozen, and when their HP does not exceed 5, gains +2 DMG.\n<color=#FFFFFFFF>After this character uses a Skill:</color> If this character's HP is at least 6, deal 1 <color=#FFFFFFFF>Piercing DMG</color> to all opposing standby characters. ｜ 本角色不会被冻结，且生命值不多于5时造成的伤害+2；\n<color=#FFFFFFFF>本角色使用技能后：</color>如果本角色生命值至少为6，则对所有敌方后台角色造成1点<color=#FFFFFFFF>穿透伤害</color>。
- After becoming the Divine Priestess, I gradually grew accustomed to this life. At the very least, I have the power to change something when it doesn't sit well with me. More importantly, this title allowed me to meet you, did it not? ｜ 成为现人神巫女之后，我也慢慢习惯了这样的生活。起码当我看到不合理的事情时，我有力量去改变它。更重要的是，我因此和你相遇了不是吗？
- Either way, if you don't get up and move around soon I swear you'll start putting down roots. ｜ 再不走动走动，你就要长在地里了。

- The gift! ｜ 是礼物！

- Progress has been slow there lately, so I thought I'd come back and see what's been going on here... I have to say, I was not expecting to see all these flyers! ｜ 最近踏鞴砂的事情迟迟没有进展，我就想着先回来看看…谁知道一来就看到这些小广告！
- Food ｜ 食物
- I'm sorry, but I'm back now, safe and sound... Here, I've brought your favorite treat, apple turnovers. ｜ 抱歉抱歉，我这不是回来了吗？看，这是你们爱吃的苹果馅饼。
- Correctly interpret all clues. ｜ 正确鉴定所有情报。

- ...What just happened? ｜ …刚刚发生了什么？

- An apprentice storyteller named Juanshu and many adventurers have put a racing challenge together based on the previous year's Radiant Sparks event. This event intends to allow participants to zig and zag their way through mountains and clouds, displaying their agility to all onlookers and giving them a one-of-a-kind encouragement! ｜ 说书人学徒卷舒联合多位冒险家一同规划的竞速挑战，充分吸取了往年「光焰蹈跃」的经验，目标是让挑战者们尽情在山间与云中穿梭，将利落的身姿和朝气展示给更多人，为他们送去独特的鼓舞！
- "M" ｜ 「M」
- I suppose I'll simply report our present status to Sango. ｜ 这样好了，我先回去和珊瑚社长报告一下现在的情况。
- I will help you fight the Vision Hunt Decree. ｜ 我愿意帮你，对抗眼狩令。
- M—Monsters! ｜ 魔，魔物！
- Then I can make some money and buy my wife's things back... ｜ 这样我就能赚钱，把我妻子的东西赎回来…
- Yes, I know you will do great, Traveler. ｜ 嗯，我相信旅行者的实力。
- 高橋李依 ｜ 高桥李依

- Party members other than the equipping character will provide the equipping character with buffs based on whether their Elemental Type is the same as the latter or not. If their Elemental Types are the same, increase Elemental Mastery by <color=#99FFFFFF>56</color>. If not, increase the equipping character's DMG Bonus from their Elemental Type by <color=#99FFFFFF>22%</color>. The aforementioned effects can have 3 stacks. Additionally, all nearby party members other than the equipping character will have their Elemental Mastery increased by <color=#99FFFFFF>46</color>. Multiple such effects from multiple such weapons can stack. ｜ 队伍中每个其他角色，都会依据元素类型与装备者相同与否，为装备者提供提升效果。相同：元素精通提升<color=#99FFFFFF>56</color>点；不同：装备者元素类型的元素伤害加成提升<color=#99FFFFFF>22%</color>。上述提升效果每种至多叠加3层。此外，队伍中装备者以外的附近角色的元素精通提升<color=#99FFFFFF>46</color>点，多件同名武器产生的此效果可以叠加。

Reading my future, they told me that I would soon meet a dangerous creature, and in just three days, I came across a large green Mushroom while {0}. It was very aggressive and hit me, knocking me unconscious. Luckily it didn't devour me... If not, I wouldn't be alive to talk about it. Could it have been the smell of coffee stuck to my clothes and it didn't like it? In any case, I will go to the café every day from now on to have my fortune told! ｜ 普斯帕咖啡馆的咖啡渣占卜实在太准了！之前我得到了「最近会有生命危险」的占卜结果，不出三天，我{0}闲逛时候，就遇见了一只绿色的大蕈兽！那只蕈兽下手可真狠啊，一下就把我打昏了，还好它没有吃掉我，我才捡回一条命，大概是我身上有一股它讨厌的咖啡味？不管怎么样，以后我每天都要去咖啡馆占卜！

- Missing Melus and Silver? ｜ 想念迈勒斯和西尔弗了吗？
- The Kujou Clan secretly provided Shiroyama with funds to study forensic science. I guess you could say that Kujou Takayuki's investment paid dividends in this case. ｜ 他先前学习法医学的相关资金，全部都来自九条家的秘密支持，只能说九条孝行的这次投资成功了。
- This is the center of the world. The castle where the dragon lurks, the tower that imprisons the Princess. Sometimes, it is the lost Ancient City of Ys. Sometimes, Arcadia. At times, it is even golden Hyperborea. ｜ 这里是世界的中心。恶龙盘踞的城堡，或是囚禁公主的塔楼。有时候是失落的夷斯古城、阿卡狄亚，抑或是黄金的亥珀波瑞亚。
- Lamps commonly seen in places such as Aaru Village. The Athel Wood frame is combined with the shell made of cloth lampshade to achieve its unique shape. Thanks to its clever design, the lamp is so stable that it is said to be unable to be blown down by a sandstorm.\nIn Aaru Village, there was a rumor of "light sand." Long ago, there was a type of fine sand in the deep desert, which was constantly illuminated by the hot sun and retained the sunlight. The earliest craftsmen who made this kind of lamp used the fine sand as the light source in the lampshade. In reality, the light source used in these lamps is also made from materials derived from plants, and a little mixing can go a long way using plants not uncommon in the desert. ｜ 可见于阿如村等地的摆灯，将「柽木」的框架与布面灯罩制成的壳体结合，就能得到这种外形独特的摆灯。得益于巧妙的设计，这种摆灯相当稳固，据说裹挟着沙尘的风暴都无法将其吹倒。\n阿如村曾有一则「留光沙」的传闻——很久以前，沙漠深处曾有长期被烈日映照，「挽留日光」的细沙，最早制造这种摆灯的工匠，就将这种细沙作为灯罩中的光源。实际上，这种摆灯所用的光源也是从植物中提取的材料，稍稍调配就能长久散发荧光，所用的植物在沙漠中并不少见。
- Seems like you can hold your own in a fight, so let's split up. Choose where you want to go, and we'll take the rest. ｜ 看你们实力很强的样子，我们分头行动吧，你们选个地方，剩下的就由我们去。
- The only time when I felt otherwise was when I had just returned to Sumeru. No one came to check up on me then. *sigh* ｜ 要说有什么可惜的，也就只有刚回须弥的那阵吧，都没个人过来跟我这老前辈嘘寒问暖，唉…

Energy can be regenerated this way once every 2.8s.\nAdditionally, <color=#FFD780FF>Hail to the Almighty Dragonlord</color> deals 70% more DMG. ｜ 处于夜魂加持状态下时，基尼奇进行环绕射击或施放迴猎贯鳞炮后，将为他恢复5点元素能量。每2.8秒至多通过这种方式恢复一次元素能量。\n此外，<color=#FFD780FF>向伟大圣龙致意</color>造成的伤害提升70%。

- But alas! The Master was stricken down with disease, never again to hold his sword. The Guhua Clan, now leaderless and helpless, was henceforth laid low... ｜ …眼看着掌门一病不起，自此告别武林。古华派便也就群龙无首，一蹶不振了…
- Isn't that fine, though? That's a problem child we're talking about — and any monster that eats him will inherit those problems. It'll save us some trouble, won't it? ｜ 不挺好吗？吃掉问题小孩的魔物也会变得有问题。这样两边都解决了，一举两得！
- Serving no master, and slaying no foe on the battlefield. The person you speak of must be a ronin. ｜ 既未追随大名，又不在战场杀敌，你所说的此人，是个浪人吧。
- Hey, you don't have to drag Paimon. You're pulling too hard! ｜ 为什么要拽我啊！你们太重了！

- Paimon ｜ 派蒙
- <color=#D3BC8EFF>Event Details</color>\nAssist the Amurta researcher who is collecting experimental data by using an item called the Inscribed Mirror. Find and recover small animals to complete said experiment.\n\n<color=#D3BC8EFF>Eligibility</color>\nAdventure Rank 20.\n\n<color=#D3BC8EFF>Event Rules</color>\nUse the Inscribed Mirror around the signs left by Lamiya. Devices linked to the Inscribed Mirror will show you what the small animals of the experiment are seeing. Use that information to find and retrieve them. ｜ <color=#D3BC8EFF>【活动说明】</color>\n协助正在收集实验数据的生论派学者，使用名为铭随流镜的道具，寻找并回收实验用的小动物完成实验。\n\n<color=#D3BC8EFF>【参与条件】</color>\n冒险等阶达到20级。\n\n<color=#D3BC8EFF>【活动规则】</color>\n在拉米雅留下的标记牌附近使用铭随流镜，通过铭随流镜链接的装置，能够看到实验用小动物视角内的事物，利用获得的画面信息，找到它们所在的位置并前往回收实验用的动物们吧。
- How interesting. I now have the urge to visit that island myself... This is the thing about traveling. You can't plan ahead, better to leave when the mood takes you and go where the heart leads. ｜ 有意思，说得我也想去那片海岛看看了。旅行一事…果然不能提前计划，随时出发，身随心动才是上选。
- We'll wait for you. ｜ 我们会等雷泽的。

- Uh... Then were you just... spacing out? Like, thinking about tasty food and stuff? ｜ 呃，那你这是在…发呆？比方说，在想好吃的？

- Alright, well, if you're ever interested to try it out, you know where to find me. ｜ 好吧，如果有兴趣试玩「风行迷踪」的话，就过来找我吧。

- Caterpillar said to meet at the message board in the administrative area. Paimon wonders if they're there already. Let's go take a look, shall we? ｜ 卡特皮拉之前说过，直接去管理区的公示处集合就好了，不知道他们是不是已经到了…我们也去看看吧！
- Yelan, Xiao, how are we looking? ｜ 夜兰，魈，可以了吗？
- But I've only drawn two pictures in this area, so it can only be in those two places. ｜ 不过，我在这周围只画了两幅画，我想应该也只可能在那两个地方了。

- Underwater caves, far from the patrol routes of the Maison Gardiennage, have become hives of villainy, used by bandits and smugglers. They even stole some clockwork meka.\nIf you can defeat the meka and their operators dwelling within, you will obtain materials with which to enhance your equipment. ｜ 远离执律庭常规巡查路径的海底洞窟被各怀异心的歹人、盗匪与走私者用作据点，他们甚至还窃取了一部分发条机关。\n若能战胜盘踞其中的机关及其操纵者，或许能获得强化装备的物质吧。

- Rumor has it that people who've ascended to Celestia have also witnessed the same helix-shaped divine ladder that can be seen within Visions. Venturing out into the universe and down into the abyss are the same in that both are braving the dark unknown. ｜ 相传通往天空岛之人，在神之眼中——在幻视中，看到的天梯也是如此螺旋的形态。我们走向宇宙，或者下到深渊。并没有差别，因为都是未知的漆黑。

- Object placement limit insufficient. Unable to copy. ｜ 拟想物件的可布设数量不足，无法复制
- <color=#FFD780FF>Normal Attack</color>\nPerforms up to 3 consecutive spear strikes.\n\n<color=#FFD780FF>Charged Attack</color>\nConsumes a certain amount of Stamina to lunge forward, dealing damage to opponents along the way.\n\n<color=#FFD780FF>Plunging Attack</color>\nPlunges from mid-air to strike the ground below, damaging opponents along the path and dealing AoE DMG upon impact.\n\n<color=#FFD780FF>Nightsoul State: Swift Stormflight</color>\nWhile in the Nightsoul's Blessing state: Iansan's Charged Attack will be transformed into the formidable Swift Stormflight, consuming a certain amount of Stamina to stomp fiercely down, dealing Nightsoul-aligned <color=#FFACFFFF>AoE Electro DMG</color>. ｜ <color=#FFD780FF>普通攻击</color>\n进行至多三段的连续枪击。\n\n<color=#FFD780FF>重击</color>\n消耗一定体力，向前方突进，对路径上的敌人造成伤害。\n\n<color=#FFD780FF>下落攻击</color>\n从空中下坠冲击地面，攻击下落路径上的敌人，并在落地时造成范围伤害。\n\n<color=#FFD780FF>夜魂状态·雷霆飞缒</color>\n在夜魂加持状态下，伊安珊的重击将转为施展豪烈的「雷霆飞缒」，消耗一定体力向前方猛踏，造成具有夜魂性质的<color=#FFACFFFF>雷元素范围伤害</color>。

The inexpensive ingredients and simple make of this dish have made it very popular amongst Inazumans. ｜ 朴素简单的面食。将荞麦制成的面条水煮后晾凉，入口滑爽，富有韧性。由于原料便宜、制作简单而广受稻妻人民欢迎。

- Ah, this place really is cursed... ｜ 啊，这里果然是被诅咒了的地方…

- Didn't you notice that there's something wrong with the environmental parameters? If we continue with the assembly, the charging efficiency of the device will be much lower than expected. ｜ 你没发现环境参数好像有点不对劲吗？就这么继续铺设的话，装置的充能效率会远低于预期。

- Remove ｜ 卸下
- ... ｜ ……
- Meow, meow... ｜ 喵，喵…
- Only with constructive criticism can we grow, right...? ｜ 有批评…才会有进步，对吧。
- Sure did. ｜ 已经问到了。
- Although I can get quite immersed in my work, I also enjoy living in the moment. When I have some free time, I would often pack some food and find a lovely place in nature to take a cozy midday nap, before returning home, relaxing some more, and then finally falling asleep to my favorite music. Oh, and other times, I like to go out for food with my friends, talk about everything that's happening in the world, and party until everyone's completely hammered. Honestly, it all just depends on what I feel like doing in the moment. Just as fashion only exists in the moment, I also love living in the moment. So, what do you think? Want to go out with me tonight and enjoy a whole night of fun? ｜ 虽然工作起来很投入，但我也喜欢享受当下的时光。闲下来的时候，我会一个人带上些吃的，找个风景好的地方静静睡个午觉，晚上再听些喜欢的音乐，美美睡去…有时候则是叫上朋友们吃顿饭，大家在一起谈天说地，开个不醉不归的派对…想怎么做全看当时的心情。正如「时尚」只存在于「当下」一样，我也喜欢活在当下。怎么样？不如今晚我们就出去狠狠放松一下？
- Next time Glory asks you for more Dandelion Seeds, I'd appreciate it if you could help her out again. ｜ 下次葛罗丽还想搜集蒲公英的话，请你们继续照顾她吧，麻烦你们了。

- Revives a character and restores 550 HP. ｜ 复苏选中的角色，为其恢复550点生命值。
- You are not of the tribes, but I will not have you die in vain. ｜ 虽然你们并不是部族人，但我还是不希望你们白白送死。
- The terror doesn't stop there, I'm afraid... Ever since the attack, the Calligraphy Tavern in the forest has been closed. No one knows why, but it is a catastrophe of the highest order for us forest-dwellers. ｜ 可怕的还不止这个…自那以后，森林中的墨色酒馆不知为何就关门了，这对森林里的居民来说可谓灾难…

- Let me give you a bit of background. Not long ago, a small team of explorers went on an expedition up the mountain. A few highly experienced adventurers joined them, and they took a safe route that avoided all the known dangerous spots. ｜ (test)是这样的。之前有一支小队进山考察，有几位经验丰富的冒险家同行。走的路线也是最安全的，绕开了一切危险的区域。
- I never guessed I'd bump into you while riding the aquabus. In the story of my life, this is big news! ｜ 我怎么也没想到会在巡轨船上遇到你们，这放在我的人生里，应该算是非常爆炸的新闻了！
- When the time comes... I will forge you an Ancient Name unlike anything that's come before, so that you, Mavuika, and Natlan as a whole can finally put an end to this endless war. ｜ 到那时…我会为你打造出一个前所未有的古名，助你…也是帮助整个纳塔，将这场旷日持久的战争划上终点。

- Fend off the monsters attacking the bystander ｜ (test)击退怪物解救路人
- Hehehe, this time the three lanterns are <color=#00E1FFFF>linked together</color>. ｜ 嘿嘿，这次的三盏灯可是<color=#00E1FFFF>「连轴」</color>的。
- We've gathered plenty of materials already. I think it's time we took a look down at the harbor. ｜ 之前收集了不少材料啊。我觉得现在是时候去码头看看了。
- "It seems you have finally restored the two Astral Assemblages to normal operation... Soon, the phlogiston concentration here should be sufficient to reactivate the communications device..." ｜ 「看来你们终于让两个『象拟聚星』恢复运转…很快，这里的燃素浓度应该会提升到能够启动交流机关的程度…」
- The pleasure is all mine. ｜ 幸会幸会。

- But... ｜ 可是…
- I'll, uh... I'll go keep watch! ｜ 我…我去望风吧！

- An adventure to another world would be quite interesting. ｜ 异世界的冒险，也许会很有趣。
- *sigh* Very well, then, I guess that's just how things are. If nothing else, those in our office specialize in accepting present realities that cannot be changed. ｜ 呼，好吧，那么事情就是这样了。好在咱们办公室的人总是很擅长接受一个无法改变的现状。

- Use the Blooming Light from your Lumenstone Adjuvant to <color=#FFE14BFF>destroy the Oozing Concretions feeding power to the Ruin Serpent</color> to knock it out of this state and cause the energy cores on its body to cease functioning. Once 4 such cores malfunction, the Ruin Serpent will enter a weakened state. ｜ 利用「流明石触媒」的纯光绽放，<color=#FFE14BFF>破坏向遗迹巨蛇输送能量的淤泥涌口</color>，可以打断这种状态，并使它分布在身躯上的能量核心失能。当4个能量核心均失能后，遗迹巨蛇会进入虚弱状态。
- I'm here on a mission. I'm sorry, but that's all I'm able to disclose. ｜ 任务在身，不便过多透露，请谅解。
- Ah! Truly, the decorations adorning your magnificent city are sublime! ｜ 啊啊，真是美丽的装饰艺术！
- In your years of service to the Shogun, not only have you managed to glean nothing good from the people around you, you have also let yourself be blinded by self-interest... And now you have ruined your once-bright future. ｜ 您为将军办事，非但没能学到周围人一星半点的优秀，反倒被几分利益蒙蔽了双眼，自毁前程…

- *sigh* Yes, allow me to explain. After we brought you from Haypasia's cave to Gandharva Ville, Haypasia resumed her meditation. ｜ 我来解释一下，事情是这样的：那天我们从海芭夏那带你们来化城郭后，她就重新开始了冥想。
- ...You're lucky this wasn't served in a restaurant, or the diners would be complaining to the chef. ｜ …幸好这道菜并非出自餐馆，避免了一些厨师和食客之间的矛盾。

- According to an eye-witness account, the person who received the device took it into The Chasm and has been missing ever since. ｜ 而据目击者说，那个接收法宝的人带着它往层岩巨渊去了，此后便下落不明。

- We're looking for an artisan who can work with stone. ｜ 我们正在找会做石雕的工匠。

- According to Iris, there are other strange shards here on Dragonspine. If you follow the strange blue plants, you may be able to find shards of this sort around the <color=#00E1FFFF>Snow-Covered Path</color>, <color=#00E1FFFF>Entombed City Outskirts</color>, and <color=#00E1FFFF>Starglow Cavern</color>. These shards seem to hold the key to removing that odd air current... ｜ 根据玉霞的说法，在这座雪山中，似乎还存在着奇怪的碎片。如果循着蓝色的奇异植物，就能在<color=#00E1FFFF>「覆雪之路」</color>、<color=#00E1FFFF>「雪葬之都·近郊」</color>和<color=#00E1FFFF>「星荧洞窟」</color>找到这类碎片。这些碎片似乎是解开奇怪气流的关键…

- So which type of youkai are you? Let Paimon guess... uh... hmm, actually Paimon has no idea what you are! ｜ 你是什么妖怪呢？让我猜猜…嗯…猜不出来！
- And refused many invitations to collaborate. ｜ 和谢绝了一堆合作邀请。
- Whenever a "Speedy Rhythm" furnishing combination scores a point, a lamp on the "Scoreboard" will light up. This furnishing combination can record 10 points at most. When all the lamps are lit, the score can be reset, which will restore the "Scoreboard" to its original state. ｜ 「疾行节奏」摆设组合每记录一次得分，「计分灯架」上将有一盏灯笼发光。此摆设组合最多记录10次得分。灯笼全部发光后，可以重置计分，使「计分灯架」回到初始状态。
- Head near Stone Gate ｜ 前往石门附近
- Dodoco is Klee's first friend, and one of her best.\nA very long time ago, her mother made this doll for her by hand.\nAlice affixed it to Klee's four-leaf clover, and hung on her big backpack.\nFrom that day forth, Klee and Dodoco became inseparable.\nHer mother said that this would ensure that Klee would never be lonely and that she would have a friend to confide in even when she was alone.\nThey would also protect each other in times of danger, just like Amber and Baron Bunny.\nThis, however, worried the Knights quite a fair bit — considering the other things Alice and her daughter had invented, perhaps this, too, might explode at any time...\n"Dodoco" is a name Klee picked herself.\nWhen asked what this name meant, she flushed red for a good long while before replying: "It means... Klee's best friend!" ｜ 「嘟嘟可」是可莉最初的朋友，也是最好的朋友之一。\n很久很久以前，妈妈亲手为她制作了这个玩偶。\n艾莉丝把它与可莉的幸运四叶草缀在一起，挂在可莉大大的背包上。\n于是，嘟嘟可和可莉成为了形影不离的好朋友。\n妈妈说，这是为了让可莉不会孤单，有一个独处时也能说悄悄话的朋友。\n困难时也会保护彼此，就像安柏与她的兔兔伯爵那样。\n不过这话让骑士团众人忧心忡忡——考虑到艾莉丝母女二人的其他「发明」，这东西或许也会在某个时刻爆炸…\n「嘟嘟可」是可莉自己为玩偶取的名字。\n被人问到这个名字的含义，可莉涨红了脸，半天才说：\n「含义是…可莉最好的朋友！」
- This is the first time I'm being called "superior!" ｜ 啊，我可是第一次被这么叫呢！
- So, I will not tolerate any mistakes. Once the mission is complete and a way for large-scale extraction of The Withering is found... ｜ 所以，这次的任务不能有丝毫闪失，等到任务完成，找到大规模提取死域的方法…
- Why am I not doing it, you ask? Haha, sorry, but we tribespeople have some taboos about this mysterious stuff... Can't be too careful and such... ｜ 为什么不由我来做？哈哈，抱歉，我们部落人对这种神神秘秘的东西多少还是怀有禁忌的…谨慎为上嘛。
- It is too late... ｜ 来不及了…

- You have to be very careful with sweets. That powerful sense of satisfaction... it weakens your willpower and makes you relaxed. It only takes a few bites to get addicted, and with long-term consumption, you'll slowly but surely lose your edge. ｜ 对于甜食，可得保持警惕啊。那种强烈的满足感…会削弱人的意志力，让人放松警惕。只要吃过几次，就有可能上瘾。长期吃甜食的人，或许会在不知不觉中变得迟钝吧。
- Poor little thing... to suffer such a calamitous fate. ｜ 可怜的孩子…命中该有此劫。
- Oh, so they're both the same Remus! They are the same person after all. ｜ 利魔世…雷穆斯…原来是这样喔！

- Gotta take advantage of the situation before someone sets themselves up as my competitor here, you know? ｜ 在这里应该还没有矿石生意能比得上我家的竞争对手，我可得好好把握机会才是。

- Iansan! ｜ 伊安珊！
- Pure elemental life-forms composed of drifting Hydro particles, as free and unbound as the butterflies they resemble.\nA glittering Hydro creature that is the product of rising and condensing elements, and which feeds off the ubiquitous power of Hydro.\nLegend has it that Hydro Crystalflies are condensed from the tears of purity to wash away the stain of sins. Regardless of how the world shifts, so long as conviction remains, righteousness will exist everlasting. ｜ 空气中飘荡不定的水元素微粒聚合而成的纯粹元素生命，同蛱蝶一般悠游。\n闪光的水元素生物，是元素上升凝合而成的产物，以无处不在的水元素维生。\n传说水晶蝶正是由涤荡罪孽的纯洁之泪所凝成的飞蝶。无论世事如何变迁，只要信念不变，正义便会永存。
- But right now, if you want to clear yourselves of any suspicion — you need to get yourselves to Northland Bank. ｜ 但现在，若要洗清「刺客」的嫌疑——就请你们移步「北国银行」吧。

Wonderful! Marvelous! Excellent indeed! ｜ <color=#fec14c>特别好评</color>：广告制作哪家强，旅行者处美名扬！好酒好菜好饭堂，好诗当配好片方！甚好甚好~

- A pizza freshly baked from the oven. The crust is dotted with large chunks of meat and fresh mushroom slices. The sweet, stretchy cheese further adds to the charm. You have no doubt that every slice will be snatched away the moment it is served. Speed, therefore, is a gourmet's best buddy when this pizza is on the table. ｜ 烘烤而成的披萨。大块大块的兽肉，佐以新鲜蘑菇，铺满整个饼皮。再配合拉丝的香甜奶酪，简直令人难以抗拒。刚一出炉就会被一抢而空，因此，品尝美味的秘诀在于眼疾手快。
- Increases all party members' Physical DMG by 20% for 300s. In Co-Op Mode, this effect only applies to your own character(s). ｜ 队伍中所有角色物理伤害提升20%，持续300秒。多人游戏时，仅对自己的角色生效。

- The operation of the Lianshan Formula created endless thunderstorms within the bowels of the mountain. It is said that the rumbling sounds of thunder that one hears outside the domain's gates call out to curious souls. ｜ 相传因连山之秘的运作，山腹内产生了无穷的雷暴。在秘境门前传说偶然能听见隐隐的滚雷之声，呼唤着求索的灵魂。
- Woah, where did this fuddy-duddy come from? ｜ 哇！这人说话怎么还文绉绉的。
- A large fish said to be the descendant of dragons.\nWith the horn on its head and its scaleless form clad as if in golden armor, it looks every bit like a king underwater. In truth, its bloodline and behavior could not be more different from that of a dragon — it can neither call forth the wind and rain nor the power of domination and is actually often the victim of food-snatching due to its weak character. A real shame, of course, that it looks so very majestic. As such, it lost the nickname "Descendant of Dragons," and is now termed the "False Dragon" instead. ｜ 被传为龙之后裔的大型鱼类。\n额上长角，体表无鳞，有金赤战袍加身，有水中王者风姿。实际就血统与习性而论，它们与龙之间的距离差之千里——既无呼风唤雨之能，又无雄踞一方之技，甚至由于性格过于软弱，还常被其他掠食性鱼类抢夺食物，实在愧对这一副威风凛凛的好相貌。因此只能摘下「龙裔」之称，屈居「假龙」之号。
- The Mingxiao Lantern this year is Skybracer. ｜ 今年的明霄灯是「移霄导天真君」。
- You know, Paimon really shouldn't be able to imagine Cyno doing something like that. But for some strange reason, the mental image is coming through clear as day... ｜ 按理说我想象不出赛诺干这种事，但不知为什么，眼前有画面了…
- "Will I ever recover?" ｜ 「我能康复吗？」
- Kanjou Notice ｜ 勘定公告
- Alright then, I'll leave the next fight to you, oh Great Ms. Paimon... ｜ 那下次战斗就拜托你了…

- Fischl, yes, she's always in the library looking to borrow fantasy novels. She always returns her books three days early and looks after them very well. She's a good kid. ｜ 菲谢尔…哦，那个总是来图书馆借幻想小说的女孩子。每次还书都会提前三天，对书籍也十分爱护，是个好孩子呢。

- Oh, the more I think about it, the more excited I am! I have so much work to do, I can't wait! The future of this world depends on us. ｜ 哎呀，这么一想，有好多事情要做，可不能继续耽搁下去了！这片大陆的未来，就全靠我们啦。
- Rosaria's Vision came to her on a particularly frigid night.\nThings were getting desperate for the bandit gang — people were starving and the food supplies were dwindling.\nNever able to eat her fill, Rosaria was driven by hunger to flee into the freezing wind rather than continue another second with the hard labor she was forced to endure.\nOne of the elders of the gang pursued her and brought her back.\nHe was the very person who had taken her from the village of her birth, and the one who had taught her how to kill.\n"Fleeing makes you a traitor, and traitors can only earn their freedom through victory in combat."\nThe old bandit tossed Rosaria an old dagger.\n"Well, come on then! Kill me, and you can leave this place. I'm long in the tooth now, while you've got youth on your side. You can do this, can't ya?"\nNo one thought that she would be able to kill him — and yet, the old lion would indeed fall by the newborn cub's claws.\nThus did the bandits lose an old member and welcome a new one that very night.\nThe bandits were reluctant to accept Rosaria at first since she had slain one of their own, but they quickly had a change of heart after seeing the Vision in her hand.\nSurely, a Vision wielder had to be far stronger than some old coot who was about to kick the bucket right? And she ate less, to boot... They could save some food this way.\nMeanwhile, a question crept into Rosaria's frozen heart:\nDid he let me replace him on purpose? ...Could a false father have harbored genuine affection for a child he stole so arbitrarily? ｜ 罗莎莉亚的「神之眼」出现在某个寒冷的夜晚。\n那是盗贼团最窘迫的时期，口粮不足以养活所有人。\n她总是吃不饱饭，因无法忍受饿着肚子在寒风里做粗活而逃走。\n盗贼团的老人将她追了回来。他正是将她从出生村庄捡走、教她杀人技法的人。\n「逃跑的都是叛徒，叛徒只有赢得决斗才能获得自由。」\n老人将一把旧匕首丢给罗莎莉亚。\n「来吧，杀了我才可能离开这里。我是暮年的狮子了，你还年轻。能做到的吧？」\n几乎没人相信罗莎莉亚真能杀死他。可老狮确实死在了初生的野兽爪下。\n那一晚，盗贼团失去一个老成员，接纳一名新成员。\n有趣的是，盗贼们起先不愿接纳杀死老人的罗莎莉亚，却在看见她手上那颗「神之眼」后改变了主意。\n——有「神之眼」的人肯定比快老死的贼厉害。再说，你吃得也少，还能节约些粮食。\n罗莎莉亚冰块般凝结的心中忽然浮出一个疑问：\n他是故意让我顶替他吗？…捡来的孩子，也会让虚假的父亲产生包庇之心吗？
- Ah, see? Zhongli really gets me. Anyway, that day, a miner — the leader of a mining crew — was out for work and happened to pass by while I was telling the story. He told me... ｜ 还是钟离兄明白。正巧那天有个外出打工的矿工头子，路过我这儿，听见这段说书，就跟我说啊…
- Alright! It's a deal, then! ｜ 嗯。那就说好了喔。

- A plant found in certain Natlan caves, notable for its highly unusual shape and faint luminescence. From a distance, it resembles a cluster of oversized mushrooms, earning it the name "Gloomglow Fungi." They say that medicines derived from this plant can be used to treat various ailments, though if handled improperly, its medicinal properties may be lost. For this reason, when it comes to harvesting, the assistance of a pharmacist from the Masters of the Night-Wind is usually required. ｜ 可见于纳塔部分洞穴的植株，有着极为特殊的形状，并伴生有微弱的荧光，远看之下，形如一组尺寸巨大的菌菇，因此也被人称为「黯光方菌」。据说，这种植株制成的药物可用于治疗多种疾病，但稍有不慎也可能会使药性丧失，因此对这种植物的采摘一般要在「烟谜主」药师的辅助下进行。
