- ...I see. ｜ …原来如此。
- Jo Kyeong-lee ｜ 赵京洢
- Do you know that chocolate candy that's made in the shape of a bullet? It's so sweet, it's like an instant shot of energy to your whole body. Well, that's what this feels like! ｜ 你知道有一种子弹形状的巧克力糖吗？它的甜度能瞬间让你全身充满力量，就像我现在的感受一样！
- A cup carved out of ice that is as chilly and biting as winter. Its former master would drink an unfreezable liquor from it. ｜ 用寒冰雕制成的杯盏，如冬天一般坚利。曾经的主人从中啜饮过不冻之酒。

- #<color=#37FFFF>Paimon: </color>Ayaka gives a sense of noble elegance with every gesture she makes.\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}: </color>Can you do an Ayaka impression, Paimon?\n<color=#37FFFF>Paimon: </color>Let's give it a try.\n<color=#37FFFF>Paimon: </color>"Oh my, you've been picking mushrooms so earnestly just to make Chicken-Mushroom Skewers for me?"\n<color=#37FFFF>Paimon: </color>"How cute..."\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}: </color>That was nothing like Ayaka. But...\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}: </color>Even though you didn't sound like yourself, it didn't feel completely out of place for you either... ｜ #<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>绫华小姐举手投足都散发着高贵的气息呢。\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}：</color>突然想看派蒙模仿绫华。\n<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>欸，我试试。\n<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>「哦，原来你这么用心的采蘑菇，是为了给我做野菇鸡肉串啊。」\n<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>「真是可爱呢。」\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}：</color>完全不是绫华啊。不过，总感觉…\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}：</color>这种明明不是派蒙却又觉得似乎理应如此的感觉是…
- Climb to the Anemo Archon statue's hand and scatter the Dandelion Seeds ｜ 在风神像手上播撒蒲公英
- Today, all people rely on Phobos to make judgments and decisions for them. If something were to go wrong with it, the citizens fear that all would descend into chaos... ｜ 如今所有人都依赖于「福波斯」为他们做出的判断与决定，如果「福波斯」出了什么问题的话，公民们恐怕都会陷入混乱…

- *sigh* This guy isn't gonna listen to a word you say. Come on, let's go and try to find that sword before he goes berserk again. ｜ 唉，这个人已经彻底听不进你的话了，在他再次发狂之前，我们还是赶快去找找那把刀吧。

- Paimon ｜ 派蒙
- Final Bounce Healing|{param4:F1P} Max HP ｜ 弹跳结束治疗量|{param4:F1P}生命值上限
- Where is this wicked spellslinger? My sword is ready! ｜ 哪里有坏巫师？吃我勇者一剑！
- When investigating the law, Yanfei's habit is to look past the cold letters of the law to perceive their point of origin.\nAs such, she is also something of a master of "reading comprehension" in her relationships.\nOnce, the Traveler met Yanfei by chance and said, "Huh. Didn't expect to see you here."\nThis should have been a line that one might hear just about anywhere, but it wound up holding a completely different meaning for Yanfei.\n"Didn't expect to meet you here" implied that the Traveler had at least thought about a scenario in which they would meet. Then why the use of "didn't expect"? One could only postulate that the Traveler had some expectation of where she might appear, and that her current location was not such a place. But whence came the expectation? Could it be that the Traveler had always been paying attention to her in secret?\n"Does this mean that the Traveler...?"\nYanfei tossed and turned in bed that night, unable to sleep. ｜ 在研究律法的时候，烟绯习惯于透过冰冷的条目，去看这些规则背后的出发点。\n受此影响，在人际交往中她也是一个阅读理解宗师。\n比方说，有一次旅行者在偶遇烟绯时，对她说「没想到会在这里遇到你」。\n这本该是随处可见的问候，落在烟绯耳中却会出现完全不同的含义。\n「没想到会在这里遇到你」，意味着旅行者有「想」过跟她相遇的场景。那么为什么会「没想到」？只能说旅行者对于她会出现的地方，已经有了一个「大概的预期」，而她现在所在的地方违背了这种预期。但这种预期是怎么来的？有没有可能是旅行者一直在暗中「关注」着她？\n「难道说旅行者，其实很在意我吗…？」\n当天晚上，烟绯翻来覆去，并没有睡着。
- If you dig up treasure, it's all yours — take it with my compliments. But if you dig up any explosives, you lose! But just this time... ｜ 要是能挖到宝贝，就给你们，算作给老唐的赔礼，原本要是挖到炸弹就算输了，不过这次嘛…

- We've gone to all the places that Ryuuji marked out. Let's head back to the Bantan Sango Detective Agency and look for him there! ｜ 龙二标记出来的地点我们都去看过了，现在回万端珊瑚侦探社去找龙二吧！

- There was once a great scholar who wished to write a book about all the festive days of the empire.\nAfter looking into it more closely, he discovered that every single day had some sort of a festival associated with it... He persevered with this monumental writing task for six months before giving up on it.\nBut don't worry — as far as this book is concerned, I am the author, and I won't let my readers down! ｜ 曾经有一位伟大的学者，想要给帝国的节日写一本著作。\n结果他发现，好像帝国每一天都有过节的传统！如此巨大的工作量之下，他写了六个月人就跑路了。\n作者我啊，是不会辜负大家的！

- A basic stage designed by Haniyyah. In her own words, "the mercenary bands I was with in the past were very poor, and couldn't afford the use of Mist Flower Corollas. If we really wanted to eat something cold, we'd just grab Cryo and Hydro Slimes and keep them in cages to refrigerate stuff for us." After leaving Sumeru with Souka to travel, Haniyyah finally got the chance to try real shaved ice, and found it much to her liking indeed, ordering at least three times the normal amount of sugar every time. Pity, then, that their fungal friends have no teeth, and cannot consume frozen Marvelous Gel...\nAs for Enghiene, who is taking part in this game, freezing is a truly terrifying concept, because even Tidalga would go down poorly in such circumstances... ｜ 海妮耶主导设计的基础关卡。按照海妮耶的自述，「我曾待过的佣兵团体非常穷，负担不起冰雾花花朵的费用。如果实在想吃冰凉凉的食物，会抓几只冰史莱姆和水史莱姆，关在笼子里帮我们制冷」。跟着左右加离开须弥旅行后，海妮耶才尝到了正宗的冰沙，喜欢得不得了，每次吃的时候都要加三倍的糖。可惜蕈兽伙伴们没有牙，吃不了冰冻的「妙妙灵冻」…\n对于这次参与游戏的昂吉安妮而言，冰冻则是非常可怕的现象，因为在那种寒冷下，汐藻也会变得不好入口…

- A cart assembled from a mix of Brightwood and Athel Wood. All of its components were designed with quick disassembly and replacement in mind, allowing for both stability and ease of maintenance during long trips. These carts may have to constantly travel between the rainforest and desert — two places with entirely different climates. Thus, they were crafted using wood from these two regions to ensure that its critical load-bearing structure stays intact throughout the trip. ｜ 以「辉木」和「柽木」两种木材混合拼装而成的货车，各种构件都采用了可被快速换装的设计，此举是为了长途运货的稳定性和维护便捷度——这类货车可能在雨林和沙漠之间不断穿行，两地的气候截然不同，因此，工匠同时使用了两地的木材，防止关键的承重结构不堪重负，在半路断裂损毁。

### Part 178

- Well, either way, Yun's back with us, so let's head back... ｜ 好，既然我的云宝找到了，我们就先回去吧…
- A valuable Ornamental Fish that may be kept as a pet in the Pool of Sapphire Grace and Shaded Clarity.\nThis medium-sized, round fish has horn-like cartilage that is used to dig underwater burrows, build shelters, and drive away creatures that try to harm it. \nThis species' whole body is pink and the tail fin is green, colors that are associated with the Zaytun Peach. These fish are, as their name suggests, so sweet that they are considered "suitable for dessert."\nDoubtless, owing to various factors, the fish dessert that the fish chefs were hoping to create did not pan out. Because this type of fish is rare and expensive, it is often farmed as an ornamental fish. \nThere is a large customer base that doesn't want to spend too much Mora on this kind of pufferfish, but nevertheless can't get enough of its bright colors. There are even enterprising businessmen who have managed to reverse this phenomenon, modeling their Zaytun Peaches after these pufferfish. The sales of those are pretty good. ｜ 珍贵的观赏鱼，可被饲养于「灵沼云池」和「澄波游影」中。\n体型圆润的中型鱼类，生有犄角般的软骨结构，据说它们会用这一结构开凿水下洞穴，建造栖身之所，或是驱赶试图伤害自己的生物。\n通体粉红，尾鳍嫩绿的角鲀，常让人联想到墩墩桃。鱼如其名，它们的口感确实相当甜美，以至于被鱼师们认定「用来做甜品都不为过」。\n当然，在种种因素的影响下，鱼师们期待的鱼肉甜品并未获得成功。加上这种角鲀较为少见，价格高昂，难以作为食材，人们通常将它作为观赏鱼养殖。\n由于不想花费大笔钱财购买这种角鲀，但又喜爱其明艳色彩的客户基数较大，甚至有商人反其道而行之，当真用墩墩桃制作了这种角鲀的模型，销量还相当不错。
- A treasure that once belonged to Barbatos, the Anemo Archon, with some power restored by a Teardrop Crystal. ｜ 曾是风神巴巴托斯的至宝，接触泪滴结晶后稍稍恢复了一些力量。
- This should be the place! That fruit Toltec mentioned should be the one on the wall, right? ｜ 应该就是这里了！托尔特克说的果实应该就是石壁上那种吧？

- Trial of Resilience: During this trial, you will be unable to use Elemental Skills or Bursts, but you will gain a new Elemental Skill: Parry.\nWhen you use Parry, you will raise your weapon up in a defensive posture, greatly decreasing DMG dealt to you. This Skill has a fixed CD.\nGet the timing down and <color=#F39000FF>Parry just as the opponent is attacking</color> to completely negate the DMG you should have taken and reset Parry CD. ｜ 坚决的试炼：在此试炼中，旅行者将无法施放元素战技和元素爆发，并获得新的战斗技能：「格挡」。\n施放「格挡」期间，旅行者将举起武器摆出防御架势：受到的伤害大幅降低。「格挡」拥有一定的冷却时间。\n把握时机，<color=#F39000FF>在敌人发起进攻的瞬间施放「格挡」</color>，将完全减免本次受到的伤害，同时重置「格挡」的冷却时间。

Guided by their Game Master, Clorinde, they encounter a <color=#e5870a>merchant</color>, a <color=#e5870a>Sternshield Crab</color> blocking their path, and a <color=#e5870a>Cryo Regisvine</color> guarding some treasure, in <color=#e5870a>that order</color>. Navia, who is playing an Adventurer, will attempt to use <color=#e5870a>"Persuasion"</color> in each encounter. ｜ 脚本规划（第1至第6镜）：\n展现桌上剧团成员们一同进行活动时的场景。在克洛琳德饰演的主持人的引导下，众人<color=#e5870a>依次</color>与<color=#e5870a>商人</color>，挡路的<color=#e5870a>坚盾重甲蟹</color>和守护宝藏的<color=#e5870a>急冻树</color>遭遇。而在每一次遭遇中，娜维娅饰演的冒险家均会尝试对对方使用<color=#e5870a>「说服」</color>。

- Once confirmed, your World Level will be reverted to its original form.\n· The level of opponents in the open world will <color=#F39000FF>increase</color> to match your original World Level\n· The rewards from Ley Line Blossoms and enemy drops will <color=#F39000FF>increase</color> to match your original World Level\nYou will be unable to readjust your World Level for the next <color=#F39000FF>24</color> hours. ｜ 确认后，世界等级将恢复至原本的等级：\n·世界上的敌人等级<color=#F39000FF>提升</color>至原本世界等级对应的等级；\n·世界上的「地脉之花」与敌人的掉落奖励<color=#F39000FF>提升</color>至原本世界等级对应的等级。\n世界等级变动后的<color=#F39000FF>24</color>小时内无法再次调整。

- A precision-machined mechanical component that counteracts the effects of gravity via high-speed rotations almost impossible to capture with the naked eye.\nIn its long history, the Fontaine Research Institute of Kinetic Energy Engineering has always warred against a flood that once washed countless lives away, and may yet cover earth and sky someday in the future, searching for a means to survive.\nArkhium, with its immense energetic potential and power to break the shackles of earth, was once considered the key to the gate of salvation. Though the experimental device built around it failed to achieve the expected results, Fontainian research into it actually began long ago, and ended without any trouble. It has the property of separating matter — or should one say, things that are not specific types of matter. ｜ 能够在肉眼几乎无法捕获的高速旋转中，抵消重力影响的精密加工机械件。\n在长久的历史中，枫丹动能工程科学研究院一直在以曾经洗去无数生命，又总有一天会再度遮天蔽日的洪水为敌，寻找着生存的途径。\n而蕴含着庞大能量，能够粉碎大地桎梏的始基矿则一度被认为是开启救赎大门的钥匙；尽管围绕它建立的实验机未能取得应有的效果，但枫丹人对它的研究实际上早在很久以前就开始，并最终无疾而终了。它所具备的特性能够将物质，或是某些物质以外的事物分离。

- It's time to tell you where coconut milk comes from... ｜ 椰奶，不是椰羊产的。

- Despite how terribly cliched that sounds, I'll admit that it holds true for this meal. Well played... Mark my words, I'll remember this recipe! ｜ 虽然听着像是什么老掉牙的论调…不过吃完这顿饭，确实像这么回事。不错，这个配方，我记下了！
- The martial arts school known as the Guhua Clan has been in decline for several hundred years now. In its heyday, the name of the Clan rang like steel throughout the harbor. It was said that the Clan harbored three great secret arts — the ways of the "Light Piercer" for polearms, "Rain Cutter" for swords, and "Life Ender" for those who excelled in both. The three arts would be refined over the generations, and with time would reach their apex. Yet the Clan's strength would continue to wane, leading to them losing their influence... The three arts became diamonds hidden in the rough, quietly awaiting a successor.\nAfter many years, the Guhua Clan would finally get one in Xingqiu. It was he who successfully grasped the ancient "Martial Principle" after merely four years of study.\nThe Guhua weapon arts stress using the weapon as an extension of your body, and indeed this is a common idea amongst the various schools of martial arts in Liyue. But the way Xingqiu saw it, the basis of the polearm and sword was the use of a Vision. Martial artists were meant to see a Vision as an extension of themselves, and see their weapon as an extension of the Vision. Hence, he says: the arts of both the polearm and the sword are just the art of the "eye." \nHaving come to this epiphany, Xingqiu took up a quill and penned a verse on the Martial Principle. Reading it, the Guhua head was shaken with tears, declaring that "it is not Xingqiu who needs the Guhua Clan, but the Guhua Clan that needs Xingqiu." Since then, this verse has been sealed up at the Clan headquarters at Wangshan Hall. Disciples are proscribed from reading it, much less outsiders.\nThe verse reads thus:\nGuhua's arts I have studied long, in its secrets I am trained, now its long-lost depths fall upon me like the coming of blessed rain.\nThe beating heart of Guhua's sword art is as a shower of floating flowers. One amidst may seize a bloom, but those without read only doom.\nThe Guhua lance is a lantern's dance, like flames in night's deep glooming. Like sparks, they scatter with ease in the dark, then join like the daybreak looming.\nThey say the sword is as your arm — I say its glint is the beholder's eye, a light like the bright dawn coming.\nThose who wander are burdened not. Freely they cut rain, and enlightened they pierce light. Like a snaking dragon, they cannot be subdued. In their right eye the blade, and in the other the spear.\nThis text should have been free for all to read. The only reason why it was sealed is the dreadful handwriting. ｜ 数百年来，武学门派「古华派」式微。辉煌时期，「古华派」曾以枪剑闻名璃月。相传，其有三大镇派秘术——枪法「刺明法」、剑法「裁雨法」，以及枪剑双绝的「生克法」。此三绝之术随代代传承不断精进，时光推移，三绝技巧渐臻化境，威力却不断削弱，导致古华派势力低迷，人心流散…三绝更是如尘埃中的宝库，静候一位继承者。\n多年后，尘封的古华派等来了行秋。数百年间，唯有他一人仅仅花费四年便悟出了传古承今的「武理」。\n古华枪剑讲究「如臂使指」，在璃月诸派武术中，这是相当常见的意识。而依行秋之见，枪与剑的运用，其根本是对于「神之眼」的运用。武人应将「神之眼」视为身体的延伸，枪与剑则又是「神之眼」的延伸。即是说：枪术与剑术的本质，乃是瞳术。\n行秋参悟此道，挥毫写就武理歌诀一篇。古华派宗主观之落泪，当即宣布：「并非行秋需要古华派，而是古华派需要行秋。」自此，这篇歌诀被供奉在古华派重地「王山厅」，不许弟子瞻仰，外人更是无从得见。\n以下为歌诀全文：\n我習古華久，深秘我已悉。古華槍劍長浮鏽，今日溶洗與爾知。\n古華之劍華，若雨若飄華。飄華人可擷，雨線人難畫。古華之槍華，灼灼兮燈華。燈華易脆散，複聚如燃霞。\n如燃霞，三尺光，何輝煌。人謂使劍如使指，我言劍光是目光。\n游離物外無重量，裁雨者雨，刺明者明。動如龍蛇捉不住，青眼為劍，側目為槍。\n——其实，歌诀内容本应对所有弟子公开，封存真迹的原因只是字实在太丑了。
- I was the same. I never questioned my actions until Murtada died. I could feel the justice that I once strived to uphold slowly crumbling in my heart. ｜ 我也同样如此…以前的我从未怀疑自己做的事情，但穆尔塔达死后，我能感觉到我坚持的正义在慢慢崩塌。
- Congratulations are in order! We're happy to hear that one of our biggest customers of Mondstadt General Goods is now also a colleague. Let's look out for one another going forward!\nIn Mondstadt, every store often helps each other out, since being in business isn't easy! Only by supporting each other can everyone create a healthy environment conducive to business, and we can all make a mountain of Mora together!\nTake this congratulatory gift. It's how we do things! ｜ 恭喜恭喜！「蒙德百货」的大客户成了我们的同行，今后我们要互相照顾啦！\n在蒙德，各个店铺之间经常互帮互助，毕竟经商不易，大家彼此扶持才能形成良好的商业氛围，一起赚大钱嘛！\n按照惯例，请收下这份贺礼！
- Liloupar, the great Jinni born of the water lilies, had her soul fragmented by an ancient punishment, and was sealed within a transparent magical bottle...\nIn the songs of the desert people, she once laid down green oases and lapis lazuli canals in Gurabad, and in turn, was also the mourning harbinger of that city's doom... Hope and omen, thus weaved together, formed her legend.\nAnd today, she seems to have found a new master... ｜ 自睡莲而生的大镇灵利露帕尔，因遭受古老的绝罚而神魂分裂，被封印在透明的魔瓶之中…\n在沙漠人的歌谣中，她曾为居尔城铺下了如茵的绿洲与青金色的运河，也曾为居尔城的毁灭发出报丧的先声…厄运与希望相交织，正构成了她的传说。\n如今，似乎她又寻得了新的主人…

- A crown inlaid with amethyst and emerald. It seems to have been the headgear worn by ancient priests of the Goddess of Flowers. ｜ 镶嵌着紫水晶与祖母绿的冠冕，似乎是古代花神祭司的头饰。
- Jehiet ｜ 婕叶
- Well, I do recall that you first earned their respect by proving your strength before becoming Captain, despite having the letter of appointment. ｜ 我记得很清楚，当时你拿着委任状，却没有强行登上队长之位，而是先通过了他们的考验，证明了自己的实力。
- Who knows how this thought came to be... but it has even suppressed the "instincts" that Abattouy had installed. ｜ 没人知道这个想法是怎么产生的，但这个想法本身，甚至压制了阿巴图伊为它设定的「本能」。
- A detailed step-by-step blueprint for making a "Qingce Cloud Residence."\nA mountain hamlet modeled after Qingce Village. It is said that the friendly atmosphere there is infectious and that visitors who enter will find themselves calmed and more appreciative of simple joys that they may have once forgotten.\nTo head out in pursuit of one's ideals and spend one's years magnificently chasing a career is certainly praiseworthy. But after spending so long on such endeavors, one may eventually tire. When that happens, a quiet and peaceful life out in the countryside remains a good choice. Qingce Village has always maintained its acceptance of young folk who head out to seek their fortunes, and is ready to welcome them back with open arms at any time.\nAfter using this item, you can view it in the Placement Screen.\nThis Furnishing Set is favored by the following companions: Xinyan, Xiao, Hu Tao, Qiqi, Shenhe, Yelan, Yaoyao, Xianyun ｜ 步骤详实的图纸，记载着「轻策闲云居」的放置方法。\n以轻策庄为摹版布置的山间村庄。据说踏入此地后，游人便会被亲切的氛围感染，心境归于平和，发现以往疏忽的质朴之美。\n年少之时追求理想，为了事业闯荡，经历一段波澜壮阔的岁月，固然值得肯定。不过常年在外闯荡，可能也会有疲惫的一天。彼时，和睦的邻里与平静的乡间生活，也不失为一种选择。对于出门远游的年轻人，轻策庄始终持以长辈般的包容，随时欢迎他们归乡发展。\n使用后可进入放置界面查看。\n偏好这套摆设的同伴：辛焱、魈、胡桃、七七、申鹤、夜兰、瑶瑶、闲云
- Oh... why are we letting all these loafers come in here to play Genius Invokation TCG anyway? All it does is encourage more people to come to the bar for a drink... ｜ 而且，就这样接受这些无所事事的大叔在酒馆里打「七圣召唤」了吗！岂不是让店里的酒也更畅销…

- Kid, a thumping would do you good. But we're professionals, Marechaussee Phantom agents. We don't beat people in public. ｜ 小鬼，你真的很欠打啊。但我们是逐影庭的专业探员，我们一般不在大庭广众之下打人。
- Eh? How's a seasoning supposed to do that? ｜ 欸，能让大家都变幸福的调料？调料…怎么能让人变得幸福呀？

- She always believed that her father, Jacques, was a good person. ｜ 她坚信她的父亲雅克是个好人。
- So you want to prove yourself, huh... ｜ 想证明自己的实力吗…
- You explain the situation to Shibasuke patiently... ｜ 耐心地向柴助解释了事情的经过…
- Do you still not understand? Even after seeing the "treasure" for yourself? The contents of that room... they represent the true legacy the Hunters left behind. ｜ 在看到你日思夜想的「宝藏」后还不明白吗？那些，才是逐影猎人真正该留下的东西。

- Perfect Heart of the Sacred Dragon ｜ 完美的圣龙之心
- Oh, you hadn't heard? It was my understanding that everyone in Mondstadt knew. ｜ 啊？原来你不知道吗？我以为全蒙德的人都知道呢。
- Well, let's go pass Lisa's message on to those people in the library who aren't reading the way they should. ｜ 我们走，去向那些来图书馆却不读书的人传达一下丽莎小姐的意思吧。
- Edwin, you scoundrel! What did you do to this thing!? ｜ 艾德温！你这个混账，到底又搞了什么乱七八糟的改造！
- Some people compare me to the Pyro Archon because of my track record in the Pilgrimage. It's a meaningless comparison. If the Pilgrimage was a tree, and I was a vulture on the highest branch, then the Pyro Archon would be the sun in the sky... The stronger you get, the more you appreciate the sheer size of the gulf between you and her. I just won a few championships — she's the champion of an entire era.\nBut at least being on top with a clear view of the sky means I can see exactly how high I want to fly from here. ｜ 有人因为我在「归火圣夜巡礼」中的胜率高，就拿我和火神大人进行比较。这太片面了。如果把我比作树梢上的一只鹫，那火神大人便是天上的太阳。实力越强，越是知道她的深不可测。我只是赢了几场比赛，而她…却冠绝了整个时代。\n——但也正因为这样，我才能清晰地看见，自己想要飞向的高度，到底在哪里。
- The Scions of the Canopy. ｜ 「悬木人」
- This is already shaping up to be a hot pot to remember... ｜ 感、感觉会变成很恐怖的火锅呢…
- "...Prior to disappearance... Legend of Varuna... obsessed with..." ｜ 「…失踪前…『法留纳传说』…执着于…」
- Waiting is about all we can do... ｜ 也只能等着了吧…

- Huh? Eh, Paimon thinks we'd better not. What are we gonna say, anyway? "Oh, could you spare us some scales, or a horn, pretty please?" ｜ 欸？还…还是别了啦，我们总不能去找它说「能不能拜托你掰点鳞片或者角给我们呀」之类的吧…

- "As one sows, so do they reap, and the joy of reaping is what one yearns for." ｜ 「种果得果，等的便是这份收获的喜悦！」
- We just agreed to help deliver a letter this one time, that's all... Although, wait... does that mean we helped make this wedding happen!? ｜ 我们去送信只是答应过人家要帮忙而已…哎？等等，难道是我们间接促成了这桩婚事！
- Oh, I could come up with lots of ideas. With Anis's help, two days will be enough for our work. However, I'm still undecided as to the style of the reference book's text and illustrations... ｜ 能想起的内容确实不少，有阿尼斯协助的话，两天也足够了。只是图册的插图和配文要走什么风格，我目前还在考虑…
- Haha, that won't be necessary. We're not that shorthanded. ｜ 哈哈，倒不必，我们还没有缺人到那个地步。
- But we have never received a reply. Perhaps the letters were lost on the way, or... ｜ 但信寄出去之后却一直杳无回音，也不知道是送丢了，还是怎么回事…

- Though I've heard the locals say there are shrine maidens on Mt. Yougou. Shrine maidens are known to be skilled diviners, and that's all the incentive I need for the climb. ｜ 不过听这里的人讲，影向山顶上有巫女，巫女们会很灵很灵的占卜术，这对我来说诱惑力有些太大了。

- "P.S.: Rope Eloffe in as well, would you?" ｜ 「附言：把爱洛芙也叫上吧！」
- There's no point in hiding this... When my brother first stated his intentions to move his shop next to mine, my first reaction was to consider moving the shop. Father would be ashamed, and rightly so. ｜ 有件事不怕你们笑话，最初大哥打算把他的店开在我隔壁，我得知消息后的第一个念头居然是搬店，真是愧对父亲。

- Paimon ｜ 派蒙
- Though I did not spend many days as a seed, the days I spent with you are ten times, no, hundreds of times more precious than the days I spent before. ｜ 虽然身为种子在地上行走的时间有些短暂，不过与你们一同度过的时间，比过往要充实数十倍，不，数百倍吧。
- #No, I mean it. Granny might not say it out loud, but I can tell — she has a soft spot for {NICKNAME}. ｜ #不对。奶奶嘴上不说而已，我能看得出来，她正在关注{NICKNAME}。

- Enjoy the Scenery ｜ 欣赏景色
- Excellent, magnificent! This beetle battle has inspired me! ｜ 妙极了，妙极了！我从这局斗虫中找到了灵感！
- "Today we tried sailing in a fixed direction, but the boat kept returning to its starting point. Reason unclear..." ｜ 「今天尝试了固定方向行驶，但无论如何，船都会回到出发点，原因不明…」

- So, is everyone ready? Don't forget to make a wish when you see the "Lunar Leviathan." ｜ 所以，大家准备好了吗？见到「海中月」可别忘了许愿哦。
- Seriously, that's all it says? What a waste! ｜ 呃，怎么印了这么多没用的东西？

- It's too healthy for me, I think... ｜ 对我来说太健康了…
- *sigh* Another miss. This sucks... ｜ 唉，又没射中，难受。
- I've been following that novel since the beginning, and the writing has changed hands twice already. That wouldn't happen with an adeptus. They can outlast pretty much anyone... ｜ 《蜃楼战记》我一路看连载下来，已经换了两次作者了。如果是仙人应该会比我坚持更久吧…
- Ahem... Of course not. But say you live in a house, and you've never seen it in its entirety, and no one has ever guaranteed its structural strength... ｜ 咳咳，那当然不是。但如果您住在一座屋子里，却从没见过这屋子的全貌，也没人保证过屋子的结构强度…

- Quest Item ｜ 任务道具
- Well, Siraj is pretty popular as of late. I heard he's gained recognition from a lot of well-known researchers. Supposedly, he's a strong contender for being one of the next sages. ｜ 西拉杰最近名气很高嘛，我听说他得到了不少知名学者的认可，是下任贤者的有力竞争者。
- In the theater of my imagination, the scene plays out in full color. I can see the expressions on the characters' faces, hear their words, feel the cadence of their speech... Text on the page is transformed into a spellbinding show, and I watch with bated breath to see where each person's story will take them. ｜ 人物的神情，场景的颜色，空气中流动的韵律…我把文字改编成精彩的演出，期待着戏中人能走向何方。
- What may come as a surprise to many younger researchers is that though Faruzan has made great contributions to the study of mechanics, she is in fact a member of Haravatat, which specializes in the study of languages.\nSimply put, her field of study is "the analysis of the structure of and solutions to various ruin devices via the study of stone carvings and other ancient texts."\nA century ago, the Akademiya's studies into Ancient Mechanics were not yet mature. As such, Faruzan's ability to prejudge the operations of such machines was indeed of great benefit to the act of exploring ruins.\nHowever, as the number of as-yet-unexplored ruins grew fewer and fewer, and the Kshahrewar's understanding of mechanics grew more advanced, this field of research would slowly lose the luster of yesteryear.\nBy the time Faruzan re-entered the Akademiya a century later, no student in Haravatat could even understand her essays, and the mentors could only look at each other in dismay at the topics she would submit for study.\nOn the other hand, there are many students in Kshahwerar who, having graduated on the back of manuscripts she had written and hearing of her present plight, have come to persuade her to join their Darshan instead, only to see little success in that matter.\nA certain researcher even went a bridge too far in their persuasion, making such claims as "in the future, Kshahrewar will be the only Darshan that can do research into machines!" and "the era of interpreting ancient texts is over!" This person wound up being chastised by an irate Faruzan for as long as it would take to sit through two entire classes.\nThey say that that evening, this poor researcher would be nursing some alcohol in Lambad's Tavern, aghast and humbled in equal measure.\nA friend of his from Haravatat spent the whole night consoling him, while plotting in his heart to debate this old fogey and show her what for.\nAlas, Lambad's Tavern would have a new inconsolable drunk the very next day. ｜ 令不少后辈诧异的是，珐露珊虽然在机关术领域建树颇丰，却是以文字研究为主业的知论派学者。\n简单来说，她的研究领域是「基于石刻等出土文献解读古遗迹中各类机关的构成与解法」。\n百年前，教令院的古典机关研究尚不成熟。珐露珊能借助古文献预先判断机关运作状态，这确实对遗迹考察工作裨益良多。\n然而随着未探明的遗迹越来越少，妙论派的机关学说越来越完善，这项研究也渐渐不复往日辉煌。\n时隔百年，等到珐露珊重返教令院时，知论派里已经没有学生能看懂她的论文，导师们对着她上报的课题也只能面面相觑。\n妙论派里有不少读着珐露珊手稿毕业的学者，听说了她的困境后，纷纷前来游说她转去刹诃伐罗学院，却通通无功而返。\n更有一位学者在游说时太过忘形，说什么「刹诃伐罗学院是未来唯一有能力研究机关的学院！」「现在已经不是解读古文的时代啦！」，被脸色越发铁青的珐露珊前辈批评教育了整整两堂课的时间。\n据说那天晚上，这位学者在兰巴德酒馆里喝着闷酒，卑陬失色。\n他的一位知论派好友拍着肩膀安慰了他一整夜，心中暗暗不忿，想着明天在知论派的答辩会上，一定要给那老古董一点教训。\n——于是第二天晚上，这位朋友也加入了喝闷酒的队伍。
- (Passive) When battle begins, create 1 initial <color=#FFFFFFFF>$[C134111]</color>. ｜ 【被动】战斗开始时，初始生成<color=#FFFFFFFF>$[C134111]</color>。
- As you know, we told you all that we found the last time without holding anything back. ｜ 我们之前也毫无保留地与你分享了我们的所知。
- A meat dish with a crispy skin. Unfortunately, grilling it for too long has left the skin cracked and blackened, with the once-tender meat within now tough, dry, and tasteless... Perhaps if the name is changed to "Charred Barbeque" someone might find it more acceptable. ｜ 脆皮包裹的肉料理。过久的烘烤让表皮变得焦黑，被包裹在内的肋排已经完全熟透了…或许改名成焦烤肋排更能让人接受。
- Quest Item ｜ 任务道具
- It seems the "Guardian" that the relic was looking for was not a valiant warrior in the usual sense. ｜ 圣物所要寻找的「守护者」，并非是寻常意义上的勇猛之士。
- Port Ormos ｜ 奥摩斯港
- Voice of the Water ｜ 水的声音
- Where's Kaeya? Gone already? ｜ 凯亚呢？走了？
- I wonder how his daughter, Navia, is doing. I should go say hello if I get the chance... ｜ 也不知道他的女儿娜维娅小姐最近怎么样了，有机会我得去问候一下…
- Shunsuiken 3-Hit DMG|{param3:F1P} ｜ 三段瞬水剑伤害|{param3:F1P}
- I only bought the gem because it seemed like there was something special about it. The legend didn't come into play until I checked certain texts back at the Temple of Silence. ｜ 嗯，我也是见这石头有些特殊，从商人手中买下带回缄默之殿后，查询了诸多文献才确定的。
- Best keep your distance, Magishroom! ｜ 拉开距离比较好，「蘑菇魔法使」！
- Hello, you two. Not to disturb you or anything, but what were you intending to do by hanging that light up again? ｜ 打扰两位。你们在树上挂灯，是为了做什么吗？
- A character is currently involved in the quest "{0}". Please complete it first. ｜ 有角色被「{0}」任务占用，请先完成后再继续
- Whenever the instructor wore this brooch, it meant there would be no training sessions that day. ｜ 教官的胸口别着这种花的时候，意味着今日不练兵。
- Lotus Flower Crisp ｜ 莲花酥
- Food ｜ 食物
- A fragrant flower that will bloom for all eternity and never wither. ｜ 永远娇嫩的鲜花，历经长久时光仍不枯萎地散发着芬芳。
- Miitoboru ｜ 「大肉丸」
- So what are you trying to sell us, here? ｜ 那你还卖关子！
- You see the little flower in the middle of the pond? It's... just like in the legends. ｜ 你们应该都看见水潭中间的小花了吧？跟传说里的一模一样。
- Collect {0} Spirit Carp to reveal ｜ 汇集{0}条「苍灵鲤」以解锁启示
- Revives a character and restores 1,500 HP. ｜ 复苏选中的角色，为其恢复1500点生命值。
- Hehe, Paimon's excited to see another of Lyney's magic shows. Wait... Lynette, shouldn't you be on stage by now? ｜ 嘿嘿，又能看到林尼的魔术表演了。对了，琳妮特，你不用上台吗？
- Ahem~ "We're going to hold a feast at the Grand Bazaar and celebrate Cyno's reinstatement as the General Mahamatra!" ｜ 「我们要在大巴扎办一场宴会，顺道庆祝赛诺恢复大风纪官职位！」
- Some music... ｜ 来点音乐。
- I have a plan. But... it needs a villain. ｜ 我有一计，不过…这个计划需要「坏人」。
- If you ask Paimon, he's just afraid that the big guy over there would rat him out to the sage. ｜ 要我说啊，他就是害怕在边上的那个大个子回去找贤者告状。
- Interested Newcomer? ｜ 兴趣使然的新人？
- Ah, my homeland... ｜ 唉，故乡…
- Electro Abyss Mage ｜ 雷深渊法师
- At the start of the first Action Phase, both players will get 2 charges of Energy for all Character Cards.\nIn each round, the cost for the first Action Card each player uses will be decreased by 2. ｜ 在首个行动阶段开始时，双方的所有角色牌获得2点充能；\n每位牌手每回合打出第一张行动牌所需费用-2。
- Material: Ores; Applied Element: Pyro; Core Propulsion: Slimes ｜ 原材：矿物；附着元素：火；核心动力：史莱姆
- Ragged Attendance Record ｜ 残破的出勤记录
- When the Bounty Rockfond Rifthound's HP falls under 15%, a large amount of HP will be restored after 10 seconds. This can only happen once during the bounty hunt. ｜ 讨伐目标「嗜岩·兽境猎犬」的生命值低于15%时，会在10秒后恢复大量生命值。该效果在一次讨伐尝试中只会触发一次。
- Kumi ｜ 久美
- Travelers coming down from the north always pass by Wangshu Inn and end up stopping off there, and as for the travelers coming up from the south... ｜ 从北边来的旅客顺路就投宿望舒客栈了，从南面来的旅客呢…
- Huh, looks like Bongo-Head doesn't mind the flavor of Crab Roe at all! ｜ 咦？原来「咚咚小圆帽」连蟹黄的味道也喜欢！
- So you're the money person, right? ｜ 懂了，钱全靠你赚。
- The way it looks now, the Order of Skeptics's archives were reaaallly off the mark. ｜ 这样看来，矫论团的文献典籍真的错得离谱呢。
- Oh, and if you'd like to join our team of volunteers, just say the word and it shall be so! ｜ 哦对了，想要加入志愿者队伍的话也可以找我，一句话的事！
- Talk to Ann ｜ 与安对话
- Perform underwater salvage ｜ 在水底进行打捞
- Oh... I remember now, he said something about entering a novel-writing competition in Inazuma... ｜ 哦对，他上次说，又写了本小说去稻妻城参赛…
- A Small Step for Hilichurls ｜ 丘丘人的一小步
- Paimon never expected to find a place like this under the sand... ｜ 没想到黄沙之下还有这样的地方…
- Quest currently unavailable. Check details > ｜ 任务暂时无法进行，前往查看详情
- Biram ｜ 庇兰
- Well, people often have different points of view depending on their mindset and experiences, right? It's actually quite normal. ｜ 可能大家的立场、经历与想法并不相同吧。这也是常有的事。
- Go to Wuwang Hill ｜ 前往无妄坡
- P·A·I·M·O·N ｜ P·A·I·M·O·N
- A rough-and-ready laurel wreath that seems as precious as a king's golden crown. ｜ 粗略编成的草环。对一些人而言，就像王者的金冠一样贵重吧。
- You see the little flower in the middle of the pond? It's... just like in the legends. ｜ 你们应该都看见水潭中间的小花了吧？跟传说里的一模一样。
- Talk to Heizou ｜ 与平藏交谈
- Deals $[D__KEY__DAMAGE] $[D__KEY__ELEMENT]. ｜ 造成$[D__KEY__DAMAGE]点$[D__KEY__ELEMENT]。
- Flattery will get you everywhere with Paimon. ｜ 派蒙最吃这一套了。
- Victory at Hand ｜ 胜利的拼图已在手中
- Zhongli: Time for Tea ｜ 钟离·茶
- Furnishing Blueprint ｜ 摆设图纸
- I have not seen my life take a single good turn, not ever... ｜ 我这辈子呀…就没有一天转运的时候…
- Well said! It is my good fortune indeed! ｜ 说得好！实在是万幸！
- That's awesome, Ioroi! But so, what did you make the meal we just had out of? ｜ 五百藏真厉害！不过，这么说来，刚刚给我们吃的到底是用什么做的呀？
- Sayu's sleeping spots are within the palm of Kano Nana's hand. She will have to resort to extraordinary measures to get a good nap this time... ｜ 早柚睡觉的地方被鹿野奈奈悉数掌握，想要睡一个安稳觉，只能出奇招了…
- Well, of course he had to tell her that, but refusing to participate is basically the same as a confession of guilt. ｜ 审判官大人的话虽然这么讲，但拒绝这个试验也就等同于承认自己不是神明了吧。
- Hello? ｜ 你好…？
- Finally... with this power, I can cook... *giggle* ...Oh no, I've started salivating! ｜ 有这种力量的话…终于可以…不好，口水要流下来了！
- Everyone in the Treasure Hoarders would say that they're happy, but not one of us could escape that vicious cycle. ｜ 盗宝团里的每个人都说自己很快活，但每个人都逃不出这种死循环。
- The guards aren't going to let us to get up that high for sure... ｜ 城里的卫兵叔叔们肯定不会让我们爬太高的…
- Back to business. Did you get any info about the knife? ｜ 还是说说刀的调查吧。
- Now, we've found the locations of all the paintings! Paimon wonders where the Aranara who made these treasure maps is... ｜ 这么一来，就找到了所有图画的地点了呢！不知道画这些藏宝图的兰那罗在什么地方呢…
- So what brings you to Liyue Harbor at this time of the year, anyway? Thinking of putting on a music festival during the Lantern Rite celebrations? ｜ 说起来，您现在这个时间点来璃月港，该不会是想在海灯节期间办音乐节吧？
- Judging from the Conqueror of Demons' reactions, I think that he was somewhere else, but his voice and image were projected to our location. ｜ 从降魔大圣刚才的反应来看，他应该跟我们处在不同地点。可他的声音和幻影竟然传到了我们所在的空间…
- After this character deals <color=#f39001>Dendro DMG</color> to an opponent, their <color=#f39001>Elemental Mastery</color> is increased ｜ 角色对敌人造成<color=#f39001>草元素伤害</color>后，<color=#f39001>元素精通</color>提高
- The techniques we ordinary people now master are generalized forms of "Phlogiston Engravings." ｜ 现在我们这些普通人掌握的涂鸦技术，其实是「燃素刻录纹」泛化后的产物。
- Oh, that's really brave of you! ｜ 真勇敢！
- President of the Spina di Rosula's Simulanka Branch ｜ 「刺玫会希穆兰卡分会」会长
- If you could promote some of our goods at his place and offer him a free trial, he might just buy some fertilizer. ｜ 如果能带着一些货去他那里宣传，并且请他「试用」的话，说不定他会愿意来多买点肥料。
- Considering its origins, the price of using that power... is death. ｜ 既然是她的力量，使用的代价不言而喻，就是死亡。
- That's so cool! So now our story will be made into wine, too! ｜ 好厉害——我们的事情被酒记下来啦！
- Margaret's Special ｜ 玛格丽特的特调酒
- "Superb Fonta, Superb Gaming!" ｜ 「畅玩游戏，畅享枫达！」
- Remember how I said Ororon's soul is fragmented? This is the talisman I created to keep it stable. ｜ 还记得欧洛伦的灵魂有残缺这件事吗？为了维持他的灵魂稳定，我给他做了个护身符。
- ...I understand. ｜ …嗯。
- I'd love to speak with the person who made it. I might even get some ideas for a new collection along the way... ｜ 如果有机会和它的设计者交流几句就好了。摘取一些有趣的元素，也许我可以创作出一套全新的服装…
- The unity of Mondstadt's people gave us the victory. ｜ 是所有齐心协力的蒙德人。
- 1-Hit DMG|{param1:F1P} ｜ 一段伤害|{param1:F1P}
- And that fire is what saved the Mountain King. ｜ 是那团火的力量最终拯救了山王。
- This Imaging Conch should have been placed somewhere else but was abandoned here by someone, causing it to project images out of their proper order. Return it to its rightful place, and who knows what you might find... ｜ 本应放在某处的影像海螺，却被人遗弃在了此处，播放着位置错位的影像。将它放回本应放回的位置，能看出什么也犹未可知…
- So, even if a Sumpter Beast got snacky, it'd still have to chomp on it for a full day. ｜ 哪怕是放进驮兽的嘴里，都能嚼上一天一夜。
- It's normal for children to have secrets amongst themselves that they keep from grown-ups. So long as they can grow up healthy, and become strong, kind, and good adults... ｜ 小孩子之间有些不愿意告诉大人的秘密很正常，只要他们能健康成长，变成强壮、善良、正直的大人就好…
- You recite the passphrase together with Paimon: Take us to the world of reverie! ｜ 和派蒙一起念出关键的暗号：「带我们前往遐想的世界」。
- About Lyney ｜ 关于林尼…
- The previous owner sold this property due to debt problems. ｜ 因债务问题，上一任东家抛售了产业。
- Log No. 330. With the support of ██, I was finally able to launch the airborne workshop. ｜ …第三百三十号记录，在██的支持下，空中工坊终于启动了…
- Whoa, there are warriors fighting everywhere... ｜ 到处都有战士在对抗深渊魔物…
- Reach the destination within the time limit ｜ 在限定时间内抵达终点
- "Flowerbed" Advert ｜ 「簇花圃」广告
- You need not worry. I will make arrangements to ensure that she will not want for food, clothing, board, or travel. ｜ 请放心，我自然会安排妥当，她的衣食住行都不成问题。
- I had already found two locations for the necessary ingredients, and I was planning to retrieve the ingredients once they have ripened. ｜ 在下本来已经看好了两处食材的所在地，打算等这些食材成熟后再去取用。
- *sob* ...The doctor is a meanie, grandma! The shot she gave me hurt! ｜ 呜呜…奶奶，医师姐姐是坏人吗，她给我打的针好痛啊…
- #{SPACE}Every level will increase <color=#B09057FF>ATK</color> by 2,000. ｜ 每一级会使其<color=#B09057FF>攻击力</color>提升2000。
- Alright, no need to look so sullen... I'm just kidding. Come on, let's eat. The food is getting cold. ｜ 好啦，别突然严肃起来啊，我开玩笑的。快吃饭吧，不然饭菜就要凉了。
- Since then, I haven't left. No more adventures... ｜ 所以从那天开始，我就一直在这里，放弃了冒险…
- Let me be honest... Do you really think you have what it takes to shoot a film? ｜ 容我直言。你们…是认真想搞映影吗？
- Restore Defaults ｜ 恢复默认
- Thank you both. The Votive Rainjade has been returned to its priests, and the statues have come back to their rightful places. The Rainjade Rite is now ready to be performed. ｜ 嗯。多亏了你们，祀珑再一次回到了它的祭司手中，仙像也回到了它们应处的位置。投珑仪式已经准备好了。
- I'll have to get going. Have a nice evening, everyone — I'll catch you all another time. ｜ 那我先走一步，你们慢慢聊。下次见啦。
- I'm a blacksmith who's been crafting weapons for the Eremites. Sometimes I make tools, accessories, and furniture pieces for other people, too. ｜ 我是专门为镀金旅团打造金属武器的铁匠，偶尔也为其他人做一些工具、饰品或家具之类的东西。
- Increases all party members' Shield Strength by 20% for 300s. In Co-Op Mode, this effect only applies to your own character(s). ｜ 队伍中所有角色护盾强效提升20%，持续300秒。多人游戏时，仅对自己的角色生效。
- As agreed, Sethos hands his Ba Fragment over to Cyno. When the latter receives it, his body begins to give off a startling radiance. ｜ 按照约定，赛索斯将他持有的跋灵交给了赛诺。赛诺收下跋灵的瞬间，身上迸发出惊人的光辉。
- A hard feather from a large seacliff hawk. The basalt tip of the feather sometimes glistens with a cool dew. ｜ 来自矶岩巨鸢的刚羽，玄石的羽尖有时会凝结有清冷的露珠。
- Six boats entered. ｜ 共驶入了6艘船。
- Still talking back? You two kids down there, don't you tarry either! Who knows what kind of dangers might show up if you dally there! ｜ 还顶嘴呢。旁边两个小朋友也别在下边耽搁了，在下面呆久了谁知道有什么危险！
- Yeah... ｜ 就是说呀…
- Come on then! Hand over your copy of Records of Jueyun and I'll sign it for you. ｜ 好了，把你的《绝云记闻》给我吧，我给你签名就是了。
- Trail of Delicacies: Path of Gentle Breezes ｜ 珍肴霞踪-悠风之路
- Defeat Challenge Objective ｜ 击败挑战目标
- What are you doing? ｜ 你在做什么？
- (What's going on?) ｜ （怎么回事？怎么回事？）
- The water has changed. It's pretty much as expected. The concentration of Primordial Seawater has increased significantly. ｜ 水质变了。和预期差不多，原始胎海水浓度明显升高。
- So in all likelihood, I'd probably still be prepping at the office for that interview of ours. I know what you're thinking... that sounds a bit sad, but I've always believed that it's best to do what you enjoy. ｜ 所以，我应该会在报社里处理你的专访吧。别说听上去很可怜之类的话哦，对我来说做自己喜欢的事就是最好的。
- However, I must warn you that it can get just a teensy bit noisy when operating at full power. ｜ 不过…它全力运转的时候，声音可能有那么一点点大。
- Surely the great champion himself doesn't actually believe that I can fulfill Rainsong Pond's calling? ｜ 那位冠军不会觉得我能够完成雨歌塘的使命吧？
- We're not leaving empty-handed after so much waiting. Get them! ｜ 等了这么久，总归要有点收获才行…上！
- Ohhh... I need to find a better hiding place... ｜ 唔…藏在这里，也不安全…
- Pfft... Ahem! N—No. It's another cute little animal. As soft and furry as a cat, but smaller and more docile... ｜ 噗…咳咳，不，不是。就是…很可爱的小动物。和猫一样软软的，毛茸茸的，但是比它要小，性格也更温顺…
- Klee's mother, Alice, is an extremely enigmatic and near-omnipotent sorceress. Don't be overly concerned. This is just her character. ｜ 可莉的母亲艾莉丝是一位极其神秘又近乎万能的魔女。千万别太惊讶，她就是这样的人。
- A classic way of drinking black tea. Slightly sweet and sour to the taste. ｜ 经典的红茶饮品，入口微酸。
- Sefana ｜ 瑟法娜
- The fact won't change that they existed in my life, and gave me the reason and motivation to move forward. ｜ 但他们曾存在于我的生命中，也给了我必须继续向前的理由与动力。
- After the investigation, Heizou eventually made a conjecture. The next step is to look on the beach... ｜ 经过一番调查后，平藏逐渐有了猜测。接下来就是去海滩上找找看…
- Give the materials to Mr. Bohuan ｜ 将材料交给伯桓子
- Challenge Failed ｜ 挑战失败
- "...Seek the blossom of eternity, and reclaim memories long-lost..." ｜ 「…追随永恒的花苞，将寻得失落的记忆…」

- Help Needed:\nOne of the good things about doing business here at <color=#3399CC>Caravan Ribat</color> is that things aren't as risky as they are out there in the desert.\nHowever, we still sometimes encounter harassing <color=#3399CC>hilichurl</color> bands who sometimes take up residence in our cargo storage by force.\nI mean, how are honest businesspeople supposed to do a job like this? Please help us restore order and normalcy. ｜ 求助：\n在<color=#3399CC>喀万驿</color>这里做生意的一大好处就是生态环境远没有沙漠里凶险。\n不过，偶尔跑来骚扰的<color=#3399CC>丘丘人</color>还是很讨厌，存放货物的地方经常会被丘丘人当成废弃洞穴占据。\n这叫人怎么做生意嘛，希望有人愿意承接击退丘丘人的委托，帮助我们恢复正常生活。
- Traveler, I'm counting on you. Please record their opinions honestly! ｜ 旅行者，全靠你了，请如实记录大家的看法啊！

- A few days ago, Stanley got drunk and told me a secret — something he's never told anyone before. ｜ 其实，前几天斯坦利先生喝醉酒，说了一些不为人知的秘密给我听。
- Archery contests are a Windblume Festival tradition that commemorate the early days of Mondstadt, an age of pioneering and hunting...\nChallenging archery competitions have also been prepared for this year's Windblume Festival.\nThose who are well-versed in these arts will, naturally, be able to win the prizes and wow the residents of Mondstadt. ｜ 弓箭挑战是风花节的传统游戏，旨在纪念蒙德建立之初，那段开拓与狩猎的历史…\n今年的风花节同样设置了极具挑战性的弓箭竞赛项目。\n精通个中玄妙的高超射手，自然能赢得赛事的奖励与蒙德居民的敬重。
- The effects of the Passive Talent "Tag-Team Triple Jump!" are enhanced:\nWhen performing the Special Plunging Attack "Thunderous Tornado Eruption," Varesa will also gain "Rainbow Crash" for 5s.\nWhen "Rainbow Crash" is in effect, Varesa's Plunging Attack ground impact DMG is increased by 180% of her ATK, whether she is in the Fiery Passion state or not. You must first unlock the Passive Talent "Tag-Team Triple Jump!" to access the above effect.\n\nAdditionally, when Varesa is in the Sudden Onrush mode of her Nightsoul's Blessing, she consumes 30% less Nightsoul points or Phlogiston. ｜ 固有天赋「连势，三重腾跃！」的效果获得强化：\n进行特殊下落攻击·大火山狂雷怒卷时，瓦雷莎也会获得「虹色坠击」，持续5秒；\n「虹色坠击」持续期间，无论瓦雷莎是否处于炽热激情状态，进行下落攻击时，坠地冲击都会改为额外造成180%攻击力的伤害。该效果需要解锁固有天赋「连势，三重腾跃！」。\n\n此外，当瓦雷莎处于夜魂加持状态下的「突驰烈进」模式时，消耗的夜魂值或燃素降低30%。
- Come on, what was with that person just now? The road's wide enough. They didn't have to walk straight at us like that! ｜ 刚才那个人是怎么回事，明明这么宽的路，却偏要笔直地朝我们走过来。

- (A simple map falls out from the diary. The map marks out the two bells in the northwest and the southeast, with two ominous skulls to go with them.) ｜ （一张简易的地图从日志本中滑落，地图上标出了西北方与东南方的两处大钟，并画了两个醒目的骷髅头。）

- Could you repeat that method of yours to me again? ｜ 能再说一次那个方法吗？

- Don't worry, don't worry! There's plenty of magic here — we can make another. ｜ 啊，别担心。这里魔力很充沛，还能再造出来。
- Xilonen's <color=#FFCC33>Elemental Skill</color> causes her to don roller blades and engage in <color=#FFCC33>swift movement and climbing</color> until her Nightsoul points are depleted.\nDuring this time, if she has at least 2 <color=#FF9999>Pyro</color>, <color=#80C0FF>Hydro</color>, <color=#99FFFF>Cryo</color>, or <color=#FFACFF>Electro</color> party members, her Normal and Plunging Attacks can accumulate Nightsoul points, and when her <color=#FFCC33>Nightsoul points reach maximum, she will decrease the corresponding Elemental RES of nearby opponents</color>. Otherwise, her Normal and Plunging Attacks deal increased DMG.\nWhen her Nightsoul points are insufficient, she can consume Phlogiston to maintain this state.\n\nHer <color=#FFCC33>Elemental Burst</color> deploys a DJ Controller that deals <color=#FFCC33>AoE Geo DMG</color> and, based on <color=#FFCC33>the Elemental Types of your party members</color>, will either also <color=#FFCC33>continuously heal the active character</color> or deal additional <color=#FFCC33>AoE Geo DMG</color>.\n\nTo facilitate experiencing the character's Elemental Burst and Nightsoul's Blessing state, additional Elemental Orbs will appear in the trial stage, and more objects will provide Phlogiston. ｜ <color=#FFCC33>元素战技</color>将使希诺宁切换至刃轮装束，进行<color=#FFCC33>快速移动与攀爬</color>，直到夜魂值耗尽。\n期间，若队伍中编成至少两名<color=#FF9999>火元素</color>、<color=#80C0FF>水元素</color>、<color=#99FFFF>冰元素</color>或<color=#FFACFF>雷元素</color>的角色，普通攻击与下落攻击可以积攒夜魂值，并<color=#FFCC33>在夜魂值达到上限时降低附近敌人的对应元素抗性</color>；否则，提升希诺宁普通攻击与下落攻击造成的伤害。\n夜魂值不足时，希诺宁能消耗燃素来维持此状态。\n\n<color=#FFCC33>元素爆发</color>将开启调音台，造成<color=#FFCC33>岩元素范围伤害</color>，并依据<color=#FFCC33>队伍中编成角色的元素类型</color>，追加<color=#FFCC33>对当前场上角色的持续治疗</color>或额外的<color=#FFCC33>岩元素范围伤害</color>。\n\n为方便体验角色的元素爆发与夜魂加持状态，试用的关卡中会产生额外的元素晶球，并有更多的物件提供燃素。

- "I'd like to thank Lady Yae Miko and the Yashiro Commissioner for their good intentions. The problem is that the documentation approval process takes way too long..." ｜ 「感谢八重神子大人与社奉行大人的好意，只是证件审核流程太过漫长…」
- Reward for inviting Venti to a duel at The Cat's Tail and claiming victory in a Friendly Fracas with him ｜ 在猫尾酒馆中邀请温迪进行对局，在友好对局难度中获得胜利后获取

- With Klee here, this all somehow feels like we're getting ready for a field trip... ｜ 有可莉在，总觉得是要去郊游…
- Oh, that's because I couldn't find them. It's my first time in Liyue Harbor and I got lost in the city. ｜ 这个，其实是因为我没有找到他们。我从来没有来过璃月港，然后就在城里迷路了。
- Yes, I have. There was a perfect crime that I haven't been able to solve to this day. ｜ 见过喔。那桩「完美犯罪」…我到现在也没能找出真正的犯人。
- Paimon thinks it's just your run-of-the-mill thief, really. ｜ 我倒觉得它只是个普通的小偷啦。
- "I used to have Chicken-Mushroom Skewers when I was an adventurer. Lately, I've been missing its simple but delicious taste. Can you stock some Chicken-Mushroom Skewers?" ｜ 「早些年冒险的时候，经常吃野菇鸡肉串。最近有些怀念那种朴素的味道，能进一些野菇鸡肉串吗？」

- Good point! Hmm, a bodyguard... ｜ 有道理…我看看，卫兵…卫兵…
- Snezhnayan forward scouts have been active in Dragonspine, seemingly after the unique energy present in this land. Defeat them, and you may yet gain precious Crimson Agate... ｜ 至冬国的探子兵士在龙脊雪山活动，似乎是觊觎着此地特殊的能量吧。如果能将他们击败，也可以取得珍贵的绯红玉髓…

- Are you here to build a snowman, too? ｜ 骑士大姐姐，你也是来堆雪人的吗？
- Ah, I'm not upset. I just wanted to get some fresh air. ｜ 我没在难过。只是想来呼吸一下新鲜空气，顺便散散心。
- What, is he going to tell me all the things the Fontaine Research Institute is hiding? ｜ 怎么，这位先生就会将枫丹科学院所有隐瞒之事告诉我吗？
- It's natural to be cautious, but one who abandons their comrades is no hero. ｜ 谨慎小心固然理所当然，但擅离职守，让他人替自己涉险，未免行不及言。

There were days when he'd spend hours down at the warehouse admiring his weapons even as debt collectors were descending upon our house. ｜ 尤其是迷上了刀剑之后，开销就止不住了，最严重的时候，追债的人都追到家里来了，他还待在城外的仓库里欣赏藏品。

- Unfortunately, some of my memories remain damaged, so I do not presently know where the Narzissenkreuz Ordo that I must reach is, precisely. ｜ 遗憾的是，由于我的部分记忆数据依然存在损坏，我目前尚不清楚，我需要前往的场所「水仙十字结社」，究竟位于何方。
- Ooh, I almost forgot! Am I allowed to go out now? ｜ 啊！对了，现在我可以外出了吗？

- The fruit of a forest shrub. Its flesh is firm and sweet. It is said to have a calming effect on the mind.\nIn the past, Zaytun Peaches were once used as ornamental plants due to their cute appearance. However, its medical properties were discovered over time, and it has now become a very common commercial product, ironically very seldom noticed for its aesthetic value. ｜ 林中灌木结出的果实。肉质敦实，味道香甜可口。据说食用后还有宁心安神的功效。\n在过去，墩墩桃因为外形可爱曾被当成一种观赏性植物。不过随着其药用价值被发现，如今已经成为了一种常见的商业作物，反而鲜少有人注意到它的观赏价值了。

- I did a little snooping around at Chioriya Boutique once. Aside from the wealthy housewives of Fontaine and the box-ticking tourists from overseas, some of the regular customers there look like really rough characters! Big muscly types with scars on their face, guys in masks and hats with their swords drawn... But they always come bearing gifts and acting like humble servants. Uh... Well, mostly. Anyone with a bad attitude is literally sent flying back out the door. Seriously! I snapped a photo of a guy being thrown out once, he was like four feet in the air! ｜ 我曾经仔细观察过「千织屋」。店里除了枫丹贵妇人和慕名而至的外国游客之外，还经常会来一些看起来就不好惹的角色！有的一身肌肉、脸上留疤，有的蒙面戴帽、怀里揣刀…但不管怎样，他们手上几乎都提着礼物样式的东西，态度也毕恭毕敬。呃…那些态度不好的，出门时都是飞出来的，我还抓拍过那样的瞬间呢！

It is almost as if you have been here before...\n\nUse this item to unlock Gnostic Hymn for a single period. ｜ 用纪行文体写成的游记，记载了在大陆上旅行的种种见闻。不知道为什么会有这个初稿，难道你之前来过？\n\n使用后可以获得当期的珍珠纪行使用资格。
- Hibiki said that that bird's strength was a truly frightening thing, capable of singeing the fur off all the cats on this island. ｜ 阿响说，那只鸟的力量很可怕，可以让岛上所有的猫的毛都炸起来。
- Well, whatever the case, this should be one of Ioroi's quests, right? ｜ 嗯嗯，不管怎样，也算是五百藏任务里的一部分吧。
- What happened? ｜ 到底是怎么回事？
- Monoceros Caeli Chapter: Act I ｜ 鲸天之章 第一幕
- *sigh* This should not be. ｜ 唉，真是不应该。
- During the "Flame-Mane" challenge, a <color=#F39000>bolt of lightning</color> dealing Electro DMG will strike at Dehya's position every 10 seconds. ｜ 在「炽鬃之狮」挑战中，每10秒将在迪希雅的位置降下<color=#F39000>落雷</color>，造成雷元素伤害。
- The storm clouds gathering over Liyue have finally parted, and the schemes that once gripped this land have been shattered by the combined efforts of the Qixing, the adepti, and yourself.\nStill, the memories of your duel with Childe of the Fatui in the depths of the Golden House remain fresh in your mind.\nRelive this duel, and you may yet learn something new... ｜ 一度笼罩璃月的疑云终于散开，胁迫这片土地的阴谋也因为七星、仙人与你的共同努力被粉碎。\n但在黄金屋的深处，与愚人众的「公子」交锋的记忆再次鲜明地浮现。\n在回忆中重新演练这场战斗，或许能有新的收获…
- Traveler ｜ 主角
- She said: "It's up to him whether he wants to support us at the performance tonight... but I expect him to make time for the upcoming banquet we're planning. No excuses!" ｜ 说是「今日来不来捧场随他心意，来日饭局切莫推脱。」
- As for long-distance travel, let me think... Hmm, perhaps I should wait until Little Mao is all grown? ｜ 至于远游，我想想…嗯，要不然等小茂长大吧？
- And it looks like there's no other route we can take, so let's just try it and see what happens! ｜ 看上去也没有别的路可走的样子，没办法，我们就先穿过这个通道看看吧！

- Ohh... I've been looking forward to this a lot... ｜ 噗…我最期待的画面出现了啊…
- ...Take all the flowers picked by our members and turn them into a huge, giant flower statue! Then, to give her a huge surprise, place it outside the rear entrance of the Church. ｜ 把应援会成员摘来的鲜花拼成一尊鲜花巨人像，送到教会后门给她一个惊喜。
- Well, what do you think? Is this souvenir valuable enough for you? ｜ 如何，可足够有「纪念」的价值了？
- My lack of ability is to blame. I failed to uncover the truth in time, and I failed to stop my father. And now, as acting head of the clan, I'm failing to quell the unrest. ｜ 都怪我能力有限，当初没能提前查明真相，也未能阻止父亲，现在代替父亲做家主的工作，也无法平息内乱。

- A detailed step-by-step recipe for making Magma Eggs. ｜ 步骤详实的食谱,记载着「乌乌黑蛋」的制作方法。
- Nilou ｜ 妮露
- A burger in which the fowl meat is the main star. The patty has been cut too thin and smeared with too much flour, causing it to taste like bread sandwiching more fried bread. ｜ 以禽肉为主体制作的汉堡。似乎不小心把禽腿排切得太薄，又裹上了太多的面粉。吃起来的口感就像是面包夹炸面饼。
- But anyway, enough of that! Fontaine's photo galleries, here I come! Haha... I trust you'll visit when the time comes as well, alright? ｜ 好啦，不管那些啦！枫丹摄影画廊，我来咯！哈哈，到时候你们也要来哇！
- Don't think about it... ｜ 别想了…
- Its former owner once fell into a cave and found the treasure trove of an exiled royal. This is a souvenir from that incident. ｜ 原本坠入落穴，却是被驱逐的旧宗族藏宝的地窖。是那次经历的纪念品。

- I also have many tasks awaiting me... I will complete them after I finish resting. ｜ 我也有许多事…在暂时的休息后，需要完成。

- <color=#FFE14BFF>Cypress Tree</color>\nThis tall tree is very easy to recognize. According to legends, long-lived specimens of this species have trunks of extraordinary girth. After heavy rains, these trees give off a refreshing scent...\nCut down Cypress Trees to get <color=#FFE14BFF>Cypress Wood</color>. ｜ <color=#FFE14BFF>「香柏树」</color>\n极易辨识的高大乔木，据说，其中一些长寿的个体具有极为粗壮的树干。每当大雨过后，这种树木就会散发出一种清新的香气…\n砍伐「香柏树」可以获得<color=#FFE14BFF>「香柏木」</color>。

- Increases Shield Strength by <color=#99FFFFFF>40%</color>. Scoring hits on opponents increases ATK by <color=#99FFFFFF>8%</color> for 8s. Max 5 stacks. Can only occur once every 0.3s. While protected by a shield, this ATK increase effect is increased by 100%. ｜ 护盾强效提升<color=#99FFFFFF>40%</color>。攻击命中后的8秒内，攻击力提升<color=#99FFFFFF>8%</color>。该效果至多可叠加5层，每0.3秒只能触发一次。此外，处于护盾庇护下时，该效果的攻击力提升效果提高100%。

- Elemental Skill: V ｜ 元素战技·其五
- <color=#D3BC8EFF>Event Overview:</color>\nThe gates to an unknown Domain have once more swung open, and the Hypostases within have called to themselves a great many attendants to make up formidable fighting forces. Use the mysterious power of Dissonances within the Domain to defeat these mighty foes!\n\n<color=#D3BC8EFF>Eligibility</color>\nReach Adventure Rank 20.\n\n<color=#D3BC8EFF>Event Rules</color>\nAfter the event begins, a new stage will be unlocked every 2 days.\nEach stage will have two modes, "Standard Scoring" and "Intense Scoring." Complete the former to unlock the latter.\nIn Standard Scoring, you must complete 4 combat stages consecutively, and in the 4th, you shall face a corresponding Elemental Hypostasis.\nDuring Intense Scoring, you can choose your challenge difficulty level freely and directly challenge the Hypostases. Complete a challenge on Fearless difficulty to unlock Extreme Difficulty. Note that completing Extreme Difficulty does not grant you any further rewards. ｜ <color=#D3BC8EFF>【活动简介】</color>\n通往未知秘境的门扉再次敞开，踞身其中的无相元素召集了大量扈从，构成了凶险至极的战阵！利用秘境中的奇妙力量「离调」，击败这些劲敌吧！\n\n<color=#D3BC8EFF>【参与条件】</color>\n冒险等阶达到20。\n\n<color=#D3BC8EFF>【活动规则】</color>\n活动开始后，每两天将解锁一个新的关卡。\n每个关卡分为「标准乐谱」和「激奏乐谱」两种模式，完成「标准乐谱」模式后，方可解锁「激奏乐谱」。\n「标准乐谱」模式中，旅行者需要连续进行4个阶段的战斗，其中，第4阶段需要击败对应的无相元素。\n「激奏乐谱」模式中，可以自主选择挑战难度，直接挑战无相元素。完成无畏难度的挑战后，将解锁极限难度。需要注意的是：完成极限难度的挑战后，无法获得额外奖励。

- ... ｜ ……
- A ruin machine that can absorb energy and hurl it back as an attack. The Ruin Drake: Skywatch can periodically release a dangerous torrent of energy and increase its own Elemental RES against the previous main type of Elemental DMG it suffered. Under various circumstances, the <color=#FFE14BFF>cores</color> all over its body will be exposed. Take this opportunity to attack those cores, and you may be able to immobilize this creature and undo its Elemental RES boost... ｜ 能够吸收能量、反制攻击的遗迹机关。遗迹龙兽·空巡在战斗中会周期性释放危险的能量洪流，并根据此前受到伤害的主要元素类型，提高对应的元素抗性。在一些状态下，它身体诸多部位的<color=#FFE14BFF>核心</color>会暴露出来。抓住这样的机会攻击核心的话，或许能使其瘫痪并解除元素抗性的提升…
- There are nurseries within the forests of Sumeru that seemingly have no one to tend to them.\nIf you touch every field tile consecutively without repeating yourself, perhaps something interesting might happen. ｜ 须弥的森林当中存在着看似无主的苗圃。\n不重复、不间断地遍历每一块「田地」的话，会发生什么好事也说不定。
- "This white cubic thing is delicious! So awesome! The taste of happiness!" He was really amazed then. ｜ 「这个白白方方的东西真好吃！好厉害！开心的味道。」可惊讶了。

- A common avian species in Teyvat. Plump and meaty, but also capable of delivering messages.\nThis pure-white member of the pigeon family is especially friendly towards humans, but is also highly perceptive of humans' ill intent. Interesting trivia: There is a widely held belief in Mondstadt that an authentic Sweet Madame must be cooked using pigeon meat, but this is just a rumor and nothing more. \nIn the Realm Within, there is no need to send and receive messages, so pigeons are often idle, sometimes delivering things to other animals and going on flights in the morning to maintain their flying ability. Over time, some animals have come to look to the pigeons' flights as a marker of time. Unfortunately for them, the pigeons themselves sometimes don't have a good sense of time. ｜ 提瓦特常见的鸟类，肉质肥美，也可用来远程传信。\n洁白可爱的白鸽，对人类非常友好，但同时也对人类的恶意有着敏锐的预感。顺带一提，坊间有传言说，蒙德名菜「甜甜花酿鸡」最正宗的做法应当用鸽肉制成，但这也只是传说而已。\n壶中洞天无需传信业务，这些白鸽也就闲了下来，偶尔为其他动物住客送送东西，或是在每天清晨振翅起飞，维持自己的飞行能力。久而久之，一些动物会将起飞的鸽子当成时间的标志。遗憾的是，鸽子们报时未必准确。

If this effect is triggered again at {2} stacks, a shockwave that deals AoE DMG will be unleashed. ｜ 队伍中任意角色施放元素爆发后，将产生「元素圆舞」效果，使队伍中所有角色的元素精通提高<color=#ffcc33>{0}</color>点。该效果持续<color=#ffcc33>{1}</color>秒，至多叠加<color=#ffcc33>{2}</color>次。叠加{2}次后在持续期间内，若再次产生该效果，将释放冲击波，造成范围伤害。

- Medium-sized, round fish with horn-like cartilage that is used to dig underwater burrows, build shelters and drive away creatures that try to harm them. \nThis sandy-colored, plain-looking fish is an important breed. Researchers have managed to deduce the ecological characteristics of the whole pufferfish lineage from the anatomy of this species. With its immense strength and strongest horns amongst its kind, this fish acts as an "underwater workhorse." They have evolved their protective coloration as a result of familiarity with the abundant river and lake sand, as well as long-term activities in the riverbed and at the bottom of the lake. ｜ 体型圆润的中型鱼类，生有犄角般的软骨结构，据说它们会用这一结构开凿水下洞穴，建造栖身之所，或是驱赶试图伤害自己的生物。\n这种角鲀有着黄沙般的色泽，其貌不扬，却是相当重要的品种。学者们根据这种角鲀的生理结构，推断出了整个角鲀谱系的生态特点——这种角鲀有着同族中最强的力量和最坚硬的犄角，扮演着「水下工人」的角色。由于长期在河床与湖底活动，与弥漫的河沙与湖沙为伴，它们也进化出了相应的保护色。
- Um... Ahem! I'd say the future of those working in Lumidouce Harbor isn't very bright. It's practically a black hole for career progression, and the pay is lousy. It's better to strike out on your own. ｜ 呃…咳！柔灯港里没有什么好混的，没前途，没意思，钱还开得少，不如出来自己干。
- Three, two, one, smile! ｜ 三、二、一——微笑！
- My strength is insufficient... ｜ 我的力气还不够…

- "Two signal testing sets..."\n"You know, I honestly thought that he was in serious trouble this time. Who knew this was just about being assigned slightly more annoying work! So yeah, that was a relief."\n"Hah! You should have seen how afraid he was of getting scolded by you. It was almost like watching a little brother cower at the thought of his older brother scolding him. Y'know... do you think he's just afraid of disappointing us? I mean, we're just squad-mates... but it does sometimes feel like we're family as well..."\n"Family, huh..." ｜ 「信号测试器…两组…」\n「唉，我还以为他被单独叫出去是要受什么严重的惩罚，结果只是布置了比较麻烦的任务，真是松了口气。」\n「他可害怕被你骂了，哈哈，看上去就像是害怕被『哥哥』骂的『弟弟』一样…你说，他是不是，其实怕的是我们对他失望…明明大家只是小队成员而已…但有的时候，感觉就跟『家人』一样啊…」\n「家人吗…」

- A machine created from the union between Fontaine's intricate device and special energy technologies. Based on whether it's imbued with <color=#FFE14BFF>ousia or pneuma</color> energy, the machine will operate differently in battle. When either energy is annihilated upon being <color=#FFE14BFF>attacked by its opposite</color>, an Overloaded state will be induced, causing the machine to lose energy and necessitating the use of emergency power to sustain low-end combat actions. ｜ 基于枫丹的精密装置技术与特殊的能源技术，制造出的机械。基于其外显的<color=#FFE14BFF>荒性或芒性</color>能源特征，在战斗中能采取不同的行动；而这种能量特征在被<color=#FFE14BFF>对立性质的攻击</color>湮灭后，将会因为供能过载而失能，并在之后以应急能源进行低限度的战斗行动。

- Gain a <color=#99FFFFFF>12%</color> Elemental DMG Bonus for all elements and receive the might of the Mistsplitter's Emblem. At stack levels 1/2/3, the Mistsplitter's Emblem provides a <color=#99FFFFFF>8/16/28%</color> Elemental DMG Bonus for the character's Elemental Type. The character will obtain 1 stack of Mistsplitter's Emblem in each of the following scenarios: Normal Attack deals Elemental DMG (stack lasts 5s), casting Elemental Burst (stack lasts 10s); Energy is less than 100% (stack disappears when Energy is full). Each stack's duration is calculated independently. ｜ 获得<color=#99FFFFFF>12%</color>所有元素伤害加成，并能获得「雾切之巴印」的威势。雾切之巴印：持有1/2/3层雾切之巴印时，获得<color=#99FFFFFF>8/16/28%</color>自己的元素类型的元素伤害加成。在下列情况下，角色将各获得1层雾切之巴印：普通攻击造成元素伤害时，持续5秒；施放元素爆发时，持续10秒；此外，角色元素能量低于100%时，将获得1层雾切之巴印，此雾切之巴印会在角色的元素能量充满时消失。每层雾切之巴印的持续时间独立计算。

- A model based on an empty paint bucket, inspired by the daily creative lives of Natlan's people. They say that a spent, overturned paint bucket symbolizes a journey of uninhibited expression and a story's perfect ending. What, then, could be more appropriate than placing such models by the corners of graffiti-covered walls? ｜ 以消耗殆尽的颜料桶为原型制作的模型，取材自纳塔人日常的创作生活。据说，因耗尽而倒地的颜料桶，象征着一场酣畅淋漓的表达，更代表着故事的完美收官。因此，令其在墙角边缘衬托那些已绘满涂鸦的墙壁，想来最为合适不过。

- #"Despite the Traveler's warnings, I still followed in {M#his}{F#her} footsteps to arrive at this place."\n"I can barely comprehend the sight of this huge sky-blue crystal pillar before me. I wonder how far I can press on, and what further records I shall leave behind..." ｜ #「尽管前辈警告再三，我还是跟随着{M#他}{F#她}的脚步来到了这片区域。」\n「天空般湛蓝的晶石巨柱，是我难以理解的景象…这是绝不属于大地的造物，只可能来自同它一般耀眼的天空。」\n「为了破解它的谜团，我决定通过隐秘的通道继续向深处探索…不知之后还能走多远，能否留下任何记录…」

- Back in Inazuma, Yoimiya is preparing for a romantic journey... ｜ 稻妻城的少女正在筹备一次浪漫的旅行…
- I hope your wish comes true. ｜ 祝你如愿以偿。
- It still meant a lot to her. ｜ 对她来说这意义非凡。
- *sigh* We were both Treasure Hoarders once. We decided to part ways after making a pretty sum at The Chasm. ｜ 唉，我和唐无仇以前都是盗宝团的，之前在层岩巨渊干了一票，大家决定分道扬镳。
- ...I want to release a Xiao Lantern, and... I'd like you to be there for it. ｜ …陪我放一盏霄灯吧。

- Huh. Why didn't Paimon think of that? C'mon, let's go take a look! ｜ 原来还有这个办法，我们马上去看看！
- If only there was a way we could distract the guards just for long enough. ｜ 如果有什么东西，能够暂时引开那些守卫就好了。
- *sigh* This condition is tricky. I'd better get Dr. Zakariya's help. ｜ 唉，这种病可不好治啊，看来还是得请扎卡里亚医生帮帮忙…
- Reach 20,000 Adeptal Energy in 2 realm layouts. ｜ 2个洞天形态的洞天仙力达到20000。
- It seems that some Treasure Hoarders had their eyes on her... Paimon hopes she was able to leave safely. ｜ 看起来…她好像被盗宝团盯上了，希望她已经安全离开了…
- After all, we'll just be using a toy as "Thelxie" and some ruins as the "Kingdom of Water Imps." The whole adventure will only be turned into a picture book for her son to read... ｜ 做一个玩具，把它当做「特尔克西」；找一座遗迹，说它是「水妖王国」，然后把这段历险画成绘本给病人看…
- He even convinced my mentor... Ahem, anyway, this is an opportunity for me to get the Wenutslayer Cannon back out in the open! ｜ 就连我的导师也被他说动了…咳，不过借这机会，我才能让这门「对沙虫用杀虫炮」重见天日！

- A Dendro Cluster will chase characters around once the challenge begins. When the Cluster touches a character or opponents, it will deal immense <color=#f39001>Dendro DMG</color> to them. If it touches a character, it will disappear. The size and DMG dealt by these clusters will gradually <color=#f39001>bleed away</color> and <color=#f39001>grow smaller</color>, but its <color=#f39001>speed</color> will also gradually <color=#f39001>increase</color>. ｜ 挑战开始后，将会出现追踪角色的草元素能量团。能量团在接触到角色或魔物时，会造成大量<color=#f39001>草元素伤害</color>；如果接触的对象是角色，该能量团会消失。能量团的体积与能造成的伤害会<color=#f39001>随时间流逝</color>而逐渐<color=#f39001>减小</color>，<color=#f39001>速度</color>会逐渐<color=#f39001>提升</color>。

- I have to go into town to take care of some routine gang business. You can come with me — consider it your internship. ｜ 接下来我正好要去町街处理一些荒泷派的日常事务。你可以跟我一起走一趟，就当做是「见习」吧。

### Part 180

- Mondstadt: Let the Wind Lead ｜ 蒙德·且听风吟
- And we've been living here for generations since then, haha. Fortunately, there were a few other squirrel families that got stranded on these islands as well, so we built ourselves a kingdom here. ｜ 哈哈，从那以后我们家族就世代生活在此喽。幸好还有其他几窝松鼠也被扔了过来，我们就在这里建立王国。
- We did it! Now we have two victories under our belt. ｜ 好欸，这样就有两个胜场了！
- The one about my "master" that Ms. Paimon asked, as well as my aforementioned "purpose." ｜ 由派蒙小姐提出的，关于「主人」的问题…以及刚才提到的，「我被设计出的目的」。
- Sure did! Investigating is what we do best! ...Well, okay, guess luck played a part in it too. ｜ 对啊，我们打听消息可是很厉害的！虽然…也有运气成分吧。
- Hello? May I help? ｜ 嗯？有什么需要的吗？
- Let's start with the one of middling length. ｜ 就先试试长短适中的吧。
- Do you not trust me? Hmph. I did not realize I was at the stage that even the Pale Floater thinks so little of me. ｜ 难道是信不过我？哼，没想到事到如今还会被区区白飘飘看扁。
- This single-storied home with ample floor space may be found within Aaru Village. To meet certain demands, such as the need to store certain special items, several windows have been built in (a rare sight for the desert) for the sake of ventilation. The artisans have also fitted the inner layer of these windows with iron plates to prevent these openings from becoming weak spots. So long as they are tightly shut, the windows will instead be the toughest part of this structure.\nAs the ventilation in such buildings is quite good indeed, they have also been used as restaurants or canteens for those on duty. At every meal, the fresh aromas of incense and good intertwine, refreshing the minds of those present for a time.\nNo matter how many people might be in one of these canteens at any one time, a quiet space will always be saved for the Guardian with heterochromatic eyes, for she is used to eating alone. She eats modestly and has no outsize appetite, and yet her strength is far from ordinary. Perhaps the difference here is just the efficiency with which she uses the nutrition? ｜ 可见于阿如村的建筑，面积宽敞的单层房屋。为了迎合诸如储藏特殊货品的需求，少见地设有多个窗口，以便通风换气。工匠们还在窗体内层安装了铁板，防止这些开孔成为结构弱区，只要牢牢闭锁，窗户反而是建筑上最结实的位置。\n由于空气流通较为高效，这样的房屋也曾被人们当成值勤日的餐馆。每到饭点，清新的熏香和饭菜的香气交融，总能让人们精神一振。\n无论当天餐馆中有多少人，人们都会为异色眼瞳的「守护者」留出一个安静的位置。那位少女习惯独自用餐。她的吃相矜持，食量也不大，却能施展出普通人难以想象的力量，或许是因为对食物能量的利用恰到好处？
- I have an idea! If you don't know what to do, why don't you start by helping the people around you? ｜ 我有个提案！如果不知道要做什么的话，就先从帮助身边的人开始吧！
- Energy Cost|{param3:I} ｜ 元素能量|{param3:I}
- Low/High Plunge DMG|{param9:P}/{param10:P} ｜ 低空/高空坠地冲击伤害|{param9:P}/{param10:P}
- Please wait! Are you also here for the King of Invokations Grand Prix? ｜ 前辈，请稍等一下！您也是来参加「召唤王大奖赛」的吗？
- He's clearly not alright! This guy's having that amnesia thing again! ｜ 明显不太好吧！这家伙怎么突然失忆了！
- I can't decide whether Pyro slimes taste better with salt and pepper or garlic and herbs... ｜ 火史莱姆，是椒盐…还是做成蒜香的好呢？
- Spiritbreath Thorn DMG|{param2:F1P} ｜ 灵息之刺伤害|{param2:F1P}
- Complete the Tribal Challenge: People of the Springs within the <color=#FFCC33>time limit</color> ｜ 在<color=#FFCC33>限定时间</color>内完成部族挑战·「流泉之众」
- A jade idol that houses a Wayob Manifestation.\nYou can roughly make out the form of an idol figurine. It has a greater capacity for channeling the Wayob's will and power. ｜ 大灵显化身寄宿的玉偶。\n能够隐约看到形制的玉偶雕像，能够承载更多「大灵」的意志与力量。
- You scratch our back, we scratch yours. ｜ 各取所需而已。
- If we slam them together and throw in some exaggerated sound effects, we can even recreate fight scenes! ｜ 要是让两个木板碰撞在一起，配上一些夸张的音效，还可以作为打斗的示意！
- Paimon ｜ 派蒙
- Oh, it's from Rudolf... Hmm... ｜ 是鲁道夫先生啊…给吉丽安娜小姐的礼物，唔…
- Let's hear it for the "Tanuki of the Chinju Forest." ｜ 镇守之森的狸猫？
- Stadium of the Sacred Flame Notice ｜ 「圣火竞技场」公告
- Yup, and that's a real symbol of purity! ｜ 说明我纯粹！
- You could say that. ｜ 算是吧。
- Huh!? That's totally uncalled for! ｜ 这也太过分了。
- Ah, Master of the Jinni! Y—you're here. ｜ 啊，「镇灵主人」，您、您、您来了。
- Nice! That saves us the trouble of explaining. You can start anytime — we'll write it all down! ｜ 太好了，省去了解释的麻烦呢。那你开始讲吧，我们会好好记下来的。
- You're going too fast, let us think about this a little... ｜ 你说得太快了，让我们考虑一下…
- Tikriti ｜ 提克里蒂
- Item does not exist ｜ 道具不存在
- Whopperflower. ｜ 骗骗花。
- The conches in various parts of the archipelago have been affected by the chaotic wavelengths present. This has caused them to record sounds around them. If you incline your ear to the shell opening, you might hear the words of others amidst the whispering of the tides. ｜ 群岛各处的海螺亦受到纷乱波长的扰动，意外收摄了周围的声响。将耳朵靠近壳口，或可在潮汐声中隐约听到他人的话语。
- It has been said, and it is recorded in our ancient writings, that our ancestors from Byakuyakoku relied on the meager light of the Dainichi Mikoshi in order to survive the sharpened claws of the Dragonheir of the Depths. ｜ 先前有说，我们的祖先起源于「白夜国」，仰赖着文献记载中的大日御舆的微薄光亮，在深海龙嗣的利爪下苟且生存。
- A type of potted plant that can be found in Petrichor, with simple, pure white blossoms. According to legend, these flowers are widely cultivated by the townspeople for their elegance and beauty. A certain playwright once wrote a story about these flowers. In the story, the protagonist is unexpectedly inspired by these white flowers and creates the variety of bells large and small now used all over Petrichor today.\nFor this reason, these pure white blossoms not only signify their own beauty, but also symbolize "inspiration." ｜ 可见于佩特莉可镇的盆栽，种有纯白的素净花簇。传说，这类花朵因清雅秀丽而被小镇的居民们看中并广泛栽培，某位剧作家还创作了与这种花有关的故事。故事中，主角意外地从这种白花中获得了灵感，并制作出了现今广泛使用的铃铛与大钟。\n正是因此，这类纯白色的花朵除了本身自带的美好寓意外，也成为了「灵感」的象征。
- I was right on their tail, and it should have taken only a few steps to catch up to them, yet somehow, I was never able to close that distance... ｜ 明明差几步就能追上，却始终差着这几步…
- Though our trial doesn't really have anything to do with jumping. Still, from what you've said, it sounds like they've found the strongest candidate to complete their calling. ｜ 虽然「跳远」和我们的试炼不太一样，但按照你们的描述，他们也的确是选拔出了最强者，以履行自己的使命。
- I don't know, I really don't know... I don't think I can do it. ｜ 我不知道，我真的不知道…应该不行吧，我做不到。
- ...Me? ｜ …我？
- #{SPACE}{0}s ｜ {0}秒
- And the radius of the contamination? ｜ 半径呢？
- ... ｜ ……
- Ah, you're interested in souvenirs? If you're struggling to decide, you might want to consider getting some jade. You can't go wrong with a nice jade pendant. They're an elegant addition to your look whatever your age or gender. ｜ 两位客人要买纪念品吗？如果纠结的话，不妨考虑一下本店的玉饰。玉饰典雅大方，无论男女佩戴都很好看。
- Photograph the "Flowerbeds of the Northern Elynas Foothills" ｜ 记录「厄里那斯北部山麓的花丛」
- Does anyone even call themselves a "renowned" anything? ｜ 怎么会有人自称「知名」啊？
- Climbable.\nThis surface will periodically release bursts of water, causing nearby characters to be affected by Hydro. ｜ 可攀爬。\n表面会周期性地发生水元素爆发，使范围内的角色受到水元素附着。
- Then hard left immediately, or we'll be crashing right into the fog! ｜ 然后马上向左！要不然可就得一头撞到迷雾里去了！
- In a hidden cave... ｜ 一处隐秘的山洞…
- Tainted Water Strike ｜ 浊水轻击
- I have no more questions. ｜ 没什么想问的了。
- Tell me about the Bantan Sango Detective Agency... ｜ 关于「万端珊瑚侦探社」…
- Good, very good. Meow meow meow! At this rate, the shrine will surely be restored to liveliness. ｜ 真不错，真不错，喵喵喵，照这样下去，神社一定会重新变得热闹的。
- Reply ｜ 回复
- And so, it looks like I will likely continue with my journey across the nations, learning more about this blade as I go. ｜ 所以接下来，我应该会继续四处游历，研究这把刀。

- About the theft at Shimura's... ｜ 关于失窃的「志村屋」…
- If you're looking for a food stall, I'd recommend you look for Tomoki. ｜ 所以如果你们需要一个小吃摊的话，我推荐你们去找智树看看。
- ...What, is it broken or something? Looks fine to Paimon... That's your master, right? AKA, the "Goddess of Prophecy"? ｜ 怎么了吗？没见到哪里缺了个角呀？不就是「预言女神」，你的师父嘛。
- Anyway, my Yasnapati, what do you think about Jarjar's Lightcall Resonance? ｜ 话说回来，吾之「谒颂主」，你怎么评价贾尔贾的「浮光鸣召」？

- Rawr! Rawr! ｜ 呀！呀！

- This ancient blessed altar is filled with monsters that fear pure, brute force.\nYou shall earn priceless Artifacts, if — and only if — you can pass the trial. ｜ 这座远古祝圣祭坛中，聚集着畏惧纯粹武力的魔物。\n若能通过其中的试炼，或许能获得珍贵的圣遗物。

- Where's Rene? ｜ 雷内呢？

- Oh, now that guy has a head full of grandiose plans fueled by raw ambition. I don't understand a word he says once he starts talking about his theories... Eh, but as long as he keeps our cash reserves stocked up, I'm not complaining. ｜ 哦，那个满脑子「宏大计划」的野心家。他的那些理论，我半句都听不进去啊。总之，只要后备资金管够就好啦。

- You and Paimon tell Yoimiya that meteor showers respond to people's wishes. In response, Yoimiya wants to spend some time getting herself ready for the occasion... ｜ 你和派蒙告诉宵宫流星雨会回应愿望而出现，宵宫想要为此做一些准备。

- A lovely, seated woodcarving torso that can be used to assemble an "Aranara Carving." It is painted pink and reminds people of huge flowers in full bloom.\nNot all children like running and jumping, and so it most likely is with Aranara as well. Some Aranara prefer sitting on the ground, quietly watching their friends as they frolic in the forest. ｜ 乖巧坐下的木刻躯干，可用于组装「兰那罗木刻」。以颜料涂制成粉色，让人联想起大朵盛放的花。\n并非所有小朋友都喜欢跑跑跳跳，兰那罗应该也是一样吧。一定也会有兰那罗乐于席地而坐，静静看着自己的朋友们在森林中嬉闹。
- ...Okay! ｜ …好！

- Paimon ｜ 派蒙
- That sound in my ears... Ahh, it's getting louder and louder. I... I have to go back to the waterfall. Yes, I must... return to the waterfall. ｜ 耳边的声音…唔，耳边的声音变得越来越重，我…得回到瀑布那才行，我得…回到瀑布那边。
- Eh? Oh, no, you don't have to apologize... ｜ 欸？没有，你不用道歉…
- First, I'll chop the Lizard Tail into slices... then soak it in the drink. Next, add the Slime Condensate and stir, then leave it to settle for a bit. Finally, we sprinkle the Butterfly Dust and... ｜ 首先把整条蜥蜴尾巴切片…然后浸入酒中，加入史莱姆凝液搅拌，静置，撒上蝴蝶鳞粉…
- Do you mean... ｜ 你是说…
- Hmm, I think we may have a different understanding of "carrying" someone. ｜ 好像我们对「背」这个行为的理解不太一样。
- Hurry up and hide our current "tent," and deliver the new one to me tonight no matter what it takes! ｜ 赶紧把现在的「帐篷」收好，路上的今晚也必须送到！
- I have half a mind to transform into a kitsune and hitch a ride on your shoulder... Hehehe, you'd like that, wouldn't you? ｜ 还不如变成一只狐狸，你背着我走完接下来的路…哼哼，你当真了？
- Some of the knights also chipped in to pay for our hard work. ｜ 其中有几个骑士还一起出资，给我们凑了一笔辛苦费。
- You mentioned that there were other survivors besides yourself. Where are they? Maybe they'll remember. ｜ 你刚刚提到过，家园的幸存者不只有你，那其他的家人呢？说不定它们会记得。
- Mhm, we want to go, too! We also think Callas is a really admirable person. ｜ 嗯，我们也想去，卡雷斯先生真的是一位值得尊敬的人呢。
- Someone's about to get very unlucky — wanna guess who? ｜ 有人很快就要倒霉了，猜猜是谁？
- I think I get it! ｜ 我好像也明白了！
- Opening Treasure Chest: III ｜ 打开宝箱·其三
- Yes. Five hundred years ago, a great catastrophe befell Inazuma. ｜ 嗯。五百年前，稻妻经历过一场浩大的灾难。
- Please unlock the Statue of The Seven that corresponds to the gameplay area to take part in Windtrace. ｜ 请解锁玩法区域对应的七天神像以参与「风行迷踪」
- Dear Traveler,\nThe "Chromatic Ode of Candies and Roses" event will end soon. Please remember to take part and claim your rewards in time~ ｜ 亲爱的旅行者：\n「彩糖与蔷薇的幻色颂」活动玩法即将结束，欢迎旅行者及时参与活动，获取活动奖励~
- Wine-Stained Tricorne ｜ 酒渍船帽
- Pavilion: Stargazer's Shelter ｜ 古宅凉亭-「夜观七宿」
- Of course! People are practically flocking to Sumeru City. You couldn't ask for a better opportunity to do business! ｜ 那当然。因为学院庆典，这段时间出入须弥城的人数不胜数，正是做生意的好时机！
- If we take this gig, we'll get that drink! ｜ 干活就有饮料！
- Her condition has stabilized. However, since Eleazar is a manifestation of the Withering on the human body, we can only cure it by finding a way to take care of Irminsul's own withering. ｜ 尽管她的病情已经稳定了下来，但魔鳞病这种人类身上的「死域」，也只有想办法解决世界树枯萎的问题才能根治。

- Hi... Are you looking for me? ｜ 你好…你是找我吗？
- Use Elemental Tuning to use more Elemental Skills ｜ 进行元素调和，多使用元素战技
- Hmm... how about rearranging it like last time? We only adjusted the item positions and everything immediately felt right. ｜ 唔…不如就像上次一样，我们来重新归置一下？上次也只是重新改换了一下物件的位置，别扭的感觉就消失不见了呢。
- Quest Item ｜ 任务道具
- Safety Notice ｜ 安全须知
- An item that can be used to replenish Original Resin. Once used, it will replenish 60 Original Resin.\nOnce obtained, it will <color=#FF5E41CC>automatically dissipate</color> after a period of time.\n·The expiration time will be calculated from the Monday after this item is obtained, and it will disappear seven days from then.\n·Multiple Transient Resins obtained on different weeks will have their expiration dates counted independently.\n\nPure energy that will dissipate with time. In this, it is similar to all else that is lovely in this world. But seize this opportunity and go make the world a slightly better place, as is fitting for one who dwells within the bounds of "time." ｜ 可以补充原粹树脂的道具，使用以补充60点原粹树脂。\n获取后，将会随时间<color=#FF5E41CC>自动分解消失</color>：\n·到期时间从获取后的下一个周一开始计算，由该时间点开始的七天后到期消失。\n·在不同的周获得的多个须臾树脂，到期时间分别计算。\n\n会随着时间消散的纯净能量。就此而言，与世间一切美好的事物有着共性。但紧握当下的片刻，让世界稍微变好一点，或许就是生活在「时间」的桎梏中的人们，应当拥有的美好品德吧。
- You can do it, Granny. I'm ready to go too. ｜ 加油，奶奶。我也会加油的。
- Huh? I, uh... I'm not too sure either. ｜ 欸？我…我也不清楚。
- Please hurry, then. I'm due to use them to brew up some wine. ｜ 那请你快一些吧，我还等着它们用来酿酒呢。
- Take a good look at this painting — there are some very special little darlings hidden within it, and I'd like you to find them. ｜ 仔细看一下这张画，里面藏着几个很特别的小家伙，我希望你能把她们找出来。
- Receiving a Gift: I ｜ 收到赠礼·其一
- Things are a bit clearer now, but Paimon's not sure anything we've found is very useful. Paimon guesses the best lead is that vagrant, Rocher. ｜ 这下总算清楚了一些，虽然搜到的东西不少，但是好像都没什么用…最有用的应该就是这个叫做罗谢的流浪汉了。
- I see. So all we'll need to do is to find some clues, make a note, and drop it off at the mailbox? ｜ 原来是这样。那我们准备好线索，投到信箱里就可以了？
- Blade Roller 1-Hit DMG|{param10:F1P} DEF ｜ 刃轮巡猎一段伤害|{param10:F1P}防御力
- Hmm, true... Now that you mention it, most ancient murals take up a whole huge wall. This looks more like someone with a paintbrush got bored and started doodling... ｜ 嗯…印象中古代壁画都是占着一面超大的墙，这个更像谁坐在那随手画的…
- He was turned into stone... ｜ 被变成了石头…
- Many lives returned to Sarva, and the Marana's rampage through the earth began. Once the forest recovered its vitality, the Aranara hid the real Vanarana in a dream to protect themselves. ｜ 许多生命归还了沙恒，无留陀开始在地上肆虐。而丛林终于恢复生机后，兰那罗为了保护自己，将真正的桓那兰那藏在了梦中。

- Courtesy first, confrontation second? ｜ 先礼后兵？
- Mr. Kurisu, I need to know the exact time and location of the theft, and anything that stood out about the perpetrators' appearance. ｜ 久利须先生，请您将货物被劫的时间、地点以及抢劫者的特征告诉我。
- Eh? Why's this bottle's cap loose? You have to unscrew it first before installing it, come on... ｜ 咦？这瓶的盖子怎么松了…得先拧下来，再装上去才行…

- The manuscript that tells the truth of the historical record, the blueprint to all of creation, the work of the great mage themselves — it can be found at the beginning of the gear-rack, and on the very first page of the book. ｜ 讲述真正历史的手稿，创造世界的规划图，魔法师的亲笔，就藏在齿条的开头、书的第一页。

- Natural laws are mysterious and elusive, and thus do each of the adepti have their own unique methods of training.\nCloud Retainer espouses the investigative study of underlying laws. Wisdom must first be sought from external sources before insights are verified internally. One must refine oneself from the outside in, aligning inner thoughts with external realities to achieve a state of unity. The purpose of investigation is to explore the principles of all things, and thereby discover the universal truths that lie within. All that is in the world, sentient or not, embodies a set of principles — and only by researching and studying these principles can one understand the laws that all things obey. This is the way of true cultivation.\nThe fruits borne by millennia of such devotion have been great indeed, and naturally it is this wisdom that sets her apart from mortal folk. That they live such short lives seems a great pity to her, for even if it was her desire to do so, she would not have the time to teach these beings the full extent of her wisdom in its purest form. Besides, those with more limited faculties often found it difficult to comprehend such profundity, even with her guidance.\nBut after an intense bout of thinking, something occurred to her.\nThough mere mortals might have great difficulty apprehending the laws of nature through experience, she herself could invest truths into ingenious devices, and thus enlighten humankind through the medium of mechanics.\nFirstly, given that the laws of nature are profound and enigmatic, if she could dismantle them into a myriad of smaller principles and spread this knowledge through the world, perhaps this would help humans grasp them better.\nSecondly, basing production on the principles of mechanics would save an inestimable amount of manpower and resources.\nIf machines could be used to wash clothes, people would no longer have to lie there in their beds listening to the sound of clothes being laundered in the dead of night.\nAnd if people could use machines to walk, there'd no longer be such a thing as a long, arduous journey.\nIn the present day, peace prevailed throughout Liyue, and the land no longer relied on her to deliver it from drought by the blessing of a timely rain — nowadays, the people themselves could save their fields through irrigation. The fires of war were all but extinguished, and the people were content, now longing for prosperous lives.\nIn an age like this, upholding contracts and protecting the world was no longer simply a matter of slaying monsters and exorcizing demons. Creating mechanisms to improve people's lives was another equally valid way to achieve the same end.\nA mortal's life is limited, and expecting them to fully grasp the laws of nature or devote their whole lives to building an enduring legacy was simply unrealistic. But with her help... perhaps creating an earthly paradise wasn't just a pipe dream after all.\nThough the songs that rang through Jueyun Karst would never be heard again, the laughter that resounded in all corners of the city could still be preserved... That was something she could do, and something she yearned for from the bottom of her heart.\nBesides, Cloud Retainer truly is passionate about her mechanisms, to the point that she'll often forget to eat and sleep when she's working on a new one, despite how much she loves her fine cuisine.\nNo one knows when it started, but Cloud Retainer's fascination for the study of mechanisms now grips her almost to the point of obsession — something that every single one of her disciples is all too aware of... ｜ 天道玄妙，难以捉摸，仙众各有修行法门，彼此不同。\n留云借风真君以格物为途径，求道于外，印证于内，由外铄我，自心与外理合而为一。彼之格物，即探索万事万物的道理中所蕴涵的天地道心。世间一切事物，无论是否有灵识，皆有道理藏于内。研究、学习这些道理，便是理解万物所遵循的道，乃是修行正法。\n她潜心钻研千年，大有心得，境界自与常人不同。可惜凡俗生灵的生命短暂，就算她有心传授却也无法将至真至纯的道理全数教予弟子。更有资质愚钝之人，即便受她点拨也始终无法开悟。\n一番苦思冥想之后，她想出了一个办法。\n既然凡夫俗子难通过体悟感知天道，何不由自己将道理融于机巧之物中，借机关术晓谕人类。\n一者天地之理高深莫测，由自己将道理拆解成无数细琐原则，流传于世，或许更利于人类学习。\n二者使用机关术进行生产，所能省下的人力与物力，不可计数。\n如用机关濯洗衣物，又何必夜阑卧听捣衣声？\n如用机关带人行走，又何须竹杖芒鞋行万里？\n如今是承平的年代，璃月土地上也再没有靠她降下甘霖才能解救的旱灾，人类自会调水救田。战火也已几乎熄灭，此时人心思安定，渴盼富足生活。\n在这样的年代里要遵循契约，守护人间，并不只有杀生除魔一途，制作机关、改善人类的生活也不失为妙法。\n常人之生涯有限，要穷尽天地之理，造就利世功业，何其之难，若是有她襄助，桃源乐土也未必是梦想。\n虽然绝云间的歌声无法重现，但守护城镇中每一扇门后的欢笑声，这是她可以做到的，也是她内心深处的愿望。\n况且机关术之于留云实在颇具趣味，像她这样热爱美食的仙人也常为钻研新机关废寝忘食。\n不知何时起，留云借风真君酷爱钻研机关术，甚至到了痴迷的程度，这件事在弟子间已经变得人尽皆知了。
- The greater the power, the greater the danger erosion may bring about. The millennia may come and go, but even a stone may tire. ｜ 越是强大的力量，被「磨损」后带来的危险也更大。几千年岁月冲刷，哪怕是岩石…也会偶感疲惫。
